छत्र.devanagari: ग्रीष्मकाले वर्षाऋतौ च छत्रम् उपयोगाय भवति।
छत्र.english: An umbrella is useful in summer as well as rainy season.
He holds an umbrella in his hand.
I went to buy an umbrella yesterday.
Where did you place the umbrella?

सूचिका.english: Tie the torn cloth with a safety pin.
The safety pin is made of metal.

सूचिका.devanagari: मया सूचिका खोजिता परन्तु न मिला।
सूचिका.transliteration: mayā sūcikā khojitā parantu na milā.
सूचिका.english: I searched for the safety pin but did not find it.
Where is the safety pin located?
Please give me the safety pin.

स्यूत.english: The bag is lying on the back.
I buy a bag at the market.

धनकोष.devanagari: धनकोषे धनम् अस्ति। Money is in the wallet.
मैं धनकोषं टेबिल पर राखता हूँ।
धनकोष.transliteration: maiṁ dhanakōṣaṁ ṭebil par rākhta hūṁ.
धनकोष.english: I keep the wallet on the table.

कुञ्चिका.devanagari: कुञ्चिका कुत्र? Where is the key?

कुञ्चिका.english: The key is made of iron.
I saw the key fall from my hand.
Did you insert the key into the door?

हस्तघटी.english: Time is now 11:45 according to my wrist watch.
My wrist watch is very beautiful.
Yesterday I bought a new wrist watch.
How much did your wrist watch cost?

हस्तघटी.devanagari: भाई, मेरा हस्तघटी टूट गया है, क्या तुम इसे ठीक कर सकते हो?
हस्तघटी.transliteration: bhāī, merā hastghaṭī ṭūt gayā hai, kyā tum ise ṭhīk kar skte ho?
हस्तघटी.english: Brother, my wrist watch is broken, can you fix it?

उपनेत्र.english: Spectacles aid the vision of the eye.
My spectacles are blue in color.
The boy reads the book wearing spectacles.
Where did you lose your spectacles?

उपनेत्र.devanagari: भवतु, मम उपनेत्रं मे दातुम् इच्छामि।
उपनेत्र.transliteration: bhavatu, mama upanetraṁ me dātum ichhāmi.
उपनेत्र.english: Please, I wish to give you my spectacles.

शृङ्खला.english: Even an elephant is tied with a chain.
The golden chain is very beautiful.
The king wore a chain around his neck.

शृङ्खला.devanagari: भो मित्र! किं त्वं शृङ्खलां पश्यसि?
शृङ्खला.transliteration: bho mitra! kiṃ tvam śṛṅkhalāṃ paśyasi?
शृङ्खला.english: Hey friend! Do you see the chain?

आधारदण्ड.english: The old main requires the help of a walking stick.
He holds a walking stick in his hands.
The grandfather walked with a walking stick.
Do you feel the need for a walking stick?
Where did you get the walking stick?

हस्तव्यजन.english: People in villages use hand fans.
The king holds a beautiful hand fan.
The girl used the hand fan to create air.

हस्तव्यजन.devanagari: किं त्वम् एतत् हस्तव्यजनम् मया दातुम् इच्छसि?
हस्तव्यजन.transliteration: kiṁ tvam etat hastavyajanam mayā dātum ichhasi?
हस्तव्यजन.english: Do you wish to give this hand fan to me?
Hey! Where is my hand fan?

कङ्कत.english: Hairdressing is done with a comb.
My comb is made of gold.

कङ्कत.devanagari: सः कङ्कतेन शीर्षं कङ्कयित्वा प्रसन्नः अभवत्।
कङ्कत.transliteration: saḥ kańkatena śīrṣaṁ kańkayitvā prasannaḥ abhavat.
कङ्कत.english: He combed his head with the comb and became happy.

कङ्कत.devanagari: अरे! मेरी कङ्कतम् खोजितम्। भवान् दृष्टवान् किमचित्?
कङ्कत.transliteration: are! merī kańkatam khojitam. bhavān dṛṣṭavān kimachit?
कङ्कत.english: Oh! My comb is lost. Have you seen it?

धनस्यूत.english: How much money is in the wallet?
My wallet is blue in color.
He searched for the wallet in the market.
Is your wallet in your house?

धनस्यूत.devanagari: भ्रातर्! मम धनस्यूतः कुत्र अस्ति? मं सहाय्यं कुरु।
धनस्यूत.transliteration: bhrātar! mama dhanaśyūtaḥ kutra asti? mṃ sahāyyaṃ kuru.
धनस्यूत.english: Brother! Where is my wallet? Please help me.

छद्ममुख.english: He wears a face mask for fun.
In the theatrical performance, the actress wears a face mask.
Out of fear of illness, he wore a face mask.
Do you want to put on a face mask?

छद्ममुख.devanagari: अरे! अस्य छद्ममुखस्य रङ्गः कस्य भवति?
छद्ममुख.transliteration: are! asya chhadmamukhasya raṅgaḥ kasya bhavati?
छद्ममुख.english: Hey! What color is this face mask?

पादरक्षा.devanagari: पादरक्षाः अत्र स्थापयन्तु। Keep slippers here.

पादरक्षा.english: He brought the slipper to the house.

कुपिता.english: Hey, why are you becoming angry?

धन.devanagari: धनम् अस्ति वा? Do you have money?

धन.english: How much money do you want?
There is no money at home. What shall I do?

कुरूपी.devanagari: अरे, यह कुरूपं फलं मत खाद!
कुरूपी.transliteration: are, yah kurūpaṃ phalaṃ mat khād!
कुरूपी.english: Hey, don't eat that ugly fruit!

शान्ता.english: A calm woman is always happy.

शान्ता.devanagari: हे मित्र! तव मनः शान्तं वर्तते।
शान्ता.transliteration: he mitra! tava manaḥ śāntaṁ vartate.
शान्ता.english: Oh friend! Your mind remains calm.

एकाकिन्.english: The lonely girl sits at home.

एकाकिन्.devanagari: मा एकाकी भव, अहं तव सखा अस्मि।
एकाकिन्.transliteration: mā ekākinī bhava, ahaṃ tava sakhā asmi.
एकाकिन्.english: Do not be lonely, I am your friend.

दुःखिता.devanagari: न, अहं दुःखिता न अस्मि। अहं सुखिता अस्मि।
दुःखिता.transliteration: Na, aham duḥkhitā na asmi. Aham sukhitā asmi.
दुःखिता.english: No, I am not sad. I am happy.

दुःखित.devanagari: माता दुःखिता आसीत्, किन्तु अद्य सुखिता अस्ति।
दुःखित.transliteration: mātā duḥkhitā āsīt, kintu aday sukhitā asti.
दुःखित.english: Mother was sad, but today she is happy.

दुःखित.devanagari: भोः! किम् ते मित्रम् दुःखितम् आसीत्?
दुःखित.transliteration: bhoḥ! kim te mitram duḥkhitam āsīt?

सन्तुष्ट.english: I am happy, how about you?

सुन्दरी.devanagari: भो! तव सुन्दरी वेशः मे बहु रोचते।
सुन्दरी.transliteration: Bho! Tava sundarī veśaḥ me bahu rochate.
सुन्दरी.english: Hey! Your beautiful attire pleases me very much.

शान्त.english: Hello calm son, how are you?
The girl sleeps calmly at night.

एकाकिनी.english: She sits alone in the house.
They read a book alone (in the past).
Does she wander alone in the city?

एकाकिनी.devanagari: हे भगिनि! किम् त्वम् एकाकिनी दुःखिता असि?
एकाकिनी.transliteration: he bhagini! kim tvam ekākinī duḥkhitā asi?
एकाकिनी.english: Hey sister! Are you sad being alone?

सुन्दर.english: The beautiful boy goes to school.
The beautiful woman sang a song.
Hey! It is a beautiful day today.

गुरु.devanagari: कन्दुकं गुरु अस्ति। Ball is big.

गुरु.english: The elephant is a big animal.

नवीना.devanagari: लेखनी नवीना अस्ति। Pen is new.

नवीना.english: A new book is in my class.
Oh! The new school is nice.

चतुर.english: The smart man studies the scriptures.
The smart woman solved the problem.

चतुर.devanagari: भवान् चतुरः अस्ति, अतः भवान् विजेष्यति।
चतुर.transliteration: bhavan chaturah asti, atah bhavan vijesyati.
चतुर.english: You are smart, therefore you will succeed.

हास्यकरी.english: Hey! Look at his funny costume.

वर्तुल.devanagari: भोः! किम् इदं वर्तुलं वस्तु सुन्दरं न अस्ति?
वर्तुल.transliteration: bhoh! kim idam vartulam vastu sundaram na asti?
वर्तुल.english: Hey! Isn't this round object beautiful?

प्राचीन.devanagari: पुस्तकं प्राचीनम् अस्ति। Book is old.
हे मित्र! यह प्राचीनं वस्त्रं दृश्य।
प्राचीन.transliteration: he mitra! yah prāchīnam vastram drishy.
प्राचीन.english: Hey friend! Look at this old cloth.

हास्यकर.english: Everyone laughs at his funny speech.

हास्यकर.devanagari: भो! तव हास्यकरा नृत्यं मे अति रोचते।
हास्यकर.transliteration: bho! tava hāsyakarā nṛtyaṃ me ati rochte.
हास्यकर.english: Hey! Your funny dance really pleases me.

मृदु.devanagari: पुष्पं मृदु अस्ति। Flower is soft.

मृदु.english: The soft leaf moves in the wind.
Hey! Touch it with soft hands.

चतुरा.english: The smart girl understands the lesson quickly.
That smart man built a house.

चतुरा.devanagari: किम् ते चतुरी मित्रा समीपे अस्ति?
चतुरा.transliteration: kim te chaturī mitrā samīpe asti?
चतुरा.english: Do you have a smart friend nearby?

चतुरा.devanagari: हे चतुरे मित्र, किम् त्वम् मां सहायं कर्तुम् शक्नोषि?
चतुरा.transliteration: he chature mitra, kim tvam māṁ sahāyaṁ kartum śaknosi?
चतुरा.english: Hey smart friend, can you help me?

शीतला.devanagari: जलं शीतलम् अस्ति। Water is cold.
हे! यह हिम शीतला अति अस्ति।
शीतला.transliteration: he! yah him śītalā ati asti.
शीतला.english: Hey! This snow is very cold.

नवीन.devanagari: लेखनी नवीना अस्ति। Pen is new.

नवीन.english: A new book is near me.

नवीन.devanagari: भोः! नवीनः शिक्षकः आयातः। कथं मन्यसे?
नवीन.transliteration: bhoḥ! navīnaḥ śikṣakaḥ āyātaḥ. kathaṃ manyase?
नवीन.english: Hey! A new teacher has come. What do you think?

लघु.devanagari: पुस्तकं लघु अस्ति। Book is small.
हे मित्र, तव लघु: वस्त्र: सुंदर: अस्ति।
लघु.transliteration: he mitra, tav laghu: vastra: sundar: asti.
लघु.english: Hey friend, your small cloth is beautiful.

वर्तुला.english: The girl played with the round ball.

प्राचीना.devanagari: पुस्तकं प्राचीनम् अस्ति। Book is old.
हे मित्र! इदं प्राचीनं वस्त्रं पश्य।
प्राचीना.transliteration: he mitra! idaṁ prāchīnaṁ vastraṁ paśy.
प्राचीना.english: Hey friend! Look at this old cloth.

शीतल.devanagari: जलं शीतलम् अस्ति। Water is cold.

शीतल.english: Is the breeze cold in the evening?

दीर्घ.devanagari: दण्डः दीर्घः अस्ति। Stick is long.

स्वादु.devanagari: भोजनं स्वादु अस्ति। Food is delicious.
हाँ, अयं पायसः अत्यन्तं स्वादु अस्ति।
स्वादु.transliteration: hāñ, ayam pāyasah atyantam swādu asti.
स्वादु.english: Yes, this pudding is very delicious.

अलस.english: The lazy man does not do the work.

अलस.devanagari: वह अलसा बालिका कल विद्यालयं न गच्छति स्म।
अलस.transliteration: vah alasā balikā kala vidyālaṃyaṃ na gacchati sma.
अलस.english: That lazy girl did not go to school yesterday.

सङ्कीर्ण.devanagari: मार्गः सङ्कीर्णः अस्ति। The road is narrow.
भोः, यह सङ्कीर्णः पथः कदर्थम् निर्मितः?
सङ्कीर्ण.transliteration: Bho, yah saṅkīrṇaḥ pathaḥ kadartha nirmitaḥ?
सङ्कीर्ण.english: Hey, why was this narrow path built?

ह्रस्व.devanagari: लेखनी ह्रस्वा अस्ति। Pen is short.
भोः, तव ह्रस्वः दण्डः मे दातव्यः।
ह्रस्व.transliteration: bhoḥ, tava hrasvaḥ daṇḍaḥ me dātavyaḥ.
ह्रस्व.english: Hey, give me your short stick.

व्यापृत.devanagari: भवान् कार्येण व्यापृतः किम्? Are you busy with your work?

व्यापृत.english: He was busy with reading a book.
Which student is busy at school?

व्यापृत.devanagari: भवान् अपि व्यापृतः? हाँ, अहं खेलेन व्यापृतः आसम्।
व्यापृत.transliteration: bhavān api vyāpṛtaḥ? hā̃, ahaṁ kheleṁ vyāpṛtaḥ āsam.
व्यापृत.english: Are you busy too? Yes, I was busy with playing.

ह्रस्वा.devanagari: लेखनी ह्रस्वा अस्ति। Pen is short.

दीर्घा.devanagari: दण्डः दीर्घः अस्ति। Stick is long.

चतुरस्रा.english: The square table is very beautiful.
You want to create a square shape.

चतुरस्र.english: I thought about the square field.
Do you know the perimeter of the square?

शाद्वला.devanagari: क्षेत्रं शाद्वलम् अस्ति। The field is greenary.

शाद्वला.english: The garden becomes greenary during the rainy season.

शाद्वला.devanagari: अरे, यह स्थानं कति शाद्वलं अस्ति!
शाद्वला.transliteration: are, yah sthānaṁ kati śāadvalaṁ asti!
शाद्वला.english: Oh, how greenary this place is!

सङ्कीर्णा.devanagari: मार्गः सङ्कीर्णः अस्ति। The road is narrow.

सङ्कीर्णा.english: He was in the middle of a narrow path.

सङ्कीर्णा.devanagari: किम् एष द्वारः सङ्कीर्णः न अस्ति?
सङ्कीर्णा.transliteration: kim eṣa dvāraḥ saṅkīrṇaḥ na asti?

सङ्कीर्णा.english: Did you come to the narrow room?

शाद्वल.devanagari: क्षेत्रं शाद्वलम् अस्ति। The field is greenary.
हे! यह पर्वतः कति शाद्वलः सुन्दरः अस्ति।
शाद्वल.transliteration: he! yah parvataḥ kati śāvdalaḥ sundaraḥ asti.
शाद्वल.english: Hey! This mountain is so beautifully greenary.

व्यापृता.devanagari: भवान् कार्येण व्यापृतः किम्? Are you busy with your work?

व्यापृता.english: She is busy with the textbook.
We were busy with business yesterday.

व्यापृता.devanagari: क्व व्यापृताः वः? Where are you (all) busy?
अहं तु गृहकार्येण व्यापृता, मां न बाधय।
व्यापृता.transliteration: aham tu gṛha-kāryena vyāpṛtā, māṃ na bādhaya.
व्यापृता.english: I am busy with household work, do not disturb me.

वक्रा.devanagari: रज्जुः वक्रा अस्ति। The rope is crooked.

घोर.english: Oh! A terrible wind is blowing.

समीप.devanagari: गृृहस्य समीपे देवालयः अस्ति। Temple is near by the house.

समीप.english: A forest exists near the city.
Previously, I was near my brother.

वक्र.devanagari: रज्जुः वक्रा अस्ति। The rope is crooked.

वक्र.english: The river flows in a crooked way.

वक्र.devanagari: हे मित्र! पश्य, यः दण्डः वक्रः अस्ति।
वक्र.transliteration: he mitra! paśya, yaḥ daṇḍaḥ vakraḥ asti.
वक्र.english: Hey friend! Look, this stick is crooked.

कृशा.devanagari: बालकः कृशः अस्ति। Boy is thin.
भवान्, अयं नारी कृशा न अस्ति।
कृशा.transliteration: bhavān, ayaṁ nārī kṛśā na asti.
कृशा.english: Sir, this lady is not slim.

ऋजु.devanagari: मार्गः ऋजुः अस्ति। The road is straight.

ऋजु.english: The yogi always dwells on the straight path.

कृश.devanagari: बालकः कृशः अस्ति। Boy is thin.
अरे! तव पुत्रः अत्यन्तं कृशः भवितव्यः।
कृश.transliteration: are! tava putraḥ atyantaṃ kṛśaḥ bhavitavyaḥ.
कृश.english: Hey! Your son must have become very thin.

मध्य.devanagari: गृहयोः मध्ये मार्गः अस्ति। There is a pathway in the middle of two houses.

मध्य.english: The middle of the river is deep.
He was standing in the middle of the young trees.
Is the middle of the forest safe?

मध्य.devanagari: भवान् मध्यात् निर्गच्छतु। तत्र खतरा अस्ति।
मध्य.transliteration: bhavān madhyāt nirgacchatu. tatra kharā asti.
मध्य.english: Come out from the middle. There is danger there.

मध्या.devanagari: गृहयोः मध्ये मार्गः अस्ति। There is a pathway in the middle of two houses.

मध्या.english: An island exists in the middle of the river.
Friendship existed between the two of them.
Who arrived in the middle of the meal?

मध्या.devanagari: अयं पुस्तकः मध्ये सुन्दरः छायाचित्रः अस्ति।
मध्या.transliteration: ayam pustakah madhye sundaram chhāyāchitrah asti.
मध्या.english: There is a beautiful picture in the middle of this book.

घोरा.english: The terrible disease destroys his body.
A terrible battle occurred on the battlefield.
Did he hear that terrible sound?

घोरा.devanagari: हे मित्र! घोरा भयं अत्र अस्ति।
घोरा.transliteration: He mitra! Ghora bhayaṃ atra asti.
घोरा.english: Oh friend! There is terrible fear here.

स्थूल.devanagari: भीमः स्थूलः अस्ति। Bhima is fat.
अहं स्थूलः अस्मि, किन्तु सुस्वस्थः अस्मि।
स्थूल.transliteration: aham sthūlaḥ asmi, kintu susvasthaḥ asmi.
स्थूल.english: I am fat, but I am healthy.

समीपा.devanagari: गृृहस्य समीपे देवालयः अस्ति। Temple is near by the house.

समीपा.english: A garden exists near the school.
Previously, the river was near the city.
Is the building near the market?

समीपा.devanagari: हे मित्र! वनस्य समीपे मा गच्छ।
समीपा.transliteration: he mitra! vanasya samīpe mā gacch.
समीपा.english: Hey friend! Don't go near the forest.

स्थूला.devanagari: भीमः स्थूलः अस्ति। Bhima is fat.

स्थूला.english: The elephant is a bulky animal.
He was carrying a bulky book.

स्थूला.devanagari: अरे, यः स्थूलः वस्त्रः अस्ति! Hasti।
स्थूला.transliteration: Are, yaḥ sthūlaḥ vastraḥ asti! Asti.
स्थूला.english: Hey, that's a bulky cloth! Yes, it is.

गर्विता.devanagari: तस्य गर्विता पुत्री सदा क्रूरा अभवत्।
गर्विता.transliteration: tasya garvitā putrī sadā krūrā abhavat.
गर्विता.english: His arrogant daughter was always cruel.

गर्विता.devanagari: अहम् गर्विता नास्मि, किन्तु विनम्रा अस्मि।
गर्विता.transliteration: aham garvitā nāsmi, kintu vinamrā asmi.
गर्विता.english: I am not arrogant, but humble.

नीच.english: A mean person does not speak the truth.
A mean person always causes suffering.

धीरा.english: A brave woman does not fear.
O brave one! You will succeed.

धनिक.devanagari: धनिकस्य समीपे धनम् अस्ति। Rich has more wealth.

धनिक.english: The rich man lives in a house.
Was the rich man at school?
Hey rich man! Where are you going?

दुष्ट.english: The wicked man broke the house.
Oh! The wicked demon is coming.

पक्वा.english: Do you want to give me a ripe mango?

तीक्ष्णा.english: Oh friend, a sharp intellect is praiseworthy.

धनिका.devanagari: धनिकस्य समीपे धनम् अस्ति। Rich has more wealth.

धनिका.english: Do the rich people enjoy much wealth?

धनिका.devanagari: अहम् धनिकः नास्मि, किन्तु सुखी अस्मि।
धनिका.transliteration: Aham dhanikaḥ nāsmi, kintu sukhī asmi.
धनिका.english: I am not rich, but I am happy.

पक्व.english: Hey, the ripe fruits were here.

प्रभूत.english: There was abundant wealth in the house.
Is there abundant food in the market?
Abundant fruit exists on the tree.
Hey! Abundant rays come from the sun.

तीक्ष्ण.english: A sharp sword is useful in battle.

तीक्ष्ण.devanagari: तीक्ष्णाः दन्ताः तस्य बहु मजबूत आसन्।
तीक्ष्ण.transliteration: tīkṣṇāḥ dantāḥ tasya bahu majbūt āsan.
तीक्ष्ण.english: His sharp teeth were very strong.
Do you see the sharp stone?

तीक्ष्ण.devanagari: अयं तीक्ष्णः वस्तुः है। सावधानं भव!
तीक्ष्ण.transliteration: ayaṁ tīkṣṇaḥ vastuḥ hai. sāvadhānaṁ bhava!
तीक्ष्ण.english: This is a sharp object. Be careful!

दरिद्रा.devanagari: भो! तुम् दरिद्रा अस्मः। किम् अपि भोजनं देहि।
दरिद्रा.transliteration: bho! tum daridrā asmaḥ. kim api bhojanaṃ dehi.
दरिद्रा.english: Oh! We are poor. Please give us some food.

नीचा.devanagari: अहं नीचः नास्मि, किन्तु सः नीचः अस्ति।
नीचा.transliteration: ahaṁ nīchaḥ nāsmi, kintu saḥ nīchaḥ asti.
नीचा.english: I am not mean, but he is mean.

दुष्टा.devanagari: सा दुष्टा नारी गृहं नष्टं कृतवती।
दुष्टा.transliteration: sā duṣṭā nārī gṛhaṁ naṣṭaṁ kṛtavantī.
दुष्टा.english: That wicked woman destroyed the house.
Which wicked men live in the city?
The wicked girl always speaks falsehoods.

दुष्टा.devanagari: भो! किम् एषा दुष्टा राक्षसी इयं?
दुष्टा.transliteration: bho! kim eṣā duṣṭā rākṣasī iyaṁ?
दुष्टा.english: Hey! Is this wicked demoness here?

धीर.english: A steady man does not fear.

धीर.devanagari: अयं धीरः युवकः शास्त्रं पठति। हाँ, सः सदा धीरः रहति।
धीर.transliteration: Ayaṁ dhīraḥ yuvakḥ śāstraṁ paṭhati. Hāṁ, saḥ sadā dhīraḥ rahati.
धीर.english: This steady young man studies scripture. Yes, he remains steady always.

सिंह.english: The lion is coming! Fear! Fear!

मृगेन्द्र.english: Does the lion live in a house?
I saw the lion. What about you?

प्रभूता.english: Abundant wealth was in his house.
There are abundant trees in the forest.
Is there abundant food in the market?

प्रभूता.devanagari: हे मित्र! प्रभूताः फलाः वृक्षे आसन्।
प्रभूता.transliteration: he mitra! prabhūtāḥ phalāḥ vṛkṣe āsan.
प्रभूता.english: Hey friend! There were abundant fruits on the tree.

केसरिणी.devanagari: भो! केसरी आगच्छति। भयं मा कुरु।
केसरिणी.transliteration: bho! kesarī āgachati. bhayaṃ mā kuru.
केसरिणी.english: Hey! The lion is coming. Don't be afraid.

भग्न.english: Oh! My plate has become broken.

भग्ना.devanagari: यस्या हृदया भग्ना आसीत् तस्या दुःखं अभवत्।
भग्ना.transliteration: yasyā hṛdayā bhagnā āsīt tasyā duḥkhaṃ abhavat.
भग्ना.english: Her heart was broken and she suffered sorrow.

भग्ना.devanagari: भो! किं तव मणिः भग्नः नास्ति?
भग्ना.transliteration: bho! kiṃ tava maṇiḥ bhagnaḥ nāsti?
भग्ना.english: Hey! Is your jewel not broken?

सुप्ता.english: The two asleep brothers were sleeping.

सुप्ता.devanagari: हे! सुप्तः पिता। कृपया जागरणम् करु।
सुप्ता.transliteration: he! supta pita. kripya jāgaraṇam karu.
सुप्ता.english: Hey! Asleep father. Please wake up.

श्रेष्ठ.english: The best student studied the lesson.
Hey! Where is the best horse?

करिन्.english: The elephant lives in the forest.

मृग.english: The deer lives in the forest.

भल्लूकी.devanagari: भल्लुकः तत्र अस्ति। There is a bear.

भल्लूकी.english: The bear lives in the forest.

हरिणी.devanagari: हरिणः वने विहरति। Deer wanders in the forest.

हरिणी.english: Oh! The deer is coming here.

हस्तिन्.english: Hey! The elephant is coming here.

गज.english: The elephant used to live in the forest.

व्याघ्री.devanagari: व्याघ्रः अपि अस्ति। Tiger is also there.

व्याघ्री.english: The tiger lives in the forest.

व्याघ्री.devanagari: अरे! व्याघ्री तत्र अस्ति इति किं मन्यसे?
व्याघ्री.transliteration: are! vyāghri tatra asti iti kiṃ manyase?
व्याघ्री.english: Hey! Do you think the tiger is there?

हस्तिनी.english: The female elephant went to the forest.
Does the female elephant drink water?
Hey! The female elephant is coming here.

गजी.english: The elephant dwelt in the forest.

भल्लूक.devanagari: भल्लुकः तत्र अस्ति। There is a bear.

भल्लूक.english: The bear lives in the forest.
Was the bear on the mountain?
The bear is strong, isn't it?

हरिण.devanagari: हरिणः वने विहरति। Deer wanders in the forest.

हरिण.english: The deer used to live on the mountain.

हरिण.devanagari: भोः, किं तव हरिणः सुरक्षितः अस्ति?
हरिण.transliteration: bhoḥ, kiṃ tava hariṇaḥ surakṣitaḥ asti?

व्याघ्र.devanagari: व्याघ्रः अपि अस्ति। Tiger is also there.

व्याघ्र.english: The tiger lives in the forest.
The tiger is very fearsome! Isn't it fearsome?

वनमनुष्य.devanagari: वनमनुष्यः वने अस्ति। Chimpanzee is in forest.

वृक.devanagari: वृकः जनान् हन्ति। Wolf kills people.

वृक.english: The wolf lives in the forest.
Hey, the wolf has arrived! Be afraid.

करिणी.english: The elephant lives in the forest.
Hey! What is the elephant doing?

कुक्कुरी.english: Hey! Where did the dog go?

शुनक.devanagari: शुनकः अस्थिमंसं भक्षयति। Dog is eating a bone.

शुनक.english: The dog runs in the forest.

मार्जारी.devanagari: मार्जारः वृक्षात् उत्क्रान्तः।  Cat is jumping from tree.

मार्जारी.english: Does the cat live in the house?

बिडाल.devanagari: बिडालः क्षीरं पिबति। Cat drinks milk.

बिडाल.english: The cat lives in the house.

मार्जार.devanagari: मार्जारः वृक्षात् उत्क्रान्तः।  Cat is jumping from tree.

मृगी.english: The deer lives in the forest.
Was the deer in the tree?

मृगी.devanagari: अरे, मृगी आगच्छति! भयं मा कुरु।
मृगी.transliteration: are, mṛgī āgacchati! bhayaṃ mā kuru.
मृगी.english: Hey, the deer is coming! Don't be afraid.

शशी.devanagari: शशी अन्यत्र शयिता अस्ति। Rabbit (female) is resting elsewhere.

शशी.english: The rabbit came to the forest yesterday.
Hey rabbit, where are you going?

शुनी.devanagari: श्वा गृहे रमति। Dog plays at home.
अरे, शुनी कुत्र अस्ति? मां पश्य!
शुनी.transliteration: are, śunī kutra asti? mām paśya!
शुनी.english: Hey, where is the dog? Look at me!

शश.devanagari: शशी अन्यत्र शयिता अस्ति। Rabbit (female) is resting elsewhere.

शश.english: The rabbit runs in the forest.

शश.devanagari: अरे! किं त्वं तं शशं दृष्टवान् अस्सि?
शश.transliteration: are! kiṁ tvṁ taṁ śaśaṁ dṛṣṭavān assi?
शश.english: Hey! Did you see that rabbit?

कूर्म.english: Hey, the turtle is coming here!

सर्प.devanagari: सर्पी नद्यां संस्थिता अस्ति। Snake is near the river.

सर्प.english: The snake lives in the forest.
Was the snake in the house?

सर्प.devanagari: अरे! सर्पः एतत्र अस्ति। सावधानः भव।
सर्प.transliteration: are! sarpaḥ etat-ra asti. sāvadhānaḥ bhava.
सर्प.english: Hey! The snake is here. Be careful.

सर्पी.devanagari: सर्पी नद्यां संस्थिता अस्ति। Snake is near the river.

सर्पी.english: The snake lives in the forest.
The snake was in the pit.

श्वन्.devanagari: श्वा गृहे रमति। Dog plays at home.

श्वन्.english: The dog eats food in the corner.
The dog slept in the forest.

कुक्कुर.english: Hey! The dog is coming here.

बिडाला.devanagari: बिडालः क्षीरं पिबति। Cat drinks milk.

बिडाला.english: The cat lives in the house.

कूर्मी.english: The turtle dived into the water.
Hey, the turtle is coming here!

सरट.devanagari: सरटः वर्णान्तरं परिणमति। Chameleon changes the color.

सरट.english: The chameleon sits on the tree.
The chameleon bore a green color.
Whose chameleon is the resident of the forest?
Hey! Where did the chameleon go?

झष.devanagari: झषः जले वसति। Fish lives in the water.

झष.english: The fish was in the water yesterday.

मीन.devanagari: मीनाः जले जीवन्ति। Fishes live in the water.

मीन.english: When did the fish come to the water?

मकर.devanagari: मकरः नद्याम् अस्ति। Crocodile is in the river.

मकर.english: The crocodile is coming there. Be careful!

मच्छ.devanagari: मच्छः कुत्र निवसति? Where does the fish live?

मच्छ.english: The fish swims in the water.
I saw the fish. Did you?

कुम्भीर.devanagari: सागरे कुम्भीरः अस्ति। Shark is in the ocean.

कुम्भीर.english: Does the shark live in water?

अष्टभुज.devanagari: सागरेषु अधः अष्टभुजाः दृश्यन्ते। Octopuses are seen underwater.

अष्टभुज.english: The octopus is a very intelligent water creature.
Yesterday I saw an octopus in the ocean.
How many arms does an octopus have?

अष्टभुज.devanagari: भो, अष्टभुजः अत्र आगच्छति! त्वं पश्य।
अष्टभुज.transliteration: bho, aṣṭabhujaḥ atra āgacchati! tvam paśya.
अष्टभुज.english: Hey, an octopus is coming here! Look!

मण्डूक.english: The frog lives in the pond.
The frog is green, isn't it?

तिमिङ्गिल.devanagari: तिमिङ्गिलः मीनान् गिलति। Whale swallows fishes.

तिमिङ्गिल.english: The whale lives in the ocean.
Is the whale an aquatic creature?
Hey! The whale is coming here.

गृहगोधिका.devanagari: गृहगोधिका भित्तौ भवति। Lizard is in the wall.

गृहगोधिका.english: Does the lizard live in forests?

कुम्भीरी.devanagari: सागरे कुम्भीरः अस्ति। Shark is in the ocean.

कुम्भीरी.english: Does the shark live in water?

कुम्भीरी.devanagari: अरे! कुम्भीरः आगच्छति! भयं मा कुरु।
कुम्भीरी.transliteration: are! kumbhīraḥ āgachChati! bhayaṁ mā kuru.
कुम्भीरी.english: Hey! The shark is coming! Don't be afraid.

अष्टभुजा.devanagari: सागरेषु अधः अष्टभुजाः दृश्यन्ते। Octopuses are seen underwater.

अष्टभुजा.english: The octopus changes the color of the water.
Yesterday I saw an octopus near the rocks.
Have you ever seen an octopus?
Hey! What kind of creature is an octopus?

मकरी.devanagari: मकरः नद्याम् अस्ति। Crocodile is in the river.
भो! मकरीं पश्य! वह मकरी कीदृशी?
मकरी.transliteration: bho! makarīṁ paśya! vah makarī kīdṛśī?
मकरी.english: Hey! Look at the crocodile! What is that crocodile like?

कुलीर.devanagari: कुलीराः जलतटेषु भवन्ति। Crabs are seen in the water shore.

कुलीर.english: The crab lives in the pond.
How many legs does the crab have?
Hey! The crab will not hurt you.

वानरी.devanagari: वानरः नरः इव करोति। Monkey does like man.

वानरी.english: The monkey was in the tree.
Oh! How beautiful the monkey is.

नक्र.devanagari: नक्रः जले अपि भवति। Crocodile is seen in water too.

नक्र.english: Does the crocodile dwell in rivers?
Hey! The crocodile has come here.

वानर.devanagari: वानरः नरः इव करोति। Monkey does like man.

वानर.english: Does the monkey live in the forest?

वानर.devanagari: अहं वानरं पश्यामि। त्वं किं पश्यसि?
वानर.transliteration: ahaṃ vānaraṃ paśyāmi. tvaṃ kiṃ paśyasi?
वानर.english: I see a monkey. What do you see?

गण्डकी.devanagari: गण्डकः नगरे न दृश्यते। Rhinoceros is not seen in town.

गण्डकी.english: The rhinoceros lives in the forest.
When did the rhinoceros come from the forest?
The rhinoceros is a large animal.

जलाश्व.devanagari: जलाश्वः जले एव भवति। Hippopotamus can be seen in water.

जलाश्व.english: The hippopotamus is a very heavy animal.
The hippopotamuses sleep in the middle of the river.
Have you ever seen a hippopotamus?
Hey, I saw a hippopotamus there!

चित्ररासभ.devanagari: चित्ररासभः वेगेन धावति। Zebra runs fast.

चित्ररासभ.english: The zebra came from the forest yesterday.
Hey! The zebra is standing here.

चित्ररासभी.devanagari: चित्ररासभः वेगेन धावति। Zebra runs fast.

चित्ररासभी.english: Was the zebra afraid of the lion?
Hey, look! The zebra is moving over there.

करियाद.english: The hippopotamus is a large animal.

गण्डक.devanagari: गण्डकः नगरे न दृश्यते। Rhinoceros is not seen in town.

गण्डक.english: The rhinoceros lives in the forest.
The rhinoceros is a great animal on earth.

गण्डक.devanagari: भो! किं त्वं गण्डकं पश्यितवान् अस्ि?
गण्डक.transliteration: bho! kiṃ tvāṃ gaṇḍkaṃ paśyitavān asi?
गण्डक.english: Hey! Have you seen the rhinoceros?

कर्कट.devanagari: कर्कटाः जलतटेषु भवन्ति। Crabs are seen in the water shore.

कर्कट.english: The crab is red in color.
The crab used to live in holes.
Does the crab eat small insects for food?

कर्कट.devanagari: अरे! पश्य, एकः कर्कटः तत्र आयाति!
कर्कट.transliteration: Are! paśya, ekaḥ karkataḥ tatra āyāti!
कर्कट.english: Hey! Look, a crab is coming there!

कङ्गारु.english: The kangaroo was seen in the forest yesterday.

कङ्गारु.devanagari: अहं कङ्गारुं पश्यितुम् इच्छामि। त्वं कङ्गारुः पश्यितवान् अस्ि?
कङ्गारु.transliteration: ahaṃ kaṅgāruṃ paśyitum ichhāmi. tvaṃ kaṅgāruḥ paśyitavān asi?
कङ्गारु.english: I want to see a kangaroo. Have you seen a kangaroo?

खड्गमृग.devanagari: खड्गमृगः नगरे न दृश्यते। Rhinoceros is not seen in town.

खड्गमृग.english: The rhinoceros lives in the forest.
Hey, the rhinoceros is going there.

खड्ग.devanagari: खड्गी नगरे न दृश्यते। Rhinoceros is not seen in town.

खड्ग.english: The rhinoceros lives in the forest.
The rhinoceros was in the forest with the elephant.

महिषी.devanagari: महिषः गृहसमीपे वसति। Buffalo lives near to the house.

महिषी.english: The buffalo was grazing in the forest.

गो.devanagari: मम गृहे गौः अस्ति। There is a cow in my house.

गो.english: The cow grazes in the field.
How does the cow give milk?

वृषभ.devanagari: वृषभः कृषकार्यं करोति। Bull does the agricultural work.

वृषभ.english: The bull went to the field.

वृषभ.devanagari: अरे! वृषभः इह आगतः। तस्य नाम किम्?
वृषभ.transliteration: are! vṛṣabhः iha āgatः. tasya nāma kim?
वृषभ.english: Hey! The bull has come here. What is its name?

महिष.devanagari: महिषः गृहसमीपे वसति। Buffalo lives near to the house.

महिष.english: The buffalo works in the field.
Does the buffalo eat your food?
Hey! The buffalo is coming here.

पुङ्गव.devanagari: पुङ्गवः कृषकार्यं करोति। Bull does the agricultural work.

पुङ्गव.english: The bull went to the field.

शृगाल.english: The jackal lives in the forest.
The jackal ate food at night.

शृगाल.devanagari: अरे, शृगालः आगच्छति! भयं मा कुरु।
शृगाल.transliteration: are, śṛgālaḥ āgachhati! bhayaṃ mā kuru.
शृगाल.english: Hey, the jackal is coming! Do not be afraid.

चित्रक.devanagari: चित्रकः वने विहरति। Leopard roams in the forest.

चित्रक.english: When did the leopard come from the forest?
The leopard used to live here.

चित्रक.devanagari: भोः, किं त्वं चित्रकं दृष्टवान् असि?
चित्रक.transliteration: bhoh, kim tvam chitrakam drishtavan asi?
चित्रक.english: Hey, have you seen the leopard?

गर्दभ.devanagari: गर्दभ भारं वहति। Donkey carries load.

गर्दभ.english: The donkey walks with slow speed.
The donkey worked in the field yesterday.
How many donkeys are in the village?
Hey! What is the name of this donkey?

उष्ट्र.devanagari: मरुभूमौ उष्ट्रः भवति। Camel exists in desert.

उष्ट्र.english: The camel is a patient animal.
The camel drank water from the well.

उष्ट्री.devanagari: मरुभूमौ उष्ट्रः भवति। Camel exists in desert.

रासभ.devanagari: रासभः शब्दं करोति। Donkey makes the noise.
अहं रासभः दृष्टवान्। त्वम् अपि दृष्टवान् किम्?
रासभ.transliteration: ahaṁ rāsabhaḥ dṛṣṭavān. tvam api dṛṣṭavān kim?
रासभ.english: I saw the donkey. Did you see it too?

धेनु.devanagari: धेनोः क्षीरं लभ्यते। Milk is from cow.

धेनु.english: The cow lives in the cowshed.

शृगाली.english: The jackal lives in the forest.
The jackal ate food at night.

चित्रकी.devanagari: चित्रकः वने विहरति। Leopard roams in the forest.

चित्रकी.english: The leopard fell from the tree yesterday.
Does the leopard come to the house?

चित्रकी.devanagari: अरे! चित्रकः तत्र वर्तते इति पश्य।
चित्रकी.transliteration: are! chitrakaḥ tatra vartate iti paśya.
चित्रकी.english: Hey! Look, the leopard is there!

गर्दभी.devanagari: गर्दभ भारं वहति। Donkey carries load.

गर्दभी.english: The donkey was at the market yesterday.
Hey, where did the donkey go?

सूकर.english: The pig plays in the mud.

अजा.devanagari: अजः तृणं चरति। Goat grazes the grass.

वराह.english: The pig lives in the forest.
The pig plays in the mud.

अज.devanagari: अजः तृणं चरति। Goat grazes the grass.

अज.english: The goat fell into the well.
Hey! Where did the goat go?

अश्व.english: Was the horse in the forest?

अश्व.devanagari: अश्वः कुत्र गच्छति? सः वटवृक्षम् प्रति गच्छति।
अश्व.transliteration: aśvaḥ kutra gacchati? saḥ vaṭavṛkṣam prati gacchati.
अश्व.english: Where does the horse go? He goes toward the banyan tree.

सूकरी.english: The hog lives in the forest.
The hog was submerged in mud.
Hey! The hog is coming there.

मेष.english: The ram drank water at the well.
Was the ram in the forest?
Hey ram! Where are you going?

शल्यक.devanagari: शल्यकः अत्र अस्ति। Here is porcupine.

शल्यक.english: The porcupine lives in the forest.
What food does the porcupine eat?
Hey! The porcupine is coming. Be careful!

रासभी.devanagari: रासभः शब्दं करोति। Donkey makes the noise.

रासभी.english: The donkey lives in the house.
The donkey carried the load yesterday.
Hey! The donkey has come here.

गड्डल.devanagari: गड्डलः तृणं चरति। Goat grazes the grass.

गड्डल.english: The goat drank water from the well.
Does the goat live in the forest?
Hey! Where did the goat go?

वराही.english: The hog lives in the forest.
The hog was playing in the mud.
What food does the hog eat?

वराही.devanagari: वराही तत्र आसीत्, अथ अन्यत्र गता।
वराही.transliteration: varahī tatra āsīt, atha anyatra gatā.
वराही.english: The hog was there, but then went elsewhere.

नकुल.english: Does the mongoose live in the forest?
Hey! The mongoose is coming here.

मूषक.devanagari: बिडालात् पलायते मूषकः। Rat escapes from cat.

मूषक.english: The rat used to live in a hole.
Hey! The rat has come here.

चिक्रोडी.devanagari: चिक्रोडः रामाय साहाय्यं अकरोत्। Squirrel helped rama.

चिक्रोडी.english: The squirrel lives in the tree.
Was the squirrel in the garden?

शृङ्ग.devanagari: मृगस्य शृङ्गं सुन्दरम्। Deer's horn is beautiful.

शिशुमार.devanagari: समुद्रे शिशुमारः अस्ति। Porpoise is in sea.

शिशुमार.english: Oh! How beautiful the porpoise is!

शल्यकी.devanagari: शल्यकः अत्र अस्ति। Here is porcupine.

शल्यकी.english: The porcupine lives in the forest.

वृक्षशायिका.devanagari: वृक्षशायिका रामाय साहाय्यं अकरोत्। Squirrel helped rama.

वृक्षशायिका.english: The squirrel lives in the tree.

वृक्षशायिका.devanagari: वृक्षशायिका कुत्र गता? - सा वृक्षे गता।
वृक्षशायिका.transliteration: vṛkṣaśāyikā kutra gatā? - sā vṛkṣe gatā.
वृक्षशायिका.english: Where did the squirrel go? - It went to the tree.

पुच्छ.devanagari: पशूनां पुच्छं भवति। Animals have tail.

पुच्छ.english: Oh, how beautiful the horse's tail is!

मूषिका, मूषका.devanagari: बिडालात् पलायते मूषकः। Rat escapes from cat.

मूषिका, मूषका.english: The mouse lived in a hole.
Hey, look at the mouse! It is coming there.

शिशुमारी.devanagari: समुद्रे शिशुमारः अस्ति। Porpoise is in sea.

शिशुमारी.english: The porpoise plays in the water.
The porpoise came from the sea yesterday.
Is the porpoise an aquatic creature?

शिशुमारी.devanagari: भो! शिशुमारीं पश्य। कतना सुन्दरा अस्ति!
शिशुमारी.transliteration: bho! śiśumārīṁ paśya. katanā sundarā asti!
शिशुमारी.english: Hey! Look at the porpoise. How beautiful it is!

चिङ्गट.devanagari: चिङ्गटः सागरे भवति। Prawn is in the sea.

चिङ्गट.english: The prawn is a small aquatic creature.
The cook ate the prawn in the meal.

चिङ्गट.devanagari: हे मित्र! अयं चिङ्गटः कति रूप्यकाणां मूल्यः अस्ति?
चिङ्गट.transliteration: he mitra! ayam chiṅgaṭaḥ kati rupyakāṇām mūlyah asti?
चिङ्गट.english: Hey friend! How many rupees is this prawn worth?

मधुकोष.devanagari: मधुकोषः मधुमक्षिकया निर्मीयते। Honey comb is built by honey bee.

मधुकोष.english: The honeycomb is located in the tree.
Is the honeycomb full of honey?

मधुकोष.devanagari: भोः! यः मधुकोषः सुन्दरः अस्ति न?
मधुकोष.transliteration: bhoḥ! yaḥ madhukośaḥ sundaraḥ asti na?
मधुकोष.english: Hey! This honeycomb is beautiful, isn't it?

चिक्रोड.devanagari: चिक्रोडः रामाय साहाय्यं अकरोत्। Squirrel helped rama.

चिक्रोड.english: The squirrel lives in the tree.
Hey, look! The squirrel is running quickly.

फणा.devanagari: सर्पस्य फणां पश्य। Look at the snake's hood.
भो! तस्य सर्पस्य फणां दृष्टवान् असि किम्?
फणा.transliteration: bho! tasya serpasya phạṇāṁ dṛṣṭvān asi kim?
फणा.english: Hey! Have you seen that snake's hood?

खुर.devanagari: अश्वस्य खुरः भवति। Hoof is seen in Horse.

खुर.english: The hoof of a cow is hard.
The horse's hoof fell on the ground.

खुर.devanagari: भोः! इमस्य पशोः खुरः भग्नः अस्ति।
खुर.transliteration: bhoḥ! imasya paśoḥ khurah bhagnaḥ asti.
खुर.english: Hey! This animal's hoof is broken.

शुण्डा.devanagari: गजः शुण्डां उन्नयति। Elephant lifts his trunk.

शुण्डा.english: The elephant took water with his trunk.

शुण्डा.devanagari: भोः! शुण्डां पश्य! इयं कति नीपा अस्ति।
शुण्डा.transliteration: bhoḥ! śuṇḍāṁ paśya! iyaṁ kati nīpā asti.
शुण्डा.english: Hey! Look at the trunk! It is very flexible.

पाठीन.devanagari: पाठीनः सागरे अस्ति। Sheat fish is in the sea.

पाठीन.english: The sheat fish swims in water.
The sheat fish was in the river yesterday.
Does the sheat fish eat food?
Hey! Where is the sheat fish going?

कमठ.devanagari: कमठः मन्दं गच्छति। Tortoise goes slow.

कमठ.english: The tortoise carries a hard shell.
What food does the tortoise eat?

कच्छप.devanagari: कच्छपः जले तथा भूमौ अपि जीवितुं शक्नोति। Tortoise can live in both water and land.

कच्छप.english: The tortoise used to carry a shell.
Does the tortoise live for a long time?

कमठी.devanagari: कमठः मन्दं गच्छति। Tortoise goes slow.

सामुद्रकूर्मी.devanagari: सामुद्रकूर्मः समुद्रे भवति। Sea turtle is in sea.

सामुद्रकूर्मी.english: The sea turtle came to the seashore yesterday.
Does the sea turtle eat grass?
Hey! When does the sea turtle come here?

सामुद्रघोटिका.devanagari: सामुुद्रघोटकः सरोवरे न दृश्यते। Sea horse is not seen in lake.

सामुद्रघोटिका.english: The sea horse lives in the ocean.
I saw a sea horse in the ocean.
Is the sea horse not an aquatic creature?
Hey, what kind of creature is the sea horse?

चिङ्गटी.devanagari: चिङ्गटः सागरे भवति। Prawn is in the sea.

चिङ्गटी.english: The shrimps were cooked in the kitchen.
Do you want to eat shrimp?
There is shrimp in the meal. Is it good?

शुक्ति.devanagari: समुुद्रेषु शुक्तयः भवन्ति। Pearl oysters are seen in the ocean.

शुक्ति.english: The pearl oyster creates a pearl.
In ancient times, pearl oysters were valuable.
Is the pearl oyster useful in jewelry?

शुक्ति.devanagari: भो! यह शुक्तिः कुतः आनीता? - समुद्रतः।
शुक्ति.transliteration: bho! yah śuktiḥ kutaḥ ānītā? - samudratāḥ.
शुक्ति.english: Hey! Where was this pearl oyster brought from? - From the ocean.

जलशुनक.devanagari: जलशुनकः जले भवति। Seal is seen in the water.

जलशुनक.english: The seal lived in the ocean.
Hey! Do you see the seal?

सामुद्रघोटक.devanagari: सामुुद्रघोटकः सरोवरे न दृश्यते। Sea horse is not seen in lake.

सामुद्रघोटक.english: The sea horse lives in the ocean.
The sea horse was seen yesterday.
What does the sea horse eat?
Oh, how beautiful the sea horse is!

कच्छपी.devanagari: कच्छपः जले तथा भूमौ अपि जीवितुं शक्नोति। Tortoise can live in both water and land.

कच्छपी.english: When does the tortoise eat food?
The tortoise was sleeping in the shade of the tree.
Hey! Where did the tortoise go?

अजगर.devanagari: अजगरः अजं गिलति। Large serpent swallows goat.

अजगर.english: The large serpent lives in the forest.
The large serpent ate the mouse.
Was the large serpent in the house?
The large serpent is coming here. Go there!

नक्षत्रमत्स्य.devanagari: नक्षत्रमत्स्याः सागरे एव दृश्यन्ते। Star fishes are seen in the sea.

नक्षत्रमत्स्य.english: The starfish lived in deep water.
Does the starfish have five arms?
We saw the starfish in the ocean.

सामुद्रकूर्म.devanagari: सामुद्रकूर्मः समुद्रे भवति। Sea turtle is in sea.

सामुद्रकूर्म.english: The sea turtle came to the sea yesterday.
Where does the sea turtle live?
Hey! The sea turtle has come here.

तरक्षु.english: The hyena eats food at night.
The hyena used to live in the forest.

तरक्षु.devanagari: तरक्षुः इह आगच्छत्। हम् तम् पश्यामः।
तरक्षु.transliteration: tarakṣuḥ iha āgacchat. ham tam paśyāmaḥ.
तरक्षु.english: The hyena is coming here. Look, we see it!

जन्तु.devanagari: वने जन्तुः अस्ति। There is an animal in the forest.

गर्ज्.english: The tiger roars in the forest.
The eagle roared in the sky.
Hey! The elephant is roaring over there.

वत्स.devanagari: वत्सः धेन्वा सह वसति। Calf lives with cow.

वत्स.english: The calf runs in the field.
Hey, the calf is coming! Look.

शम्बूक.devanagari: शम्बूकः मन्दं सर्पति। Snail goes slower.

शम्बूक.english: The snail lives on a rock.
The snail came during the rain.
Hey! Where is the snail going?

तर्णक.devanagari: धेेनोः वत्सः अयम्। This is cow's calf.

तर्णक.english: The calf runs in the field.
Hey! The calf is coming here. Look!

उभयचर.devanagari: सर्पः उभयचरः। Snake is an amphibian.

उभयचर.english: The frog is an amphibian and lives in water.
When does the amphibian move on land?

स्थपति.english: Does the architect know the plan?

स्थपति.devanagari: नमस्ते स्थपतिः! भवान् कुत्र कार्यं करोति?
स्थपति.transliteration: namaste sthapatih! bhavan kutra karyam karoti?
स्थपति.english: Greetings architect! Where do you work?

वाटिका.devanagari: वाटिकायां पुष्पाणि सन्ति। There are flowers in the garden.

वाटिका.english: There were trees in your garden.
Are there fruits in the garden?

वाटिका.devanagari: आ, वाटिकायां आओ! पुष्पाः सुन्दराः सन्ति।
वाटिका.transliteration: ā, vāṭikāyāṃ āo! puṣpāḥ sundarāḥ santi.
वाटिका.english: Come, let's go to the garden! The flowers are beautiful.

रचनाकारी.english: The architect previously constructed a bridge.
Does the architect like this plan?

रचनाकार.english: The architect created a beautiful palace.
Did the architect make a plan?
Hey architect! How many houses do you design?

रक्तपा.devanagari: रक्तपा रक्तं पिबति। Leech drinks blood.

रक्तपा.english: The leech was on the human's body.

रक्तपा.devanagari: अरे, रक्तपा मे लग गया! किं करवाणि?
रक्तपा.transliteration: are, raktapā me lag gayā! kiṃ karavāṇi?
रक्तपा.english: Oh, a leech has attached to me! What should I do?

किञ्चुलक.devanagari: किञ्चुलकः सस्यपोषकः। Earth worm is good for plants.

किञ्चुलक.english: The earthworm was in the agricultural field.
Hey, the earthworm is visible there.

शम्बूका.devanagari: शम्बूकः मन्दं सर्पति। Snail goes slower.

शम्बूका.english: The snail rests on a leaf.

शम्बूका.devanagari: भो! शम्बूकां पश्य। इयं कति मन्दा!
शम्बूका.transliteration: bho! śambūkāṁ paśya. iyaṁ kati mandā!
शम्बूका.english: Hey! Look at the snail. How slow it is!

उद्यान.devanagari: उद्याने वृक्षाः सन्ति। Trees are in park.

उद्यान.english: Come, let us go to the garden.

जलबन्ध.devanagari: जलरक्षणार्थं जलबन्धः अस्ति। Dam is to save water.

जलबन्ध.english: A dam was built in the river.
Do you know the function of a dam?

देवालय.devanagari: नगरेे देवालयः अस्ति। Temple is in the town.

देवालय.english: He went to the temple and performed worship.
Do you stay at the temple?
Come, let us go to the temple.

यावनधर्ममन्दिर.devanagari: नगरेे यावनधर्ममन्दिरम् अस्ति। Masjid is in the town.

प्रासाद.devanagari: प्रासादेषु राजानः निवसन्ति। Kings live in palaces.

प्रासाद.english: The king ruled the kingdom from the palace.

पर्णकुटी.devanagari: पर्णकुटी लघुः अस्ति। The hut is smaller.

पर्णकुटी.english: The hut stands in the forest.

पर्णकुटी.devanagari: कस्य पर्णकुटी इयम् अस्ति? तव पर्णकुटी रमणीया अस्ति।
पर्णकुटी.transliteration: kasya parnakutī iyam asti? tava parnakutī ramaṇīyā asti.
पर्णकुटी.english: Whose hut is this? Your hut is beautiful.

क्रैस्तधर्ममन्दिर.devanagari: नगरेे क्रैस्तधर्ममन्दिरम् अस्ति। Church is in the town.
अरे, क्रैस्तधर्ममन्दिरम् कुत्र अस्ति? तत्र गच्छामः।
क्रैस्तधर्ममन्दिर.transliteration: are, kraisatdharma-mandiram kutra asti? tatra gacchāmaḥ.
क्रैस्तधर्ममन्दिर.english: Hey, where is the church? Let's go there.

दुर्ग.devanagari: दुर्गं महदस्ति। The fort is big.

दुर्ग.english: There are soldiers in the fort.
Hey! Let's go to the fort.

पटगृह.devanagari: पटगृहस्य निर्माणं कुर्मः। Let us build tent.

पटगृह.english: Are you the owner of the tent?
Hey! Bring the tent for me.

गृह.devanagari: मम गृहं तत्र अस्ति। My house is there.

गृह.english: The boy goes to the house.

हर्म्य.devanagari: नगरेषु हर्म्येषु निवसन्ति जनाः। In towns, people live in apartments.
भोः! तत् हर्म्यम् कदा निर्मितम् भविष्यति?
हर्म्य.transliteration: bhoh! tat harmyam kada nirmitam bhavishyati?
हर्म्य.english: Hey! When will that apartment be built?

समाधि.devanagari: एषः महापुरुषस्य समाधिः अस्ति। This is the tomb of great person.

समाधि.english: The king's tomb is in the city.
The ancient one's tomb was in the Himalayas.

समाधि.devanagari: भोः, तत् समाधिः कति वर्षे निर्मितः इति जानासि किम्?
समाधि.transliteration: Bhoḥ, tat samādhiḥ kati varṣe nirmitaḥ iti jānāsi kim?
समाधि.english: Hey, do you know in how many years that tomb was built?

गृुरुद्वारा.devanagari: नगरेे गुरुद्वारा अस्ति। Guru dwara is in the town.

गृुरुद्वारा.english: Service should be done at the Guru Dwara.
There was food at the Guru Dwara yesterday.
Do you go to the Guru Dwara?
I perform devotion at the Guru Dwara.

रचयित्री.english: The architect designed a beautiful house.

रचयितृ.english: The architect built a beautiful temple.
Does the architect design the city?

रचयितृ.devanagari: नमस्ते रचयिता! भवान् कस्य भवनस्य रचयिता अस्ति?
रचयितृ.transliteration: Namaste racayitā! Bhavān kasya bhavnasya racayitā asti?
रचयितृ.english: Greetings, architect! Whose building are you the architect of?

सेतु.devanagari: नदीतरणार्थं सेतुः अस्ति। Bridge is to cross river.

सेतु.english: Hey! Let's cross over the bridge.

चित्र.devanagari: चित्रे कः अस्ति? Who is in the picture?
भवान् चित्रम् पश्यन्ति? अहम् अपि पश्यामि।
चित्र.transliteration: bhavan chitram pashyanti? aham api pashyami.
चित्र.english: Are you looking at the picture? I am also looking.

सत्य.devanagari: अहं सत्यं वदामि। I speak truth.

भोजन.english: Do you want to eat food?
The food here is very cold.

वस्त्र.devanagari: बालकः वस्त्रं धरति। Boy wears the dress.
भवान् किं वस्त्रम् पसंद करते हैं?
वस्त्र.transliteration: Bhavān kiṁ vastram pasand karte haiṁ?

प्रेमन्.devanagari: सर्वत्र प्रेम भवति। Love is everywhere.

प्रेमन्.english: In the past, love gave me happiness.

जल.english: The boy brought water from the river.

जल.devanagari: किं त्वं जलं पीत्वा तृप्तः असि?
जल.transliteration: kiṁ tvam jalaṁ pītvā tṛptah asi?
जल.english: Did you become satisfied after drinking water?
Please, would you like to give me water?

निद्रा.english: At night my sleep is deep.
I want to sleep for a long time.

आश्रय.devanagari: रात्रौ आश्रयः आवश्यकः अस्ति। In night, shelter is necessary.

आश्रय.english: In the forest, a house (shelter) does not exist.
On the mountain, an ancient shelter was (there).
Are you looking for a shelter?

आश्रय.devanagari: हे मित्र! अस्मिन् गृहे आश्रयः अस्ति।
आश्रय.transliteration: he mitra! asmin gṛhe āśrayaḥ asti.
आश्रय.english: O friend! There is shelter in this house.

सौन्दर्य.english: The beauty of the flowers delighted me.
Hey, look at the beauty of these women!

मृत्तिका.english: The potter shaped the clay with effort.
Do you want to play with clay?

मृत्तिका.devanagari: हे! मृत्तिका कुत्र अस्ति? - इह अस्ति।
मृत्तिका.transliteration: he! mṛttikā kutra asti? - iha asti.
मृत्तिका.english: Hey! Where is the clay? - It is here.

विग्रह.devanagari: देवालये विग्रहः अस्ति। Idol is in the temple.

विग्रह.english: The beautiful idol is situated in the temple.
Is the idol made of gold?

विग्रह.devanagari: भोः! अयं विग्रहः कीदृशः रमणीयः अस्ति न?
विग्रह.transliteration: bhoḥ! ayaṁ vigrahaḥ kīdṛśaḥ ramaṇīyaḥ asti na?
विग्रह.english: Hey! Isn't this idol very beautiful?

स्थापत्य.devanagari: एतत् उत्तमं स्थापत्यम्। This is very good architecture.
किं भवान् इस्य आधुनिकं स्थापत्यम् पश्यति?
स्थापत्य.transliteration: Kim bhavān isya ādhunnikam sthāpattyam pashyati?
स्थापत्य.english: Do you see this modern architecture?

योगदान.devanagari: देशाय मम योगदानम्। My contribution to the country.
अस्य परियोजनायाः सफलतायैः तव योगदानम् महत्त्वपूर्णम् आसीत्।
योगदान.transliteration: asya pariyojanāyāḥ saphaltāyaiḥ tava yogadānam mahattvapur̥ṇam āsīt.
योगदान.english: Your contribution was important for the success of this project.

योगदान.devanagari: समाजस्य विकासे किम् त्वं योगदानम् दातुम् इच्छसि?
योगदान.transliteration: samājasya vikāse kim tvam yogadānam dātum ichhasi?
योगदान.english: Do you wish to give a contribution to society's development?
My friend makes a contribution to education.
To whom have you come to give a contribution?

कुटुम्ब.devanagari: सः मम कुटुम्बः अस्ति। That is my family.

कुटुम्ब.english: My family is very dear to me.
The family was together at home.
I am a member of the family.

रचना.devanagari: एषा उत्तमा रचना। This is very good architecture.

रचना.english: The ancient architecture lasted for a long time.
What is the architecture of the building?

कोकिला.devanagari: कोकिलस्य वाणी अतिमधुरा अस्ति।Indian cuckoo's voice is very sweet.

कोकिला.english: The cuckoo sings in the forest.
Hey! Have you heard the cuckoo?

कपोती.devanagari: कपोतः जलं पिबति। Pigeon drinks water.

कपोती.english: The pigeon lives in the tree.
The pigeon was in his house.

ध्वाङ्क्ष.devanagari: ध्वाङ्क्षस्य वाणी अतिकठोरा अस्ति। The voice of crow is very rude.

ध्वाङ्क्ष.english: The crow sits on the tree.
Hey! The crow is coming. Look!

चटका.devanagari: चटकः शाखायां उपविशति। On tree's branch Sparrow sits.

काकी.devanagari: काकः श्यामः अस्ति। Crow is black.

काकी.english: The crow lives in the tree.
Does the crow fly in the sky?
Hey, where did the crow go?

चटक.devanagari: चटकः शाखायां उपविशति। On tree's branch Sparrow sits.

चटक.english: The sparrow sings, it is not silent.

कोकिल.devanagari: कोकिलस्य वाणी अतिमधुरा अस्ति।Indian cuckoo's voice is very sweet.

कोकिल.english: The cuckoo sits on the tree.
Does the cuckoo live in the forest?
Hey! Look at the cuckoo! It is singing.

परभृत.devanagari: परभृतस्य वाणी अतिमधुरा अस्ति। The Indian cuckoo's voice is very sweet.

परभृत.english: The Indian cuckoo sits on the tree.
The Indian cuckoo sang a song yesterday.
Does the Indian cuckoo live in the forest?

परभृत.devanagari: अरे! परभृतः आगतः। किं तस्य गीतं श्रोषि?
परभृत.transliteration: are! parabhṛtaḥ āgataḥ. kiṃ tasya gītaṃ śroṣi?
परभृत.english: Hey! The Indian cuckoo has come. Are you listening to its song?

काक.devanagari: काकः श्यामः अस्ति। Crow is black.

काक.english: The crow sits on the tree.
Does the crow fly in the sky?
Hey crow! Where are you going?

पारावत.devanagari: पुरासमये पारावतः पत्रं आनयति स्म । In old times, Pigeon used to bring letter.

पारावत.english: The pigeon lives on the tree.
Does the pigeon fly in the sky?
Hey! Look, the pigeon is coming.

कुक्कुट.devanagari: कुक्कुटः कुक्कुट्या सह गच्छति। A Cook goes with hen.

कुक्कुट.english: The cock crows in the morning.
Hey! Where did the cock go?

कपोत.devanagari: कपोतः जलं पिबति। Pigeon drinks water.

कपोत.english: The pigeon sits on the tree.
Hey! The pigeon is flying! Look, look!

शुकी.devanagari: शुकः रामस्य नाम जपति। Parrot chants Name of the Rama.

शुकी.english: The parrot is green in color.

शुकी.devanagari: अहं शुकं पश्यामि। किं त्वं अपि पश्यसि?
शुकी.transliteration: ahaṁ śukaṁ paśyāmi. kiṁ tvam api paśyasi?
शुकी.english: I see the parrot. Do you also see it?

शुक.devanagari: शुकः रामस्य नाम जपति। Parrot chants Name of the Rama.

शुक.english: The parrot lives in the tree.

शुक.devanagari: अरे, शुकः कहाँ गच्छति? मेरा शुकः नष्टा!
शुक.transliteration: Are, śukaḥ kahāँ gachhati? Merā śukaḥ naṣṭā!
शुक.english: Hey, where is the parrot going? My parrot is lost!

कुक्कुटी.devanagari: कुक्कुटः कुक्कुट्या सह गच्छति। A Cook goes with hen.

कुक्कुटी.english: Hey, the hen is coming here.

हंस.devanagari: हंसः सरोवरे तरति। Swan swims in lake.

हंस.english: Hey! The swan is coming. Look!

हंसी.devanagari: हंसः सरोवरे तरति। Swan swims in lake.

हंसी.english: The swans lived in the forest.

जतुका.devanagari: वृक्षे जतुका वामं लम्बते । Bat hangs on reverse in tree.
भो! किम् अनेन जतुकया भयं न भवति?
जतुका.transliteration: bho! kim anena jatukayā bhayaṁ na bhavati?
जतुका.english: Hey! Are you not afraid of this bat?

कादम्ब.devanagari: सरोवरे कादम्बः तरति। Duck swims in pond.

कादम्ब.english: The duck plays in the water.
Hey! The duck is coming. Look!

गृध्र.devanagari: गृध्रः मांसं खादति ।  Vulture eats meat.

गृध्र.english: The vulture lives in a tree.
The vulture was flying in the sky.
Hey! Look, the vulture is coming.

उष्ट्रपक्षिन्.devanagari: उष्ट्रपक्षिणः पादौ दीर्घौ स्तः । Ostrich's legs are long.

उष्ट्रपक्षिन्.english: The ostrich was seen in the forests yesterday.
Does the ostrich fly in the sky?

गृध्रा.devanagari: गृध्रः मांसं खादति ।  Vulture eats meat.

गृध्रा.english: The vulture flies in the sky.
The vulture saw the dead animal yesterday.
Does the vulture live in the forest?
Hey! The vulture is coming there.

कञ्जल.english: The maina sits on the tree.
Hey, the maina has arrived! It is near here.

श्येन.devanagari: श्येनस्य पक्षिणः नेत्रे अति सतर्के स्तः। Hawkbird's two eyes are very alert.

श्येन.english: The hawk flies in the sky.
The hawk carried away the mouse.
Was the hawk in your tree?

श्येन.devanagari: अरे, श्येनः इह आगतः! एनं पश्य!
श्येन.transliteration: are, śyenaḥ iha āgataḥ! enam paśya!
श्येन.english: Hey, the hawk has come here! Look at it!

दार्वाघाट.devanagari: दार्वाघाटः काष्ठं हन्ति। The wood-pecker hits at wood.

दार्वाघाट.english: The woodpecker lives in a tree.
Why does the woodpecker pierce the wood?

दार्वाघाट.devanagari: अहं दार्वाघाटं पश्यामि। त्वं किं पश्यसि?
दार्वाघाट.transliteration: ahaṁ dārvāghāṭaṁ paśyāmi. tvaṁ kiṁ paśyasi?
दार्वाघाट.english: I see a woodpecker. What do you see?

उलूक.devanagari: उलूकः रात्र्यां द्रष्टुं शक्नोति। Owl can see in night.

उलूक.english: The owl lives in a tree.
The owl made a harsh sound.
Does the owl sleep during the day?
Hey! The owl is coming here.

हिमेरु.devanagari: हिमेरुः आकर्षकः पक्षी अस्ति। Penguin is attractive bird.

हिमेरु.english: The penguin lived in the icy region.
Does the penguin live in the cold?
Hey! What kind of bird is the penguin?

मीनरङ्ग.devanagari: मीनरङ्गः मीनं मारयति। Kingfisher kills fish.

मीनरङ्ग.english: The kingfisher lives in a tree.
The kingfisher came out of the water.
Is the kingfisher blue in color?
Hey! The kingfisher is flying there. Look!

बक.devanagari: बकस्य वर्णः श्वेतः भवति। Indian crane's colour is white.

बक.english: The crane bathes in the water.
The crane was in the pond yesterday.
Where does the crane eat food?

बक.devanagari: अरे, बकः आगच्छति! किं त्वं तं पश्यसि?
बक.transliteration: are, bakaḥ āgacchati! kiṁ tvam taṁ paśyasi?
बक.english: Hey, the crane is coming! Do you see it?

काष्ठकूट.devanagari: काष्ठकूट: वृक्षं छेत्ति। wood pecker makes hole in tree.

काष्ठकूट.english: The woodpecker lives in the tree every day.

पक्ष.devanagari: पक्षाभ्यां पक्षी उड्डयते । With wings bird flies.

चकोर.devanagari: चकोरः चन्द्रं पश्यति। The bartavelle or Greek partridge sees moon.

चकोर.english: The bartavelle lives in the forest.

चकोर.devanagari: भो! चकोरं पश्य। What a beautiful bird!

चकोरी.devanagari: चकोरः चन्द्रं पश्यति। The bartavelle or Greek partridge sees moon.

चकोरी.english: The Greek partridge lives in the forest.
What does the Greek partridge eat?
Oh! The Greek partridge is beautiful.

नख.devanagari: नखाः हस्तयोः पादयोः च वर्तन्ते। Nails are there in both hands & feet.

नख.english: The girl played with her nails.
How many nails do you have?

नीड.devanagari: पक्षिनां गृहं नीडम् अस्ति। Birds' house is nest.

नीड.english: There is a beautiful nest in the tree.
The bird laid eggs in the nest.

नीड.devanagari: भव, नीडं पश्य! कति पक्षिणः तत्र सन्ति।
नीड.transliteration: Bhava, nīḍaṁ paśya! Kati pakṣiṇaḥ tatra santi.
नीड.english: Come, look at the nest! How many birds are there?

चातकी.english: The cuckoo lives in the forest.
The cuckoo sang a song yesterday.

चातकी.devanagari: चातकी कुत्र गच्छति? तत्र तत्र गच्छति।
चातकी.transliteration: chātakī kutra gachhati? tatra tatra gachhati.
चातकी.english: Where does the cuckoo go? It goes here and there.

चक्रवाकी.devanagari: चक्रवाकः किं पश्यति? The ruddy goose see what?

चक्रवाकी.english: The Brahmany duck plays in the water.
The Brahmany duck was in the forest.
Where does the Brahmany duck go?
Hey! The Brahmany duck is beautiful, isn't it?

बर्ह.devanagari: कृष्णस्य मन्दिरं बर्हेण अलङ्कृतम्। Krishna's temple is decorated with Peacock's

बर्ह.english: The god danced with the peacock's tail.
Is the peacock's tail not charming?

बर्ह.devanagari: बर्हं पश्य! इयं कति रङ्गाः सन्ति।
बर्ह.transliteration: barhaṃ paśya! iyaṃ kati raṅgāḥ santi.
बर्ह.english: Look at the peacock's tail! How many colors are there.

मयूरी.devanagari: मयूरः मयूर्या सह धावति। Peacock runs with peahens.

मयूरी.english: The peahen is blue in color.
The peahen sat on the tree yesterday.

मयूरी.devanagari: क्या मयूरी सुंदर नृत्य करती है?
मयूरी.transliteration: Kyā mayūrī sundar nṛty kartī hai?

मयूरी.devanagari: देखो, मयूरी वहाँ आ रही है!
मयूरी.transliteration: Dekho, mayūrī vahāñ ā rahī hai!
मयूरी.english: Look, the peahen is coming there!

चक्रवाक.devanagari: चक्रवाकः किं पश्यति? The ruddy goose see what?

चक्रवाक.english: The ruddy goose lives on the riverbank.
The ruddy goose sang a beautiful song.
Where do the ruddy geese eat food?

चक्रवाक.devanagari: भो! चक्रवाकः भयानकः न भवति इति मन्ये।
चक्रवाक.transliteration: Bho! Chakravākaḥ bhayānakaḥ na bhavati iti manye.
चक्रवाक.english: Friend! I think the ruddy goose is not frightening.

अण्ड.devanagari: पक्षी अण्डात् जायते । Bird born from eggs.
हे! अण्डं पश्य। इदं गरमं अस्ति।
अण्ड.transliteration: He! Aṇḍaṁ paśya. Idaṁ garamaṁ asti.
अण्ड.english: Hey! Look at the egg. It is hot.

पञ्जर.devanagari: गृहे पक्षिणः पञ्जरे वसन्ति। In house, birds stay in cage.

पञ्जर.english: Is this cage made of iron?

चञ्चू.devanagari: काकः चञ्च्वा खादति। Crow eats with beak.

चञ्चू.english: The parrot ate the fruit with its beak.

चञ्चू.devanagari: भोः! दृश अत्र वायसस्य चञ्चुः कीदृशी वर्तते।
चञ्चू.transliteration: bhoh! dṛśa atra vāyasasya chañchuh kīdṛśī vartate.
चञ्चू.english: Hey! Look here at how the crow's beak is.

चातक.english: The cuckoo sits on the tree.
The cuckoo sang a song yesterday.

चातक.devanagari: भो! चातकं पश्य! सुन्दरः न भवति?
चातक.transliteration: bho! chātakaṁ paśya! sundaraḥ na bhavati?
चातक.english: Hey! Look at the cuckoo! Isn't it beautiful?

मयूर.devanagari: मयूरः मयूर्या सह धावति। Peacock runs with peahens.

मयूर.english: The peacock is beautiful in blue color.
Does the peacock live in the forest?

मयूर.devanagari: मयूरः कश्य सखा अस्ति? मयूरः मेरः सखा अस्ति।
मयूर.transliteration: mayūraḥ kasya sakhā asti? mayūraḥ meraḥ sakhā asti.
मयूर.english: Whose friend is the peacock? The peacock is my friend.

खग.devanagari: खगः आकाशे डयते। Bird is flying in the sky.

खग.english: The bird sits on the tree.
The bird is beautiful, isn't it?

सारसी.devanagari: सारसः वृक्षे अस्ति। Crane is in the tree.

सारसी.english: Do you see the crane and the goose?

कुक्कुटशावक.devanagari: श्वानः कुक्कुटशावकं खादति। Dog eats chicken.

कुक्कुटशावक.english: The chicken walks in the garden.
The boy gave food to the chicken.

चाप.devanagari: चापस्य कण्ठः नीलः अस्ति। Throat of chaap bird is blue.

चाप.english: The chaap bird lives in the tree.

वान्ति.english: O doctor! When will this vomiting stop?

श्लेष्मन्.english: There is excessive phlegm in the patient's body.
The physician determined the phlegm imbalance.

श्लेष्मन्.devanagari: भोः! श्लेष्ममुक्तिके लागि किं चिकित्सा कुर्याः?
श्लेष्मन्.transliteration: Bhoḥ! Śleṣmamuktiké lāgi kiṁ chikitsā kuryāḥ?
श्लेष्मन्.english: Friend! What treatment should one do for phlegm relief?

अङ्गविकृति.devanagari: अङ्गविकृत्या पीडितः। He has got stroke.

अङ्गविकृति.english: When did he have a stroke?

अङ्गविकृति.devanagari: पिता महोदयस्य अङ्गविकृतिः भवति, तत् चिन्तनीयम्।
अङ्गविकृति.transliteration: Pitā mahodayasya aṅgavikṛtiḥ bhavati, tat chintanīyam.
अङ्गविकृति.english: Father sir is having a stroke; that is worrisome.
His stroke was evident from his drooping hand.

दर्पण.english: There is a mirror at home.
The girl used to see herself in the mirror.

क्षुर.devanagari: क्षुर: तीक्ष्णः अस्ति। The razor is sharp.

मलरोध.devanagari: सः मलरोधेन पीडितः। He is suffering from constipation.

मलरोध.english: Constipation is troublesome for the patient.

जामिता.devanagari: मम जामिता अस्ति। I am bored.

आसक्ति.devanagari: पठने मम आसक्तिः। My interest is in reading.

आसक्ति.english: The boy had interest in games.

भ्रामण.devanagari: भ्रामणेन पतितवान् बालकः। Boy fell due to giddiness.

भ्रामण.english: I have giddiness in my head.

भ्रामण.devanagari: भ्रामणेन सः खड़ी भवितुं न शक्नोति।
भ्रामण.transliteration: bhrāmaṇena saḥ khaḍī bhavituṁ na śaknoti.
भ्रामण.english: He cannot stand due to giddiness.

भ्रामण.devanagari: अरे! मे भ्रामणं अभवत्। न खड़ी भवितुं शक्नोऽस्मि।
भ्रामण.transliteration: are! me bhrāmaṇaṁ abhavat. na khaḍī bhavituṁ śaknò'smi.
भ्रामण.english: Oh! I got giddiness. I cannot stand.

क्षुरपत्र.english: The hair is shaved with a razor blade.
The barber holds the razor blade.
Who was wounded by the razor blade?
Hey! Please give me the razor blade.

फेनक.devanagari: फेनकस्य सुगन्ध: सम्यक् अस्ति। The soap's fragrance is nice.

फेनक.english: I wash my hands with soap.
Yesterday I brought soap from the market.

अतिसार.devanagari: भोजनदोषात् अतिसारः। Diarrhoea due to food poison.
भवान् को अतिसारः न अस्ति किम्?
अतिसार.transliteration: Bhavān ko atisāraḥ na asti kim?

अतिसार.devanagari: अतिसारः कदा समाप्तः भविष्यति? - वैद्यः औषधं दास्यति।
अतिसार.transliteration: Atisāraḥ kadā samāptaḥ bhaviṣyati? - Vaidyaḥ auṣadhaṁ dāsyati.
अतिसार.english: When will the diarrhea end? - The doctor will give medicine.

चित्तनाश.devanagari: चित्तनाश इव भाति। It looks like Dementia.
चित्तनाशः रोगी को पीड़ा देती है।
चित्तनाश.transliteration: chittanāśaḥ rogī ko pīḍā detī hai.
चित्तनाश.english: Dementia causes suffering to the patient.
The old man was afflicted with dementia.
Can dementia be cured by treatment?

चित्तनाश.devanagari: अयं मनुष्यः चित्तनाशे भ्रष्टः इव दृश्यते।
चित्तनाश.transliteration: ayaṃ manuṣyaḥ chittanāśe bhraṣṭaḥ iva dṛśyate.
चित्तनाश.english: This person appears lost in dementia.

दन्तकूर्च.english: I clean my teeth with a toothbrush every day.
Do you want to buy a toothbrush?

फेनकाधानिका.devanagari: फेनकाधानिका शौचगृहे आस्ति। The soap box is in bathroom.

फेनकाधानिका.english: Where did you keep the soap box?

फेनकाधानिका.devanagari: मया फेनकाधानिका क्रीता। तव किम् आवश्यकम्?
फेनकाधानिका.transliteration: mayā phenakādhānikā krītā. tava kim āvaśyakam?
फेनकाधानिका.english: I bought a soap box. Do you need one?

प्रसाधनपेटिका.devanagari: शयनगृहे प्रसाधनपेटिका अस्ति। Makeup kit is in the bedroom.

प्रसाधनपेटिका.english: My makeup kit is very beautiful.
I opened the makeup kit yesterday.
Whose makeup kit is in the house?
Oh! Where did my makeup kit go?

बद्धकोष्ठ.devanagari: सः बद्धकोष्ठेन पीडितः। He is suffering from constipation.

बद्धकोष्ठ.english: Constipation is an extremely troublesome disease.

बद्धकोष्ठ.devanagari: तस्य बद्धकोष्ठः कई दिनों से विद्यते।
बद्धकोष्ठ.transliteration: tasya baddhakoṣṭhaḥ kaī dinōṁ se vidyate.
बद्धकोष्ठ.english: He has had constipation for several days.

भ्रू.devanagari: भ्रुवौ तीक्ष्णे अस्ति। Eyebrows are sharp.

मौलि.devanagari: मौलौ केशाः सन्ति। There are hairs in the head.

मौलि.english: There is pain in the head.
The crown shines on the head.

मौलि, मौली.devanagari: मौलौ केशाः सन्ति। There are hairs in the head.

कनीनिका.english: Hey, what color is your pupil?

वदन.devanagari: वदने दन्ताः सन्ति। Teeth are in mouth.
मम वदनम् शुष्कम् अस्ति। जलम् दातुम् इच्छामि।
वदन.transliteration: mama vadnam śuṣkam asti. jalam dātum ichhāmi.
वदन.english: My mouth is dry. I want to drink water.

ललाट.devanagari: रामस्य ललाटं प्रकाशमानम् आसीत्। The forhead of Lord Ram was glowing.

ललाट.english: There is a tilak on his forehead.
There was blood on the warrior's forehead.

ललाट.devanagari: भोः, तव ललाटे स्वेदः आयातः किम्?
ललाट.transliteration: bhoh, tava lalāte svetah āyātah kim?
ललाट.english: Hey, did you get sweat on your forehead?

कर्ण.english: I had pain in my ear.
Hey! What do I hear with my ears?

मुख.devanagari: बालस्य मुखं कोमलम् अस्ति। Boy's face is soft / beautiful.

मुख.english: Let the brothers wash their faces.

मुख.devanagari: हे मित्र, तव मुखं कथं भवति?
मुख.transliteration: he mitra, tava mukhaṁ kathaṁ bhavati?
मुख.english: Hey friend, how is your face? (How are you feeling?)

कर्णपालि.english: The earlobe is adorned with gold.
The sister's earlobes were decorated with jewels.
Oh! Your earlobe is so beautiful!

घ्राणपुटक.english: The nostril perceives a pleasant smell.
Is the nostril important for breathing?

शिरस्.english: The boy's head shines in sunlight.
He experienced pain in his head.
Whose head hit during the accident?

शिरस्.devanagari: भवान् अपने शिरसि हस्तं धारयति किम्?
शिरस्.transliteration: bhavān apne śirasi hastṁ dhārayati kim?
शिरस्.english: Are you holding your hand on your head?

अक्षिगोल.english: The colour of the eyeball is white.
The eyeball is a part of the eye.

अक्षिगोल.devanagari: भवान् अक्षिगोलं देखित्वा चिकित्सकं गतवान् किम्?
अक्षिगोल.transliteration: bhavān akṣigolam dekhitva chikitsakan gatavān kim?
अक्षिगोल.english: Did you go to the doctor after examining the eyeball?

अक्षिगोल.devanagari: अक्षिगोलस्य रक्षा सर्वदा आवश्यकः इति मन्यते।
अक्षिगोल.transliteration: akṣigolasya rakṣā sarvadā āvaśyakaḥ iti manyate.
अक्षिगोल.english: The protection of the eyeball is always necessary, one thinks.

नयन.devanagari: राधायाः नयने सुन्दरे स्तः। Radha's eyes are beautiful.

नयन.english: What kind of eyes do you have?

नयन.devanagari: अरे, मेरे नयने दुःखयति! किम् करोमि?
नयन.transliteration: are, mere nayne duḥkhayati! kim karomi?
नयन.english: Oh no, my eye hurts! What should I do?

नासिका.english: Ram's nose was troubled by illness.
Does your nose smell the fragrance?

नासिका.devanagari: अरे, मम नासिका इदानीं अत्यन्तं खारा अनुभवति।
नासिका.transliteration: are, mama nāsikā idānīṃ atyantaṃ khārā anubhavati.
नासिका.english: Hey, my nose feels very dry right now.

चिबुक.english: Food was stuck to the chin of the baby.

जिह्वा.english: The tongue is in the mouth.
The boy stuck his tongue out.

हस्त.english: I bow with my two hands

मणिबन्ध.english: There is a Bangle on Rama's wrist.
Sita wore an ornament on her wrist.
Hey! I have a watch on my wrist.

दन्त.english: There are teeth also in the mouth.
Hey friend! My tooth has fallen out.

अधर.devanagari: तस्य अधरस्य समीपे कलङ्कः अस्ति। There is a mark near his lower lip.

अधर.english: The boy's lower lip is red.
Having touched his lower lip, he felt pain.
Oh, my lower lip is bleeding!

ग्रीवा.english: There was a jewel on his neck.
Oh no, my neck hurts! Why?

ओष्ठ.english: The lip on my face is beautiful.
What kind of lip do you have?

ओष्ठ.devanagari: अरे, मेरी ओष्ठः इदानीं व्यथितः अस्ति।
ओष्ठ.transliteration: Are, merī oṣṭhaḥ idānīṃ vyathitaḥ asti.
ओष्ठ.english: Hey, my lip is hurting right now.

भुज.english: She wears an armlet on her upper arm.
The soldier received a wound on his upper arm.
How long is your upper arm?

भुज.devanagari: अरे, मम भुजे पीडा वर्तते। किं करणीयम्?
भुज.transliteration: are, mama bhuje pīḍā vartate. kiṃ karaṇīyam?
भुज.english: Hey, I have pain in my upper arm. What should I do?

प्रतिबाहु.english: His forearm is covered with shirt.
The boy experienced pain in his forearms.

कूर्पर.english: The boy's elbow got hurt while playing.
The elbow was broken while flying a kite.
What will you do with your elbow?

कूर्पर.devanagari: अरे! मम कूर्परः अत्यन्तं पीडितः। किम् करणीयम्?
कूर्पर.transliteration: are! mam kūrparaḥ atyantaṃ pīḍitaḥ. kim karaṇīyam?
कूर्पर.english: Oh! My elbow is very sore. What should I do?

स्कन्ध.english: He has pain in his shoulder.
He was carrying a load on his shoulder.

अङ्गु्ष्ठ.english: The thumb is a part of the body.
The thumb is the strongest finger of the hand.
Rama picked the fruit with his thumb.
What can you do with your thumb?

अङ्गु्ष्ठ.devanagari: अङ्गुष्ठः दर्दमयः आसीत् , किन्तु अधुना सुस्थः अस्ति ।
अङ्गु्ष्ठ.transliteration: Aṅguṣṭhaḥ dardamayaḥ āsīt, kintu adhunā susthaḥ asti.
अङ्गु्ष्ठ.english: The thumb was painful, but now it is well.

बाहु.devanagari: व्यायामं कृत्वा बाहौ दृढौ कुरु इति पिता पुत्रं वदति।
बाहु.english: "Do exercise and make your arms strong" said father to the son.
The warrior released an arrow with his arms.

बाहु.devanagari: अरे! मम बाहुः अति थक्तः। किं त्वं सहायं कर्तुं शक्नोषि?
बाहु.transliteration: are! mama bāhuḥ ati thaktaḥ. kiṃ tvam sāhāyaṃ kartuṃ śaknoṣi?
बाहु.english: Hey! My arm is very tired. Can you help?

कटि.english: Through yoga practice, the waist becomes flexible।

कटि.devanagari: हे मित्र! मम कटिः दुःखितः अस्ति।
कटि.transliteration: he mitra! mama kaṭiḥ duḥkhitaḥ asti.
कटि.english: Oh friend! My waist is in pain.

उदर.devanagari: भोजनस्य पश्चात् तस्य उदरम् पूर्णम् अभवत्।
उदर.transliteration: Bhojanasya paścāt tasya udaram pūrṇam abhavat.
उदर.english: After eating, his stomach became full.

उदर.devanagari: भोजनम् खादिष्यामि, मे उदरम् क्षुधार्तम् अस्ति।
उदर.transliteration: Bhojanam khādiṣyāmi, me udaram kṣudhārtam asti.
उदर.english: I will eat food, my stomach is hungry.

अङ्घ्रि.devanagari: अङ्घ्रिवेदना अस्ति। Foot pain is there.

अङ्घ्रि.english: The foot was on the ground.

अङ्घ्रि.devanagari: अङ्घ्रिः मम शीतलः अस्ति। त्वस्य अङ्घ्रिः कीदृशः?
अङ्घ्रि.transliteration: aṅghriḥ mama śītalḥ asti. tvasya aṅghriḥ kīdṛśaḥ?
अङ्घ्रि.english: My foot is cold. How is your foot?

गुल्फ.english: She is wearing beautiful anklets on her ankles.

गुल्फ.devanagari: मेरा गुल्फः कल मुड़ गया था।
गुल्फ.transliteration: merā gulphah kal mud gayā thā.

गुल्फ.devanagari: अरे, मेरा गुल्फः बहु पीडयति। भिषजकं गच्छामि।
गुल्फ.transliteration: are, merā gulphah bahu pīḍayati. bhiṣajkam gachchāmi.
गुल्फ.english: Oh, my ankle hurts a lot. I am going to the doctor.

कटी.english: Through yoga practice, the waist becomes flexible।
He experienced pain in the waist region.
I am wearing a waist band because my waist is aching.

पाद.english: He goes to school on foot.
What wound was on your leg?

पाद.devanagari: अहं कल पादस्य पीडाया पीडिता आसम्।
पाद.transliteration: ahaṁ kala pādasya pīḍāyā pīḍitā āsam.
पाद.english: I was troubled by leg pain yesterday.
Can you play with your leg?

चरण.english: There was pain in my foot.

अङ्गुलिग्रन्थि.english: The girl knock on the door with her knuckles.
He knocked on the table with his knuckles.

ऊरु.english: The mother comforts the child by holding him on her thighs.
The runner felt pain in his thighs.

ऊरु.devanagari: अहं ऊर्वोः मांसपेशीं दृढ़ं करितुं इच्छामि।
ऊरु.transliteration: ahaṁ ūrvoh māṁsapeśīṁ dṛḍhaṁ karituṁ ichhāmi.
ऊरु.english: I want to make my thigh muscles strong.

वक्षःस्थल.english: Kaustubham (a jewel) is on Krishna's bosom.
Yogis wear a garland on their chest.
The soldier received a wound on his chest.
Do you feel pain in your chest?

वक्षःस्थल.devanagari: भोः! मम वक्षःस्थले हार सुन्दरः अस्ति न?
वक्षःस्थल.transliteration: bhoḥ! mama vakṣaḥsthale hāra sundaraḥ asti na?
वक्षःस्थल.english: Hey! Isn't the necklace on my chest beautiful?

जानु.english: The old lady has pain in her knees
The boy touches the ground with his knees.
Does your knee cause you pain?

जानु.devanagari: मम जानू दुर्बलौ स्तः, अतः मैं उपवेशनं करोमि।
जानु.transliteration: mama jānū durbālau stah, atah mam upaveśanam karomi.
जानु.english: My knees are weak, so I am sitting down.

पृष्ठ.devanagari: अहं मम पृष्ठं द्रष्टुं न शक्नोमि।

पृष्ठ.english: There was a pot on his back.
Is there pain on this person's back?

पृष्ठ.devanagari: भो मित्र! मम पृष्ठं खण्डय कृपया।
पृष्ठ.transliteration: bho mitra! mama pṛṣṭhaṁ khaṇḍaya kṛpayā.
पृष्ठ.english: Hey friend! Please scratch my back.

पार्ष्णि.english: The soldier strikes the enemy's heel.
The runner struck his heel on the ground.

पार्ष्णि.devanagari: अरे, मम पार्ष्णिः अत्यन्तं पीडयते! किं करणीयम्?
पार्ष्णि.transliteration: are, mama pārṣṇiḥ atyantaṃ pīḍayate! kiṃ karaṇīyam?
पार्ष्णि.english: Hey, my heel hurts terribly! What should I do?

अग्रजङ्घा.english: While running, his shin got injured.
There is pain in my shin.

अग्रजङ्घा.devanagari: तव अग्रजङ्घा कति दिनानि पीडयति स्म?
अग्रजङ्घा.transliteration: tava agrajañgha kati dinanani pidayati sma?
अग्रजङ्घा.english: For how many days was your shin hurting?
During play, the boy's shin was struck.

अग्रजङ्घा.devanagari: भोः, मम अग्रजङ्घे व्रणः अस्ति। किं त्वं चिकित्सकं जानसि?
अग्रजङ्घा.transliteration: bhoh, mam agrajañghe vranah asti. kim tvam chikitsaka janasi?
अग्रजङ्घा.english: Hey, I have a wound on my shin. Do you know a doctor?

ऊख.devanagari: वृद्धः पतनेन तस्य ऊखस्य क्षतिं कृतवान्।
ऊख.english: The old man hurt his buttocks due to a fall.

ऊख.devanagari: बालकः खेलते गिरित्वा अपने ऊखे पीडां अनुभवति।
ऊख.transliteration: bālakḥ khēlatē giritva apnē ūkhē pīḍāṃ anubhavati.
ऊख.english: The boy, having fallen while playing, feels pain in his buttocks.

ऊख.devanagari: तस्य ऊखः कठोर स्थानं आहत्य क्षतिग्रस्तः अभवत्।
ऊख.transliteration: tasya ūkhḥ kaṭhōr sthānṃ āhatya kṣatigrāstḥ abhavat.
ऊख.english: His buttocks struck a hard place and became injured.

ऊख.devanagari: भवान् कदा अपने ऊखस्य पीडां अनुभवति स्म?
ऊख.transliteration: bhavān kadā apnē ūkhasy pīḍāṃ anubhavati sma?
ऊख.english: When did you experience pain in your buttocks?

ऊख.devanagari: अरे! मे ऊखे महती पीडा अस्ति, किञ्चित् औषधं देहि।
ऊख.transliteration: arē! mē ūkhē mahattī pīḍā asti, kiñchit auṣadhṃ dēhi.
ऊख.english: Oh! I have great pain in my buttocks, give me some medicine.

यकृत्.english: The liver is an important organ of the body.
What function does the liver perform?

काकु.english: The under-tongue is below the teeth.

काकु.devanagari: मम काकुः पीडयते। त्वम् किं करिष्यसि?
काकु.transliteration: mama kākuḥ pīḍayate. tvam kiṁ kariṣyasi?
काकु.english: My under-tongue hurts. What will you do?

त्वच्.english: The skin became tan due to sunlight.
The skin was afflicted by disease.
Hey friend, the skin itches from the cold.

कशेरु.english: The doctor examines the patient's back-bone.
The bird does not have a back-bone.

कण्ठ.english: The garland shines around the neck.
The throat was pained by illness.

अस्थि.english: The doctor examines the bone fracture.
The snake does not eat bone.
Bone is hard, isn't it true?

चर्मन्.devanagari: चर्म शरीरस्य रक्षणं करोति। Skin protects the body.

चर्मन्.english: His skin was wounded by a wound.
Does skin burn by the sun's light?

चर्मन्.devanagari: हे मित्र, मम चर्म अत्यन्त शुष्कम् अस्ति।
चर्मन्.transliteration: he mitra, mama charmam atyantam śuṣkam asti.
चर्मन्.english: Hey friend, my skin is very dry.

पादतल.english: Massaging the sole (of the foot) brings relief.
The sole of the foot is hard.
There was a thorn on Rama's sole.
Do you have pain in the sole of your foot?
Oh, my sole is burning terribly.

करतल.english: He drinks water by taking it in his palm.
The girl fills her palm with flowers.
There was a jewel in his palm.

करतल.devanagari: किं तव करतले कोऽपि वस्तु अस्ति?
करतल.transliteration: kiṃ tava karṭale ko'pi vastu asti?
करतल.english: Is there something in your palm?
Hey! Don't drop the papaya from your palm.

कपोल.english: The child touches the mother's cheek.

कपोल.devanagari: किम् तव कपोलः दुःखित इव दिशति?
कपोल.transliteration: kim tava kapolah dukhita iva dišati?

कपोल.devanagari: भो! तव कपोले किम् हस्तं निक्षिपामि?
कपोल.transliteration: bho! tava kapole kim hastam nikšipāmi?
कपोल.english: Hey! May I place my hand on your cheek?

मांसपेशी.english: The yogi's muscles were very firm.

मांसपेशी.devanagari: त्वस्य मांसपेशी कस्य कारणात् पीडितः सन्ति?
मांसपेशी.transliteration: tvasya māṃsapeśī kasya kāraṇāt pīḍitaḥ santi?

मांसपेशी.english: Hey friend! Make your muscles strong.

अन्त्र.english: The intestines are important in the process of digestion.
The intestine is a necessary part of the human body.
Food is digested in the intestines.
When did the intestinal disease begin?
You should keep your intestinal health protected.

मस्तिष्क.english: Scientists explore the mysteries of the brain.

मस्तिष्क.devanagari: मस्तिष्कम् शरीरस्य सर्वाधिकं महत्वपूर्णं अङ्गं अस्ति।
मस्तिष्क.transliteration: mastishkam śarīrasya sarvādhikam mahattvapur‍nam angam asti.
मस्तिष्क.english: The brain is the most important organ of the body.
Rama's brain was injured in an accident.
Does the brain work for thinking?

मस्तिष्क.devanagari: अहं मस्तिष्कस्य स्वास्थ्यां रक्षितुम् इच्छामि। भवान् किं सुझावम् ददाति?
मस्तिष्क.transliteration: aham mastishkasya svāsthyām rakshitum ichchhāmi. bhavān kim suzhāvam dadāti?
मस्तिष्क.english: I want to protect the health of my brain. What suggestion do you give?

फुप्फुस.english: The function of the lungs is respiration.
When will you show your lung disease to the doctor?

फुप्फुस.devanagari: अस्य मनुष्यस्य फुप्फुसा स्वस्थौ सतः तत्र प्राणवायुः सुखेन प्रवहति।
फुप्फुस.transliteration: asya manushyasya phuphusa swasthai satah tatra pranavayu sukhen pravahati.
फुप्फुस.english: In this man whose lungs are healthy, the vital breath flows easily there.

फुप्फुस.devanagari: भोः! किम् तव फुप्फुसः पीडितः अस्ति?
फुप्फुस.transliteration: bhoh! kim tava phuphusah pidiitah asti?

श्मश्रु.devanagari: तस्य श्मश्रु पश्यतु। Lood at his beard.

श्मश्रु.english: I am shaving my beard. What about you?

अश्रु.devanagari: नेत्राभ्याम् अश्रु स्रवति। Tear drops from eyes.

अश्रु.english: From sorrow, the king's tear was shed.
A tear is a sign of separation.

दन्तपाली.devanagari: दन्तपाली दृढा अस्ति। Tooth gum is stronger.

दन्तपाली.english: When did the tooth gum become diseased?
Did you go to the dentist for your tooth gum?

लक्ष्मन्.devanagari: तस्य हस्ते लक्ष्म अस्ति। There is a mark in his hand.

लक्ष्मन्.english: A mark is visible on his face.
There was a mark on Amara's forehead.

लक्ष्मन्.devanagari: भगिनि! तव कण्ठे किं लक्ष्म नास्ति?
लक्ष्मन्.transliteration: bhagini! tava kaṇṭhe kiṃ lakṣma nāsti?
लक्ष्मन्.english: Sister! Don't you have a mark on your neck?

मुष्टी.english: He struck the door with his fist.
Do you want to fight with your fist?

खल्वाट.devanagari: खल्वाटे केशाः न भवन्ति। No hair in the bald head.

खल्वाट.english: The bald head burns in sunlight.
His bald head used to shine.
Does the bald head suffer from cold?

खल्वाट.devanagari: अहो! तव खल्वाटः कति वर्षानि पुरातनः?
खल्वाट.transliteration: aho! tava khalvāṭaḥ kati varṣāni purātanaḥ?
खल्वाट.english: Oh! For how many years has your head been bald?

कपाल.english: The skull protects the human brain.

कपाल.devanagari: किम् एषः कपालः मानवस्य वा पशोः?
कपाल.transliteration: kim eṣaḥ kapālah mānavasya vā paśoḥ?
कपाल.english: Is this skull human or animal?

कपाल.devanagari: भोः, अत्र कपालः दृश्यते। किं भयानकः नास्ति?
कपाल.transliteration: bhoḥ, atra kapālah dṛśyate. kiṁ bhayānakaḥ nāsti?
कपाल.english: Hey, a skull is visible here. Isn't it frightening?

मुष्टि.english: He hit the door with his fist.

मुष्टि.devanagari: भो! मेरा मुष्टिः देख। Behold my fist!

वेणी.devanagari: वेणी पष्पेण अलङ्कृता। Braid is decorated with flower.

वेणी.english: The girl was braiding her hair.

वेणी.devanagari: अरे, तव वेणी सुन्दरा इव दृश्यते।
वेणी.transliteration: Are, tava venī sundarā iva dṛśyate.

सीमन्त.devanagari: सीमन्ते तिलकं धर। Wear tilak in Hair line.

सीमन्त.english: What is your hair line like?

सीमन्त.devanagari: अरे, मेरे सीमन्तः आज बहुत सुन्दर दिख रहा है!
सीमन्त.transliteration: are, mere sīmantaḥ āj bahut sundar dikh rahā hai!
सीमन्त.english: Hey, my hair line looks very beautiful today!

नाभि, नाभी.devanagari: पद्मनाभस्य नाभौ पद्मम् अस्ति। Lotus is in the navel of Padmanabha.

नाभि, नाभी.english: The yogi meditated on the navel.
Is the navel in the middle of the body?

नाभि, नाभी.devanagari: भो! त्वं नाभिं स्पृष्ट्वा दर्शय मे।
नाभि, नाभी.transliteration: bho! tvaṁ nābhiṁ spṛṣṭvā darśaya me.
नाभि, नाभी.english: Hey! Touch your navel and show me.

हृदय.english: The heart is the center of life.
His heart was afflicted with sorrow.
Oh friend, the heart always walks on the path of truth.

शरीर.english: Exercise to be done for healthy body.
The body should be kept clean.

शरीर.devanagari: अहं कल शरीरम् रोगेण पीडितम् अभवम्।
शरीर.transliteration: ahaṁ kala śarīram rogeṇa pīḍitam abhavam.
शरीर.english: Yesterday my body was troubled by illness.
Friend, the care of the body is important.

मुण्डितशिर.devanagari: मुण्डितशिरः एषः। This is tansured head.

मुण्डितशिर.english: The tonsured-headed monk was in the temple.

मुण्डितशिर.devanagari: वह मुण्डितशिरः पुरुषः यज्ञे भाग लिलीयते।
मुण्डितशिर.transliteration: vah muṇḍitaśiraḥ puruṣaḥ yajñe bhāg lilīyate.
मुण्डितशिर.english: That tonsured-headed man participates in the sacrifice.
Sir, why do you wish to become tonsured-headed?

अस्थिपञ्जर.devanagari: अस्थिपञ्जरम् श्वेतं च दृढं च अस्ति।
अस्थिपञ्जर.transliteration: asthipañjaram śvetaṁ ca dṛḍhaṁ ca asti.
अस्थिपञ्जर.english: The skeleton is white and strong.
The doctor showed the skeleton to the student.
How many bones is the skeleton made of?
