अस्थिपञ्जर.devanagari: भोः! यः अस्थिपञ्जरम् स्पृश्टवान्? तत् खतरनकम्।
अस्थिपञ्जर.transliteration: bhoḥ! yaḥ asthipañjaram spṛśtvān? tat khatarankam.
अस्थिपञ्जर.english: Hey! Who touched the skeleton? That is dangerous.

वणिज्.english: The businessman goes to the market.

केश.english: What kind of hair do you have?

विक्रयिक.devanagari: विक्रयिकः आपणे अस्ति। Seller is in the shop.

विक्रयिक.english: The seller was selling fruits yesterday.

विक्रयिक.devanagari: भोः विक्रयिक! कति मूल्यं इदं फलम्?
विक्रयिक.english: Hey seller! What is the price of this fruit?

आपणिक.devanagari: आपणिकः आपणे अस्ति। Merchant is in shop.

आपणिक.english: O merchant, why have you come?

मूर्ति.devanagari: एषा मूर्तिः अस्ति। This is form.

मूर्ति.english: The form of the god is beautiful.
The form was in the temple.
Who caused this form to be made?
Hey! Where did this form come from?

वज्रलेप.english: Cement is used nowadays in building construction.
Friend, where can one buy cement?

आपणिकी.devanagari: आपणिकः आपणे अस्ति। Merchant is in shop.

आपणिकी.english: The merchant earned much money yesterday.
Does the merchant woman sell fruits?
Greetings merchant! What do you sell?

सिकता.devanagari: समुद्रतटे सिकता अस्ति। Sand in the coast.

सिकता.english: The children play in the sand.
Hey! Don't let sand fall in your mouth.

विपणि.devanagari: अहं विपणिं गच्छामि। I am going to market.

विपणि.english: Who went to the market yesterday?
I hear that you are seeing the market.

विपणि.devanagari: विपणिः भवतु मनोहरः! अत्र फलानि सन्ति।
विपणि.transliteration: Vipaṇiḥ bhavatu manoharaḥ! Atra phalāni santi.
विपणि.english: Let the market be beautiful! There are fruits here.

पदचिह्न.devanagari: जन्तोः पदचिह्नानि इमानि। These are marks of animal foot.

पदचिह्न.english: A foot mark is seen on the path.
The child's foot mark was in the sand.
Do you see this foot mark?

पदचिह्न.devanagari: हे मित्र! किमेतानि पदचिह्नानि कस्य सन्ति?
पदचिह्न.transliteration: He mitra! Kimetāni padachihhnāni kasya santi?
पदचिह्न.english: Hey friend! Whose foot marks are these?

कालक.devanagari: तस्य हस्ते कालकः अस्ति। There is a mark in his hand.

कालक.english: A mole is visible on his face in the morning.

कालक.devanagari: या स्त्री अस्ति तस्याः भुजे कालकः आसीत्।
कालक.transliteration: yā strī asti tasyāː bhuje kālakः āsīt.
कालक.english: The woman who is here had a mark on her arm.
Is there a mole on your neck?

कालक.devanagari: अरे! तस्य पादे एकः नवः कालकः अभवत्।
कालक.transliteration: are! tasya pāde ekaː navaː kālakः abhavat.
कालक.english: Oh! A new mark appeared on his foot.

इष्टिका.devanagari: इष्टिकाः कुत्र लभ्यन्ते। Where are the bricks available?

इष्टिका.english: The brick is red in color.
The worker built a house with bricks.
How many bricks will you buy?
Hey! The bricks are heavy, aren't they?

तुण्ड.devanagari: एषः तुण्डः अस्ति। This is trunk.

तुण्ड.english: The bird ate food with its beak.

तुण्ड.devanagari: किं तुण्डः कठोरः वा नवः वा अस्ति?
तुण्ड.transliteration: Kiṃ tuṇḍaḥ kaṭhoraḥ vā navaḥ vā asti?
तुण्ड.english: Is the beak hard or new?

तुण्ड.devanagari: भोः, तुण्डं पश्य! इदं कति विस्तारं अस्ति।
तुण्ड.transliteration: Bhoḥ, tuṇḍaṃ paśya! Idaṃ kati vistāraṃ asti.
तुण्ड.english: Hey, look at the trunk! How wide it is.

भ्रमि.devanagari: यन्त्रभागं स्थाने दृढं स्थापयितुं भ्रमिः उपयुज्यते ।
भ्रमि.english: A screw is used to keep the machine part firmly in place.
The blacksmith made a screw with his hand tool.
A screw is necessary to fasten this wooden board.

भ्रमि.devanagari: भोः ! भ्रमिः कुत्र अस्ति ? मां दर्शय ।
भ्रमि.transliteration: bhoḥ ! bhramiḥ kutra asti ? māṁ darśay ।
भ्रमि.english: Hey! Where is the screw? Show me.

शङ्कु.english: Picture suspension is possible with a nail / pin.
The nail is firm in the wall.
We drove the nail into the stone.
Who will give me the nail?

उत्सव.devanagari: अद्य उत्सवः अस्ति। Festival is on today.

उत्सव.english: The festival was grand last year.
Hey! Let's go to the festival.

स्वेदक.devanagari: शीतलकाले स्वेदकम् आवश्यकम्। During the cold, sweater is needed.

सपीति.devanagari: सपीतिम् अनेके जनाः आगच्छन्ति। Many people are coming to the tea party.

सपीति.english: The tea party happens in the evening.
There was sweet food at the tea party.
Hey! Is the tea party happening here?

सग्धि.devanagari: सग्धेः कृते धनम् आवश्यकम्। For party money is needed.

सग्धि.english: All friends were at the party.

सग्धि.devanagari: अहं सग्धौ गच्छामि। त्वं आगच्छसि किम्?
सग्धि.transliteration: ahaṁ sagdhau gacchāmi. tvaṁ āgacchasi kim?
सग्धि.english: I am going to the party. Are you coming?

टोपिका.devanagari: अनुजा टोपिकाया: अन्वेषणं करोति। Younger sister searching her cap.

टोपिका.english: The boy wears a blue hat.

आपण.devanagari: आपणे वस्तूनि सन्ति। Items are in the shop.

आपण.english: There were ordinary goods in the shop.

आपण.devanagari: आपणे आइये! अत्र सुन्दरं वस्तु अस्ति।
आपण.transliteration: āpaṇe āiye! atra sundaram vastu asti.
आपण.english: Come to the shop! There is a beautiful item here.

शिरस्त्र.devanagari: सः शिरास्त्रम् धरति। He is wearing hat.

शिरस्त्र.english: Hey! Can you see my hat?

विपणी.devanagari: अहं विपणिं गच्छामि। I am going to market.

विपणी.english: The market is filled with many people.
Come, let us go to the market.

निचोल.devanagari: सा निचोलं क्रीणाति। She buys skirt.

निचोल.english: Sir, can you give me the skirt?

सम्भोजन.devanagari: सम्भोजने मिलामः। Let us meet in the party.

सम्भोजन.english: Are you going to the party?

सम्भोजन.devanagari: अहम् सम्भोजने आसम्। भवान् अपि आसते?
सम्भोजन.transliteration: aham sambhōjane āsam. bhavān api āsate?
सम्भोजन.english: I was at the party. Were you also there?

सहभोज.devanagari: सहभोजस्य आयोजनं क: करोति? Who is organizing dinner party?

सहभोज.english: The dinner party is tomorrow evening.

सहभोज.devanagari: गतवर्षे हमने एक सुंदर सहभोजः आयोजितं किंतु।
सहभोज.transliteration: gatavarṣe hamne ek sundar sahabhojah ayojitam kintu.
सहभोज.english: Last year we organized a beautiful dinner party.
Will you come to the dinner party?
I will eat delicious food at the dinner party.

तोरण.english: On festive days the house is decorated with buntings.
A beautiful arch decoration stands at the temple's entrance.
We made entrance decorations for the wedding.
Whose house is decorated with buntings?

तोरण.devanagari: भो! इदं तोरणम् कुत्र क्रीणीमः? — बाजारे गच्छ।
तोरण.transliteration: bho! idam torāṇam kutra krīṇīmaḥ? — bāzāre gacch.
तोरण.english: Friend! Where shall we buy this arch decoration? — Go to the market.

रङ्गवल्ली.devanagari: द्वारं रङ्गवल्ल्या अलङ्करोतु। Decorate the door with rangoli.

रङ्गवल्ली.english: The girl decorated the rangoli with colors.
Do you want to make a rangoli?

रङ्गवल्ली.devanagari: भवान्, एषा रङ्गवल्ली कति रमणीया! अहं तां बहु प्रशंसामि।
रङ्गवल्ली.transliteration: bhavān, eṣā raṅgavallī kati ramaṇīyā! ahaṃ tāṃ bahu praśaṃsāmi.
रङ्गवल्ली.english: Sir, how beautiful this rangoli is! I admire it greatly.

अन्तर्युतक.devanagari: अन्तर्युतकम् आवश्यकम्।  The vest is essential.

अन्तर्युतक.english: Where is the vest? It is here.

उत्तरीयम्.devanagari: एतद् उत्तरीयम् अस्ति। This is scarf.
भोः! मे उत्तरीयम् दातुम् इच्छसि वा?
उत्तरीयम्.transliteration: bhोḥ! me uttarīyam dātum icchasi vā?
उत्तरीयम्.english: Hey! Do you want to give me the scarf?

उत्तरीय.devanagari: उत्तरीयं धृत्वा गच्छतु। Wear the outer garment and go.

उत्तरीय.english: Where did you keep the garment?

उत्तरीय.devanagari: भो मित्र! मम उत्तरीयं दास्यसि किम्?
उत्तरीय.transliteration: bho mitra! mama uttarīyaṁ dāsyasi kim?
उत्तरीय.english: Oh friend! Will you give me my outer garment?

करांशुक.devanagari: भवतः करांशुकं शोभते। Your pyjama top is good.
अहं नूतनं करांशुकं किनितवान्। त्वं किम् पश्यसि?
करांशुक.transliteration: Aham nūtanam karāṁshukam kinitavān. Tvam kim paśyasi?
करांशुक.english: I bought a new pyjama top. What do you see?

अन्तर्वस्त्र.devanagari: अन्तर्वस्त्रम् आवश्यकम्। The underwear is necessary.

अन्तर्वस्त्र.english: Do you want to buy underwear?

उपानह.devanagari: भवतः नूतनौ उपानहौ इच्छामि। I like your two new shoes.
तव उपानहः मज्जनस्य समये खण्डितः आसीत्।
उपानह.transliteration: tava upānahaḥ majjanasya samaye khaṇḍitaḥ āsīt.
उपानह.english: Your shoe was broken at the time of bathing.

उपानह.devanagari: किं त्वम् नूतनं उपानहं क्रेतुम् इच्छसि?
उपानह.transliteration: kiṃ tvam nūtanaṃ upānahaṃ kretum ichhasi?
उपानह.english: Do you want to buy a new shoe?

अर्धोरुक.devanagari: बालकः अर्धोरुकं धरति। The boy is wearing shorts.

अर्धोरुक.english: The shorts are of blue color.

अर्धोरुक.devanagari: अरे! मेरे अर्धोरुकं बहु सुन्दरं अस्ति न?
अर्धोरुक.transliteration: Are! Mere ardhorukaṁ bahu sundara asti na?
अर्धोरुक.english: Hey! My shorts are very beautiful, aren't they?

वृष्टियुतकम्.devanagari: वृष्टि भवति, कृपया वृष्टियुतकं नयतु। It will rain. Please take raincoat.

वृष्टियुतकम्.english: I went to buy a raincoat.

वृष्टियुतकम्.devanagari: मम वृष्टियुतकं कुत्र अस्ति? किम् त्वं जानासि?
वृष्टियुतकम्.transliteration: mama vṛṣṭiyutakaṁ kutra asti? kim tvam jānāsi?
वृष्टियुतकम्.english: Where is my raincoat? Do you know?

पादांशुक.devanagari: अग्रजः पादांशुकं धरति। Eleder brother is wearing pyjama.

पादांशुक.english: The girl is wearing new pyjama bottoms.
Yesterday I washed the red pyjama bottoms.
Which pyjama bottoms do you prefer?
Hey! Where are my pyjama bottoms?

वेष्टि.devanagari: पितामहः वेष्टिं धरति। Grandfather is wearing dhoti.

वेष्टि.english: The boy is wearing a new dhoti.

वेष्टि.devanagari: मातुः वेष्टिः कहाँ अस्ति? इहाँ आहे।
वेष्टि.transliteration: Mātuः veṣṭiः kahāँ asti? Ihāँ āhe.
वेष्टि.english: Where is mother's dhoti? It's here.

ऊरुक.devanagari: सौचिकः ऊरुकम् सीव्यति।  The tailor is stiching touser.

ऊरुक.english: The boy wears a blue trouser.

ऊरुक.devanagari: किम् त्वम् श्वेतम् ऊरुकम् परिधातुम् इच्छसि?
ऊरुक.transliteration: Kim tvam śvetam ūrukam paridhātum ichhasi?
ऊरुक.english: Do you want to wear a white trouser?

धौतवस्त्र.devanagari: पुरोहितः श्वेतं धौतवस्त्रं धरति। Priest is wearing white dhoti.

धौतवस्त्र.english: The boy is wearing a blue dhoti.

शाटिका.devanagari: मातामही नूतनां शाटिकां नयति। Grandmother (mother's mother) carries new saree.

शाटिका.english: The girl wears a red saree.

शाटिका.devanagari: सीता सुन्दरां शाटिकां क्रेतुं बाजारं गता।
शाटिका.transliteration: sītā sundarāṃ śāṭikāṃ kretuṃ bāzāraṃ gatā.
शाटिका.english: Sita went to the market to buy a beautiful saree.
Which color of saree do you like?

शाटिका.devanagari: अयं शाटिका कति रुप्यकाणां मूल्यस्य अस्ति? पञ्चशतं रुप्यकाणां।
शाटिका.transliteration: ayaṃ śāṭikā kati rupyakāṇāṃ mūlyasya asti? pañchśataṃ rupyakāṇāṃ.
शाटिका.english: How much is this saree? Five hundred rupees.

प्रावारक.devanagari: तादृशः प्रावारक: मम समीपे अस्ति। I have a coat just like that.

प्रावारक.english: A coat is necessary in winter.

प्रावारक.devanagari: रमेश: नीलं प्रावारकं परिधाय गच्छति स्म।
प्रावारक.transliteration: rameś: nīlaṁ prāvārakaṁ paridhāya gacchati sma.
प्रावारक.english: Ramesh wore a blue coat and went (past).

प्रावारक.devanagari: मम प्रावारक: कहाँ अस्ति? - इहैव सोफायां अस्ति।
प्रावारक.transliteration: mama prāvārak: kahā̃ asti? - ihayva sophāyāṁ asti.
प्रावारक.english: Where is my coat? - It is right here on the sofa.

उष्णीष.devanagari: तस्य शिरसि सुन्दरं उष्णीषं दृश्यते। On his head beautiful turban is seen.

उष्णीष.english: The king wears a turban made of gold.
I obtained a blue turban yesterday.

उष्णीष.devanagari: किं त्वं इदं उष्णीषं पसन्द करोषि?
उष्णीष.transliteration: kiṁ tvaṁ idaṁ uṣṇīṣaṁ pasand karoṣi?

उष्णीष.english: Hey! Where was this turban purchased?

पादुका.devanagari: माता पादुके धरति। Mother wears slippers.

राङ्कव.devanagari: राङ्कवम् सम्यक् अस्ति। The shawl is good.

करवस्त्र.devanagari: श्याम: करवस्त्रम् विस्मरति। Shyam forgets his handkerchief.

प्रोञ्छ.devanagari: प्रोञ्छः नूतनः अस्ति। The towel is new.

प्रोञ्छ.english: The towel is on the table.
I washed the towel with water.

गलबन्ध.devanagari: सः गलबन्धं धृतवान् अस्ति। He has worn Muffler.

गलबन्ध.english: In winter, a muffler is necessary.

गलबन्ध.devanagari: भवान् गलबन्धं धारयतु। शीत अधिकः अस्ति।
गलबन्ध.transliteration: bhavān galbandhaṁ dhārayatu. śīt adhikaḥ asti.
गलबन्ध.english: Please wear a muffler. It is very cold.

अर्धनिचोल.devanagari: अनुजाया: अर्धनिचोलः सुन्दरः अस्ति। Younger sister's half skirt looks good.

अर्धनिचोल.english: The king's half skirt is red.
Did the dancer wear a half skirt?
Mayur wore a half skirt before.

अञ्चल.devanagari: शाटिकाया: अञ्चल: बहु सम्यक् अस्ति। The border of the saree is very beautiful.

अञ्चल.english: The woman's garment border is red.

अञ्चल.devanagari: अञ्चल: कति सुन्दर: भवति! हे सखि।
अञ्चल.transliteration: añchal: kati sundar: bhvati! he sakhi.
अञ्चल.english: How beautiful the border is! Dear friend.

रक्ता.devanagari: पुष्पस्य वर्णः रक्तः। Color of flower is red.

रक्ता.english: This cloth has a red color.
She was carrying a red rose.
Do you like the red color?

गलपट्ट.devanagari: अधिकारिणः ग्रीवायाम् गलपट्ट: शोभते। The neck tie suits in the officer's neck.
सः नीलं गलपट्टं परिधाय कार्यालयं गच्छति।
गलपट्ट.transliteration: saḥ nīlaṁ galapaṭṭaṁ paridhāya kāryālayaṁ gachhati.
गलपट्ट.english: He wears a blue neck tie and goes to the office.
I bought a red neck tie yesterday.
Do you wear a neck tie?
Hey! Your neck tie is very beautiful.

हस्तकोष.devanagari: शीतकाले हस्तकोषौ उपयोगिनौ स्तः। In the winter hand glows are useful.

हस्तकोष.english: My hand gloves are blue in color.

हस्तकोष.devanagari: कल मैंने हस्तकोषान् क्रेतुं बाजारे गच्छम्।
हस्तकोष.transliteration: Kala maiṁne hastakośān pretum bāzāre gaccham.
हस्तकोष.english: Yesterday I went to the market to buy hand gloves.

हस्तकोष.devanagari: त्वस्य हस्तकोषाः कीदृशाः? एते मम हस्तकोषाः लोहितवर्णाः।
हस्तकोष.transliteration: Tvasya hastakośāḥ kīdṛśāḥ? Ete mama hastakośāḥ lohitavarṇāḥ.
हस्तकोष.english: What are your hand gloves like? These are my red hand gloves.

कञ्चुक.devanagari: बालिका सुन्दरं कञ्चुकं धरति। The girl is wearing beautiful blouse.

कञ्चुक.english: The princess is wearing a red blouse.
Her blouse was made of silk.
Where do you want to buy a blouse?

कञ्चुक.devanagari: अहं नीलं कञ्चुकं पसारयामि। त्वं इदं रोचते किम्?
कञ्चुक.transliteration: Ahaṃ nīlaṃ kañcukaṃ pasārayāmi. Tvaṃ idaṃ rochate kim?
कञ्चुक.english: I am showing a blue blouse. Do you like this?

रक्त.devanagari: पुष्पस्य वर्णः रक्तः। Color of flower is red.

रक्त.english: The sky becomes red at sunset.

रक्त.devanagari: किं तव हृदयस्य रंगः रक्तः अस्ति?
रक्त.transliteration: Kiṃ tava hṛdayasya raṃgaḥ raktaḥ asti?
रक्त.english: Is the color of your heart red?

रक्त.devanagari: अहं रक्तं फलं इच्छामि। भवान् किम् इच्छति?
रक्त.transliteration: Ahaṃ raktaṃ phalaṃ ichhāmi. Bhavān kim ichhati?
रक्त.english: I want a red fruit. What do you want?

कटिबन्ध.devanagari: कटिबन्धं पिता मह्यं दत्तवान्। Father gave me belt.

कटिबन्ध.english: The dancer wears a beautiful waist belt.
The king wore a waist belt made of gold.

कटिबन्ध.transliteration: kaḥ nava kațibandhaṃ kretu ṃ icchati?
कटिबन्ध.english: Who wants to buy a new waist belt?

कटिबन्ध.devanagari: भो बहुन! कटिबन्धः कस्य अस्ति? तव कटिबन्धः रक्तवर्णः अस्ति।
कटिबन्ध.transliteration: bho bahun! kațibandhaḥ kasya asti? tava kațibandhaḥ raktavarṇaḥ asti.
कटिबन्ध.english: Hey friend! Whose waist belt is this? Your waist belt is red.

चित्रवेष्टि.devanagari: पितामहः चित्रवेष्टिं धरति। Grandfather is wearing printed dhoti.

चित्रवेष्टि.english: The boy wants to wear a printed dhoti.
He went to buy a printed dhoti yesterday.
Do you like the blue printed dhoti?

चित्रवेष्टि.devanagari: भ्रातः, मेरं चित्रवेष्टिं देह। यह अति सुन्दरः अस्ति।
चित्रवेष्टि.transliteration: Bhratah, meraṃ chitraveshṭiṃ deh. Yah ati sundarah asti.
चित्रवेष्टि.english: Brother, give me the printed dhoti. It is very beautiful.

स्नानवस्त्र.devanagari: पिता स्नानान्तरं स्नानवस्त्रं धरति। Father wears bathrobe or gown after bath.

स्नानवस्त्र.english: The mother washes the son's bathrobe.
I kept the bathrobe in the room.
Is the bathrobe blue in color?

हरित.devanagari: पर्णस्य वर्ण: हरित:। Color of leaf is green.

हरित.english: Hey, will we see something green?

पीता.devanagari: पीताम्बरस्य वर्ण: पीत:। Yellow dress color is yellow.

पीता.english: The yellow flower was in the forest.

पीता.devanagari: अयं पीत: पुष्प: सुन्दर: अस्ति इति मन्ये।
पीता.transliteration: Ayam pīta: puṣpa: sundar: asti iti manye.
पीता.english: I think this yellow flower is beautiful.

कृष्णा.devanagari: काकस्य वर्णः कृष्णः। Crow's color is black.
हे मित्र! यह पत्थर कृष्णा अस्ति न?
कृष्णा.transliteration: He mitra! Yah patthar kṛṣṇā asti na?
कृष्णा.english: Hey friend! This stone is black, isn't it?

नील.devanagari: समुद्रस्य वर्ण: नील:। Sea color is blue.

कृष्ण.devanagari: काकस्य वर्णः कृष्णः। Crow's color is black.

कृष्ण.english: The black elephant was in the forest.

कृष्ण.devanagari: भो! कृष्णं पुष्पम् मह्यम् दातुम् शक्नोषि?
कृष्ण.transliteration: bho! kṛṣṇam puṣpam mahyam dātum śaknośi?
कृष्ण.english: Hey! Can you give me the black flower?

कपिश.devanagari: भित्तेः वर्णः कपिशः। Wall color is brown.
हे मित्र! यह पत्रं कपिशं न भवेत्।
कपिश.transliteration: he mitra! iha patraṁ kapiśaṁ na bhavet.
कपिश.english: Hey friend! This leaf is not brown.

श्वेत.devanagari: हंसस्य वर्णः श्वेतः। Swan's color is white.
हे मित्र! श्वेतः पुष्पः कतिचित् सुन्दरः।
श्वेत.transliteration: he mitra! śvetaḥ puṣpaḥ katicit sundaraḥ.
श्वेत.english: Hey friend! The white flower is quite beautiful.

नीला.devanagari: समुद्रस्य वर्ण: नील:। Sea color is blue.
भवान् नील: रंग: प्रच्छन्दति? हाँ, मम प्रिय: रंग: नील: अस्ति।
नीला.transliteration: bhavān nīla: raṅga: pracchandati? hāñ, mam priya: raṅga: nīla: asti.
नीला.english: Do you like the blue color? Yes, blue is my favorite color.

पीत.devanagari: पीताम्बरस्य वर्ण: पीत:। Yellow dress color is yellow.

पीत.english: The yellow sun shines in the sky.

पीत.devanagari: हे मित्र, तव पीत: कन्दुक: कुत्र अस्ति?
पीत.transliteration: he mitra, tav pīta: kanduḥ katra asti?
पीत.english: Hey friend, where is your yellow ball?

केसरा.devanagari: ध्वजस्य वर्ण: केसर:। Flag color is saffron.

केसरा.english: Mother added saffron to the food.

केसरा.devanagari: अरे! केसरा कति मूल्य: अस्ति? महार्हा इव दृश्यते।
केसरा.transliteration: are! kesarā kati mūly: asti? mahārhā iva dṛśyate.
केसरा.english: Hey! What is the price of saffron? It seems very expensive.

श्वेता.devanagari: हंसस्य वर्णः श्वेतः। Swan's color is white.

श्वेता.english: She was wearing a white garment.
Do you see the white house?

श्वेता.devanagari: अरे, किम् तव श्वेता पुस्तकं सुन्दरं नास्ति?
श्वेता.transliteration: Are, kim tava śvetā pustakaṃ sundaraṃ nāsti?
श्वेता.english: Hey, isn't your white book beautiful?

नीललोहित.devanagari: वृन्ताकस्य वर्णः नीललोहितः। Brinjal color is purple.

नीललोहित.english: Do you like the purple flower?

नीललोहित.devanagari: हे मित्र! अयं नीललोहितः रङ्गः कति रमणीयः!
नीललोहित.transliteration: he mitra! ayaṃ nīlalohitaḥ raṅgaḥ kati ramaṇīyaḥ!
नीललोहित.english: Hey friend! This purple color is so lovely!

नीललोहिता.devanagari: वृन्ताकस्य वर्णः नीललोहितः। Brinjal color is purple.

नीललोहिता.english: The sky becomes purple in the evening.

हरिता.devanagari: पर्णस्य वर्ण: हरित:। Color of leaf is green.
आकाश: नील: किन्तु घास: हरित: अस्ति।
हरिता.transliteration: ākāsh: nīl: kintu ghās: harit: asti.
हरिता.english: The sky is blue but the grass is green.

हरिता.devanagari: कल मेरा हरित वस्त्र नष्ट हुआ।
हरिता.transliteration: kal merā harit vastr nष्ट huā.
हरिता.english: Yesterday my green cloth was lost.

हरिता.devanagari: भो! तव हरित: पुष्प: सुन्दर: अस्ति।
हरिता.transliteration: bho! tav harit: puṣp: sundar: asti.
हरिता.english: Hey! Your green flower is beautiful.

केसर.devanagari: ध्वजस्य वर्ण: केसर:। Flag color is saffron.

केसर.english: Saffron is the king of spices.
Mother added saffron to the food.
Do you know the fragrance of saffron?
Brother, where can saffron be bought?

कपिशा.devanagari: भित्तेः वर्णः कपिशः। Wall color is brown.

कपिशा.english: He was wearing a brown garment.

कपिशा.devanagari: अरे! तव कपिशः वलयः सुन्दरः अस्ति।
कपिशा.transliteration: are! tava kapiśaḥ valayaḥ sundaraḥ asti.
कपिशा.english: Hey! Your brown bracelet is beautiful.

कषाय.devanagari: कषाय वर्ण वस्त्रं तत्र अस्ति । Brown cloth is there.

कषाय.english: The brown horse wanders in the forest.
The brown stone was on the riverbank.

कषाय.devanagari: अयं कषायः पक्षी सुन्दरः न भवति।
कषाय.transliteration: ayaṃ kaṣāyaḥ pakṣī sundaraḥ na bhavati.
कषाय.english: This brown bird is not beautiful.

रजता.devanagari: नाणकस्य वर्णः रजतः। Coin color is silver.

रजता.english: The king wore a silver crown.
Was your necklace made of silver?
I keep the silver vessel carefully.

धूसर.devanagari: मेघस्य वर्ण: धूसर:। Color of cloud is gray.
हे मित्र, तस्य शिरस्य केश: धूसरा: सन्ति।
धूसर.transliteration: He mitra, tasya śirasya keś: dhūsarā: santi.
धूसर.english: Hey friend, the hairs on his head are gray.

पाटला.devanagari: पाटलपुष्पस्य वर्णः पाटलः। Rose flower's color is rose.

पाटला.english: The girl wore a pink garland.
Do you like the pink color?
Hey! Look at the beauty of this pink flower.

पिङ्गल.devanagari: नाणकस्य वर्णः पिङ्गलः। Coin color is gold.

पिङ्गल.english: The merchant wants to buy gold money.

पिङ्गला.devanagari: नाणकस्य वर्णः पिङ्गलः। Coin color is gold.
किम् इदं वस्तु पिङ्गलं न भवति?
पिङ्गला.transliteration: kim idam vastu piṅgalaṁ na bhavati?

पिङ्गला.devanagari: भोः! यः पिङ्गलः वलयः तव अस्ति कः?
पिङ्गला.transliteration: bhoḥ! yaḥ piṅgalaḥ valayaḥ tava asti kaḥ?
पिङ्गला.english: Hey! Whose is that gold bracelet of yours?

धूसरा.devanagari: मेघस्य वर्ण: धूसर:। Color of cloud is gray.

धूसरा.english: The color of the horse is gray.

धूसरा.devanagari: हे मित्र! इदं धूसरं पुस्तकं सुंदरम्।
धूसरा.transliteration: he mitra! idaṁ dhūsaraṁ pustakaṁ sundarma.
धूसरा.english: Hey friend! This gray book is beautiful.

कषाया.devanagari: कषाय वर्ण वस्त्रं तत्र अस्ति । Brown cloth is there.

कषाया.english: She sees a brown flower in the forest.
His brown pot fell on the ground.

कषाया.devanagari: किं ते कषायाः गृहाः सुंदराः सन्ति?
कषाया.transliteration: kiṃ te kṣāyāḥ gṛhāḥ sundarāḥ santi?

कषाया.devanagari: हे मित्र! तत् कषायं पुस्तकं मे दातुम् इच्छसि?
कषाया.transliteration: he mitra! tat kṣāyaṃ pustakạṃ me dātum icchasi?
कषाया.english: Hey friend! Do you want to give me that brown book?

शुकहरित.devanagari: शुकस्य वर्ण: शुकहरित:। Parrot color is parrot green.

शुकहरित.english: His garment is of parrot-green color.
The parrot-green flower was visible in the forest.

शुकहरित.devanagari: किं तव प्रिये वस्त्रं शुकहरितं न रोचते?
शुकहरित.transliteration: kim tava priye vastram śukaharitam na rochate?
शुकहरित.english: Dear, does the parrot-green garment not please you?

शुकहरित.devanagari: अहं शुकहरितं रंगं अतिप्रिय मन्ये। भवान् अपि?
शुकहरित.transliteration: aham śukaharitam rangam atipriya manye. bhavān api?
शुकहरित.english: I find the parrot-green color very pleasing. What about you?

हिरण्मयी.devanagari: वलयं हिरण्मयम् अस्ति। The bangle is gold.

हिरण्मयी.english: The crown is gold, belonging to the king.
Is that ornament made of gold?
Do you want this golden ring?

पाटल.devanagari: पाटलपुष्पस्य वर्णः पाटलः। Rose flower's color is rose.
तस्य पाटलः वस्त्रः अतीव सुन्दरः अस्ति।
पाटल.transliteration: tasya pāṭlaḥ vastram atīva sundaraḥ asti.
पाटल.english: His rose-colored garment is very beautiful.
We brought the pink fruit to the garden.

पाटल.devanagari: अहम् पाटलं रङ्गं अतीव प्रियं करोमि। त्वम् अपि?
पाटल.transliteration: aham pāṭlam raṅgam atīv apriyam karomi. tvam api?
पाटल.english: I like the rose color very much. Do you also?

रजत.devanagari: नाणकस्य वर्णः रजतः। Coin color is silver.
किम् एतत् पात्रं रजतं वस्तु न अस्ति?
रजत.transliteration: kim etat pātram rajataṃ vastu na asti?
रजत.english: Is this vessel not a silver object?

रजत.devanagari: भो! ते रजते मुद्रायाः कीमूल्यम् अस्ति?
रजत.transliteration: bho! te rajate mudrayāḥ kīmūlyam asti?
रजत.english: Hey! What is the price of that silver coin?

हिरण्मय.devanagari: वलयं हिरण्मयम् अस्ति। The bangle is gold.

हिरण्मय.english: The crown was gold, belonging to the king.

हिरण्मय.devanagari: हे मित्र! यह पात्रं हिरण्मयं बहु सुंदरम्।
हिरण्मय.transliteration: he mitra! yah pātraṁ hiraṇmayaṁ bahu sundaram.
हिरण्मय.english: Oh friend! This vessel is gold and very beautiful.

हिरण्मय.devanagari: देवस्य मूर्तिः हिरण्मयी भवन् मन्दिरे स्थिता।
हिरण्मय.transliteration: devasya mūrtiḥ hiraṇmayī bhavan mandir stihta.
हिरण्मय.english: The god's statue, being gold, stood in the temple.

शुकहरिता.devanagari: शुकस्य वर्ण: शुकहरित:। Parrot color is parrot green.
तस्य शुकहरिता पंख: अति सुंदर: अस्ति।
शुकहरिता.transliteration: tasya śukahāritā paṅkhaḥ ati sundara asti.
शुकहरिता.english: His parrot-green feathers are very beautiful.
We saw the parrot-green color before.

शुकहरिता.devanagari: किं यह वस्त्रं शुकहरित वर्णस्य अस्ति?
शुकहरिता.transliteration: kiṃ yaha vastraṃ śukahārita varṇasya asti?
शुकहरिता.english: Is this cloth of parrot-green color?

शुकहरिता.devanagari: हे मित्र! यह शुकहरिता रंग कति रमणीय: अस्ति! नैव सत्यम्?
शुकहरिता.transliteration: he mitra! yaha śukahāritā raṃga kati ramaṇīyaḥ asti! naiva satyam?
शुकहरिता.english: Hey friend! This parrot-green color is so lovely, isn't it?

शुभप्रातर्.devanagari: सर्वेभ्यः शुभप्रातः To all good morning

कृपया.devanagari: कृपया मम साहाय्यातां कुरु । please help me.

स्वागत.devanagari: मम गृहे त्व स्वागतं । In my house you are welcome.

स्वागत.english: Do they say you are welcome?
You were welcome in the house.

शुुभसाय.devanagari: सर्वेभ्यः सुभसायं To all good evening

शुुभसाय.english: Good evening! All is well indeed.
Good evening was in the classroom.

शुभरात्रि.devanagari: सर्वेभ्यः शभरात्रिः To all good night

शुभरात्रि.english: Last night was a good night.
Good night to you! Sleep well.

क्षम्यताम्.devanagari: क्षम्यताम् मार्गं ददातु । Excuse me, give me way.

क्षम्यताम्.english: Excuse me, what is your name?
Excuse me, you should give me water.
Excuse me, who is this man?

सुप्रभात.devanagari: सर्वेभ्यः सुप्रभातं To all good morning

गौर.devanagari: वस्त्रस्य वर्णं गौरम् अस्ति। The clothes color is pale red.
अहो! यह गौरा मणिः कतिधां शोभते।
गौर.transliteration: aho! yah gaurā manīh katidhām shobhate.
गौर.english: Oh! How beautifully this pale red jewel shines.

राम् राम्.devanagari: सः कल्यासं गतः, राम् राम् इति अब्रवीत्।
राम् राम्.transliteration: saḥ kalyāsaṁ gataḥ, rām rām iti abravīt.

राम् राम्.english: Goodbye, friend! Until we meet again.

धन्यवाद.devanagari: भवान् मम कार्यं अकरोत् धन्यवादः you did my work, thankyou

धन्यवाद.english: You gave me a book, thank you.

धन्यवाद.devanagari: अहं भवतः सहायतां कृते धन्यवादम् अर्पयामि।
धन्यवाद.transliteration: aham bhavataḥ sahāytām kṛte dhanyavādam arpaymi.
धन्यवाद.english: I offer thanks for your help.

धन्यवाद.devanagari: किम् अहं भवन्तं धन्यवादेन धन्य करोमि?
धन्यवाद.transliteration: kim aham bhavantam dhanyavādena dhanya karomi?
धन्यवाद.english: Should I thank you with gratitude?
Thank you! You are very helpful to me.

गौरा, गौरी.devanagari: वस्त्रस्य वर्णं गौरम् अस्ति। The clothes color is pale red.

गौरा, गौरी.english: Her pale red face was beautiful.
Is this not a pale red flower?

गौरा, गौरी.devanagari: भोः! तस्य गौरी साड़ी कति रमणीयः!
गौरा, गौरी.transliteration: bho! tasya gaurī sāṛī kati ramaṇīyaḥ!
गौरा, गौरी.english: Hey! That pale red sari is so lovely!
The idol of Ganesha is made with a pale red color.

पाण्डुरा.devanagari: पाण्डुर वर्ण: वेष्टिः कुत्र अस्ति । Where is the pale white color dhoti?

पाण्डुरा.english: His pale white face was beautiful.
The pale white flower grows in the garden.

पाण्डुरा.devanagari: किं तव पाण्डुरा वस्त्रः नवीनः अस्ति?
पाण्डुरा.transliteration: kiṃ tava pāṇḍurā vastraḥ navīnaḥ asti?
पाण्डुरा.english: Is your pale white garment new?

पाण्डुरा.devanagari: अहं पाण्डुरां दीपं अद्य क्रेतुं इच्छामि।
पाण्डुरा.transliteration: ahaṃ pāṇḍurāṃ dīpaṃ adya kretuṃ ichhāmi.
पाण्डुरा.english: I want to buy a pale white lamp today.

पाण्डुर.devanagari: पाण्डुर वर्ण: वेष्टिः कुत्र अस्ति । Where is the pale white color dhoti?
तस्य पाण्डुरः मुखः रोगात् दुर्बलः अभवत्।
पाण्डुर.transliteration: tasya pāṇḍuraḥ mukhaḥ rogāt durbalah abhavat.
पाण्डुर.english: His pale white face became weak from illness.

पाण्डुर.devanagari: यह पाण्डुरः पुष्पं कस्य वाटिकायां विकसति?
पाण्डुर.transliteration: yah pāṇḍuraḥ puṣpaṃ kasya vāṭikāyāṃ vikasati?
पाण्डुर.english: In whose garden does this pale white flower bloom?

पाण्डुर.devanagari: अहं पाण्डुरः शाटी त्वयै क्रेतुं इच्छामि।
पाण्डुर.transliteration: ahaṃ pāṇḍuraḥ śāṭī tvayai kretu ichchhāmi.
पाण्डुर.english: I wish to buy a pale white sari for you.

पाण्डुर.devanagari: भोः! किम् एषः पाण्डुरः वस्त्रः सुन्दरः न अस्ति?
पाण्डुर.transliteration: bhoh! kim eṣah pāṇḍuraḥ vastraḥ sundarah na asti?
पाण्डुर.english: Hey! Isn't this pale white cloth beautiful?

आ-गम्.devanagari: बालकः गृहम् आगच्छति। Boy comes to home.

न जानामि.english: Hey! I don't know that place.
This is a i don't know.

अनु-भू.devanagari: अशोकः कष्टम् अनुभवतिI Ashok experiences difficulty.

इष्.devanagari: बाला फलम् इच्छति। Girl likes fruit.

नूतनं किम्?.english: He has no news that is new.
What is new in the present time?

आ-क्रम्.devanagari: राजा शत्रुदेशम् आक्रामति। King captures the enemy country.
भवान् किम् आक्रामति? अहम् त्वाम् आक्रामामि।
आ-क्रम्.transliteration: bhavān kim ākrāmati? aham tvām ākrāmāmi.
आ-क्रम्.english: What are you seizing? I am seizing you.

अङ्गी-कृ.english: Will you agree to this plan?
This is a i agree / you're right.

प्रायशः.english: Perhaps we will stay at home tomorrow.
Perhaps did she come from the forest?

अधि-स्था.devanagari: पृथ्वी आकाशम् अधितिष्ठति। Earth is situated in space.

अधि-स्था.english: The god dwells in the temple.
The king was seated on the throne.

अधि-स्था.devanagari: भो, त्वं कुत्र अधितिष्ठसि? अहम् नगरे अधितिष्ठामि।
अधि-स्था.transliteration: Bho, tvam kutra adhitishthasi? Aham nagare adhitishthami.
अधि-स्था.english: Hey, where do you dwell? I dwell in the city.

आ-रुह्.devanagari: बालक: वृक्षम् आरोहति। Boy climbs the tree.

आ-रुह्.english: Come, let us climb the wall together.

असूञ्.devanagari: गीता पण्डिताय असूयति। Geetha is jealous about learned people

असूञ्.english: He is displeased with his friend's success.
The wife was discontented with her husband.
Are you displeased with my work?

असूञ्.devanagari: अहम् तस्य लोभायै असूये। किम् त्वमपि असूयसि?
असूञ्.transliteration: Aham tasya lobhāyai asūye. Kim tvamapi asūyasi?
असूञ्.english: I am discontented with his greed. Are you also displeased?

अट्.english: The elephant roams in the forest.
Previously, he wandered in the city.

अट्.devanagari: कुत्र त्वम् अटसि? मया सह आ।
अट्.transliteration: kutra tvam atasi? Maya saha a.
अट्.english: Where are you roaming? Come with me.

अभिनन्दनानि.english: He got married, congratulations to him.

अभिनन्दनानि.devanagari: भवती नवीनं कार्यं प्राप्तवती किम्? अभिनन्दनानि!
अभिनन्दनानि.transliteration: bhavtī navīnaṁ kāryaṁ prāptavtī kim? abhinandanāni!
अभिनन्दनानि.english: Did you get a new job? Congratulations!

अभिनन्दनानि.devanagari: अरे! तुम् पुरस्कारम् जितवन्तौ। अभिनन्दनानि भवतोः!
अभिनन्दनानि.transliteration: are! tum puraskāram jitavantau. abhinandanāni bhavataḥ!
अभिनन्दनानि.english: Hey! You both won the prize. Congratulations to you both!

अलं-कृ.devanagari: महिला मालया अलङ्करोति। The lady decorates with garland.

अलं-कृ.english: The girl decorates the house with flowers.
Your brother decorated the temple with lamps.
Do you decorate with a necklace?

अलं-कृ.devanagari: अहम् इदं पुष्पमाला अलङ्करामि। त्वम् अपि सलङ्करोसि?
अलं-कृ.transliteration: aham idaṃ pushpamlā alaṅkarāmi। tvam api salaṅkarosi?
अलं-कृ.english: I decorate with this flower garland. Will you also decorate?

अधि-वस्.devanagari: व्याघ्री वनम् अधिवसति। Tigress lives in the forest.

अधि-वस्.english: The sage lives on the mountain.

अधि-वस्.devanagari: अहम् आश्रमे अधिवसामि, त्वम् कुत्र अधिवससि?
अधि-वस्.transliteration: aham āśrame adhivásāmi, tvam kutra adhivásasi?
अधि-वस्.english: I live in the hermitage. Where do you live?

क्रीड्.devanagari: बाल: उद्याने क्रीडति। Boy child plays in garden.

क्रीड्.english: The boys play in the forest.
Come on! The two horses are playing.

गम्.devanagari: वृद्ध: वनं  गच्छति। Old man goes to forest.

कथ्.english: Hey friend! Let him tell the experience.

खाद्.devanagari: सेवक: अन्नं  खादति। Servant eats food.
अहं रोटिं खादामि। त्वं किं खादसि?
खाद्.transliteration: Aham rotim khādāmi. Tvam kim khādasai?
खाद्.english: I eat bread. What do you eat?

क्री.devanagari: जनकः लेखनीं क्रीणाति। Father buys pen.

क्षिप्.devanagari: बालिका कन्दुकं क्षिपति। Girl throws balls.

क्षिप्.english: The teacher threw away the student (rejected him).
Do you also throw away the fruit?

वाद्.devanagari: वेणुवादकः वेणुं वादयति। Flutist plays the flute.
हे मित्र! त्वं कौ वाद्यं वादयसि?
वाद्.transliteration: he mitra! tvaṃ kau vādyaṃ vādayasi?
वाद्.english: Hey friend! What instrument do you play?

प्र-क्षाल्.devanagari: वस्त्राणि माता प्रक्षालयति। Mother washes the clothes.

प्र-क्षाल्.english: The student washes his own hands.

प्र-क्षाल्.devanagari: भो! अहम् पत्राणि प्रक्षालयामि। त्वम् किं करोषि?
प्र-क्षाल्.transliteration: bho! aham patrāṇi prakṣālayāmi. tvam kiṁ karoṣi?
प्र-क्षाल्.english: Hey! I am washing the leaves. What are you doing?

कृ.devanagari: अम्बा पाकं करोति। Mother does cooking.

कृ.english: Did you not do the work?

कृ.devanagari: भवान् किम् करोति? - अहं पुस्तकं लिखामि।
कृ.transliteration: bhavān kim karoti? - aham pustakam likhāmi.
कृ.english: What are you doing? - I am writing a book.

क्षल्.devanagari: रजक: वस्त्रं क्षालयति। Washerman washes cloth.

क्षल्.english: The boys used to wash their hands in the pond.

क्षल्.devanagari: अहं केशान् क्षालयामि। त्वं किम् अपि क्षालयसि?
क्षल्.transliteration: ahaṃ keśān kṣālayāmi. tvaṃ kim api kṣālayasi?
क्षल्.english: I am washing my hair. Are you washing anything too?

त्रुट्.devanagari: बालकः इक्षुदण्डं त्र्युट्यति। Boy breaks the sugar cane stick.

त्रुट्.english: The dancer breaks the ankle bell.
Hey! He is breaking the pot.

उद्-स्था.devanagari: भवान् कदा उत्तिष्ठति। When do you get up?

उद्-स्था.english: The boy gets up at sunrise.
I got up in the morning.
Why do you get up so late?
Get up! There is much work to do today.

उप-विश्.devanagari: महिला आसन्दे उपविशति। Lady sits in a chair.

उप-विश्.english: The boy sits in the shade of the tree.

उप-विश्.devanagari: गुरुः शिष्यः च भूमौ उपविशतः स्मः।
उप-विश्.transliteration: guruḥ śiṣyaḥ cha bhūmau upavishataḥ smaḥ.
उप-विश्.english: The teacher and the student sat on the ground.

उप-विश्.devanagari: अहम् एतस्मिन् आसने उपविशामि। त्वं मम समीपे उपविश।
उप-विश्.transliteration: aham etasmin āsane upavishāmi. tvaṁ mama samīpe upavisha.
उप-विश्.english: I sit on this chair. You sit near me.

खण्ड्.devanagari: सः वृक्षान् खण्डयति। He breaks trees.

खण्ड्.english: The king breaks the enemy's army.

खण्ड्.devanagari: अरे, तूँ मालिकायाः पात्रं मा खण्डय!
खण्ड्.transliteration: are, tū̃ mālikāyāḥ pātraṃ mā khaṇḍay!
खण्ड्.english: Hey, don't break the master's vessel!

कर्त्.devanagari: पाचकः शाकं कर्तयति। Cook cuts vegetables.

गण्.devanagari: छात्रा पुस्तकानि गणयति। Girl student counts the books.

तड्.devanagari: बालकः केन ताडयति? With what does the boy hit?

तड्.english: He beat the teacher with a stick.

जीव्.devanagari: दरिद्र: कष्टेन जीवति। Poor lives with difficulty.

जीव्.english: He lives peacefully in the village.
His father lived in the city.

कूज्.devanagari: हे मित्र! भोर में पक्षी कूजति इति सुन्दरम्।
कूज्.transliteration: he mitra! bhora meṃ pakṣī kūjati iti sundaram.
कूज्.english: Oh friend! How beautiful that birds sing in the morning.

गै.devanagari: महिला गीतं गायति। Woman sings a song.

गै.english: The boy sings a beautiful song.
The poet sang a verse yesterday.

स्था.devanagari: वानर: वृक्षे तिष्ठति। Monkey stands on a tree.

स्था.english: The girl stood at the door.
Does the teacher stand in the classroom?

घ्रा.devanagari: बालिका मालां जिघ्रति। Girl smells the garland.
अहं अगुरं जिघ्रामि। त्वं किं न जिघ्रसि?
घ्रा.transliteration: ahaṁ aguṛaṁ jighrāmi. tvaṁ kiṁ na jighrasi?
घ्रा.english: I smell the incense. Don't you smell it?

ग्रह्.devanagari: आरक्ष: चोरं गृह्णाति। Police catches thief.
त्वं किं गृह्णसि? अहं शङ्कुं गृह्णामि।
ग्रह्.transliteration: tvam kim gṛihṇasi? aham śaṅkum gṛihṇāmi.
ग्रह्.english: What do you catch? I catch the conch.

चल्.devanagari: युवकः वेगेन चलति। Youth moves fast.

चल्.english: The girl moves in the garden.
The lion moved in the forest.

ज्ञा.devanagari: अहं चोर: इति स: न जानाति। He does not know that i am a thief.

ज्ञा.english: I did not know that work.

ज्ञा.devanagari: भवती कुत्र निवसति इति किम् जानाति?
ज्ञा.transliteration: bhavatī kutra nivasati iti kim jānāti?
ज्ञा.english: Does she know where she lives?

तर्ज्.devanagari: शिक्षक: छात्रं तर्जयति। Teacher scolds boy student.

तर्ज्.english: Does the teacher not scold the student?

तर्ज्.devanagari: भोः! मा मां तर्जय। अहम् दोषी नास्मि।
तर्ज्.transliteration: bho! mā mām tarjaya. aham doṣī nāsmi.
तर्ज्.english: Hey! Don't scold me. I am not guilty.

तक्ष्.devanagari: तक्षकः काष्ठं तक्षति। Carpenter chops wood.

तक्ष्.english: That carpenter carves a door every day.
We did carpentry on the wood.

तक्ष्.devanagari: भो तक्षक! किं त्वं मेरुं तक्षसि?
तक्ष्.transliteration: bho takṣaka! kiṁ tvam meruṁ takṣasi?
तक्ष्.english: O carpenter! Are you carving the pillar?

चर्.devanagari: केदारं धेनु: चरति। Cow grazes paddy field.

चर्.english: The cow grazes in the forest.
The animals graze in the agricultural field.
Does the cow graze in the forest?
Hey! Where is the cow grazing?

गॄ.devanagari: मीन: कीटीं  गिलति। Fish swallows worm.

चुर्.devanagari: सा धनं चोरयति। She steals money.
अयं चोरः रत्नानि चोरयति, न सत्यं वदति।
चुर्.transliteration: ayaṁ choraḥ ratnāni chorayati, na satyaṁ vadati.
चुर्.english: This thief steals jewels and does not speak the truth.

ध्यै.devanagari: सः ईश्वरं ध्यायति। He meditates on God.

ध्यै.english: She should meditate in the temple.
Do you meditate in the morning?
I will meditate for a long time.

कम्प्.english: The boy was trembling in the cold.
Does the leaf tremble with the wind?
Hey, why is your hand trembling?

धा.devanagari: मनः ध्येये दधातु। Put the mind in the object to be focused.

धा.english: He puts the book on the table.
I put the fruits in the basket.
Where do you put the money?
She used to put the lamp in the house.

दण्ड.devanagari: ईश्वर: दुष्टान् दण्डयति। God punishes the wicked.

दण्ड.english: The teacher punished the lazy students.
Does the king punish the angry ones?

निन्द्.devanagari: स: तं सदा निन्दति। He always censures him.

त्रस्.devanagari: गजः सिंहात् त्रस्यति। Elephant shakes for fear of lion.

त्रस्.english: The leaf trembles because of the wind.
The boy trembled from the roaring sound.
Why do you tremble from fear?
Do not tremble! I will protect you.

नम्.devanagari: जननी प्रतिदिनम् ईश्वरं नमति। Mother prays to God everyday.

नम्.english: The devotee always salutes, always salutes.

नी.devanagari: सः मेषान् वनं नयति। He takes along goats to forest.

नी.english: The teacher takes the students to school.
The father took the son to the market.
Come, I will take you to the river.

दंश्.devanagari: सर्प: दशति एव। Snake bites only (ofcourse).

दंश्.english: The dog bites the boy's hand.

दंश्.devanagari: यदि त्वं सावधान: न भविष्यसि, तदा शुनक: त्वां दशिष्यति।
दंश्.transliteration: yadi tvam sāvadhān: na bhaviṣyasi, tadā śunak: tvām daśiṣyati।
दंश्.english: If you are not careful, then the dog will bite you.

दंश्.devanagari: अरे! शुनक: मां दशिष्यति इति भयम्।
दंश्.transliteration: are! śunak: mām daśiṣyati iti bhayam।
दंश्.english: Oh no! I am afraid the dog will bite me!

त्यज्.devanagari: नृपः कनकं त्यजति। King abandons gold.

त्यज्.english: Do you give up the bad habit?
I never give up my duty.

तोष्.devanagari: पुष्पाणि समर्प्य माता देवान् तोषयति। Mom pleases god by offering flowers.
रमणी सुंदरं गीतं गायित्वा पतिं तोषयत।
तोष्.transliteration: ramaṇī sundar gītam gāyitvā patim toṣayat.
तोष्.english: The woman pleased her husband by singing a beautiful song.

तोष्.devanagari: भव, त्वं मयं तोषयसि यदि सत्यं वदसि।
तोष्.transliteration: bhava, tvam mayam toṣayasi yadi satyam vadasi.
तोष्.english: Friend, you will please me if you speak the truth.

दा.devanagari: सा अकिञ्चनेभ्यः वस्त्राणि ददाति। She gives clothes to poor.

दा.english: The teacher gives knowledge to the students.
The father gave a ball to his son for playing.
Will you give me the book?

दा.devanagari: भिक्षुः भिक्षुकाय अन्नं ददाति। किं तव अपि इच्छा अस्ति?
दा.transliteration: bhikṣuḥ bhikṣukāya annaṁ dadāti. kiṁ tava api ichhā asti?
दा.english: The monk gives food to the beggar. Do you also wish to give?

सृ.devanagari: अश्व: वेगेन धावति । Horse runs fast

सृ.english: The boy runs towards the school.

सृ.devanagari: सीता वने धावत् इति वयं अश्रौषम् ।
सृ.transliteration: Sītā vane dhāvat iti vayaṁ aśrauṣam .
सृ.english: We heard that Sita ran in the forest.
Why do you run? Is it out of fear?

ध्मा.devanagari: अर्जुनः शङ्खं ध्माति। Arjun blows the counch.

ध्मा.english: The boy was blowing the flute.
I am blowing the fragrance of flowers.

निर्-वा.devanagari: यः पवनः निर्वाति सः शीतलः आसीत्।
निर्-वा.transliteration: yaḥ pavanaḥ nirvāti saḥ śītalaḥ āsīt.
निर्-वा.english: The wind that blew out was cool.
Hey, does the air blow out here?

पच्.devanagari: माता भोजनं पचति। Mother cooks food.

दृश्.english: The boy looks at the sky.
Sir, do you see the stars?

पठ्.devanagari: अर्चक: वेदं पठति। Priest reads Vedas.
अहं कविता पठामि। त्वं किम् पठसि?
पठ्.transliteration: Aham kavitā pathāmi. Tvam kim pathasi?
पठ्.english: I read poetry. What do you read?

लिख्.devanagari: बालकः कथां लिखति। Boy writes the story.

लिख्.english: I am writing a letter. What about you?

रच्.devanagari: चित्रं रचयति बालकः। Boy makes the picture.
अहं गीतं रचयामि। भवान् किं रचयति?
रच्.transliteration: ahaṁ gītaṁ racayāmi. bhavān_ kiṁ racayati?
रच्.english: I make the song. What do you make?

प्र-वह्.english: Why does the river flow quickly?
Brother! Let the pot be carried in the river water.

पूर्.devanagari: घटं जलेन पूरयतु। Fill the pot with water.

पूर्.english: He fills the vessel with milk.
I filled the basket with food.
Do you fill the bowl with oil?
Friend, please fill the pitcher with water.

रुद्.devanagari: शिशु: सदा रुदिति। Child always cries.
अरे, किम् त्वम् रोदिषि? मा रुद।
रुद्.transliteration: are, kim tvam rodiṣi? mā rud.
रुद्.english: Hey, why are you crying? Don't cry.

श्रु.devanagari: पिता गानं शृणोति। Father hears the song.
हे मित्र! भवान् किं गुरोः उपदेशं शृणोति?
श्रु.transliteration: he mitra! bhavān kiṁ guror upadēśaṁ śṛṇoti?
श्रु.english: Hey friend! Do you hear the teacher's instruction?

पा - पाने.devanagari: सः चायं पिबति। He drinks the tea.
अहं तु शीतलं जलं पिबामि। त्वं किं पिबसि?
पा - पाने.transliteration: ahaṁ tu śītalaṁ jalaṁ pibāmi. tvaṁ kiṁ pibasi?
पा - पाने.english: I drink cold water. What do you drink?

वेञ्.devanagari: सा वस्त्रं वयति। She weaves the cloth
बालिका सुन्दरं वस्त्रं वयति, न किम्?
वेञ्.transliteration: bālikā sundaraṃ vastraṃ vayati, na kim?
वेञ्.english: The girl weaves beautiful cloth, doesn't she?

नृत्.devanagari: मयूरः मेघं दृष्ट्वा नृत्यति। Peacock dances on seeing clouds.

नृत्.english: The girl dances upon hearing the song.
Does the dancer dance on the stage?

नृत्.devanagari: अहं त्वां नृत्यन्तीं पश्यामि! कीदृश् नृत्यति सा!
नृत्.transliteration: Ahaṁ tvāṁ nṛtyantīṁ paśyāmi! Kīdṛś nṛtyati sā!
नृत्.english: I see you dancing! How beautifully she dances!

पत्.devanagari: आम्रफलं हस्तात् पतति। Mango falls from hand.

पत्.english: During the rainy season, water falls from the sky.
The leaves from the branch fell to the ground.
Does the boy's toy fall from the tree?
Hey! The bridge is falling! Save yourself!

वह्.english: The water was being carried in the vessel.
The bee carries the flower, doesn't it?

आ-लोच्.english: He thinks what should be done.

चिन्त्.english: The female student thought about the lesson.

खिद्.english: She feels sad after reading the letter.
He felt sad when his friend left.
Hey! Why do you feel sad? Be happy.

उत्-पत्.english: The rabbit jumped out of the well.
Hey friend, do you also jump?

आ-लोक्.english: Both of them watched the tree.

स्पृश्.devanagari: शिशुः पुष्पं स्पृशति। Child touches the flower.

स्ना.devanagari: भक्तः गङ्गायां स्नाति। Devotee takes bath in Ganga River.

स्ना.english: The boy takes bath in the morning.
He took bath in the pond yesterday.

स्ना.devanagari: अहम् सायंकाले स्नामि। त्वम् कदा स्नासि?
स्ना.transliteration: Aham sāyankāle snāmi. Tvam kadā snāsi?
स्ना.english: I take bath in the evening. When do you take bath?

हस्.english: Ramesh laughed after hearing the story.
Laugh! This is a funny thing.

क्षम्.english: The mother pardons the son's mistake.

उत्-प्लव्.english: The boy jumps on the tree.
She (the dancer) jumped on the stage.
Does the horse jump out of fear?
Hey! Let the animals jump in the pond.

मन्.devanagari: अहङ्कारविमूढात्मा कर्ताहमिति मन्यते। Arrogant / Ignore person thinks he is the doer.

मन्.english: He thinks he is a scholar.
How do they think themselves intelligent?
Do you always think yourself wealthy?
Then the king thought himself great.

कूर्द्.english: The boy jumps in the garden.
The elephant jumped over the river.

कूर्द्.devanagari: अहं तु गृहे कूर्दामि, त्वं कथं न कूर्दसे?
कूर्द्.transliteration: ahaṁ tu gṛhe kūrdāmi, tvạ̀ kathaṁ na kūrdasě?
कूर्द्.english: I jump at home, but why don't you jump?

ईक्ष्.devanagari: अहम् तम् ईक्षे। त्वम् अपि ईक्षस्व।
ईक्ष्.transliteration: aham tam īkṣe. tvam api īkṣasva.
ईक्ष्.english: I am watching him. You watch too.

स्रु.english: Water oozes out of the water tap.
Sap oozes from the tree's trunk.
Does water ooze from the wall?

स्रु.devanagari: अरे! अत्र दूधं स्रवति। किम् अवस्थितं खण्डितम्?
स्रु.transliteration: are! atra dūdhaṃ sravati। kim avasthitaṃ khaṇḍitam?
स्रु.english: Hey! Milk is oozing here. Is the pot broken?

श्लाघ्.devanagari: माता: "बेटा, तुम्हारा अध्ययन सुंदर है। मैं तुम्हें श्लाघते हूँ।"
श्लाघ्.transliteration: mātā: "betā, tumhārā adhyayan sundar hai. maiṃ tumhẽ ślaghate hūँ."
श्लाघ्.english: Mother: "Son, your studies are beautiful. I appreciate you."

प्र-काश्.english: The sun shines in the morning.
Where do you shine? I shine here.

बाध्.devanagari: कीट: सस्यं बाधते। Insect affects plant.

पला-अय्.english: The lion escapes from the forest.
The boy escaped from the mother out of fear.
Hey! Where are you escaping from?

मुद्.devanagari: धनिक: मोदते। Rich person feels happy.

डी.english: The bird flies in the sky.
Hey! The divine messenger flies to heaven.

यत्.english: He tries to read the book.
The girl tried to sing a song.
What are you trying to do?
I try to learn the language.

भिक्ष्.devanagari: भिक्षुक: अन्नं भिक्षते। Beggar begs food.

भिक्ष्.english: The two of them used to beg in the city.
Kind one, please beg! I will give you food.

त्रै.english: Hey, protect me! I am in danger.

वन्द्.english: The student bows to the teacher.
The mother bowed to the parents.
Do you bow to the god?

वन्द्.devanagari: आइ, हे मित्र! वयं मिलित्वा वन्दामहे।
वन्द्.transliteration: āi, he mitra! vayṁ militve vanddāmahe.
वन्द्.english: Come, friend! Let us bow together.

प्लु.devanagari: पर्णं जले प्लवते। Leaf flats in water.

प्लु.english: The boat floats on the river.
The flower floated in the lake.
Does the small stick float in water?

प्लु.devanagari: अहं समुद्रे प्लवामि, भवान् अपि प्लवसे?
प्लु.transliteration: ahaṃ samudre plāvāmi, bhavān api plavase?
प्लु.english: I float in the ocean, do you float too?

लज्ज्.english: The boy feels shy in new clothes.
She felt shy in the classroom.
Do you feel shy in front of people?

लज्ज्.devanagari: अहं अतिशय लज्जे, नाम कथयितुम् न शक्नोमि।
लज्ज्.transliteration: ahaṁ atishay lajje, nām kathayitum na shaknomi.
लज्ज्.english: I feel very shy, I cannot speak my name.

प्र-यत्.devanagari: सरलतया संभाषणं कर्तुं स: प्रयतते। He tries to talk fluently.

प्र-यत्.english: The student tries to understand the lesson.
I tried to speak Sanskrit yesterday.
What are you trying to do?

प्र-यत्.devanagari: हे मित्र! त्वं पुस्तकं पठितुं प्रयतस्व।
प्र-यत्.transliteration: he mitra! tvaṁ pustkaṁ paṭhituṁ prayatasva.
प्र-यत्.english: Hey friend! Try to read the book.

याच्.devanagari: भिक्षुक: अन्नं याचते। Beggar begs food.

याच्.english: The boy begs for forgiveness near his mother.

याच्.devanagari: सः कल: राजा: समक्षे वरं याचिष्यते।
याच्.transliteration: sah kāl: rājā: samakshe varaṁ yāchishyate.
याच्.english: He will beg for a boon in front of the king tomorrow.
Are you begging me for help?
Lord, please let me beg for your blessing.

स्पर्ध्.english: The two boys compete in play.

सेव्.english: Does the lady serve the deity?

वृध्.english: Hey friend! The population in the city is growing.

सम्-भाष्.devanagari: सा संस्कृतेन सम्यक् सम्भाषते। She converses well in Samskrutam

सम्-भाष्.english: The two friends converse every day.
The teacher conversed with the student.
Do you converse with the teacher?
Yes, I converse with him regularly.

परि-वेष्.devanagari: माता अन्नं परिवेषयति। Mother serves the rice.

परि-वेष्.english: The servant served water to the guests.
Who serves the meal in the south?

सह्.devanagari: दरिद्र: कष्टं सहते। Poor man tolerates hardship.

सह्.english: The mother tolerates the child's crying.
He will endure the long journey.
Sir, do you endure this knowledge?

व्यथ्.english: The boy worries because of the exam.
He was worried about the difficulty.
Do you worry about the future?
Don't worry! Everything will be fine.

निस्-कास्.devanagari: बाालकः वस्त्रं निष्कासयति। Boy removes the shirt.

निस्-कास्.english: Ram removes the letter from the house.
The teacher removed the student from the classroom.
Please remove the noise from the classroom.

धृ.devanagari: बालकः वस्त्रं धरति। Boy wears the dress.

धृ.english: Your father wore an upper garment.

धृ.devanagari: अहं पादुके धरामि, त्वम् किम् धरसि?
धृ.transliteration: Ahaṁ pāduке dharāmi, tvam kim dharasi?
धृ.english: I wear sandals, what do you wear?

शुभ्.english: We think he wore the award nicely.

शुभ्.devanagari: हे अनिल! तव गृहं बहु शोभते।
शुभ्.transliteration: He Anil! tava gṛhaṁ bahu śobhate.
शुभ्.english: Oh Anil! Your house looks very nice.

स्वद्.devanagari: मधुरं स्वदते बालकाय। Boy tastes sweet.

स्वद्.english: What does this food's flavor taste like?

शङ्क्.devanagari: सः दुर्वार्तां श्रुत्वा शङ्कते। He doubts after hearing bad news.

शङ्क्.english: The student doubts in the examination.

शङ्क्.devanagari: सा पत्रं न आगतं दृष्ट्वा शङ्कते स्म।
शङ्क्.transliteration: sā ptraṁ na āgataṁ dṛṣṭvā śaṅkate sma.
शङ्क्.english: She doubted when she did not see the letter arrive.

शङ्क्.devanagari: किम् भवान् इस्य योजनायाः सफलतायां शङ्कते?
शङ्क्.transliteration: kim bhavān isya yojanāyāḥ saphalitāyāṁ śaṅkate?
शङ्क्.english: Do you doubt the success of this plan?

शङ्क्.devanagari: भवान् शङ्कते किम्? नास्ति कारणं शङ्कायै।
शङ्क्.transliteration: bhavān śaṅkate kim? nāsti kāraṇaṁ śaṅkāyai.
शङ्क्.english: Why do you doubt? There is no reason to doubt.

नि-मस्ज्.english: The brahmin boy immerses into the river while chanting mantras.
The sun sinks in the western direction.
The leaf became immersed in the water.
Do you immerse yourself in that lake?

नि-मस्ज्.devanagari: अहं तु प्रातः नदीजले निमज्जामि। किम् त्वम् अपि निमज्जसि?
नि-मस्ज्.transliteration: ahaṁ tu prātaḥ nadījale nimajjāmi. kim tvam api nimajjasi?
नि-मस्ज्.english: I immerse in the river water in the morning. Do you also immerse yourself?

उद्-गमॢँ गतौ.devanagari: क्वथितं क्षीरम् उद्गच्छति। Boiled milk rises up.

उद्-गमॢँ गतौ.english: The sun rises in the eastern direction.
The smoke rose into the sky.
What is rising from the water?
Hey, the stars rise at night.

क्वथ.english: The villager boils the curry in an earthen vessel.
The mother boils water in the kitchen.
The cook boiled food for the family.

क्वथ.devanagari: भो! दालः अधिकं क्वथति। अग्निं न्यून कुरु।
क्वथ.transliteration: bho! dālaḥ adhikaṁ kvathati. agniṁ nyūna kuru.
क्वथ.english: Hey! The lentils are boiling too much. Reduce the fire.

प्र-दर्श्.devanagari: माता चन्द्रं प्रदर्शयति। Mother shows the moon.

प्र-दर्श्.english: Oh, please show me the way.

तॄ.english: Do you swim in the water?

नि-द्रा.english: The mother sleeps during the day.

जृम्भ्.devanagari: सः उत्थाय जृम्भते। He gets up and gapes.

जृम्भ्.english: The boy gapes while waking from sleep.
The child used to gape in the morning.

लिह्.devanagari: बालिका लेढि, किन्तु माता न अनुमति ददाति।
लिह्.transliteration: balikā leḍhi, kintu mātā na anumati dadāti.
लिह्.english: The girl licks, but mother does not permit.

स्वी-कृ.devanagari: सः पुस्तकं स्वीकरोति। He takes the book.

चित्र्.devanagari: अहं वृक्षं चित्रयामि। त्वं किम् अपि चित्रयसि?
चित्र्.transliteration: aham vṛksham chitrayāmi. tvam kim api chitrayasi?
चित्र्.english: I am drawing a tree. Are you drawing something too?

वि-क्री.devanagari: विक्रयकः वस्तु विक्रीणीते। Seller sells the item.

बध्.devanagari: पेटिकां रज्ज्वा बध्नातु। Tie the box with rope.

बध्.english: He ties the cow with a rope.
Hey friend! Please tie the cloth.

रिङ्ग्.english: The insect crawls on the ground.
The snake crawled in the forest.
Does the baby crawl in your house?
Hey friend! We crawl in the garden.

शी.english: The boy sleeps in the house.
Ram slept on the bed yesterday.

शी.devanagari: अरे, पिता अधुना शेते। तूष्णीम् भव।
शी.transliteration: are, pitā adhunā śete. tūṣṇīm bhava.
शी.english: Hey, father is sleeping now. Be quiet.

नि-क्षिप्.devanagari: बालकः शिलाखण्डं निक्षिपति। Boy throws the stone.

नि-क्षिप्.english: The mother throws the book on the table.
The father dropped the mirror on the ground.
Do you throw the letter into the water?
Let him drop this fruit, then we shall eat it.

चुम्ब्.english: Does the husband kiss the wife?

दॄ.devanagari: बालकः पत्रं दृणाति। Boy tears the paper.

दॄ.english: Don't tear the flower! It is beautiful.

छिक्.english: I'm sneezing! Sir, please give me medicine.

पुटी-कृ.devanagari: शुष्कवस्त्राणि सा पुटीकरोति। She folds dried clothes.

उद्-डाय्.devanagari: बालकः पत्रं उड्डाययति। Boy makes the paper flying.

उद्-डाय्.english: The bird makes [itself] fly in the sky.
The girl made the kite fly.
Do you make the crow fly?
I make my body fly, follow me!

प्र-नुद्.devanagari: सः वाहनं प्रणुदति। He pushes the vehicle.
अहं शकटं प्रणुदामि, भवान् अपि प्रणुदतु।
प्र-नुद्.transliteration: aham śakataṃ pranudāmi, bhavān api pranudatu.
प्र-नुद्.english: I push the cart; please you also push it.

अव-सृप.devanagari: बालिका अवसर्पिकया अवसर्पति। Girl slides down via slider.

अव-सृप.english: The snake slides down from the tree.
The child slipped down from the mountain.

आ-लम्ब्.english: The boy leans over the tree.
They (two) leaned over at the water's edge.
Do you lean over at the window?
Hey! Be careful, don't lean over!

कास्.devanagari: अरे! किमर्थं त्वं कासते? किं ज्वरः अस्ति?
कास्.transliteration: are! kimarthṁ tvaṁ kāsate? kiṁ jvara: asti?
कास्.english: Hey! Why are you coughing? Do you have a fever?

वम्.english: The boy vomits after eating food.

वम्.devanagari: भगिनी! त्वं किम् वमसि? कच्छ! अहं औषधं आनयामि।
वम्.transliteration: bhaginī! tvam kim vamasi? kachcha! aham auṣadhṃ ānayāmi.
वम्.english: Sister! Are you vomiting? Come here! I will bring medicine.

वि-दार्.devanagari: सः पत्रं विदारयति। He tears the paper.

वि-दार्.english: Don't tear your body! That causes pain.

प्र-साध्.devanagari: माता केशं प्रसाधयति। Mother decorates the hair.
हे सखे! त्वं वस्त्रं प्रसाधय। निमन्त्रणं आगत्य भवेत्।
प्र-साध्.transliteration: he sakhe! tvaṁ vastraṁ prasādha. nimantraṇaṁ āgatya bhavet.
प्र-साध्.english: Hey friend! Adorn your clothes. The invitation has arrived.

परि-ईक्ष्.devanagari: भवान् कિम् इदं परीक्षते? आम्, अहं परीक्षे।
परि-ईक्ष्.transliteration: bhavān kim idam parīkṣate? ām, aham parīkṣe.
परि-ईक्ष्.english: Are you examining this? Yes, I am examining it.

आ-रोप्.devanagari: बालकः सस्यं आरोपयति। Boy plants the plant.
अहम् फलवृक्षान् आरोपयामि। त्वं किं आरोपयसि?
आ-रोप्.transliteration: aham phalavṛkṣān āropayāmi. tvam kim āropayasi?
आ-रोप्.english: I plant fruit trees. What do you plant?

सीव्.devanagari: माता वस्त्रं सीव्यति। Mother stitches the cloth.
अहं दारिकां सीव्यामि, त्वं किं करोषि?
सीव्.transliteration: ahaṃ dārikāṃ sīvyāmi, tvaṃ kiṃ karoṣi?
सीव्.english: I am stitching the cloth, what are you doing?

खन्.english: The farmer digs in the field.
I dig in order to plant seeds.

निस्-पीड्.devanagari: सा वस्त्राणि निष्पीडयति। She squeezes the clothes.

निस्-पीड्.english: Hey! Let him squeeze the lemon.

अव-रुह्.english: The boy gets down from the tree.
The elephant got down from the mountain.
Does the horse get down from the platform?
Hey! Please get down from the roof.

रोप्.devanagari: माता बीजं रोपयति। Mother plants a seed.

रोप्.english: The farmer plants grain in the field.
Where do you plant the flower?

रोप्.devanagari: अहं तु शाकं रोपयामि, भवान् किम् रोपयसि?
रोप्.transliteration: ahaṁ tu śākaṁ ropyāmi, bhavān kim ropysis?
रोप्.english: I plant vegetables, what do you plant?

कृष्.devanagari: अश्वः वाहनं कर्षति। Horse pulls the vehicle.

कृष्.english: The strong man pulled the rope.

कृष्.devanagari: भोः, मां कर्ष! अहं पश्चाद् आसे।
कृष्.transliteration: bhoh, mām karṣ! aham paśchād āse.
कृष्.english: Hey, pull me! I am behind.

सम्-मार्ज्.devanagari: अहं कक्षां सम्मार्जयामि। भवान् अपि सम्मार्जयति किम्?
सम्-मार्ज्.transliteration: ahaṃ kakṣāṃ sammārjayāmi. bhavān api sammārjayati kim?
सम्-मार्ज्.english: I am cleaning the classroom. Are you also cleaning?

मार्ज्.devanagari: माता स्थलां मार्जयति। Mother cleans the floor.

उद्-नी.devanagari: भारवाहः भारम् उन्नयति। Worker lifts the weight.

उद्-नी.english: The sun lifts itself in the sky.
The boy lifted the leaf from the ground.
Does this man lift the stone?

उद्-नी.devanagari: अहं भुजौ उन्नयामि। दृश्यतु मम बलम्।
उद्-नी.transliteration: Ahaṁ bhujau unnayāmi. Dṛśyatu mama balam.
उद्-नी.english: I lift my arms. See my strength!

सिञ्च्.devanagari: बालकः जलेन सिञ्चति। Boy sprinkles the water.

सिञ्च्.english: The gardener sprinkles water on the flowers.
The housewife sprinkled oil in the kitchen.
Do you sprinkle water in the garden?

सिञ्च्.devanagari: भो! क्षेत्रं सिञ्च। अहं सहायं करिष्यामि।
सिञ्च्.transliteration: bhō! kṣētraṃ siñch. ahaṃ sahāyaṃ karisyāmi.
सिञ्च्.english: Hey! Sprinkle the field. I will help you.

छिद्.devanagari: सः वृक्षं चिनत्ति। He cuts the tree.
अहं कष्ठं छिनामि। त्वं किं करोषि?
छिद्.transliteration: ahaṃ kaṣṭhaṃ chināmi. tvaṃ kiṃ karoṣi?
छिद्.english: I cut the wood. What are you doing?

अव-तॄ.devanagari: कपाटिकायाः वस्तूनि अवतारयतु। Put down items from cupboard.

अव-तॄ.english: He puts down the book from the table.
The teacher put down the students on the ground.
Are you putting down the cloth from the tree?
Hey, please put down the merchandise from the shop.

चूर्ण्.devanagari: सः मरीचिकाः चूर्णयति। He powders the chillies.

अव-नम्.english: The teacher bows toward the student.
The king bowed to the deity.
To what does the monk bow?

निस्-कोष्.devanagari: बालकः कदलीफलं निष्कोषयति। Boy peals the banana.

निस्-कोष्.english: Hey! Are you pealing the grass?

प्र-हृ.devanagari: बालकः कन्दुकं प्रहरति। Boy hits the ball.

तोल्.devanagari: सा शाकं तोलयति। She measures the vegetables.

निस्-वाप्.devanagari: दीपं निर्वापयतु। Switch off the light.

ज्वल्.english: Hey! Where does this lamp light?

प्र-ज्वाल्.english: Hey friend, light the lamp quickly!

मा.devanagari: माता क्षीरं माति। Mother measures the milk.

नि-ष्ठीव्.devanagari: अत्र मा निष्ठीवतु। Do not spit here.

नि-ष्ठीव्.english: The cow spat on the path.
Do not spit! It is very unclean.
The boy spits because of illness.

प्र-सार्.devanagari: माता कटं प्रसारयति। Mother spreads the mat.

प्र-सार्.english: Do you spread the ancient text?
I am spreading the news today.

प्र-तुम्फ्.english: He hits, but I do not hit.

चि.devanagari: यदिष्टं चिनोतु। Choose the one which you like.
वयं कः चिनोमः? तव मित्रं वा?
चि.transliteration: vayaṃ kaḥ chinomah? tava mitraṃ vā?
चि.english: Whom shall we choose? Your friend or someone else?

लङ्घ्.english: The horse mounts upon the mountain.
The boy mounted upon the branch.
Does the elephant mount upon the wall?

लङ्घ्.devanagari: सिंहः वनस्य शिलां लङ्घयति। किमर्थम् तत् करोति?
लङ्घ्.transliteration: siṁhaḥ vanasya śilām laṅghayati. kimartham tat karoti?
लङ्घ्.english: The lion mounts upon the forest rock. Why does he do that?

जागृ.devanagari: बालः प्रातः ५ वादने जागर्ति। Boy wakes up at 5 AM.
सूर्यः पूर्वदिशायाम् उदेति तदा पक्षिणः जागर्ति।
जागृ.transliteration: Sūryaḥ pūrvadishāyām udeti tadā pakshinaḥ jāgarti.
जागृ.english: When the sun rises in the east, the birds awake.
I used to wake up at 6 o'clock every day.
Oh, you're awake now! Good morning!

शुध्.devanagari: माता तण्‍डुलान् शोधयति। Mother cleans the rice.

शुध्.english: Hey friend! Please purify the vessel.

आ-ह्वे.devanagari: माता बालकम् आह्वयति। Mother calls the boy.

आ-ह्वे.english: Hey! Call me. I am coming.

पिष्.devanagari: माता कलायं पिनष्टि। Mother grinds the ground nuts.

पिष्.english: Hey, Neeta! Please grind the turmeric.

आ-दा.devanagari: बालकः कपाटिकायाः वस्त्रम् आदत्ते। Boy takes cloth from the cupboard.

आ-दा.english: The student accepts the teacher's instruction.
When do you receive the fruits?

निस्-पव्.devanagari: माता तण्‍डुलान् निष्पवते। Mother winnows the rice.
अहं निष्पवामि, त्वं किं न निष्पवसे?
निस्-पव्.transliteration: ahaṃ niṣpavāmi, tvaṃ kiṃ na niṣpavase?
निस्-पव्.english: I winnow, why don't you winnow?

मन्थ्.devanagari: माता नवनीतं मन्थति। Mother churns the butter.
अहं क्षीरं मन्थे, त्वं कुत्र असि?
मन्थ्.transliteration: ahaṁ kṣīraṁ manthe, tvam kutra asi?
मन्थ्.english: I am churning the milk, where are you?

उद्-घर्ष्.devanagari: माता वस्त्राणि उद्घर्षति। Mother rubs clothes together.

उद्-घर्ष्.english: Are you rubbing your hands together?

उद्-घर्ष्.devanagari: अरे! तुम् किं उद्घर्षसि? मैं भी करोमि।
उद्-घर्ष्.transliteration: are! tum kiṃ udghṛṣasi? maiṃ bhī karomi.
उद्-घर्ष्.english: Hey! What are you rubbing together? I'll do it too.

कुट्ट.devanagari: माता मरीचिकां कुट्टति। Mother grinds the chillies.

कुट्ट.english: Sister, grind the grain. Yes, mother.

भ्रज्ज्.devanagari: माता दोशां भृञ्जति। Mother fries/cooks dosa.

भ्रज्ज्.english: In the kitchen, the cook fries oil.

दुह्.devanagari: गोपालः गां दोग्धि। Gopala milks the cow.

दुह्.english: The milkmaid milks the cow every day.

दुह्.devanagari: अहं तु प्रातः गां दोग्धि, भवान् अपि किम्?
दुह्.transliteration: Ahaṃ tu prātaḥ gāṃ dogdhi, bhavān api kim?
दुह्.english: I milk the cow in the morning. Do you also?

निर्-दिश्.devanagari: गुरुः शिष्यं निर्दिशति। Guru instructs the student.

निर्-दिश्.english: The mother instructs the child in the house.
The king directed the soldiers in battle.
What does the teacher instruct the student?
I am directing you on the path, follow me.

स्थाप्.devanagari: पिता आसन्दे पुस्तकं स्थापयति। Father places the book on the chair.

स्थाप्.english: The mother places food in the kitchen.
The teacher placed the word on the blackboard.
Who places the lamp on the table?

स्थाप्.devanagari: भ्राता, त्वं उद्याने पुष्पं स्थापयसि किम्?
स्थाप्.transliteration: bhrātā, tvam udyānē puṣpam sthāpayasi kim?
स्थाप्.english: Brother, are you placing the flower in the garden?

मिश्र्.devanagari: माता क्वथिते लवणं मिश्रयति। Mother mixes the salt with sambar.

मिश्र्.english: The boy mixes water with milk.
The cook mixed all the spices in the food.
Do you mix jaggery with oil?
Hey, go ahead and mix the sugar in the milk.

उद्-धृ.devanagari: माता कूपाद् जलम् उद्धरति। Mother extracts water from well.

उद्-धृ.english: The teacher raises the student out of the mud.
He raised the book from the ground.
Will the lord raise up the gods?

उद्-धृ.devanagari: अरे, मां कूपात् उद्धर! मैं डूबत आहे।
उद्-धृ.transliteration: are, māṁ kūpāt uddhar! maiṁ Dūbat āhe.
उद्-धृ.english: Hey, raise me out of the well! I am drowning.

अपि-धा.devanagari: बालकः पुस्तकं पिदधाति। Boy closes the book.

उद्-स्थाप्.devanagari: माता पुत्रम् उत्थापयति। Mother wakes up the son.

उद्-स्थाप्.english: The teacher wakes up the students.
The father woke up the boy.
Do you wake up your mother?

आ-हन्.devanagari: वादकः भेरीम् आहन्ति। Player plays the drum.

आ-हन्.english: Brother! Play the drum. What should I do?

अव-चि.devanagari: बालकः फलानि अवचिनोति। Boy picks the fruits.
अहम् तु पुष्पानि अवचिनोमि, किन्तु त्वम् न अवचिनोसि।
अव-चि.transliteration: aham tu puṣpāni avachinomi, kintu tvam na avachinosi.
अव-चि.english: I pick the flowers, but you do not pick them.

मुच्.devanagari: अर्जुनः बाणं मुञ्चति। Arjun throws the arrow.

मुच्.english: Does the boy release the ball?

वि-जन्.devanagari: पिता व्यजनेन वीजति। Father fans with fan.

वि-जन्.english: He fanned with a fan yesterday.
Hey, fan me! It is very hot.

वप्.devanagari: कृषकः बीजानि वपति। Farmer seeds the seeds.

वप्.english: He seeds the seeds every day.
The householder seeded the seeds yesterday.
Who seeds the seeds in this field?
Do you wish to seed the seeds?

लु.devanagari: कृषकः तृणं लुनाति। Farmer plucks the grass.

लु.english: He says, 'Come, let us reap the grain.'

सं-योज्.devanagari: माता सूचीं सूत्रेण संयोजयति। Mother joins needle and thread.

सं-योज्.english: The teacher joins the students with a book.
The father joined the rope with the tree.

सं-योज्.devanagari: किं त्वं मेरु पर्वते नदीं संयोजयसि?
सं-योज्.transliteration: kiṃ tvam meru parvate nadīṃ saṃyojayasi?
सं-योज्.english: Do you join the river with Mount Meru?

वि+कॄ.devanagari: धीवरः जले जालं विकिरति। Fisherman casts the net on the water.

वि+कॄ.english: The boy throws flowers into the sky.
The farmer scattered seeds in the field.
Do you throw food to the birds?

वि+कॄ.devanagari: अरे! सः तत्र कंकरान् विकिरति, आयाहि।
वि+कॄ.transliteration: Are! sah tatra kankarān vikiratī, āyāhi.
वि+कॄ.english: Hey! He's throwing pebbles there, come here.

सम्-चाल्.devanagari: शिक्षकः परीक्षां सञ्चालयति। Teacher conducts the exam.
अहं कार्यक्रमं सञ्चालयामि, त्वं किं करोषि?
सम्-चाल्.transliteration: ahaṁ kāryakramaṁ sañchālayāmi, tvaṁ kiṁ karoṣi?
सम्-चाल्.english: I conduct the program, what are you doing?

प्रेङ्खोल.devanagari: बालकः दोलया प्रेङ्खोलयति। Boy swings in the swing.

प्रेङ्खोल.english: The girl swings on the tree branch.
Yesterday those boys swung in the gardens.
Does this boy swing with a rope?

प्रेङ्खोल.devanagari: भोः! त्वम् अपि मयसह प्रेङ्खोलयसि न किम्?
प्रेङ्खोल.transliteration: bhōḥ! tvam api mayasah preṅkhōlayasi na kim?
प्रेङ्खोल.english: Hey! Won't you also swing with me?

ऊय्.devanagari: माता स्यूतं ऊयते। Mother weaves the bag.
हे देवि! कस्य कृते वस्त्रं ऊयते?
ऊय्.transliteration: he devi! kasya krte vastram ūyate?
ऊय्.english: O goddess! For whom are you weaving the garment?

वि-तॄ.devanagari: शिक्षकः पत्राणि वितरति। Teacher distributes the papers.

वि-तॄ.english: The mother distributes food to the children.
The king distributed money to the soldiers.
To whom do you distribute the flowers?

वि-तॄ.devanagari: अहं छात्रेभ्यः पुस्तकानि वितरामि। त्वं किं वितरसि?
वि-तॄ.transliteration: ahaṃ chātrebhya pustakāni vitarāmi. tvaṃ kiṃ vitarasi?
वि-तॄ.english: I distribute books to the students. What do you distribute?

उद्-मूल.devanagari: कृषकः सस्यम् उन्मूलयति। Farmer uproots the plant.

उद्-मूल.english: Where are you uprooting the grass?

आ-शिष्.devanagari: गुरुः शिष्यम् आशिषति। Guru blesses the student.

स्थग्.devanagari: पुरुषः लोकयानं स्थगयति। Man stops the bus.

भाज्.devanagari: अहं भूमिं भाजयामि, त्वम् अपि भाजय।
भाज्.transliteration: ahaṁ bhūmiṁ bhājayāmi, tvam api bhājaya.
भाज्.english: I divide the land; you divide too.

अनु-सृ.devanagari: बालकः मित्रम् अनुधावति। Boy chases the friend.

अनु-सृ.english: Does the brother chase the sister?

भ्रम्.english: The boy spins the wheel on the ground.
The dancer was spinning to the music.
Let him spin in the circle!

सम्-कल्.devanagari: अहम् अक्षराणि सङ्कलयामि, त्वम् किम् करोषि?
सम्-कल्.transliteration: aham akṣarāṇi saṅkalayāmi, tvam kim karoṣi?
सम्-कल्.english: I am adding letters, what are you doing?

शो.devanagari: बालिका अङ्कनीं श्यति। Girl sharpens the pencil.

भ्राम्.devanagari: बालकः विद्युद्व्यजनं भ्रामयति। Boy makes the electric fan to spin.

भ्राम्.english: The mother spins the spinning wheel.
Does your brother spin the toy top?

भ्राम्.devanagari: अहं चक्रं भ्रामयामि, भवान् अपि भ्रामयतु।
भ्राम्.transliteration: ahaṁ chakrṁ bhramāyāmi, bhavān api bhramayatu.
भ्राम्.english: I spin the wheel; you also spin it.

भञ्ज्.devanagari: बालकः कोपेन घटं भञ्जयति। Boy breaks the pot with anger.

भञ्ज्.english: The king smashes the enemy in battle.
He smashed the window with a stone.

अव-रुध्.devanagari: क्रीडालुः कन्दुकम् अवरुणद्धि। Sports man stops the ball.

अव-रुध्.english: Does this stone obstruct the door?

अव-रुध्.devanagari: भोः! तव रथः मम गतिम् अवरुणद्धि।
अव-रुध्.transliteration: Bhoh! tava rathah mama gatim avaruṇaddhi.
अव-रुध्.english: Hey! Your chariot obstructs my movement.

वि-अव-कल्.english: The teacher subtracted three from five.

वि-अव-कल्.devanagari: त्वं किं व्यवकलयसि? मैं सप्तात् चत्वारि व्यवकलयामि।
वि-अव-कल्.transliteration: tvaṃ kiṃ vyavakalaras?i Maiṃ saptāt chatvāri vyavakalaāmi.
वि-अव-कल्.english: What do you subtract? I subtract four from seven.

क्रम्.devanagari: पुरुषः नदीं क्रामति। Man crosses the river.

क्रम्.english: I cross the road. What about you?

नि-पीड्.devanagari: माता परीक्षार्थं शाकं निपीडयति। Mother presses the vegetable to test.

नि-पीड्.english: The boy pressed the flower with his hand.
Who is pressing this soft leaf?

नि-पीड्.devanagari: भवान् किं फलं निपीडयति? हाँ, मैं फलं परीक्षार्थं निपीडयामि।
नि-पीड्.transliteration: bhavan kim phalam nipīḍayati? hāñ, main phalam parīkṣārtham nipīḍayāmi.
नि-पीड्.english: Are you pressing the fruit? Yes, I am pressing the fruit to test it.

मस्ज्.devanagari: माता जलनयनार्थं घटं जले मज्जयति। Mother dips pot into the water to take water.

मस्ज्.english: The boy dips water for bathing.
The teacher dipped the student in the water of knowledge.

मस्ज्.devanagari: किं त्वं अपि फलं मधुरे जलनयने मज्जयसि?
मस्ज्.transliteration: kiṃ tvam api phalaṃ madhure jalanayane majjayasi?
मस्ज्.english: Do you also dip the fruit in sweet water?

मस्ज्.devanagari: अहं घटं गङ्गायां मज्जयामि। त्वं किं करोषि?
मस्ज्.transliteration: ahaṃ ghaTaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ majjayāmi. tvam kiṃ karoṣi?
मस्ज्.english: I am dipping the pot in the Ganges. What are you doing?

गुण्.english: The student multiplied two by three.
Do you multiply five by six?

गुण्.devanagari: अहं चतुर्दश गुणयामि, त्वं किं करोषि?
गुण्.transliteration: ahaṃ chaturddash guṇayāmi, tvaṃ kiṃ karoṣi?
गुण्.english: I multiply fourteen, what do you do?

शासितृ.devanagari: एषः शासिता अस्ति। He is the administrator.

प्रेषक.devanagari: प्रेषकः अत्र नास्ति। No sender here.

प्रेषक.english: The sender sent the parcel yesterday.

कम्प.devanagari: माता उत्थापनार्थं पुत्रं कम्पयति। Mother shakes the son to wake him up.
अरे, मा मां कम्पय। शांतः भव।
कम्प.transliteration: Are, mā māṃ kampaya. Śāntaḥ bhava.
कम्प.english: Hey, don't shake me. Be calm.

वै-पत्र.english: I am sending you an email.

प्रशासक.devanagari: एषः प्रशासकः अस्ति। He is the administrator.

प्रशासक.english: The administrator works in the city.
The administrator made a decision yesterday.
Who is the administrator of this region?
O Administrator! Why have you come?

व्यवस्थापिका.devanagari: एषः व्यवस्थापकः अस्ति। He is the administrator.

व्यवस्थापिका.english: The administrator does the work of the school.
The administrator gave orders to the students yesterday.
Was the administrator in the office?

व्यवस्थापक.devanagari: एषः व्यवस्थापकः अस्ति। He is the administrator.

व्यवस्थापक.english: The administrator does the work of the school.
The administrator appointed students in education yesterday.
Is the administrator present in the meeting?

व्यवस्थापक.devanagari: भोः व्यवस्थापक! कृपया मां सहाय्यं कुरु।
व्यवस्थापक.transliteration: bho vyavasthāpaka! kṛpayā māṃ sahāyyaṃ kuru.

नि-अञ्च्.devanagari: माता कूपीं प्रक्षाल्य न्यञ्चति। Mother hangs down the bottle after washing.

नि-अञ्च्.english: He hangs down the bark from the tree.
The maidservant hung down the cloth on the rope.
Why does your face hang down like that?
Hey, why do the branches hang down? (With joy.)

मौखिक.devanagari: मौखिकपरीक्षा प्रचलति। Oral exam is going on.

मौखिक.english: Did you pass the oral exam?
I am in favor of oral education.

प्रशासिका.devanagari: एषः प्रशासकः अस्ति। He is the administrator.

प्रशासिका.english: She is the administrator of the school and does the work.
Was the administrator in the office?

प्रशासिका.devanagari: नमस्ते प्रशासिके! किं वयं एकत्र सहायतां कुर्मः?
प्रशासिका.transliteration: namaste praśāsike! kiṁ vayaṁ ekattra sahāytāṁ kurmah?
प्रशासिका.english: Hello administrator! Can we help you together?

शासित्री.devanagari: एषः शासिता अस्ति। He is the administrator.

शासित्री.english: She, the administrator, does the work of the city.
The administrator made a decision yesterday.

शासित्री.devanagari: किम् एषा शासित्री राज्यस्य भारं वहति?
शासित्री.transliteration: kim eṣā śāsitri̍ rājyasya bhāraṃ vahati?
शासित्री.english: Does this administrator carry the burden of the kingdom?

शासित्री.devanagari: भो शासित्री! किं त्वम् जनानां सेवां कुरुषि?
शासित्री.transliteration: bho śāsitri̍! kiṃ tvam janānāṃ sevāṃ kuruṣi?
शासित्री.english: O administrator! Do you serve the people?

विस्तारक.devanagari: विस्तारकः तन्त्रांशं निर्माति। Developer develops software.

विस्तारक.english: The developer starts a new project.
Is the developer capable of solving the problem?

विस्तारक.devanagari: भोः विस्तारक, किं वयं कार्यं पूर्णं कर्तुं शक्नुमः?
विस्तारक.transliteration: Bhōh vistārak, kim vayam kāryam pūrṇam kartum shaknumah?
विस्तारक.english: Hey developer, can we complete the work?

मौखिका.devanagari: मौखिकपरीक्षा प्रचलति। Oral exam is going on.
मौखिकाः परम्पराः भारते प्राचीनकालात् अस्तित्वं धारयन्ति।
मौखिका.transliteration: Maukhikāḥ paramparāḥ bhārate prāchīnakālāt astitvam dhārayanti.
मौखिका.english: Oral traditions have existed in India since ancient times.
The teacher gave oral knowledge to the student.

मौखिका.devanagari: भवान् मौखिकीं साक्षात्कारं पूर्णम् कृतवान् किम्?
मौखिका.transliteration: Bhavān maukhikīm sākṣātkāram pūrṇam kṛtavān kim?
मौखिका.english: Did you complete the oral interview?
I hope to pass the oral examination.

शारीरिकभाषा.devanagari: शारीरिकभाषया अनुक्तमपि ज्ञातुं शक्यते। By body language, one can know untold things too.'

शारीरिकभाषा.english: Body language is an important part of human communication.

शारीरिकभाषा.devanagari: तस्य शारीरिकभाषया तस्य असहमति स्पष्टः आसीत्।
शारीरिकभाषा.transliteration: tasya śārīrikabhāṣayā tasya asahamati spaṣṭaḥ āsīt.
शारीरिकभाषा.english: Through his body language, his disagreement was clear.

शारीरिकभाषा.devanagari: किं शारीरिकभाषा कथितवाक्यात् अधिकं महत्त्वं रखति?
शारीरिकभाषा.transliteration: kiṃ śārīrikabhāṣā kathitavākyāt adhikaṃ mahattvaṃ rakhati?
शारीरिकभाषा.english: Does body language carry more importance than spoken words?

शारीरिकभाषा.devanagari: भवान् शारीरिकभाषां कथं शिक्षितवान्? मम शारीरिकभाषा दुर्बलः एव।
शारीरिकभाषा.transliteration: bhavān śārīrikabhāṣāṃ kathaṃ śikṣitavān? mama śārīrikabhāṣā durbalah eva.
शारीरिकभाषा.english: How did you learn body language? My body language is still weak.

निर्मात्री.devanagari: निर्माता तन्त्रांशं निर्माति। Developer develops the software.

निर्मात्री.english: The developer creates a new application.
The developer built the system yesterday.

निर्मात्री.devanagari: हे निर्माता, इदं कोडं सुधयतु कृपया।
निर्मात्री.transliteration: He nirmātā, idaṁ kōḍaṁ sudhayatu kṛpayā.
निर्मात्री.english: Hey developer, please fix this code.

निर्मातृ.devanagari: निर्माता तन्त्रांशं निर्माति। Developer develops the software.

निर्मातृ.english: The developer successfully created the machine.

निर्मातृ.devanagari: भोः निर्माता! किं आप नवीनं उत्पादनं निर्मिष्यसि?
निर्मातृ.transliteration: Bhoh nirmātā! Kim āp navinam utpādanam nirmiṣyasi?
निर्मातृ.english: Hey developer! Will you create a new product?

विश्लेषिका.devanagari: एषः कार्यालये विश्लेषकः। He is Programmar or Analyst.
सा विश्लेषिका डेटा विश्लेषण करती है।
विश्लेषिका.transliteration: sā viśleṣikā ḍeṭā viśleṣaṇ karatī hai.
विश्लेषिका.english: She is an analyst who analyzes data.
Those analysts wrote the program yesterday.

विश्लेषिका.devanagari: अहम् विश्लेषिका हूँ। समस्याओं का समाधान करती हूँ।
विश्लेषिका.transliteration: aham viśleṣikā hū̃. samasyāõ kā samādhān karatī hū̃.
विश्लेषिका.english: I am an analyst. I solve problems.

कुट्टक.devanagari: कुट्टकः तन्त्रांशस्य दत्तनिधिं प्रविशति। Hacker enters into the database of the software.

कुट्टक.english: The hacker enters into the computer.
Does the hacker steal your information?

कुट्टक.devanagari: एषः कुट्टकः भयङ्करः अस्ति न किम्?
कुट्टक.transliteration: eṣaḥ kuṭṭakaḥ bhayaṅkaraḥ asti na kim?
कुट्टक.english: This hacker is dangerous, isn't he?

विश्लेषक.devanagari: एषः कार्यालये विश्लेषकः। He is Programmar or Analyst.

विश्लेषक.english: She is an analyst who analyzes data.
Hello! What is your profession, analyst?

विधिकारी.devanagari: विधिकारः तन्त्रांशं लिखति। Developer writes the software.

विधिकारी.english: The developer creates a new program.
The developer fixed the error yesterday.
Did the developer complete the program?

विधिकारी.devanagari: भोः विधिकारे, किमर्थं एषः त्रुटिः जातः?
विधिकारी.transliteration: bhōḥ vidhikāre, kimarthaṁ ēṣaḥ truṭiḥ jātaḥ?
विधिकारी.english: Hey developer, why did this error occur?

विधिकार.devanagari: विधिकारः तन्त्रांशं लिखति। Developer writes the software.

विधिकार.english: The developer creates a new application.
The developer corrected the bug yesterday.
Will the developer edit the system?

विधिकार.devanagari: नमस्ते विधिकार, भवान् कथं सिद्धिं प्राप्नोति?
विधिकार.transliteration: namaste vidhikāra, bhavān kathaṃ siddhiṃ prāpnoti?
विधिकार.english: Hello developer, how do you achieve success?

अङ्कसङ्गणक.devanagari: अङ्कसङ्गणकं लघु अस्ति। Laptop is small.

अङ्कसङ्गणक.english: The laptop is in my hand.
When do you want to buy a laptop?

अङ्कसङ्गणक.devanagari: भवतः अङ्कसङ्गणकं कीदृशं अस्ति? इदम् नवीनं अस्ति।
अङ्कसङ्गणक.transliteration: bhavata: aṅkasaṅgaṇakam kīdṛśam asti? idam navīnam asti.
अङ्कसङ्गणक.english: What is your laptop like? This one is new.

अध्यङ्कसङ्गणक.devanagari: अध्यङ्कसङ्गणकं सर्वत्र दृश्यते। Laptop is seen everywhere.

अध्यङ्कसङ्गणक.english: Who wants to buy a laptop?
I worked with a laptop yesterday.

अध्यङ्कसङ्गणक.devanagari: भवतः अध्यङ्कसङ्गणकम् कुत्र अस्ति? - मम कक्षायां अस्ति।
अध्यङ्कसङ्गणक.transliteration: bhavatḥ adhyaṅkasaṅgaṇakam kutra asti? - mama kakṣāyāṁ asti.
अध्यङ्कसङ्गणक.english: Where is your laptop? - It is in my room.

विस्तारिका.devanagari: विस्तारकः तन्त्रांशं निर्माति। Developer develops software.

विस्तारिका.english: The developer creates a new application.
The developer fixed the bug yesterday.

विस्तारिका.devanagari: किं विस्तारिका इदं समस्या समाधातुम् शक्नोति?
विस्तारिका.transliteration: Kiṁ vistārikā idaṁ samasya samādhātum śaknoti?
विस्तारिका.english: Can the developer solve this problem?

विस्तारिका.devanagari: नमस्ते विस्तारक! भवान् केन भाषायां कोडं लिखति?
विस्तारिका.transliteration: Namaste vistārak! Bhavān kena bhāṣāyāṁ kōḍaṁ likhati?
विस्तारिका.english: Hello developer! In which language do you write code?

व्युत्पादिका.devanagari: व्युत्पादकः तन्रांशं उत्पादयति। Developer develops the software.

व्युत्पादिका.english: The developer creates a new application.
Does the developer correct the program?

व्युत्पादिका.devanagari: अरे, व्युत्पादक! किं तव कार्यं समाप्तम्?
व्युत्पादिका.transliteration: are, vyutpādaka! kiṁ tava kāryaṁ samāptam?
व्युत्पादिका.english: Hey, developer! Is your work finished?

व्युत्पादक.devanagari: व्युत्पादकः तन्रांशं उत्पादयति। Developer develops the software.

व्युत्पादक.english: The developer created a new program.

व्युत्पादक.devanagari: किम् व्युत्पादकः इदं समस्यां समाधातुं शक्नोति?
व्युत्पादक.transliteration: kim vyutpādakaḥ idaṁ samasyāṁ samādhātuṁ śaknoti?
व्युत्पादक.english: Can the developer solve this problem?

व्युत्पादक.devanagari: नमस्ते व्युत्पादक! भवान् कीदृशं कार्यं करोति?
व्युत्पादक.transliteration: namaste vyutpādaka! bhavān kīdṛśaṁ kāryaṁ karoti?
