व्युत्पादक.english: Hello developer! What kind of work do you do?

सङ्गणकप्रबन्धक.devanagari: सङ्गणकप्रबन्धकः प्रवेशनियन्त्रणनियमान् रचयति। System administrator writes rules for access control.

सङ्गणकप्रबन्धक.english: The system administrator protects the network.
The system administrator changed the employees' passwords.
Did the system administrator restart the server?

सङ्गणकप्रबन्धक.devanagari: भोः सङ्गणकप्रबन्धक, एतत् समस्या कदा समाधानीयते?
सङ्गणकप्रबन्धक.transliteration: bhoh sangaṇakaprabandhaka, etat samasya kada samadhaniyate?
सङ्गणकप्रबन्धक.english: Hey system administrator, when will this problem be solved?

सङ्गणकव्यवस्थापक.devanagari: सङ्गणकव्यवस्थापकः प्रवेशनियन्त्रणनियमान् रचयति। System administrator writes rules for access control.

सङ्गणकव्यवस्थापक.english: The system administrator manages all security systems.
The system administrator fixed an error yesterday.
Does the system administrator protect the database?

सङ्गणकव्यवस्थापक.devanagari: नमस्ते सङ्गणकव्यवस्थापक! मम पासवर्डं परिवर्तयितुं शक्नोषि किम्?
सङ्गणकव्यवस्थापक.transliteration: namaste sañ­gaṇaka­vyavasthāpaka! mama pāsvarḍaṁ parivarta­yituṁ śaknośi kim?
सङ्गणकव्यवस्थापक.english: Hello system administrator! Can you help me change my password?

भञ्जक.devanagari: भञ्जकः तन्त्रांशस्य दत्तनिधिं प्रविशति। Hacker enters into the database of the software.

भञ्जक.english: The hacker will break the computer.
The hacker stole the password and left.

भञ्जक.devanagari: किं भञ्जकः तव खातां हरितुं शक्तः?
भञ्जक.transliteration: kiṃ bhañjakः tava khātāṃ harituṃ śaktaḥ?
भञ्जक.english: Can the hacker steal your account?
The hacker is coming! Be careful.

कुञ्चिकापटल.devanagari: एतद् कुञ्चिकापटलम् अस्ति। This is key board.

कुञ्चिकापटल.english: Will you give me the keyboard?

अभिगमपद.devanagari: प्रयुक्तेः अभिगमपदं किम्? What is the access code of the application?

अभिगमपद.english: The access code should be memorable.
The friend gave the access code.
Do you know the access code?
Please tell me the access code, sir.

प्रांशु.devanagari: प्रांशुः शल्यक्रियायामपि उपयुज्यते। Laser is used in surgery too.

प्रांशु.english: Is the laser a type of light?
Hey! Where can the laser be found?

उपकरण.devanagari: कार्यसिद्ध्यर्थं बहूनि उपकरणानि सन्ति। There are many devices to complete the work.

उपकरण.english: Ram wants to buy a new device.

उपकरण.devanagari: भोः, मह्यं एकः उपकरणः आवश्यकः अस्ति।
उपकरण.transliteration: Bhoḥ, mahyaṁ ekaḥ upkaraṇaḥ āvaśyakaḥ asti.

परांशु.devanagari: परांशुः शल्यक्रियायामपि उपयुज्यते। Laser is used in surgery too.
किं परांशुः प्रकाशस्य एकः प्रकारः वर्तते?
परांशु.transliteration: kiṃ parāṃśuḥ prakāśasya ekaḥ prakāraḥ vartate?
परांशु.english: Is the laser a type of light?

परांशु.devanagari: भोः! परांशुः कुत्र क्रयते? Bho! parāṃśuḥ kutra krayate?
परांशु.english: Hey! Where can one buy a laser?

प्रवेश.devanagari: भवता सञ्चयस्य प्रवेशः शक्यते वा? Can you access the folder?

प्रवेश.english: Access to the path is easy.

प्रवेश.devanagari: तस्य गृहस्य प्रवेशः मया न अनुज्ञातः आसीत्।
प्रवेश.transliteration: tasya gṛhasya praveśaḥ mayā na anujñātaḥ āsīt.
प्रवेश.english: I was not permitted access to his house.

प्रवेश.devanagari: किं नगरस्य प्रवेशः अद्य संभवः अस्ति?
प्रवेश.transliteration: kiṁ nagrasya praveśaḥ aday sambhavaḥ asti?
प्रवेश.english: Is access to the city possible today?

प्रवेश.devanagari: कृपया राज्यस्य प्रवेशः मुझे दातुं शक्नोषि वा?
प्रवेश.transliteration: kṛpayā rājyasya praveśaḥ mujhe dātuṁ śaknośi vā?
प्रवेश.english: Could you please give me access to the kingdom?

सङ्गणक.devanagari: कार्यालयेषु एव मञ्चगतं सङ्गणकं दृश्यते। Desktop computer is seen only in offices.

सङ्गणक.english: The desktop computer does work quickly.

सङ्गणक.devanagari: अहं कल मञ्चगतं सङ्गणकं क्रेतुं इच्छामि।
सङ्गणक.transliteration: ahaṃ kala mañchagataṃ saṅgaṇakaṃ kretuṃ ichhāmi.
सङ्गणक.english: I wanted to buy a desktop computer yesterday.

सङ्गणक.devanagari: भवान् मञ्चगतं सङ्गणकं कदा उपयोगं करतु?
सङ्गणक.transliteration: bhavān mañchagataṃ saṅgaṇakaṃ kadā upayogaṃ karatu?
सङ्गणक.english: When do you use the desktop computer?

सङ्गणक.devanagari: त्वं मञ्चगतस्य सङ्गणकस्य नाम जानसि वा?
सङ्गणक.transliteration: tvaṃ mañchagatasya saṅgaṇakasya nāma jānasi vā?
सङ्गणक.english: Do you know the name of this desktop computer?

कीलफलक.devanagari: एतद् कीलफलकम् अस्ति। This is key board.

कीलफलक.english: A keyboard is necessary in the office.
I wrote a letter with the keyboard.
Where did you keep the keyboard?

कीलफलक.devanagari: भोः, कीलफलकं मह्यं दातुं शक्नोषि किम्?
कीलफलक.transliteration: bhoh, kīlaphalkam mahyam dātum śaknoshi kim?
कीलफलक.english: Hey, can you give me the keyboard?

अधिमञ्चसङ्गणक.devanagari: कार्यालयेषु एव अधिमञ्चसङ्गणकं दृश्यते। Desktop computer is seen only in offices.

अधिमञ्चसङ्गणक.english: This desktop computer is very powerful.
I bought a desktop computer before.
Do you use a desktop computer?
I need a desktop computer for work.

उत्सङ्गसङ्गणक.devanagari: उत्सङ्गसङ्गणकं सर्वत्र दृश्यते। Laptop is seen everywhere.

उत्सङ्गसङ्गणक.english: Yesterday I worked with the laptop.

उत्सङ्गसङ्गणक.devanagari: भवान् उत्सङ्गसङ्गणकं कुत्र रक्षति? मेज उपरि।
उत्सङ्गसङ्गणक.transliteration: Bhavān utsaṅgasaṅgaṇakam kutra rakṣati? Mez upari.
उत्सङ्गसङ्गणक.english: Where do you keep the laptop? On the table.

उत्पीठसङ्गणक.devanagari: कार्यालयेषु एव उत्पीठसङ्गणकं दृश्यते। Desktop computer is seen only in offices.

उत्पीठसङ्गणक.english: Yesterday the student wrote the lesson on a desktop computer.
Whose desktop computer do you wish to buy?

अभिगमकूट.devanagari: प्रयुक्तेः अभिगमकूटः कः? What is the access code of the application?

अभिगमकूट.english: I wrote down the access code.
Hey! Will you give me the access code?

व्युत्प्रकाशन.devanagari: व्युत्प्रकाशनं शल्यक्रियायामपि उपयुज्यते। Laser is used in surgery too.

व्युत्प्रकाशन.english: Laser is extremely important in medical treatment.
Scientists discovered a new use of laser.
Is laser also used in vision correction?
Hey, what kind of power does a laser have?

साधन.devanagari: कार्यसिद्ध्यर्थं बहूनि साधनानि सन्ति। There are many devices to complete the work.
यज्ञं करणार्थं आवश्यकं साधनं कुत्र आस्ति?
साधन.transliteration: yajñaṁ karaṇārtha āvaśyakaṁ sādhanaṁ kutra āsti?
साधन.english: Where is the necessary device for performing the sacrifice?
The teacher shows a beautiful device to the students.

साधन.devanagari: अहं पञ्चास्य दिनेषु एकं नूतनं साधनं खरीदितवान्।
साधन.transliteration: ahaṁ pañchāsya dineṣu ekaṁ nūtanaṁ sādhanaṁ kharīditavān.
साधन.english: I bought a new device five days ago.

साधन.devanagari: भोः! किं तव साधनं मार्जितं अस्ति?
साधन.transliteration: bhoḥ! kiṁ tava sādhanaṁ mārjitaṁ asti?

लेसर्.devanagari: लेसर् शल्यक्रियायामपि उपयुज्यते। Laser is used in surgery too.

लेसर्.english: Laser is a type of light.
The scientist conducted an experiment using a laser.
Do you know the uses of lasers?

लेसर्.devanagari: हे मित्र! लेसर् बहु उपयोगी यन्त्रः अस्ति।
लेसर्.transliteration: He mitra! Laser bahu upyogī yantraḥ asti.
लेसर्.english: Hey friend! Laser is a very useful device.

समय.devanagari: भवतः गूगुल्समयः अस्ति वा? Do you have Google Account?

समय.english: Please log in with your account.

लेखा.devanagari: भवतः गूगुल्लेखा अस्ति वा? Do you have Google Account?
कल मैंने अपना लेखा जांचा था।
लेखा.transliteration: kal mainne apnā lekhā jānchā thā.

लेखा.devanagari: मेरा लेखा बंद हो गया है। क्या मैं इसे फिर से खोल सकता हूं?
लेखा.transliteration: merā lekhā band ho gayā hai. kyā main ise phir se khol sktā hūm?
लेखा.english: My account has been closed. Can I reopen it?

कारकर.devanagari: विषविधिः कारकररूपेण अनुतिष्ठति। Virus runs in the form of agent.

कारकर.english: Fire is the agent of heat.
Wind was the agent of smell.
Who becomes the agent of the body?
God is said to be the agent of creation.

सामयिक.devanagari: भवतः गूगुल्सामयिकनाम किम्? What is your Google Account name?

प्रयुक्ति.devanagari: गणकप्रयुक्तिः कुत्रास्ति? Where is the calculator application?
अरे! प्रयुक्तिः न कार्यते। किं करवाणि?
प्रयुक्ति.transliteration: are! prayuktih na karyate. kim karavani?
प्रयुक्ति.english: Hey! The application is not working. What should I do?

अनुप्रयोग.devanagari: गणकानुप्रयोगः कुत्रास्ति? Where is the calculator application?

अनुप्रयोग.english: The application of science is important in life.
What is the name of this application?
The application was nice, wasn't it?

अभिगमगूढपद.devanagari: प्रयुक्तेः अभिगमगूढपदं किम्? What is the access code of the application?
भवान् नवीनं अभिगमगूढपदं निर्मातुम् इच्छति किम्?
अभिगमगूढपद.transliteration: bhavān navīnam abhigamagūḍhapadam nirmātum ichhati kim?
अभिगमगूढपद.english: Do you want to create a new access code?
Please write the access code here.

सञ्जीवन.devanagari: सञ्जीवनेन बहूनि चलदृश्यानि निर्मीयन्ते अधुना। There are many movies created with animation nowadays.

सञ्जीवन.english: The qualities of his animation were excellent.
I am a fan of animation, are you?

प्रतिहस्त.devanagari: विषविधिः प्रतिहस्तरूपेण अनुतिष्ठति। Virus runs in the form of agent.

प्रतिहस्त.english: Disease is transmitted by an agent.
Who acts in the form of an agent?
The wind once carried fragrance like an agent.
Hey, why is this agent necessary?

सक्रियगवाक्ष.devanagari: सक्रियगवाक्षे लेपयतु। Paste in active window.

सक्रियगवाक्ष.english: The active window controls the application.
I changed the active window before.
Which was the active window just now?
Sir, please click on the active window, if you will.

चित्रचालन.devanagari: चित्रचालनेन बहूनि चलदृश्यानि निर्मीयन्ते अधुना। There are many movies created with animation nowadays.

चित्रचालन.english: In the past, animation was made by hand.

चित्रचालन.devanagari: किं भवान् चित्रचालनस्य माध्यमेन कार्य करोति?
चित्रचालन.transliteration: Kim bhavān chitrachālanasya mādhyamena kāry karoti?
चित्रचालन.english: Do you work through the medium of animation?

क्रियाशीलगवाक्ष.devanagari: क्रियाशीलगवाक्षाद् प्रतिलेखं स्वीकुरु। Copy from the active window.

क्रियाशीलगवाक्ष.english: The active window is currently functioning.
I wrote the text in the active window.
Do you have an active window on your computer?
Hey, please open the active window now.

जीवीकरण.devanagari: जीवीकरणेन बहूनि चलदृश्यानि निर्मीयन्ते अधुना। There are many movies created with animation nowadays.
जीवीकरणम् कला अस्ति यत्र चित्रा गतिमन्त: भवन्ति।
जीवीकरण.transliteration: jīvīkaraṇam kalā asti yatra citrā gatimantas bhavanti.
जीवीकरण.english: Animation is an art where pictures become moving.

जीवीकरण.devanagari: तस्य फलके जीवीकरणेन सुन्दरा कथा दर्शिता।
जीवीकरण.transliteration: tasya phalake jīvīkaraṇena sundarā kathā darśitā.
जीवीकरण.english: A beautiful story was shown on his screen through animation.

जीवीकरण.devanagari: किम् भवान् जीवीकरणम् कथं निर्माण करितवान्?
जीवीकरण.transliteration: kim bhavān jīvīkaraṇam kathaṁ nirmāṇ karitavān?
जीवीकरण.english: How did you make the animation?

जीवीकरण.devanagari: अहम् जीवीकरणस्य प्रशंसक अस्मि, त्वम् किम्?
जीवीकरण.transliteration: aham jīvīkaraṇasya praśaṁsak asmi, tvam kim?
जीवीकरण.english: I am a fan of animation, are you?

प्रवेशनियन्त्रण.devanagari: प्रवेशनियन्त्रणस्य नियमान् जालप्रबन्धकः रचयति। Network administrator writes rules for access control.

प्रवेशनियन्त्रण.english: Access control protects the security of the computer.
Access control functioned successfully in the office.

प्रवेशनियन्त्रण.devanagari: भवान् प्रवेशनियन्त्रणस्य महत्त्वं जानाति? हाँ, अहम् तस्य गुरुत्वं अवगच्छामि।
प्रवेशनियन्त्रण.transliteration: Bhavān praveśaniyantreṇasya mahattvaṃ jānāti? Hāñ, aham tasya gurutvaṃ avagacchāmi.
प्रवेशनियन्त्रण.english: Do you understand the importance of access control? Yes, I understand its significance.

अभिगमप्रकार.devanagari: भवान् केन अभिगमप्रकारेण कार्यं करोति? By what access mode, you perform your work?

अभिगमप्रकार.english: All students understand the teacher's access mode.
I entered the computer through the first access mode.

अभिगमप्रकार.devanagari: भोः! अभिगमप्रकारं परिवर्तयिष्यामि। - आम्, तत् भद्रम्।
अभिगमप्रकार.transliteration: bhoḥ! abhigamaprakāraṁ parivartayiṣyāmi. - ām, tat bhadram.
अभिगमप्रकार.english: Friend! I will change the access mode. - Yes, that's good.

चालनकील.devanagari: चालनकीलैः सारकं सारयतु। Move the cursor with arrow keys.

चालनकील.english: By pressing the arrow key, the picture moves.
I played the game with the arrow key.
Do you know the arrow key?
Hey! Where is the arrow key?

प्रतिलिखित.devanagari: प्रतिसप्ताहं प्रतिलिखितं भवेत्। Take backup everyweek.

कूटशलाका.devanagari: कूटशलाकबम्बग्रहणं कृत्वा लिखतु। Bill by scanning bar code.

कूटशलाका.english: The bar code shows the price of the item.
Please enter the bar code into the machine.

प्रतिलिखिता.devanagari: प्रतिसप्ताहं प्रतिलिखितं भवेत्। Take backup everyweek.
प्रतिलिखिता कुत्र संरक्षिता अस्ति? क्लाउडे वा।
प्रतिलिखिता.transliteration: pratilikkhitā kutra saṃrakṣhitā asti? klāude vā.
प्रतिलिखिता.english: Where is the backup stored? In the cloud?

श्रव्यसञ्चिका.devanagari: श्रव्यसञ्जिकां स्रोतसा शृणोतु। Hear the audio file by streaming.

श्रव्यसञ्चिका.english: This audio file is very pleasant.
The audio file was received yesterday.
Do you keep the audio file saved?
Listen to this audio file well! —Thank you.

यन्त्रीकरण.devanagari: यन्त्रीकरणेन अस्माकं कार्यं लघु सरलं च भवति। By automation, our work becomes small and easy.

यन्त्रीकरण.english: Automation is essential in the modern world.
In ancient times, automation did not exist.

You certainly know the benefits of automation.

कृत्रिमप्रज्ञा.devanagari: कृत्रिमाप्रज्ञायाः प्रवृद्धप्रभावः सर्वत्राधुना दृश्यते। The AI influence is seen everywhere nowadays.
अतीते कृत्रिमप्रज्ञा इदानीं इतना विकसिता नासीत्।
कृत्रिमप्रज्ञा.transliteration: atīte kṛtrimapragyā idānīṁ itanā vikasitā nāsīt.

वामोच्छेदक.devanagari: वामोच्छेदकेन पाठ्यं निष्कासयतु। Remove the text with backspace.

वामोच्छेदक.english: Having pressed the backspace key, the letter was deleted.
How will you use the backspace key?
The backspace key is important in a keyboard.
Friend, errors can be corrected with the backspace key.

प्रज्ञाकल्प.devanagari: प्रज्ञाकल्पस्य प्रवृद्धप्रभावः सर्वत्राधुना दृश्यते। The AI influence is seen everywhere nowadays.

प्रज्ञाकल्प.english: Artificial Intelligence makes human work easier.

प्रज्ञाकल्प.devanagari: प्रज्ञाकल्पस्य विकासः पिछले दशके अत्यधिकम् अभवत्।
प्रज्ञाकल्प.transliteration: Prajñākalpassya vikāsaḥ pichle dashke atyādhikam abhat.
प्रज्ञाकल्प.english: The development of AI was very significant in the last decade.
Do you know the uses of Artificial Intelligence?

प्रज्ञाकल्प.devanagari: अहं प्रज्ञाकल्पं नितरां रोचकं मन्ये। भवान् किम्?
प्रज्ञाकल्प.transliteration: Ahaṁ prajñākalpaṁ nitarāṁ rochakhaṁ manye. Bhavān kim?
प्रज्ञाकल्प.english: I find Artificial Intelligence very interesting. What about you?

कृतकप्रज्ञा.devanagari: कृतकप्रज्ञायाः प्रवृद्धप्रभावः सर्वत्राधुना दृश्यते। The AI influence is seen everywhere nowadays.

कृतकप्रज्ञा.english: Artificial Intelligence makes the work of humans easier.
The computer was specially developed with Artificial Intelligence.
How do you understand Artificial Intelligence?

कृतकप्रज्ञा.devanagari: अहं कृतकप्रज्ञां अध्ययनं करोमि। त्वमपि करोषि किम्?
कृतकप्रज्ञा.transliteration: Ahaṁ kṛtakaprajñāṁ adhyayanaṁ karomi. Tvamapi karoṣi kim?
कृतकप्रज्ञा.english: I am studying Artificial Intelligence. Are you doing it too?

परोक्षध्वनि.devanagari: परोक्षध्वनिना सम्यक् न श्रूयते। Due to background noise, audio is not heard

परोक्षध्वनि.english: Background noise in the classroom disturbs the teacher's words.

परोक्षध्वनि.devanagari: परोक्षध्वनिना कारणेन सभायां वक्तृ न श्रोतुं शक्तः।
परोक्षध्वनि.transliteration: parokṣadhvninā kāraṇena sabhāyāṁ vaktṛ na śrotuṁ śaktaḥ.
परोक्षध्वनि.english: Because of background noise, the speaker in the assembly could not be heard.
Why does background noise interrupt our conversation?
Having heard the background noise, what do you think?

परोक्षरव.devanagari: परोक्षरवेण सम्यक् न श्रूयते। Due to background noise, audio is not heard.

परोक्षरव.english: Background noise hinders the students' study in the classroom.
Yesterday, the conversation was interrupted by background noise.

परोक्षरव.devanagari: किं परोक्षरवः दूरभाषे श्रवणीयताम् कम् करोति?
परोक्षरव.transliteration: kiṁ parokṣravaḥ dūrabhāṣe śravaṇīyatāṁ kam karoti?
परोक्षरव.english: Does background noise reduce audibility on the telephone?

परोक्षरव.devanagari: अरे, परोक्षरवः अत्यधिकः अस्ति। कम् करणीयः?
परोक्षरव.transliteration: are, parokṣravaḥ atyadhikaḥ asti. kam karaṇīyaḥ?
परोक्षरव.english: Hey, the background noise is too much. What should be done?

स्वयञ्चालन.devanagari: स्वयञ्चालनेन अस्माकं कार्यं लघु सरलं च भवति। By automation, our work becomes small and easy.

स्वयञ्चालन.english: Automation is the heart of a modern factory.

स्वयञ्चालन.devanagari: पञ्चवर्षपूर्वं स्वयञ्चालनं इह व्यवसायः न आसीत्।
स्वयञ्चालन.transliteration: pañchavarsapūrvam svayañchālanam iha vyavasāyah na āsīt.
स्वयञ्चालन.english: Five years ago, automation was not in this business.

स्वयञ्चालन.devanagari: किं स्वयञ्चालनं श्रमिकानां नौकरीं नष्टं करोति?
स्वयञ्चालन.transliteration: Kim svayañchālanam śramikānām naukarīm nashtam karoti?
स्वयञ्चालन.english: Does automation destroy the jobs of workers?

स्वयञ्चालन.devanagari: भवान् स्वयञ्चालनस्य लाभान् समझन्ति? हाँ, अहं समझामि।
स्वयञ्चालन.transliteration: bhavān svayañchālanasya lābhān samjhanti? Hāñ, aham samjhāmi.
स्वयञ्चालन.english: Do you understand the benefits of automation? Yes, I do.

स्वयंकारण.devanagari: स्वयंकरणेन अस्माकं कार्यं लघु सरलं च भवति। By automation, our work becomes small and easy.
स्वयंकारणं आधुनिक तकनीकस्य महत्त्वपूर्णः अंशः अस्ति।
स्वयंकारण.transliteration: Svayaṃkāraṇaṃ ādhunika taknikasya mahattvapu͠rṇaḥ aṃśaḥ asti.
स्वयंकारण.english: Automation is an important part of modern technology.

स्वयंकारण.devanagari: कारखानायां स्वयंकारणं प्रयुक्तं तदा उत्पादनं वर्धितम्।
स्वयंकारण.transliteration: Kārkhanāyāṃ svayaṃkāraṇaṃ prayuktaṃ tadā utpādanaṃ vardhitam.
स्वयंकारण.english: When automation was used in the factory, production increased.

स्वयंकारण.devanagari: किं स्वयंकारणं भविष्यते सर्वेषां कार्यस्य समाधानम्?
स्वयंकारण.transliteration: Kiṃ svayaṃkāraṇaṃ bhaviṣyate sarveṣāṃ kāryasya samādhānam?
स्वयंकारण.english: Will automation be the solution for all work?

स्वयंकारण.devanagari: भोः, कथं स्वयंकारणं व्यवहारे उपयोगं करामः?
स्वयंकारण.transliteration: Bhoḥ, kathaṃ svayaṃkāraṇaṃ vyavhāre upayogaṃ karāmaḥ?
स्वयंकारण.english: Hey, how can we use automation in practice?

कृतकधी.devanagari: कृतकधियाः प्रवृद्धप्रभावः सर्वत्राधुना दृश्यते। The AI influence is seen everywhere nowadays.

कृतकधी.english: Artificial Intelligence makes human work easier.

कृतकधी.devanagari: कृतकधिया विज्ञानिनः अनेकानि समस्यानि समाधाय निवेदितवन्तः।
कृतकधी.transliteration: Kṛtakádhiyā vijñānináḥ aneká‌ni samasyā́ni samádhāya niveditavántaḥ.
कृतकधी.english: Scientists solved many problems using Artificial Intelligence.
What role should Artificial Intelligence play in education?
Do you understand how Artificial Intelligence works?

अपाकरणगण्डं यदि दबसि तर्हि कार्यं निरस्यते।
अपाकरणगण्ड.transliteration: apākaraṇagaṇḍaṃ yadi dabasi tarhi kāryaṃ nirasyate.
अपाकरणगण्ड.english: If you press the cancel key, the task is rejected.

परिहार.devanagari: दोषस्य परिहारः कदा भवति। When will the bug fix available.

Hey, a bug fix is really needed.

Hey, the bug fix was absolutely necessary.

ब्रह्माक्षरकील.devanagari: ब्रह्माक्षरकीलेन वर्णप्रभेदं लिखतु। Write different cased letters with caps lock.

भोह, अयं क्षेत्रं पक्षानुपाती अस्ति, तत् स्मर।

पक्षानुगुणा.transliteration: bhōḥ, yadi idaṃ pakṣānuguṇaṃ asti, tarhi 'A' tathā 'a' bhinnau staḥ.

पक्षानुपातिनी.devanagari: कूटपदक्षेत्रं पक्षानुपाति अस्ति। Password field is case-sensitive.

पक्षानुपातिनी.english: The case-sensitive word was rejected yesterday.

यदा त्वं पक्षवेदिनं कोडं लिखितवान्, तदा समस्या अभवत्।
पक्षवेदिन्.transliteration: yadā tvaṃ pakṣavedinaṃ kōḍaṃ likhitavān, tadā samasyā abhavat.

प्रसङ्गम् बिना संगणकः कार्यं न करोति।
प्रसङ्ग.transliteration: prasaṅgam binā saṅgaṇakah kāryam na karoti.
प्रसङ्ग.english: Without a CPU, the computer does not work.
Previously, the CPU's speed was slow.
Has the CPU become faster now?
Hey, what kind of power does the CPU have?

पक्षानुगुण.devanagari: कूटपदक्षेत्रं पक्षानुगुणं अस्ति। Password field is case-sensitive.

पक्षानुगुण.transliteration: he mitra, yah lāgin nāma pakṣānuguṇā asti. dhyānaṁ kuru!

सङ्कुचितसञ्चिका.devanagari: सङ्कुचितसञ्चिकां अवरोपयतु। Download the compressed file.

सङ्कुचितसञ्चिका.english: The compressed file is sent quickly.

विध्यादेश.devanagari: सङ्गणकं विध्यादेशेनैव कार्यं करोति। Computer does the work with the code.

विध्यादेश.english: The new code fixes the computer's error.
Previously, the code was written by the programmer.

विध्यादेश.devanagari: हे मित्र! इदं विध्यादेशं कठिनं भवति।
विध्यादेश.transliteration: he mitra! idaṃ vidhyādeśaṃ kaṭhinaṃ bhavati.

मध्यकक्ष.devanagari: सङ्गणके सर्वगणनकार्याणि मध्यकक्षेण एव प्रचलन्ति। In the computer, all the computational jobs are run through CPU.

मध्यकक्ष.english: The CPU is the heart of the computer.
In the past, CPUs were very slow.
Is the CPU really that important?
Hey! What is the speed of the CPU like?

प्रमाणपत्र.devanagari: प्रज्ञाकल्पस्य प्रमाणपत्रं प्राप्तं वा? Have you completed AI certification?

प्रमाणपत्र.english: The student is proud having obtained the certification.
His computer certification was obtained last year.

When will you take the exam for the certification?

चित्रपट.devanagari: चित्रपटेन सारल्येन कठिनविषयाः अवगम्यन्ते। With the chart, the difficult things can be understood easily.

चित्रपट.english: The teacher drew colored lines on the chart.
Do you want to see the chart?
Hey! Please show me the chart.

टिप्पणी.devanagari: विध्यादेशलेखनावसरे टिप्पणी लेखनमपि आवश्यकम्। It is important to write comment while writing code.

टिप्पणी.english: The teacher writes a comment on the student's worksheet.

टिप्पणी.devanagari: मैं आपकी पुस्तके विस्तृत टिप्पणी लिखा।
टिप्पणी.transliteration: maiṁ āpkī pustke vistṛt ṭippañī likhā.
टिप्पणी.english: I wrote a detailed comment on your book.

टिप्पणी.transliteration: kṛpayā is lekhe par ek sāarthak ṭippañī dīyatām.

प्रतिलेख.devanagari: क्रियाशीलगवाक्षाद् प्रतिलेखं स्वीकुरु। Copy from the active window.

प्रतिलेख.transliteration: kiṃ tvam isya pustakasya pratilekhaṃ kartum ichhasi?
प्रतिलेख.english: Do you want to make a copy of this book?

सर्वाधिकार.english: The copyright of this book belongs to the author.

सर्वाधिकार.transliteration: sarvādhikāraḥ pañchadaśa varṣāṇi yāvat vartate sma.
सर्वाधिकार.english: The copyright used to last for fifteen years.
Do you know the copyright rules?

सर्वाधिकार.devanagari: हे मित्र! अस्य चित्रस्य सर्वाधिकारः कीदृश् है?
सर्वाधिकार.transliteration: he mitra! asya citrasya sarvādhikāraḥ kīdṛś hai?

संहृतसञ्चिका.devanagari: संहृतसञ्चिकां अवरोपयतु। Download the compressed file.

Hey! Where is the compressed file stored?

समादेश.devanagari: भृत्यं समादेशानुसारं कार्यं करोति। Robot does the work as per the command.

समादेश.english: The king's command must be obeyed by all.
The teacher gave a command to the students.
Hey! This command is given to you.

विन्यास.devanagari: विन्यासः जालप्रवेशनियन्त्रणार्थं लिखतु। Write the configuration to control the network access.
यस्य विन्यासः सुन्दरः अस्ति, तस्य गृहं रमणीयं भवति।
विन्यास.transliteration: Yasya vinyāsaḥ sundaraḥ asti, tasya gṛham ramaṇīyaṁ bhavati.
विन्यास.english: Whose configuration is beautiful, his house becomes pleasant.

विन्यास.devanagari: भो, किम् त्वं विन्यासं समझसि? आवाम् अस्य सम्बन्धे बद्धलप्य कथयामः।
विन्यास.transliteration: Bho, kim tvam vinyāsaṁ samjhasi? Āvām asya sambandhe baddhalapy kathayāmaḥ.
विन्यास.english: Hey, do you understand the configuration? Let us discuss this matter together.

प्रतिकृति.devanagari: क्रियाशीलगवाक्षाद् प्रतिकृतिं स्वीकुरु। Copy from the active window.

प्रतिकृति.english: This copy is similar to the original picture.

प्रतिकृति.devanagari: शिक्षकः छात्रस्य प्रतिकृतिं दृष्ट्वा प्रसन्नः अभवत्।
प्रतिकृति.transliteration: śikṣakaḥ chātrasya pratikṛtiṁ dṛṣṭvā prasannaḥ abhavat.
प्रतिकृति.english: The teacher was pleased after seeing the student's copy.
Where did you make this copy?

प्रतिकृति.devanagari: कृपया इस्य प्रतिकृतिः मे यच्छ, अहम् तस्य आवश्यकं अनुभवामि।
प्रतिकृति.transliteration: kṛpayā isya pratikṛtiḥ me yachcha, aham tasya āvaśyakaṁ anubhavāmi.
प्रतिकृति.english: Please give me a copy of this, I need it.

विदूषिता.devanagari: विदूषिता सञ्चिका अवारोपिता। Downloaded a corrupt file.

विदूषिता.english: Hey! I received a corrupt message.

दत्तनिधि.devanagari: भञ्जकः तन्त्रांशस्य दत्तनिधिं प्रविशति। Hacker enters into the database of the software.

दत्तनिधि.english: The database is full of information.
When will you update the database?

प्रतिकृत्यधिकार.devanagari: एतस्य तन्त्रांशस्य प्रतिकृत्यधिकारः कस्यास्ति? Who is owning the copyright of this software?

प्रतिकृत्यधिकार.english: The copyright of this book belongs to the author.
The copyright was established fifty years ago.
Whose copyright exists in this image?

ध्वंस.devanagari: सहसा एव ध्वंसः अभवत्। Suddenly it crashed.

ध्वंस.english: The crash of the building was terrible.
The crash of the tree makes a loud sound on the ground.
Hey! Why did this crash happen?

पूर्णस्वाम्य.devanagari: एतस्य तन्त्रांशस्य पूर्णस्वाम्यं कस्यास्ति? Who is owning the copyright of this software?

पूर्णस्वाम्य.english: The copyright of this book belongs to the author.

पूर्णस्वाम्य.devanagari: तत् चित्रं पूर्णस्वाम्यं कर्तृणा रक्षितम् आसीत्।
पूर्णस्वाम्य.transliteration: tat chitraṁ pūrṇasvāmyaṁ kartṛṇā rakṣitam āsīt.
पूर्णस्वाम्य.english: That image's copyright was protected by the creator.

पूर्णस्वाम्य.devanagari: भवान् पूर्णस्वाम्यं समझन्ति किम्? आम्, अहं समझामि।
पूर्णस्वाम्य.transliteration: bhavān pūrṇasvāmyaṁ samjhanti kim? ām, ahaṁ samjhāmi.
पूर्णस्वाम्य.english: Do you understand copyright? Yes, I understand it.

साङ्गणिका.devanagari: साङ्गणिककार्याणि अधिकानि जातानि। Cyber works have increased.

साङ्गणिका.english: The cyber system is very important.
Cyber security was improved last year.
Hey friend! Let's use the cyber service.

साङ्गणिक.devanagari: साङ्गणिककार्याणि अधिकानि जातानि। Cyber works have increased.

साङ्गणिक.english: Indians were aware of cyber crimes.
Do you attend a cyber school?
Hey! Knowledge of cyber is necessary today.

कर्तनलेपन.devanagari: पाठ्यस्य कर्तनलेपनं करोतु। Cut and paste the text.

कर्तनलेपन.english: I will cut and paste the image.
He cut and pasted the word.
Do you want to cut and paste?

कर्तनलेपन.devanagari: भवान् कर्तनलेपनं कुरु! यदि न जानासि, तर्हि मम सहायतां कुरु।
कर्तनलेपन.transliteration: bhavān kartanalepanam kuru! yadi na jānāsi, tarhi mama sāhāytāṁ kuru.
कर्तनलेपन.english: Please do the cut and paste! If you don't know, then help me.

गुप्तलेखनशास्त्र.devanagari: गुप्तलेखनशास्त्रद्वारेण सङ्कूटितसन्देशाः प्रेषयितुं शक्यन्ते। With the help of cryptography, encrypted messages can be sent.

गुप्तलेखनशास्त्र.english: In ancient times, cryptography was used.

गुप्तलेखनशास्त्र.devanagari: अहं गुप्तलेखनशास्त्रे उत्सुकः स्मि। त्वं किम्?
गुप्तलेखनशास्त्र.transliteration: Ahaṃ guptalekhnaśāstre utssukaḥ smi. Tvaṃ kim?
गुप्तलेखनशास्त्र.english: I am interested in cryptography. What about you?

पूर्णाधिकार.devanagari: एतस्य तन्त्रांशस्य पूर्णाधिकारः कस्यास्ति? Who is owning the copyright of this software?

पूर्णाधिकार.english: The copyright of this book belongs to the author.

पूर्णाधिकार.devanagari: पूर्वे तस्य संगीतस्य पूर्णाधिकारः संरक्षितः आसीत्।
पूर्णाधिकार.transliteration: purve tasya sangītasya pūrṇādhikāraḥ saṃrakṣitaḥ āsīt.
पूर्णाधिकार.english: Previously, the copyright of that music was protected.

पूर्णाधिकार.devanagari: किम् एतस्य चित्रस्य पूर्णाधिकारः अभी वर्तते?
पूर्णाधिकार.transliteration: kim etasya chitrasya pūrṇādhikāraḥ abhī vartate?
पूर्णाधिकार.english: Is the copyright of this image still valid now?

पूर्णाधिकार.devanagari: भोः, अस्य वीडियोस्य पूर्णाधिकारः कुत्र पञ्जीकृतः अस्ति?
पूर्णाधिकार.transliteration: bhoḥ, asya vīḍiyosya pūrṇādhikāraḥ kutra pañjīkṛtaḥ asti?
पूर्णाधिकार.english: Hey, where is the copyright of this video registered?

दत्तसङ्ग्रह.devanagari: भञ्जकः तन्त्रांशस्य दत्तसङ्ग्रहं प्रविशति। Hacker enters into the database of the software.

दत्तसङ्ग्रह.english: The database is important and protects information.

दत्तसङ्ग्रह.devanagari: किं दत्तसङ्ग्रहे कति भाषाः संगृहीताः सन्ति?
दत्तसङ्ग्रह.transliteration: kiṃ dattasaṅgrahe kati bhāṣāh saṃgṛhītāh santi?
दत्तसङ्ग्रह.english: How many languages are stored in the database?

दत्तसङ्ग्रह.devanagari: अहं दत्तसङ्ग्रहं उद्घाटयितुं शक्नोमि, किन्तु त्वं किम् इच्छसि?
दत्तसङ्ग्रह.transliteration: ahaṃ dattasaṅgrahṃ udghāṭayituṃ shaknomi, kintu tvaṃ kim ichchhasi?
दत्तसङ्ग्रह.english: I can open the database, but what do you want?

गुप्तलेखनपद्धति.devanagari: गुप्तलेखनपद्धतिद्वारेण सङ्कूटितसन्देशाः प्रेषयितुं शक्यन्ते। With the help of cryptography, encrypted messages can be sent.

गुप्तलेखनपद्धति.english: Cryptography is extremely important in computer science.
In ancient times, cryptography was used for royal messages.

गुप्तलेखनपद्धति.devanagari: अहं गुप्तलेखनपद्धतिं शिक्षामि। भवान् अपि शिक्षिष्यसि किम्?
गुप्तलेखनपद्धति.transliteration: ahaṃ guptalekhanapaddhatiṃ shikṣāmi. bhavān api shikṣiṣyasi kim?
गुप्तलेखनपद्धति.english: I am learning cryptography. Will you also study it?

गूढलेखनशास्त्र.devanagari: गूढलेखनशास्त्रद्वारेण सङ्कूटितसन्देशाः प्रेषयितुं शक्यन्ते। With the help of cryptography, encrypted messages can be sent.

गूढलेखनशास्त्र.english: Cryptography is extremely important in the modern age.

गूढलेखनशास्त्र.devanagari: प्राचीनकाले गूढलेखनशास्त्रस्य उपयोगः सैनिकानां मध्ये प्रचलितः आसीत्।
गूढलेखनशास्त्र.transliteration: Prāchīnakāle gūḍhalekhanaśāstrasya upayogaḥ sainikānāṁ madhye prachalitaḥ āsīt.
गूढलेखनशास्त्र.english: In ancient times, the use of cryptography was prevalent among soldiers.
Why is cryptography necessary for information protection?

गूढलेखनशास्त्र.devanagari: भो! किं भवान् गूढलेखनशास्त्रस्य सिद्धान्तः जानाति? हाँ, अहम् इदं शिखितवान्।
गूढलेखनशास्त्र.transliteration: Bho! Kim bhavān gūḍhalekhanaśāstrasya siddhāntaḥ jānāti? Hāñ, aham idam śikhitavān.
गूढलेखनशास्त्र.english: Hey! Do you know the principles of cryptography? Yes, I have learned this.

विदूषित.devanagari: विदूषिता सञ्चिका अवारोपिता। Downloaded a corrupt file.

विदूषित.english: The king enacted a corrupt policy.

विदूषित.devanagari: किम् एषः विदूषितः पुरुषः सत्यं कथयिष्यति?
विदूषित.transliteration: kim eṣaḥ vidūṣitaḥ puruṣaḥ satyaṃ kathayiṣyati?
विदूषित.english: Will this corrupt man tell the truth?
They are troubled by corrupt deeds.

कर्तन.devanagari: पाठ्यं कर्तयित्वा अन्यत्र लेपयतु। Cut the text and paste somewhere else.

कर्तन.english: Cutting of the plant is necessary.
The cutting of an animal in the sacrifice occurred in ancient times.

कर्तन.devanagari: किं त्वं इदं वृक्षस्य कर्तनं करिष्यसि?
कर्तन.transliteration: kim tvam idam vrikṣasya kartanam karisyasi?
कर्तन.english: Will you do the cutting of this tree?

कर्तन.devanagari: अरे! इस तृणस्य कर्तनं शीघ्रं कुर्वन्तु।
कर्तन.transliteration: are! isa triṇasya kartanam śīghram kurvantā.
कर्तन.english: Hey! Do the cutting of this grass quickly.

अङ्क्.devanagari: मुद्रितपुस्तकानि अङ्कयतु। Digitize the printed books.

उत्सर्ग.devanagari: स्थलम् उत्सर्गमूल्येन पूरितम् अस्ति। The field is filed with default value.

उत्सर्ग.english: The program accepts the default number.
I did not change the default.
Did you know the default value?

दत्तांशनिधि.devanagari: भञ्जकः तन्त्रांशस्य दत्तांशनिधिं प्रविशति। Hacker enters into the database of the software.

दत्तांशनिधि.english: The database is stored in the computer.
How many students' names are stored in the database?

अङ्की-कृ.devanagari: मुद्रितपुस्तकानि अङ्कीकरोतु। Digitize the printed books.

अङ्की-कृ.english: The teacher digitizes the student papers.
I will digitize all the documents tomorrow.
Do you digitize the photo gallery?
I heard that you are digitizing (it).

वि-युज्.devanagari: अन्तर्जालं वियोजयित्वा पुनः योजयतु। Disconnect and connect the internet again.
त्वं कस्मात् तस्य साथं वियोजयित्वा चलितवान्?
वि-युज्.transliteration: tvaṃ kasmāt tasya sāthṃ viyojayitvā chalitavān?
वि-युज्.english: Why did you disconnect from him and leave?
The teacher disconnected the student from the class.
Please disconnect the brush from the device.

उच्छेदनकील.devanagari: उच्छेदनकीलेन पाठ्यं निष्कासयतु। Delete the text with delete key.

उच्छेदनकील.english: I erase the homework by pressing the delete key.
He deleted everything with the delete key.
Do you know the delete key?

उच्छेदनकील.devanagari: अहं उच्छेदनकीलस्य उपयोगः करोमि। त्वं किं करोषि?
उच्छेदनकील.transliteration: ahaṁ ucchedanakīlasya upayogaḥ karomi. tvaṁ kiṁ karoṣi?
उच्छेदनकील.english: I use the delete key. What do you do?

दत्तांशसङ्ग्रह.devanagari: भञ्जकः तन्त्रांशस्य दत्तांशसङ्ग्रहं प्रविशति। Hacker enters into the database of the software.

दत्तांशसङ्ग्रह.english: I created a new record in the database.
Dear sir, who will give permission for the database?

व्याख्यान.devanagari: सङ्कूटितसन्देशस्य व्याख्यानम् अकृत्वा अवगन्तुं न शक्यते। Encoded message can not be understood without decoding.

व्याख्यान.english: The teacher gives an explanation of the difficult text to the student.
I had read an explanation of the Pancanga (calendar).

व्याख्यान.devanagari: किम् इदम् शास्त्रस्य व्याख्यानम् सुबोधम् अस्ति?
व्याख्यान.transliteration: kim idam śāstrasya vyākhyānam subodham asti?
व्याख्यान.english: Is this explanation of the scripture clear?

व्याख्यान.devanagari: भो! अस्य सूत्रस्य व्याख्यानम् मे वद।
व्याख्यान.transliteration: bho! asya sūtrasya vyākhyānam me vada.
व्याख्यान.english: Hey! Tell me the explanation of this aphorism.

प्रत्याकुञ्चन.devanagari: दृश्यसञ्चिकायाः प्रत्याकुञ्चनं कृत्वा दृश्यताम्। Decompress the video file and watch.

प्रत्याकुञ्चन.english: Decompression of the database is necessary.
I performed the decompression of the compressed file.

प्रत्याकुञ्चन.devanagari: किं त्वं इस्य प्रत्याकुञ्चनं सम्पन्नं कृतवान्?
प्रत्याकुञ्चन.transliteration: Kim tvam isya pratyākuñchanam sampannam kṛtavān?
प्रत्याकुञ्चन.english: Did you complete the decompression of this?
Hey! Do the decompression of this compressed document.

निष्कासनकील.devanagari: निष्कासनकीलेन पाठ्यं निष्कासयतु। Delete the text with delete key.

निष्कासनकील.english: We delete the text by pressing the delete key.
You quickly deleted the text with the delete key.

निष्कासनकील.transliteration: niṣkāsanakīlaṁ spṛṣṭvā patra ṁ mocha ya, bhoḥ।
निष्कासनकील.english: Please touch the delete key and remove the letter, friend.

निष्कूटन.devanagari: सङ्कूटितसन्देशस्य निष्कूटनम् अकृत्वा अवगन्तुं न शक्यते। Encoded message can not be understood without decoding.

निष्कूटन.english: The decoding of this secret script is difficult.
I performed the decoding of the letter.

निष्कूटन.devanagari: किं त्वं इस्य सन्देशस्य निष्कूटनम् कर्तुम् समर्थः?
निष्कूटन.transliteration: kiṃ tvam isya sandēśasya niṣkūṭanam kartum samarhaḥ?
निष्कूटन.english: Are you able to perform the decoding of this message?

निष्कूटन.devanagari: भोः, कृपया इस्य सङ्कूटितलेखस्य निष्कूटनम् कुरु।
निष्कूटन.transliteration: bhōḥ, kṛpayā isya saṅkūṭitalēkhasya niṣkūṭanam kuru.
निष्कूटन.english: Friend, please perform the decoding of this encrypted text.

पूर्वन्यस्त.devanagari: स्थलम् पूर्वन्यस्तमूल्येन पूरितम् अस्ति। The field is filed with default value.

पूर्वन्यस्त.english: The default value in the computer was automatically determined.
One can change the default settings.
I use the default configuration as well.

पूर्वनिविष्ट.devanagari: स्थलम् पूर्वनिविष्टमूल्येन पूरितम् अस्ति। The field is filed with default value.

पूर्वनिविष्ट.english: The default password on the computer was secure.
Do you want to change the default settings?

पूर्वनिविष्ट.transliteration: ayam aiplaike śanah pūrvaniviṣṭamoḍen kāryam karoti.
पूर्वनिविष्ट.english: This application works in default mode.
I accept the default value. And you?

अङ्कीयसर्पक.devanagari: अङ्कीयसर्पकं सर्वाभिः दूरवाणीभिः कर्तुं शक्यते। Digital zoom can be done by all the mobile phones.

अङ्कीयसर्पक.english: When did you start using digital zoom?

अङ्कीयसर्पक.devanagari: यस्य फोटोचित्रे अङ्कीयसर्पकं प्रयुक्तं तस्य गुणवत्ता अल्पीयसी।
अङ्कीयसर्पक.transliteration: yasya photocittre aṅkīyasarpakaṃ prayuktaṃ tasya guṇavattā alpīyasī.
अङ्कीयसर्पक.english: The quality of photos in which digital zoom was used became poor.

अङ्कीयसर्पक.devanagari: अङ्कीयसर्पकं कः अर्थः? — इदं फोटोचित्रं वर्धितं कर्तुं कौशलम्।
अङ्कीयसर्पक.transliteration: aṅkīyasarpakaṃ kaḥ arthaḥ? — idaṃ photocittraṃ vardhitaṃ kartuṃ kaushalam.
अङ्कीयसर्पक.english: What is digital zoom? — It is the skill to enlarge a photograph.

प्रसारण.devanagari: दृश्यसञ्चिकायाः प्रसारणं कृत्वा दृश्यताम्। Decompress the video file and watch.

प्रसारण.english: Decompression of the database is necessary.
The decompression of that file was done.

प्रसारण.devanagari: किं त्वं संचिकायाः प्रसारणं कर्तुम् इच्छसि?
प्रसारण.transliteration: kiṁ tvam sanchikaayaah prasaranam kartum ichhasi?
प्रसारण.english: Do you want to perform decompression of the file?

चक्र.devanagari: चक्रे सर्वं रक्ष्यते। Everything is stored in disk.

चक्र.english: The disk of the chariot is large.
The disk had fallen on the ground.
Hey! The disk is visible on the road.

वृत्तक.devanagari: वृत्तके सर्वं रक्ष्यते। Everything is stored in disk.

द्विर्नोदन.devanagari: द्विर्नोदनेन उपसर्पयतु। Zoom in with double click.

द्विर्नोदन.english: Will you perform a double click?
Open the window with a double click.

शिक्षाग्रन्थ.devanagari: शिक्षाग्रन्थं दृष्ट्वा कार्यं करोतु। Do the work referring to documentation.

शिक्षाग्रन्थ.english: The documentation is in the library.
Hey! Please give me the documentation.

शिक्षा.devanagari: शिक्षां दृष्ट्वा कार्यं करोतु। Do the work referring to documentation.
कृपया शिक्षां मह्यं दातुम्। कदा उपलब्धा भविष्यति?
शिक्षा.transliteration: kṛpayā śikṣāṁ mahyaṁ dātum. kadā upalabdhā bhaviṣyati?
शिक्षा.english: Please give me the documentation. When will it be available?

लेख्य.devanagari: वृृत्तस्य लेख्यं लिखतु। Write document on what happened.

शिक्षालेख.devanagari: शिक्षालेखं दृष्ट्वा कार्यं करोतु। Do the work referring to documentation.

वृत्तकक्षमता.devanagari: अधिकं रक्षितुं वृत्तकक्षमता वर्तते। There is disk capacity to store a lot.

वृत्तकक्षमता.english: My computer's disk capacity is full.
The disk capacity was becoming low.
Hey! The disk capacity should be more now.

मण्डलक.devanagari: मण्डलके सर्वं रक्ष्यते। Everything is stored in disk.
भोः! मण्डलकं कुत्र अस्ति? - इह अस्ति।
मण्डलक.transliteration: bhoḥ! maṇḍalkaṁ kutra asti? - iha asti.
मण्डलक.english: Hey! Where is the disk? - It is here.

द्विर्नोद.devanagari: द्विर्नोदेन उपसर्पयतु। Zoom in with double click.

द्विर्नोद.english: I saw the entire screen with a double click.
Hey, open one image with double click.

अङ्कीयदृश्यवृत्तक.devanagari: अङ्कीयदृश्यवृत्तकम् अधुना न दृश्यते। Nowadays DVD is not seen.

अङ्कीयदृश्यवृत्तक.english: He wants to buy a DVD.
Can you give me a DVD?

वृत्तकधारणशक्ति.devanagari: अधिकं रक्षितुं वृत्तकधारणशक्तिः वर्तते। There is disk capacity to store a lot.

वृत्तकधारणशक्ति.english: My computer's disk capacity is low.
Can you increase the disk capacity?

अदृश्यक.devanagari: अदृश्यकम् अधुना न दृश्यते। Nowadays DVD is not seen.

अदृश्यक.english: The DVD was popular long ago.
Where can you buy a DVD?

लेख.devanagari: वृृत्तस्य लेखं लिखतु। Write document on what happened.

लेख.english: The king reads an important document.
The clerk will write the document tomorrow and submit it.
Do you wish to see which document?
I have kept the document safe in the library.

वृत्तकसामर्थ्य.devanagari: अधिकं रक्षितुं वृत्तकसामर्थ्यं वर्तते। There is disk capacity to store a lot.

वृत्तकसामर्थ्य.english: The disk capacity became low yesterday.
Can you increase the disk capacity?

सञ्चिका.english: I am searching for the file.

अन्तकील.devanagari: पङ्क्तेः अन्तं अन्तकीलेन गच्छ। Goto end of the line with end key.

अन्तकील.english: The end key is placed on the door.
He unlocked the door with the end key.
Do you want to give me the end key?

व्यभिचार.english: There should be no exception to the rule.
Hey, why is this exception here?

अदृवक.devanagari: अदृवकम् अधुना न दृश्यते। Nowadays DVD is not seen.

अदृवक.english: The DVD was popular in the past.
Where do you want to buy a DVD?
Is the DVD still important today?

सङ्कूटन.devanagari: सङ्कूटनं कृत्वा सन्देशं प्रेषयतु। Send message by encoding.

सङ्कूटन.english: I encoded it with a key.
Do the encoding, then send it.

चालन.devanagari: विध्यादेशस्य चालनं करोतु। Run the code.

चालन.english: The execution of the plan was quick.

चालन.devanagari: नीतेः चालनं भवतः कर्तव्यम् इति मन्ये।
चालन.transliteration: nīteḥ chālanam bhavataḥ kartavyam iti manye.
चालन.english: I think the execution of the policy is your duty.
Everyone used to execute the decision.

सामान्यजिज्ञासा.devanagari: सन्देहनिवाराणार्थं सामान्यजिज्ञासाः दृश्यन्ताम्। Look at the FAQs to clear your doubts.

सामान्यजिज्ञासा.english: FAQs are available on the website.

निर्यात.devanagari: दृश्यं सम्पादनं कृत्वा निर्यातं कुरु। Export the picture after editing.
भोः, किं निर्यातं सफलं जातम्? हाँ, अत्यन्तं सफलम्।
निर्यात.transliteration: bhoḥ, kiṁ niryātaṁ saphalaṁ jātam? hāñ, atyantaṁ saphalam.
निर्यात.english: Hey, did the export succeed? Yes, very successful.

अनुष्ठान.devanagari: विध्यादेशस्य अनुष्ठानं करोतु। Execute the code.
किं वयं इस्य कार्यस्य अनुष्ठानं करिष्यामः?
अनुष्ठान.transliteration: kiṃ vayaṃ isya kāryasya anuṣṭhānaṃ karisyāmaḥ?

असकृद्याचितप्रश्न.devanagari: सन्देहनिवाराणार्थं असकृद्याचितप्रश्नाः दृश्यन्ताम्। Look at the FAQs to clear your doubts.

असकृद्याचितप्रश्न.english: FAQs are available on the website.

असकृद्याचितप्रश्न.devanagari: असकृद्याचितप्रश्नाः पढ़। तव समस्याः समाधानं प्राप्स्यसि।
असकृद्याचितप्रश्न.transliteration: asakṛdyāchitaprashnaḥ padha. tava samasyāḥ samādhānaṁ prāpsyasi.
असकृद्याचितप्रश्न.english: Read the FAQs. You will find solutions to your problems.

सामान्यप्रश्नोत्तर.devanagari: सन्देहनिवाराणार्थं सामान्यप्रश्नोत्तराणि दृश्यन्ताम्। Look at the FAQs to clear your doubts.

सामान्यप्रश्नोत्तर.english: FAQs are available on the website.
Have you looked at the FAQs?

सामान्यप्रश्नोत्तर.devanagari: मेरा प्रश्न सामान्यप्रश्नोत्तरेषु नास्ति। तत्र किं करवाणि?
सामान्यप्रश्नोत्तर.transliteration: merā prashno sāmānyaprashnoattereshu nāsti. tatra kiṃ karavāṇi?
सामान्यप्रश्नोत्तर.english: My question is not in the FAQs. What should I do there?

समापनकील.devanagari: पङ्क्तेः अन्तं समापनकीलेन गच्छ। Goto end of the line with end key.

समापनकील.english: After pressing the end key, the text is finished.
Maitreya! Where is the end key?
I went to the end of the sentence with the end key.

समापनकील.devanagari: भोः! समापनकीलं मा भुञ्जः, कृपया सावधानः भव।
समापनकील.transliteration: Bhoḥ! samāpanakīlaṁ mā bhuñjaḥ, kṛpayā sāvadhānaḥ bhava।
समापनकील.english: Hey! Don't neglect the end key, please be careful.

अपक्रम.devanagari: अपक्रमकीलेन बहिर्गच्छ। Exit with escape key.

अपक्रम.english: The escape key is necessary on the keyboard.
I exited the program with the escape key.
Do you know about the escape key?
Press the escape key! You will exit immediately.

निवर्तन.devanagari: क्षेत्रं पूरयित्वा निवर्तनकीलेन नूतनक्षेत्रं पूरय। After filling the field, with enter key fill new field.
निवर्तनं दबायित्वा अगला पंक्तिः सक्रिया भवति।
निवर्तन.transliteration: nivartan aṁ dabāyitvā aglā panktiḥ sakriyā bhavati.
निवर्तन.english: By pressing the return key, the next line becomes active.
I sent the message with the return key.

निवर्तन.transliteration: are, nivartan mā vismara! patraṁ pūrṇaṁ karaṇīyam.
निवर्तन.english: Hey, don't forget the return key! The letter must be completed.

गुण.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य नूतनाः गुणाः सन्ति। New features of the sofware are there.
इस पुस्तकस्य सर्वे गुणाः उत्तमाः सन्ति।
गुण.transliteration: isa pustakasya sarve guṇāḥ uttamāḥ santi.
गुण.english: All features of this book are excellent.

गुण.devanagari: तस्य व्यक्तित्वस्य किं किं गुणाः आसन्?
गुण.transliteration: tasya vyaktitvasya kiṃ kiṃ guṇāḥ āsan?
गुण.english: What were the features of his personality?

गुण.devanagari: भवान्, अस्य गुणः कदा प्रकटः भविष्यति?
गुण.transliteration: bhavān, asya guṇaḥ kadā prakataḥ bhaviṣyati?
गुण.english: Sir, when will this feature become apparent?

The teacher shows the flow chart to the students.
Sir, please understand the flow chart.

समुच्चय.english: The folder is on my desktop.
Can you see the files in the folder?
The folder is here. What is the name?

वर्णचित्र.devanagari: देवनागरिलेखनार्थं किं वर्णचित्रम् उपयुज्यते। What is the font used to type devanagari.

वर्णचित्र.english: I did not know the new font.
Which font is best for reading?

वर्णचित्र.devanagari: भवान् इमं वर्णचित्रम् पसन्दं करोति किम्?
वर्णचित्र.transliteration: bhavān imaṁ varnachittram pasandaṁ karoti kim?

अवधान.devanagari: अवधानं कस्मिन् क्षेत्रे अस्ति। Which field has the focus.

अवधान.english: The student's focus is on the book.
The teacher gave attention to the students.
Do you focus on the story?

अवधान.transliteration: Avdhānam na kuru, manah śāntam bhavatu.
अवधान.english: Don't worry about focus; let your mind be peaceful.

लक्ष्य.english: The student's focus was the exam.

स्थिरतन्त्रांश.devanagari: दूरवाण्यां स्थिरतन्त्रांशः अस्ति। There is firmware in the phone.

स्थिरतन्त्रांश.english: Hey! The firmware needs to be installed.

दहनदुर्ग.devanagari: दहनदुर्गेण जालं रक्ष्यते। Network is protected with firewall.

ध्रुवतन्त्रांश.devanagari: दूरवाण्यां ध्रुवतन्त्रांशः अस्ति। There is firmware in the phone.

ध्रुवतन्त्रांश.english: What is the device's firmware like?

सञ्चय.devanagari: भवता सञ्चयस्य प्रवेशः शक्यते वा? Can you access the folder?

सञ्चय.english: The folder is located on my desktop.
Do you know the name of the folder?

सञ्चय.devanagari: एष सञ्चयः महत्त्वपूर्णः अस्ति, तत्र दस्तावेजाः सन्ति।
सञ्चय.transliteration: eṣa sañcayaḥ mahattvaḥpūrṇaḥ asti, tatra dastāvejāḥ santi.
सञ्चय.english: This folder is important; there are documents in it.

पादक.devanagari: जालपुटस्य पादके सर्वाधिकारसूचना भवति। Copyright notice is in the footer of the webpage.

पादक.english: The author's name is written in the footer of the book.
Is the page number visible in the footer?
Hey, where is the footer located?

वार्ण.devanagari: देवनागरिलेखनार्थं किं वार्णम् उपयुज्यते। What is the font used to type devanagari.
किं त्वं इदं वार्णम् पठितुं शक्नोषि?
वार्ण.transliteration: kiṃ tvam idam vārṇam paṭhitum śaknoshi?

वार्ण.devanagari: भोः, किं तव लेखने नवीनम् वार्णम् आवश्यकम्?
वार्ण.transliteration: bhoh, kiṃ tava lekhne navīnam vārṇam āvaśyakam?
वार्ण.english: Hey, do you need a new font for your writing?

वर्णमुख.devanagari: वर्णमुखस्य आकारं वर्धयतु। Increase the font size.

वर्णालेख.devanagari: देवनागरिलेखनार्थं कः वर्णालेखः उपयुज्यते। What is the font used to type devanagari.
यः वर्णालेखः सुन्दरः अस्ति तं मे दर्शय।
वर्णालेख.transliteration: yaḥ varṇālekhaḥ sundaraḥ asti taṁ me darśaya.
वर्णालेख.english: Show me the font that is beautiful.
I installed a new font on the computer.
What is the name of this font?
That font was fine and readable.

पावकवृति.devanagari: पावकवृत्त्या जालं रक्ष्यते। Network is protected with firewall.

पावकवृति.english: The firewall blocks all malicious threats.
The shop's data was protected by the firewall.

पावकवृति.devanagari: किं पावकवृतिः अपूर्वे दिने कार्यं करोति?
पावकवृति.transliteration: kiṃ pāvakavṛtiḥ apūrve dine kāryaṃ karoti?
पावकवृति.english: Does the firewall work every day?
Hey! Can you install the firewall?

अब्जाष्टक.english: Your GB units are being lost.
Hey! Where are the GB units?

वाक्पीठ.devanagari: वाक्पीठे संवादान् पठ। Read the discussions in the forum

वाक्पीठ.english: Yesterday I asked a question in the forum.
Are you a member of the forum?
Please read my answer in the forum.

प्रारूपण.english: The formatting of the document is beautiful.
I did the formatting of the letter.
Hey, please complete the formatting quickly.

संरूपण.english: The formatting of the document is difficult.
I completed the formatting of the letter.
Please correct the formatting of the page.

सूत्र.devanagari: सूत्रेण गणनं करोतु। Do the math with formula.

सूत्र.english: This formula is the foundation of mathematics.
The teacher taught the formula to the students.
The formula is memorable, isn't it?

प्रारूप.devanagari: आमन्त्रपत्रस्य प्रारूपं समीकरणीयम्। The invitation should be formatted.

प्रारूप.english: The format of the letter is beautiful.
The teacher showed the format to the students.
What should the format of this document be?
Please, write according to this format.

आलेख.devanagari: गतपञ्चवर्षाणां लाभं आलेखेन दर्शयतु। Show the last 5-year profits with a graph.

आलेख.english: The graph clearly shows the growth of sales.
The teacher showed the graph to the students.

प्रपत्र.devanagari: प्रपत्रं पूरयित्वा पञ्जीकरणं करोतु। Register by filling the form.

प्रपत्र.english: Do you want to fill the form?

प्रपत्र.devanagari: अरे, यह प्रपत्रम् कुत्र अस्ति? कृपया मह्यं दर्शय।
प्रपत्र.transliteration: are, yah prapātram kutra asti? krupayā mahyaṁ darshay.
प्रपत्र.english: Hey, where is this form? Please show me.

गोलस्थानग्राहक.devanagari: उपाहारमन्दिरस्य स्थानं गोलस्थानग्राहकेन अन्विषतु। Search the location of restaurant with GPS.

गोलस्थानग्राहक.english: You did not use the GPS.

गोलस्थानग्राहक.devanagari: किं गोलस्थानग्राहकं सह मार्गं ज्ञातवान् असि?
गोलस्थानग्राहक.transliteration: kiṁ golasthangrahakaṁ saha mārgaṁ jñātavān asi?
गोलस्थानग्राहक.english: Did you know the way with GPS?
Hey, please give me the GPS.

संरूप.devanagari: आमन्त्रपत्रस्य संरूपं समीकरणीयम्। The invitation should be formatted.

संरूप.english: The format of the document is beautiful.
The teacher corrected the format of the letter.

संरूप.devanagari: किम् इस्य कार्यस्य संरूपं स्पष्टम् अस्ति?
संरूप.transliteration: kim isya kāryasya saṃrūpaṃ spaṣṭam asti?
संरूप.english: Is the format of this task clear?

संरूप.devanagari: भोः, कृपया इस्य संरूपं पुनः लिखतु।
संरूप.transliteration: bhoh, kṛpayā isya saṃrūpaṃ punah likhatु.

निश्शुल्कतन्त्रांश.devanagari: निश्शुल्कतन्त्रांशस्य परिशीलनं कुरु। Evaluate the freeware.

निश्शुल्कतन्त्रांश.english: I became successful by creating freeware.
What do you know about freeware?

मुक्ततन्त्रांश.devanagari: मुक्ततन्त्रांशः सम्यक् परिशील्य प्रयोक्तव्यः। We must use freeware after thorough examination.

मुक्ततन्त्रांश.english: This free software is available for everyone.
We used free software last year.
Do you know this free software?

मुक्ततन्त्रांश.devanagari: अहं मुक्ततन्त्रांशं प्रेम करामि, किन्तु सः कठिनः अस्ति।
मुक्ततन्त्रांश.transliteration: ahaṃ muktattantrāṃśaṃ prema karāmi, kintu saḥ kaṭhinaḥ asti.
मुक्ततन्त्रांश.english: I love free software, but it is difficult.

गोलस्थाननिर्धारक.devanagari: उपाहारमन्दिरस्य स्थानं गोलस्थाननिर्धारकेन अन्विषतु। Search the location of restaurant with GPS.

गोलस्थाननिर्धारक.english: I found the route using GPS.

गोलस्थाननिर्धारक.devanagari: गोलस्थाननिर्धारकं कुत्र क्रेतुं शक्यते? - औषधालये तु न, किन्तु यन्त्रदुकानेषु।
गोलस्थाननिर्धारक.transliteration: golasthānaninirdhārakam kutra kretum shakyate? - aushadhālaye tu na, kintu yantradukānéshu.
गोलस्थाननिर्धारक.english: Where can GPS be bought? - Not in pharmacies, but in electronics shops.

गोलस्थक.devanagari: उपाहारमन्दिरस्य स्थानं गोलस्थकेन अन्विषतु। Search the location of restaurant with GPS.

गोलस्थक.english: GPS is useful in my travels.
I found the path with GPS.

गोलस्थक.devanagari: किं त्वं गोलस्थकं स्वस्य फलके स्थापितवान्?
गोलस्थक.transliteration: kiṁ tvaṁ golasthakaṁ svasya phalake sthāpitavān?
गोलस्थक.english: Did you install GPS on your phone?

गोलस्थक.devanagari: भोः! गोलस्थकं मे दर्शय, कदा हम् होटलं प्राप्स्यामः?
गोलस्थक.transliteration: bhoh! golasthakaṁ me darśaya, kadā ham hotalaṁ prāpsyāmaḥ?
गोलस्थक.english: Hey! Show me the GPS, when will we reach the hotel?

चित्रण.devanagari: फेनकविज्ञापनार्थं चित्रणं करोतु। Do the graphic work for the soap advertisement.

आ-या.devanagari: दृश्यसञ्चिकां आयापयतु। Import the video file.
भोः, किं तव मित्रः औषधं आयापयति?
आ-या.transliteration: bhō, kiṃ tav mitrah auṣadhaṃ āyāpayati?
आ-या.english: Hey, does your friend import medicine?

मुखपृष्ठ.devanagari: मुखपृष्ठं पश्य। Look at the home page.

मुखपृष्ठ.english: Was there information on the home page?
Hey, loading the home page is difficult.

निमन्त्रक.devanagari: निमन्त्रके तन्त्रांशं चालयतु। Run the software in the host.

निमन्त्रक.english: Will the host give water to the guests?

गूढसञ्चिका.devanagari: गूढसञ्चिका द्रष्टुं न शक्यते। Hidden file can not be seen.

गूढसञ्चिका.english: The hidden file is protected on the computer.
Where is the hidden file located?
Hey, did you see the hidden file?

गुप्तसञ्चिका.devanagari: गुप्तसञ्चिका द्रष्टुं न शक्यते। Hidden file can not be seen.

गुप्तसञ्चिका.english: The hidden file is protected on the computer.
I deleted the hidden file yesterday.
Can you see the hidden file?

गुप्तसञ्चिका.devanagari: अरे, गुप्तसञ्चिका इत्र विद्यते। येन सेवकेन निर्मिता?
गुप्तसञ्चिका.transliteration: are, guptasañcikā itra vidyate. yena sevakena nirmitā?
गुप्तसञ्चिका.english: Hey, there is a hidden file here. By which administrator was it created?

यन्त्रसामग्री.devanagari: पुुरातनी यन्त्रसामग्री परिवर्तनीया। Olden hardware is to be replaced.

यन्त्रसामग्री.english: It is necessary to buy new hardware.
Last year I installed the hardware.

यन्त्रसामग्री.devanagari: भवान् यन्त्रसामग्रीविषये कोऽपि ज्ञानं वेत्ति किम्?
यन्त्रसामग्री.transliteration: bhavān yantrasāmagrīviṣaye ko'pi jñānaṁ vetti kim?
यन्त्रसामग्री.english: Do you know anything about hardware?

यन्त्रांश.devanagari: पुुरातनः यन्त्रांशः परिवर्तनीयः। Olden hardware is to be replaced.

यन्त्रांश.english: New hardware is necessary for the computer.
Do you wish to buy hardware?
You think I should repair the hardware.

नि-विश.devanagari: नामस्थले नाम निवेशयतु। Enter/Input the name in the name field.

नि-विश.english: He inputs important information in the letter.
The teacher input the verse in the book.

नि-विश.devanagari: किं त्वं अपना विचारं प्रपत्रे निवेशयसि?
नि-विश.transliteration: kiṃ tvaṃ apnā vicāraṃ prapatra niveśayasi?
नि-विश.english: Will you input your opinion in the form?
Please input the customer's name in the database.

ग्राफ्.devanagari: गतपञ्चवर्षाणां लाभं ग्राफा दर्शयतु। Show the last 5-year profits with a graph.

ग्राफ्.english: This graph shows the students' marks.
Yesterday I made a graph on paper.

ग्राफ्.devanagari: किं त्वं इस् ग्राफस्य अर्थं समजसि?
ग्राफ्.transliteration: kiṁ tvam is graphasya arthaṁ samajasi?
ग्राफ्.english: Do you understand the meaning of this graph?

प्रतिमा.devanagari: प्रतिमायाः सम्पादनं करोतु। Edit the image.

प्रतिमा.english: The image of the god is placed in the temple.
The artist created a beautiful image.

प्रतिमा.devanagari: अयं प्रतिमा कति रूप्यकाणां मूल्यवती अस्ति? — बहुमूल्यवती!
प्रतिमा.transliteration: ayaṁ pratimā kati rupyakāṇāṁ mūlyavantī asti? — bahumūlyavantī!
प्रतिमा.english: How much silver is this image worth? — It is very valuable!

आरम्भकील.devanagari: पाठ्यपङ्क्तेः आरम्भे सर्पकं सारयितुम् आरम्भकीलं कीलयतु। Press home key to move the cursor to the beginning of the text line.
आरम्भकीलं दबायित्वा कर्सर गृहस्य आदौ गच्छति।
आरम्भकील.transliteration: ārambhakīlaṁ dabāyitvā karsara gṛhasya ādau gachhati.
आरम्भकील.english: By pressing the home key, the cursor goes to the beginning of the house.

आरम्भकील.devanagari: कल मैंने आरम्भकीलं कीलयित्वा पाठ्यं आरम्भं कृतवान्।
आरम्भकील.transliteration: kala maiṁne āramphakīlaṁ kīlayitvā pāṭhyaṁ āramphṁ kṛtvān.
आरम्भकील.english: Yesterday I pressed the home key and started the lesson.
How do you use the home key?

आरम्भकील.devanagari: आरम्भकीलं कीलय, तते कर्सर आरम्भे भविष्यति।
आरम्भकील.transliteration: āramphakīlaṁ kīlaya, tate karsara āramphе bhraviṣyati.
आरम्भकील.english: Press the home key, then the cursor will be at the beginning.

उद्वर्ण.devanagari: सन्देशे मुख्यांशान् उद्वर्णयतु। Highlight important parts of the message.

उद्वर्ण.english: The teacher highlights the important parts of the lesson.
The student highlighted the main words.

उद्वर्ण.devanagari: किं भवान् इस्य विषयस्य केन्द्रबिन्दुं उद्वर्णयिष्यति?
उद्वर्ण.transliteration: kiṃ bhavān isya viṣayasya kendrabinduṃ udvarnayiṣyati?
उद्वर्ण.english: Will you highlight the central point of this topic?
Hey! Let's highlight the main ideas of this text.

हैश्मूल्य.devanagari: हेश्मूल्येन सत्यं ज्ञायते। The genuineness is known with hash value.

हैश्मूल्य.english: The hash value is important in computer security.

हैश्मूल्य.devanagari: अहम् हैश्मूल्यं पठितवान्। तव हैश्मूल्यं कस्मात् भिन्नम् आसीत्?
हैश्मूल्य.transliteration: aham haiśhmūlyaṁ paṭhitavān. tava haiśhmūlyaṁ kasmāt bhhinnam āsīt?
हैश्मूल्य.english: I read the hash value. Why was your hash value different?

हैश्मूल्य.devanagari: त्वम् हैश्मूल्यं समझसि? आम्, अहम् तस्य अर्थं जानामि।
हैश्मूल्य.transliteration: tvam haiśhmūlyaṁ samjhasi? ām, aham tasya arthaṁ jānāmi.
हैश्मूल्य.english: Do you understand the hash value? Yes, I know its meaning.

रेखाचित्र.devanagari: गतपञ्चवर्षाणां लाभं रेखाचित्रेण दर्शयतु। Show the last 5-year profits with a graph.

रेखाचित्र.english: By reading the graph, I understand the data.
The teacher displayed the graph in front of the students.

रेखाचित्र.devanagari: किं त्वं इदं रेखाचित्रं बोद्धुं शक्नोषि?
रेखाचित्र.transliteration: kim tvam idam rekhāchitram boddhum śaknośi?

रेखाचित्र.devanagari: अयं रेखाचित्रः अत्यन्तं उपयोगी अस्ति, नैव च?
रेखाचित्र.transliteration: ayam rekhāchitrah atyantam upayogī asti, naiva ch?
रेखाचित्र.english: This graph is very useful, isn't it?

कुञ्जिका.devanagari: कीलपटले कुञ्जिकाः सन्ति। Keyboard has keys.

कुञ्जिका.english: I open the house door with a key.

कुञ्जिका.devanagari: सा कुञ्जिकां खोजितवती किन्तु न अलभत।
कुञ्जिका.transliteration: sā kuñjikāṃ khōjitavatī kintu na alabhat.
कुञ्जिका.english: She searched for the key but did not find it.

प्रतिबन्धक.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य चालनं प्रतिबन्धकेन स्थगितंम्। Software stopped because of an interupt.

प्रतिबन्धक.english: A signal came through the interrupt.
Does the interrupt interrupt the process?

आन्तरजाल.devanagari: कार्यलयेषु आन्तरजालं भवति। Intranet is in offices.

आन्तरजाल.english: Yesterday the intranet did not work.
Are you satisfied with the intranet?

कील.devanagari: कीलपटले कीलानि सन्ति। Keyboard has keys.

कील.english: The key of the door is made of metal.
Ram forgot the key at home.
Did you search for the key?

कील.devanagari: मम कीलं कुत्र अस्ति? अहं जानामि नह।
कील.transliteration: mama kīlaṁ kutra asti? ahaṁ jānāmi nah.
कील.english: Where is my key? I don't know.

कुञ्जी.devanagari: कीलपटले कुञ्ज्यः सन्ति। Keyboard has keys.

कुञ्जी.english: Where is the key to his house?
I placed the key on the stone.

कुञ्जी.devanagari: हे सखे! मम कुञ्जी मे दास्यसि।
कुञ्जी.transliteration: he sakhe! mama kuñjī me dāsyasi.
कुञ्जी.english: Hey friend! Will you give me my key?

उपरोधक.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य चालनं उपरोधकेन स्थगितंम्। Software stopped because of an interupt.

उपरोधक.english: The computer was stopped by the interrupt.
Does the interrupt disrupt the process?

उपरोधक.devanagari: अरे, उपरोधकः आयातः! कार्यं पुनः आरभध्वम्।
उपरोधक.transliteration: are, uparodhkaḥ āyātaḥ! kāryaṃ punaḥ ārabhadhvam.
उपरोधक.english: Oh, the interrupt has come! Start the work again.

कीलनोद.devanagari: टङ्कनपरीक्षायां कीलनोदाः माप्यन्ते। Keystrokes are measured in the typing exam.

कीलनोद.english: The keystroke is very important on the computer.
How many keystrokes do you make every day?
Oh! My keystrokes were full of mistakes.

सहाष्टक.english: This kilobyte is in my computer.
Did you read about the kilobyte?
The teacher explained the definition of kilobyte to the student.
How many kilobytes are in this file?

कीलफलकरचना.devanagari: कार्यानुगुनं विभिन्नाः कीलफलकरचनाः भवन्ति। There various keyboard layouts depends on the work.
एषा कीलफलकरचना अंग्रेजी भाषायै निर्मिता अस्ति।
कीलफलकरचना.transliteration: eṣā kīlaphalakaracnā aṅgrezī bhāṣāyai nirmitā asti.
कीलफलकरचना.english: This keyboard layout is made for the English language.
I learned a new keyboard layout.
How many types of keyboard layouts are there?
Do you want to change the keyboard layout?

संवादात्मिका.devanagari: आधुनिकप्रज्ञाकल्पः संवादात्मकः जातः। The current AI systems have become interactive.

संवादात्मिका.english: The students love the interactive classroom.

संवादात्मिका.devanagari: शिक्षकः संवादात्मिकं पद्धतिं वर्षे पूर्वे प्रारम्भयत्।
संवादात्मिका.transliteration: śikṣakaḥ saṃvādātmikaṃ paddhattiṃ varṣe pūrve prāramabhayat.
संवादात्मिका.english: The teacher started the interactive method last year.
Do you support the interactive method?

अन्तर्क्रियात्मक.devanagari: आधुनिकप्रज्ञाकल्पः अन्तर्क्रियात्मकः जातः। The current AI systems have become interactive.

अन्तर्क्रियात्मक.english: The students played an interactive game.

अन्तर्क्रियात्मक.devanagari: हँ, यह अन्तर्क्रियात्मकः पाठ्यक्रमः अत्यन्तम् उपयोगी अस्ति।
अन्तर्क्रियात्मक.transliteration: hom, yaha antarkrīyātmakaḥ pāṭhyakramaḥ atyantam upayogī asti.
अन्तर्क्रियात्मक.english: Yes, this interactive course is very useful.

कीलफलकविधान.devanagari: कार्यानुगुनं विभिन्नाः कीलफलकविधानानि भवन्ति। There various keyboard layouts depends on the work.

कीलफलकविधान.english: What is the name of this keyboard layout?

कीलफलकविधान.devanagari: QWERTY कीलफलकविधानम् अंग्रेजीभाषायां सर्वाधिकं प्रचलितम् आसीत्।
कीलफलकविधान.transliteration: QWERTY kīlaphalakavidhānam aṅgrejībhāṣāyāṁ sarvādhikaṁ pracalitam āsīt.
कीलफलकविधान.english: The QWERTY keyboard layout was most popular in the English language.
The Indian keyboard layout is convenient for the Devanagari script.
Can you change the keyboard layout?

अन्तर्क्रियात्मिका.devanagari: आधुनिकप्रज्ञाकल्पः अन्तर्क्रियात्मकः जातः। The current AI systems have become interactive.

अन्तर्क्रियात्मिका.english: The interactive system is helpful to the students.
Interactive computers did not exist in the past.
Do you like this interactive course?

अन्तर्क्रियात्मिका.devanagari: हे मित्र! अन्तर्क्रियात्मिकी व्यायामः अत्यन्तं रोचकी वर्तते।
अन्तर्क्रियात्मिका.transliteration: hé mitr! antar-kriyātmikī vyāyāmah atyantam rochkī vartté.
अन्तर्क्रियात्मिका.english: Hey friend! The interactive exercise is very interesting.

संवादात्मक.devanagari: आधुनिकप्रज्ञाकल्पः संवादात्मकः जातः। The current AI systems have become interactive.
एषः संवादात्मकः कक्षः छात्रेभ्यः अत्यन्तं रोचते।
संवादात्मक.transliteration: eṣaḥ saṃvādātmakaḥ kakṣaḥ chātrébhyaḥ atyantaṃ rochate.
संवादात्मक.english: This interactive classroom is very pleasing to the students.
Last year, an interactive teaching method was started.

संवादात्मक.devanagari: किं त्वं संवादात्मकं वेबसाइटं उपयोगं करितवान्?
संवादात्मक.transliteration: kiṃ tvam saṃvādātmakaṃ vébsāiṭaṃ upayogaṃ karitavān?
संवादात्मक.english: Have you used an interactive website?

संवादात्मक.devanagari: भोः, एषा संवादात्मका प्रोग्रामः कथं वर्तते?
संवादात्मक.english: Friend, how does this interactive program work?

क्रीडायष्टि.devanagari: क्रीडायष्ट्या बालकः क्रीडति। The boy plays with joystick.

क्रीडायष्टि.english: The girl played with the joystick yesterday.
Do you want to play with the joystick?

क्रीडायष्टि.devanagari: अहं क्रीडायष्ट्या बहु रमणीयम् पाठम् शिक्षितवान्।
क्रीडायष्टि.transliteration: aham krīḍāyaṣṭyā bahu ramaṇīyam pāṭham śikṣitavān.
क्रीडायष्टि.english: I learned a very enjoyable lesson with the joystick.

वृत्त.devanagari: वृत्तं दृष्ट्वा दोषं वा व्यभिचारं वा ज्ञातुं शक्यते। Looking at log, one can know error or exception.

वृत्त.english: The log fell in the forest.
Who removes the log from the river?

स्थितिस्थापन.devanagari: स्थितिस्थापनेन जालादेशः नोपलभ्यते। Due to maintanence, website is not available.

स्थितिस्थापन.english: Hey! The time for maintenance has come.

इतिवृत्त.devanagari: इतिवृत्तं दृष्ट्वा दोषं वा व्यभिचारं वा ज्ञातुं शक्यते। Looking at log, one can know error or exception.

इतिवृत्त.english: It is necessary to read the log.
I have successfully preserved the log.
Have you seen the log, sir?

कीलपद.devanagari: कीलपदाधारेण अन्वेषणं भवति। Search happens based on keyword.

कीलपद.english: Having written the keyword, I perform a search.
The student had known the keyword before.

कीलपद.devanagari: भवान् कीलपदं लिखतु, तदा अहं अन्वेषणं करिष्यामि।
कीलपद.transliteration: bhavān kīlapádaṁ likhatu, tadā ahaṁ anvéṣaṇaṁ karíṣyāmi.
कीलपद.english: Please write the keyword, then I will search.

सुस्थापन.devanagari: सुस्थापनेन जालादेशः नोपलभ्यते। Due to maintanence, website is not available.

सुस्थापन.english: The maintenance of the building is necessary.
The employee did the maintenance of the house.
When will the maintenance of the machine happen?
Why should money be given for maintenance?

सूचि.devanagari: सूचिः इह उपलब्धा अस्ति। भोजनं कोषयामि।
