निजसङ्गणक.devanagari: अस्माकं गृहेषु निजसङ्गणकानि सन्ति। PCs are there in our houses.

निजसङ्गणक.english: Ramesh went to buy a personal computer.
What do you do with your personal computer?

चौर्य.devanagari: चौर्यात् रक्षणं करणीयम्। Protect from piracy.

चौर्य.english: In the past, piracy was very common.
Sir, how shall we prevent piracy?

आलम्बन.devanagari: ई-वाणिज्यार्थं नूतनालम्बनं निर्मीयते। New E-Business platform is created.

आलम्बन.english: The workers stood on the platform.

ऊर्जामितव्ययदशा.devanagari: ऊर्जामितव्ययदशया विद्युच्छक्तिः रक्षिता भवति। Electric power is saved with power saving mode.

ऊर्जामितव्ययदशा.english: Power save mode is active on the device.
Yesterday I activated power save mode.
Do you use power save mode?
With power save mode, the battery lasts longer.

ऊर्जरक्षणावस्था.devanagari: ऊर्जरक्षणावस्थया विद्युच्छक्तिः रक्षिता भवति। Electric power is saved with power saving mode.

ऊर्जरक्षणावस्था.english: Power Save Mode increases the lifespan of the device.
Do you use Power Save Mode?

ऊर्जरक्षणावस्था.devanagari: ऊर्जरक्षणावस्था अत्यन्तं उपयोगी अस्ति, नास्ति किम्?
ऊर्जरक्षणावस्था.transliteration: Ūrjarakṣaṇāvasthā atyantaṁ upayogī asti, nāsti kim?
ऊर्जरक्षणावस्था.english: Power Save Mode is very useful, isn't it?

निसङ्ग.devanagari: अस्माकं गृहेषु निसङ्गानि सन्ति। PCs are there in our houses.

निसङ्ग.english: I will go to buy a PC tomorrow.

निसङ्ग.devanagari: किम् त्वं निसङ्गेन कार्यं कर्तुं शक्नोषि?
निसङ्ग.transliteration: kim tvam̐ niṣaṅgena kāryaṃ kartur śaknośi?
निसङ्ग.english: Can you do work with the PC?

निसङ्ग.devanagari: अरे! तव निसङ्गः एकदा नष्टः अभवत्।
निसङ्ग.transliteration: are! tava niṣaṅgaḥ ekadā naśṭaḥ abhavat.
निसङ्ग.english: Hey! Your PC was broken once.

स्वीयसङ्गणक.devanagari: अस्माकं गृहेषु स्वीयसङ्गणकानि सन्ति। PCs are there in our houses.

स्वीयसङ्गणक.english: He worked with the personal computer.
Do you use a personal computer?

स्वीयसङ्गणक.devanagari: भो! मम स्वीयसङ्गणकम् खराबम् जातम्। किम् त्वं साहाय्यं दातुम् शक्नोषि?
स्वीयसङ्गणक.transliteration: bho! mama swīyasaṅgaṇakam kharābam jātam. kim tvāṃ sāhāyyaṃ dātum shaknoshi?
स्वीयसङ्गणक.english: Hey! My personal computer has become broken. Can you help?

वेदिका.devanagari: ई-वाणिज्यार्थं नूतनवेदीका निर्मीयते। New E-Business platform is created.

वेदिका.english: An ancient platform exists near the temple.
Is the platform beautifully adorned with flowers?

वेदिका.devanagari: भवान् वेदिकायां उपविष्टः। भद्रे, अत्र आसनं अस्ति किम्?
वेदिका.transliteration: bhavān vedikāyāṁ upaviṣṭaḥ. bhadre, atra āsanaṁ asti kim?
वेदिका.english: You sat on the platform. Good sir, is there a seat here?

स्वसङ्ग.devanagari: अस्माकं गृहेषु स्वसह्गानि सन्ति। PCs are there in our houses.

स्वसङ्ग.english: It is not difficult to operate a personal computer.

स्वसङ्ग.devanagari: कल मैंने नवीनं स्वसङ्गं क्रेतुं कार्यालयं गतवान्।
स्वसङ्ग.transliteration: kala maiṁne navīnaṁ svasaṅgaṁ krētuṁ kāryālayaṁ gatavān.
स्वसङ्ग.english: Yesterday I went to the office to buy a new personal computer.
For what purpose do you use a personal computer?

स्वसङ्ग.devanagari: भो! किम् भवानां स्वसङ्गः कार्यं करोति? हाँ, सः उत्तमः अस्ति।
स्वसङ्ग.transliteration: bho! kim bhavānāṁ svasaṅgaḥ kāryaṁ karoti? hāñ, saḥ uttamaḥ asti.
स्वसङ्ग.english: Hey! Is your personal computer working? Yes, it is excellent.

विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.devanagari: ई-वाणिज्यार्थं नूतनविशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांशः निर्मीयते। New E-Business platform is created.

विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.english: The platform is useful for students.
A new platform was established last year.

विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.devanagari: किमेतः विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांशः सर्वेषां कृते सुलभः अस्ति?
विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.transliteration: kim-etaḥ viśiṣṭasaṅgaṇakayantráṃśaḥ sarveṣāṁ kṛte sulabhaḥ asti?
विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.english: Is this platform accessible to everyone?

विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.devanagari: भवान् अपि इमं विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांशं प्रयोजयति वा?
विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.transliteration: bhavān api imaṁ viśiṣṭasaṅgaṇakayantráṃśaṁ prayojayati vā?
विशिष्टसङ्गणकयन्त्रांश.english: Do you also use this platform?

पत्याष्टकानि.devanagari: एतस्य संगणकस्य भण्डारणशक्तिः पञ्च पत्याष्टकानि अस्ति।
पत्याष्टकानि.transliteration: etasya sanganakasya bhandaranashaktih paṁch patya'ashtakani asti.
पत्याष्टकानि.english: This computer's storage capacity is five petabytes.

पत्याष्टकानि.devanagari: गूगलः दश पत्याष्टकानि डेटा संचयं कृतवान्।
पत्याष्टकानि.transliteration: gugal dasha patya'ashtakani data sanchayam krutavan.
पत्याष्टकानि.english: Google stored ten petabytes of data.

पत्याष्टकानि.devanagari: भवतः सेवकस्य कति पत्याष्टकानि सञ्चयनशीलता अस्ति?
पत्याष्टकानि.transliteration: bhavtah sevkasya kati patya'ashtakani sanchyanshilata asti?
पत्याष्टकानि.english: How many petabytes of storage capacity does your server have?

पत्याष्टकानि.devanagari: अहं सोचयामि यत् एताः डेटा तीन पत्याष्टकानि धारयिष्यन्ति।
पत्याष्टकानि.transliteration: aham sochayami yat etah data tin patya'ashtakani dharayishyanti.
पत्याष्टकानि.english: I think this data will occupy three petabytes.

ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा.devanagari: ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशया विद्युच्छक्तिः रक्षिता भवति। Electric power is saved with power saving mode.
यदि ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा सक्रिया अस्ति, तर्हि बैटरी दीर्घकालं स्थिरः रहति।
ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा.transliteration: yadi ūrjābhirakṣaṇadaśā sakriyā asti, tarhi baiṭrī dīrghakālaṁ sthiraḥ rahati.
ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा.english: If power save mode is active, then the battery remains stable for a long time.
I activated power save mode yesterday.
Do you use power save mode?

ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा.devanagari: भो, ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा भवतः फलकस्य आयुः वर्धयिष्यति।
ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा.transliteration: bho, ūrjābhirakṣaṇadaśā bhavataḥ phalakasya āyuḥ vardhayiṣyati.
ऊर्जाभिरक्षणदशा.english: Hey, power save mode will extend the life of your tablet.

आधार.devanagari: ई-वाणिज्यार्थं नूतानाधारः निर्मीयते। New E-Business platform is created.
यः आधारः मजबूतः अस्ति, तस्य भवनं दीर्घकालं स्थायी भवति।
आधार.transliteration: yaḥ ādhāraḥ majbūtaḥ asti, tasya bhavanaṃ dīrghakālaṃ sthāyī bhavati.
आधार.english: A building whose foundation is strong remains stable for a long time.
There, the foundation was built of stone.

आधार.devanagari: भवनस्य आधारः कुत्र अस्ति? — भूमिं निम्नभागे आधारः वर्तते।
आधार.transliteration: bhavnasya ādhāraḥ kutra asti? — bhūmiṃ nimnabhāge ādhāraḥ vartate.
आधार.english: Where is the building's foundation? — The foundation lies beneath the ground.

संविधि.english: For whom are you writing the program?
I am creating a new program.

विधिलेखन.devanagari: विधिकारः विधिं लिखति। Programmar writes the program.

उपस्थापन.devanagari: निर्देशकाय नूतनं उपस्थापनं निर्मातु। Make presentation for director.

उपस्थापन.english: The teacher listens to the students' presentation.
A presentation was made in the assembly yesterday.

उपस्थापन.devanagari: किं त्वम् नूतनं उपस्थापनं द्रष्टुम् इच्छसि?
उपस्थापन.transliteration: kim tvam nūtanam upasthāpanam draṣṭum ichhasi?
उपस्थापन.english: Do you want to see the new presentation?

प्रस्तोतव्य.devanagari: निर्देशकाय नूतनं प्रस्तावनं निर्मातु। Make presentation for director.

प्रस्तोतव्य.english: The student presented the presentation in the classroom.

प्रस्तोतव्य.transliteration: adhyāpikā prastotavyaṃ āja prastu itu ichchhati.
प्रस्तोतव्य.english: The teacher wants to present the presentation today.
Hey! Have you prepared the presentation?

प्रस्तुति.devanagari: निर्देशकाय नूतनां प्रस्तुतिं निर्मातु। Make presentation for director.

प्रस्तुति.english: The teacher reads the students' presentation.
Yesterday I made an excellent presentation.

प्रस्तावन.devanagari: निर्देशकाय नूतनां प्रस्तावनं निर्मातु। Make presentation for director.

प्रस्तावन.english: The student presents the presentation to the listeners.
The teacher made the presentation yesterday.
How will you make the presentation?

विधि.english: Does the program do the work?
A new program has been created here.

उपस्थापनीय.devanagari: निर्देशकाय नूतनं उपस्थापनीयं निर्मातु। Make presentation for director.

उपस्थापनीय.english: Prepare the presentation in front of the students.
The teacher displayed the presentation to the students.

उपस्थापनीय.devanagari: भो! इदं उपस्थापनीयं कृत्वा मे साहाय्यं कुर्यास्।
उपस्थापनीय.transliteration: bho! idam upsthāpanīyam krtvā me sāhāyyam kuryās.
उपस्थापनीय.english: Hey! Please help me by making this presentation.

गुप्तता.devanagari: अन्तर्जालस्य गुप्तता सन्देहात्मिका। Online privacy is doubtful.

गुप्तता.english: The government protected citizens' privacy in the past.
Have you thought about the shop's privacy?
I am committed to your privacy.

विधिभाषा.devanagari: जावा इत्येका विधिभाषा। Java is one programming language.

विधिभाषा.english: Python is a popular programming language.

विधिभाषा.devanagari: सः विधिभाषां शिखिष्यत इति मे ज्ञातम्।
विधिभाषा.transliteration: Saḥ vidhiBhāṣāṃ shikhiṣyat iti me jñātam.
विधिभाषा.english: I know that he learned a programming language.
How many programming languages are useful nowadays?

विधिभाषा.devanagari: भवान् कस्यै विधिभाषायै श्रेष्ठ इति मन्यते?
विधिभाषा.transliteration: Bhavān kasyai vidhiBhāṣāyai śreṣṭh iti manyate?
विधिभाषा.english: Which programming language do you think is the best?

मुद्रक.devanagari: मुद्रकेन मुद्रणं कृत्वा समर्पयतु। Submit after taking printout with printer.

मुद्रक.english: The letter was printed by the printer.
Which printer works in this city?
Hey printer! Is this work finished?

मुद्रणयन्त्र.devanagari: मुद्रणयन्त्रेण मुद्रणं कृत्वा समर्पयतु। Submit after taking printout with printer.

मुद्रणयन्त्र.english: The day before yesterday, the printer was broken.
Where do you want to buy a printer?

मुद्रणयन्त्र.devanagari: अरे! मुद्रणयन्त्रम् अत्र आस्ते। इदम् सुलभं मूल्यम् अस्ति।
मुद्रणयन्त्र.transliteration: are! mudraṇayantram atra āste. idam sulabham mūlyam asti.
मुद्रणयन्त्र.english: Hey! The printer is here. It has an affordable price.

ऊर्जस्रोत.devanagari: ऊर्जस्रोतेन सङ्गणकं चलति। Computer runs with power supply.
ऊर्जस्रोतः भवनस्य सर्वत्र विद्युत् प्रदाय करति।
ऊर्जस्रोत.transliteration: Ūrjasrōtaḥ bhavanaśya sarvatra vidyut pradāya karati.
ऊर्जस्रोत.english: The power supply provides electricity throughout the building.

ऊर्जस्रोत.devanagari: कल ऊर्जस्रोतः खण्डितः आसीत्, अतः प्रकाशः नाभवत्।
ऊर्जस्रोत.transliteration: Kala ūrjasrōtaḥ khaṇḍitaḥ āsīt, ataḥ prakāśaḥ nābhavat.
ऊर्जस्रोत.english: Yesterday the power supply was cut off, therefore there was no light.

ऊर्जस्रोत.devanagari: भो! ऊर्जस्रोतः कहाँ अस्ति? - वह दरवाजे के पास अस्ति।
ऊर्जस्रोत.transliteration: Bho! Ūrjasrōtaḥ kahāँ asti? - Vah darvāze ke pās asti.
ऊर्जस्रोत.english: Hey! Where is the power supply? - It is near the door.

गुह्यता.devanagari: अन्तर्जालस्य गुह्यता सन्देहात्मिका। Online privacy is doubtful.

गुह्यता.english: The state protected the citizens' privacy.
What is the state of your home's privacy?

गुह्यता.devanagari: भोः, अस्मिन् स्थले गुह्यता नास्ति इति मन्ये।
गुह्यता.transliteration: bhoḥ, asmin sthale guhyatā nāsti iti manye.
गुह्यता.english: Sir, I think there is no privacy in this place.

रहोभाव.devanagari: अन्तर्जालस्य रहोभावः सन्देहात्मकः। Online privacy is doubtful.

रहोभाव.english: In the past, the royal family's privacy was protected.

रहोभाव.devanagari: किं त्वं तस्य रहोभावस्य विषये सचेतनः?
रहोभाव.transliteration: kiṃ tvam tasya rahobhāvas'ya viṣaye sacetanaḥ?
रहोभाव.english: Are you aware about his privacy matter?

रहोभाव.devanagari: भोः मित्र, एषा पत्रा रहोभावेन पठनीया अस्ति।
रहोभाव.transliteration: bhoḥ mitra, eṣā patrā rahobhāvena pathanīyā asti.
रहोभाव.english: Hey friend, this letter should be read privately.

नोद्यगण्ड.devanagari: तत्र नोद्यगण्डः अस्ति। There is a push button.

नोद्यगण्ड.english: What does the push button do?

परियोजनाप्रबन्धन.devanagari: परियोजनाप्रबन्धनं करोति एषः। He is doing project management.
भवती परियोजनाप्रबन्धने निपुणा अस्ति, न किम्?
परियोजनाप्रबन्धन.transliteration: Bhavati pariyojanapraban­dhane nipuna asti, na kim?
परियोजनाप्रबन्धन.english: You are skilled in project management, aren't you?

प्रोद्यम.devanagari: भवान् कस्मिन् प्रोद्यमगणे अस्ति? Which project team are you in?
अस्मिन् प्रोद्यमे कति जनाः कार्यं करन्ति?
प्रोद्यम.transliteration: asmin prodyame kati janāḥ kāryaṁ karanti?
प्रोद्यम.english: How many people work on this project?

प्रोद्यम.devanagari: भवान् तस्य प्रोद्यमस्य प्रमुखः अस्ति किम्?
प्रोद्यम.transliteration: bhavān tasya prodyamasya pramukhaḥ asti kim?
प्रोद्यम.english: Are you the head of that project?

गुणग्राम.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य गुणग्रामः परीक्षणीयः। Quality of the software is to be tested.

गुणग्राम.english: The quality of the product is excellent.
Are you satisfied with the quality?

निष्क्रम.devanagari: वृत्तलेखात् निष्क्रमं करोतु। Exit from the logs.

निष्क्रम.english: The soldier exits from the battlefield.
The frightened child did not exit from the house.
Who will exit from the city?

गुणवत्ताप्रमाणन.devanagari: तन्त्रज्ञः गुणवत्ताप्रमाणनं करोति। The engineer is doing quality assurance.

गुणवत्ताप्रमाणन.english: Quality assurance is important in industry.

स्वाम्य.devanagari: एतत् स्वाम्यं कार्यम्। This is proprietary work.

स्वाम्य.english: His proprietary right existed in the past.

स्वाम्य.devanagari: किम् एतत् स्वाम्यं गोपनीयं न अस्ति?
स्वाम्य.transliteration: Kim etat svāmyaṃ gopanīyaṃ na asti?
स्वाम्य.english: Is this proprietary information not confidential?
Hey, where is the proprietary document?

परियोजना.devanagari: भवान् कस्मिन् परियोजनागणे अस्ति? Which project team are you in?

परियोजना.english: His project was completed last year.

परियोजना.devanagari: किं भवती इस्य परियोजनायां कार्यं करिष्यति?
परियोजना.transliteration: kiṃ bhavtī isya pariyojnāyāṃ kāryaṃ karisyati?
परियोजना.english: Will you work on this project?
Yes, I will help with the project.

अभिस्मृति.devanagari: अभिस्मृतिः तात्कालिका स्मरणशक्तिः। RAM is temporary memory.

अभिस्मृति.english: The RAM of the computer is fast.

अभिस्मृति.devanagari: अभिस्मृतिः कुत्र स्थितः अस्ति? - संगणके अंतरे।
अभिस्मृति.transliteration: abhissmṛtiḥ kutra sthitaḥ asti? - saṁgaṇake antare.
अभिस्मृति.english: Where is the RAM located? - Inside the computer.

निरसन.devanagari: पुरातनवृत्तलेखस्य निरसनं करोतु। Purge old logs.

निरसन.english: Purge of the wasteful budget is necessary.
The physician will purge the disease.
When will the purge of evil elements happen?
Hey! Did you purge the poison?

गुणवत्तासम्प्रत्यय.devanagari: तन्त्रज्ञः गुणवत्तासम्प्रत्ययं करोति। The engineer is doing quality assurance.

गुणवत्तासम्प्रत्यय.english: The company organized quality assurance before.
Do you know the work of quality assurance?
Hey! What is quality assurance like?

गुणवत्ता.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य गुणवत्ता परीक्षणीया। Quality of the software is to be tested.

गुणवत्ता.english: The quality of this book is excellent.
The quality of his work was good.

गुणवत्ता.devanagari: किम् एतस्य वस्तुस्य गुणवत्ता निकृष्टा अस्ति?
गुणवत्ता.transliteration: kim etasya vastusya guṇavattā nikṛṣṭā asti?
गुणवत्ता.english: Is the quality of this object poor?

गुणवत्ता.devanagari: भोः, गुणवत्ता कीदृशी भवेत्? सा परिवर्तनीया अस्ति।
गुणवत्ता.transliteration: bhoh, guṇavattā kīdṛśī bhavet? sā parivartanīyā asti.
गुणवत्ता.english: Friend, what should the quality be like? It needs to be improved.

प्रकल्प.devanagari: भवान् कस्मिन् प्रकल्पगणे अस्ति? Which project team are you in?

प्रकल्प.english: When will his project be completed?

प्रकल्प.devanagari: अरे! यः प्रकल्पः पूर्वं निर्धारितः तस्य प्रगतिः कीदृशः?
प्रकल्प.transliteration: are! yaḥ prakalpḥ pūrvaṁ nirdhāritḥ tasya prattiḥ kīdṛśḥ?
प्रकल्प.english: Hey! How is the progress of the project that was decided earlier?

संविद्.devanagari: अङ्गीकृतसंविदा दत्तांशस्य सञ्चारः भवति। Data communication happes with agreed protocol.

संविद्.english: A new protocol is established between the computers.

संविद्.devanagari: पुरा संविद् निर्धारिता आसीत् तदा सञ्चारः सफलः अभवत्।
संविद्.transliteration: purā saṃvid nirdhāritā āsīt tadā sañchāraḥ saphalḥ abhavat.
संविद्.english: When the protocol was determined before, the communication became successful.

संविद्.devanagari: किं त्वं अस्य संविदः नियमान् जानसि?
संविद्.transliteration: kiṃ tvam asya saṃvidaḥ niyamān jānasi?
संविद्.english: Do you know the rules of this protocol?

संविद्.devanagari: भोः! संविद् परिवर्तनीया भवेत् इति मन्ये।
संविद्.transliteration: bhoḥ! saṃvid parivartanīyā bhavet iti manye.
संविद्.english: Hey! I think the protocol should be changed.

निष्कासन.english: The administrator purges the contaminated water.
The employee purged the malicious software from the computer.

निष्कासन.devanagari: किं भवान् अस्मिन् सञ्चयपत्रे अनावश्यकादिद्रव्यस्य निष्कासनं करिष्यति?
निष्कासन.transliteration: kiṁ bhavān asmin sañchayapatre anāvaśyakādidradvyasya niṣkāsanaṁ kariṣyati?
निष्कासन.english: Will you purge unnecessary items from this storage box?

निष्कासन.devanagari: भवान्, कृपया इमानि पुरातनपत्राणि निष्कासयतु। आम्, तत्क्षणात् करिष्यामि।
निष्कासन.transliteration: bhavān, kṛpayā imāni purātanpatrāṇi niṣkāsayatu. Ām, tatkṣaṇāt kariṣyāmi.
निष्कासन.english: Sir, please purge these old documents. Yes, I will do it right away.

दूरसम्प्रवेश.devanagari: दूरसम्प्रवेशं कृत्वा पश्यतु। Do the remote login and see.

दूरसम्प्रवेश.english: I have done the remote login.
Do you know about remote login?
Hey, how is remote login done?

यादृच्छिकसङ्ख्या.devanagari: यादृच्छिकसङ्ख्यां जनयतु। Generate a random number.

यादृच्छिकसङ्ख्या.english: The computer created a random number.
I think about the random number.
Do you know what a random number is?

दूरादभिगम.devanagari: दूरादभिगमेन निर्वहनं करोतु। Do the maintanence with remote access.

दूरादभिगम.english: We completed the work through remote access.
Hey, please provide the service via remote access.

यदृच्छासङ्ख्या.devanagari: यदृच्छासङ्ख्यां जनयतु। Generate a random number.

यदृच्छासङ्ख्या.english: The computer creates a random number.
What random number are you thinking of?

नवीकरण.devanagari: नूतनदत्तांशं द्रष्टुं नवीकरोतु। Refresh to see new data.
किं त्वम् पृष्ठस्य नवीकरणं कर्तुम् इच्छसि?
नवीकरण.transliteration: kiṁ tvam pṛṣṭhasya navīkaraṇaṁ kartum ichhasi?
नवीकरण.english: Do you want to refresh the page?

अनियतसङ्ख्या.devanagari: अनियतसङ्ख्यां जनयतु। Generate a random number.

अनियतसङ्ख्या.english: A random number is seen in the calculator.
A random number was created before.
Do you know what a random number is?
What is a random number for? — It is useful in calculation.

सम्पादन.devanagari: नूतनदत्तांशं द्रष्टुं पुनः सम्पादनं करोतु। Refresh to see new data.

सम्पादन.english: Refresh of the webpage is necessary.

सम्पादन.devanagari: किं त्वं पुनः सम्पादनं कर्तुम् इच्छसि?
सम्पादन.transliteration: kim tvam punaḥ sampādanam kartum ichhasi?
सम्पादन.english: Do you want to do a refresh?

सम्पादन.devanagari: पुनः सम्पादनं करोतु, तदा सूचनाः प्रकटिष्यन्ते।
सम्पादन.transliteration: punaḥ sampādanam karotu, tadā sūchnāḥ prakatiṣyante.
सम्पादन.english: Do a refresh, then the notifications will appear.

प्रकाश.devanagari: नूतनतन्त्रांशः श्वः प्रकाशितः भवति। New software will be released tomorrow.

प्रकाश.english: The release of the book was in August.
Will the release of the film happen now?
The new music will be released.

दूराभिगम.devanagari: दूराभिगमेन निर्वहनं करोतु। Do the maintanence with remote access.

दूराभिगम.english: He accomplished the work through remote access.
Can you control the system with remote access?

पुनः उत्+ष्ठा.english: He rebooted the entire system yesterday.

दूरात्सम्पवेश.devanagari: दूरात्सम्पवेशं कृत्वा पश्यतु। Do the remote login and see.

दूरात्सम्पवेश.english: Do you know about remote login?
You should work with remote login.

पुनरादान.devanagari: नूतनदत्तांशं द्रष्टुं पुनरादानं करोतु। Refresh to see new data.
कृपया पुनरादानं कुरु, पुस्तकं पठितुम् इच्छामि।
पुनरादान.transliteration: kṛpayā punarādānaṃ kuru, pustakaṃ paṭhitum ichhāmi.
पुनरादान.english: Please refresh, I want to read the book.

अभिलेख.devanagari: आदेशानाम् अभिलेखं करोतु। Record the instructions.

अभिलेख.english: The king preserves the record of important matters.

अभिलेख.devanagari: भो! अभिलेखः कुत्र स्थितः अस्ति? - विद्यालये स्थितः अस्ति।
अभिलेख.transliteration: bho! abhilekhaḥ kutra sthitaḥ asti? - vidyālaye sthitaḥ asti.
अभिलेख.english: Hey! Where is the record? - It is in the school.

विप्रकृष्टादभिगम.devanagari: विप्रकृष्टादभिगमेन निर्वहनं करोतु। Do the maintanence with remote access.

विप्रकृष्टादभिगम.english: I completed all tasks with remote access.

पुनः प्र+वृतु.devanagari: स्वीयसङ्गणकं पुनः प्रवर्तयतु। Reboot the PC.
यन्त्रः क्षतिग्रस्तः अस्ति, तस्मात् अहं पुनः प्रवर्तयामि।
पुनः प्र+वृतु.transliteration: Yantraḥ kṣatigrastaḥ asti, tasmāt ahaṃ punaḥ pravartayāmi.
पुनः प्र+वृतु.english: The device is damaged, so I am rebooting it.

पुनः प्र+वृतु.devanagari: सः पुनः प्रवर्तयत् तदा समस्या समाप्ता अभवत्।
पुनः प्र+वृतु.transliteration: Saḥ punaḥ pravartayat tadā samastyā samāptā abhavatū.
पुनः प्र+वृतु.english: When he rebooted it, the problem was solved.
Will you reboot the mobile phone?

पुनः प्र+वृतु.devanagari: अरे! कम्प्यूटरः कार्यं न करोति। पुनः प्रवर्तयामि इति?
पुनः प्र+वृतु.transliteration: Are! Kampyūtaraḥ kāryaṃ na karoti. Punaḥ pravartayāmi iti?
पुनः प्र+वृतु.english: Hey! The computer isn't working. Shall I reboot it?

उपग्रह.devanagari: पृथ्व्यां सर्वत्र उपग्रहेण दत्तांशस्य सञ्चारः भवति। Everywhere in the earth, the data communication happen through satellite.

उपग्रह.english: The satellite moves in the sky.
Who knows the function of the satellite?

रक्ष.devanagari: नाशात् पूर्वमेव रक्ष। Save before loosing.

रक्ष.english: Hey! Save me. Danger is coming.

प्रतिवेदन.devanagari: भोः! प्रतिवेदनं कुत्र अस्ति? मह्यम् आवश्यकम्।
प्रतिवेदन.transliteration: bhoḥ! prativeданam kutr asti? mahyam āvaśyakam.
प्रतिवेदन.english: Hey! Where is the report? I need it.

पत्रबिम्बक.devanagari: पत्रबिम्बकेन पत्रं अङ्कयतु। Digitize the paper with scanner.

पत्रबिम्बक.english: The scanner quickly does the work.
I have digitized the paper with the scanner.

पत्रबिम्बक.devanagari: भवान् पत्रबिम्बकः कुत्र अस्ति इति जानाति किम्?
पत्रबिम्बक.transliteration: bhavān patrabimbakah kutra asti iti jānāti kim?
पत्रबिम्बक.english: Do you know where the scanner is?

वामेतरनोदन.devanagari: वामेतरनोदनं कृत्वा पुनरादानं करोतु। Do right click and refresh.

वामेतरनोदन.english: A menu appears with a right click.

वामेतरनोदन.devanagari: अहं वामेतरनोदनं अकरवम् तर्हि किम् अभवत्?
वामेतरनोदन.transliteration: ahaṃ vāmetaranodanaṃ akarovam tarhi kim abhavat?
वामेतरनोदन.english: I did a right click, then what happened?
He saw the options through a right click.
Do you want to do a right click?

आलोचक.devanagari: आलोचकेन पत्रं अङ्कयतु। Digitize the paper with scanner.

आलोचक.english: We digitized the documents with the scanner.
Do you know how to use the scanner?

दक्षिणनोदन.devanagari: दक्षिणनोदनं कृत्वा पुनरादानं करोतु। Do right click and refresh.

दक्षिणनोदन.english: By doing a right click, the menu appears.
I did a right click; what happened then?
Do you know the use of right click?
Right click is always useful when needed.

पत्रबिम्बग्राहक.devanagari: पत्रबिम्बग्राहकेन पत्रं अङ्कयतु। Digitize the paper with scanner.

पत्रबिम्बग्राहक.english: The scanner is on the table.
I scanned all the papers with the scanner.

पत्रबिम्बग्राहक.devanagari: भोः, पत्रबिम्बग्राहकं मह्यं देहि। अहं पत्रं अङ्कयिष्यामि।
पत्रबिम्बग्राहक.transliteration: bhoḥ, patrababiṁbgrāhkaṁ mahyaṁ dehi. ahaṁ patraṁ aṅkayiśyāmi.
पत्रबिम्बग्राहक.english: Hey, give me the scanner. I will scan the paper.

प्रत्याधान.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य प्रत्याधानं करोतु। Rollback the software.

प्रत्याधान.english: A rollback of the database is necessary.

प्रत्याधान.devanagari: भोः, एतस्य प्रत्याधानं कर्तव्यम्। अथ न करिष्यामः?
प्रत्याधान.transliteration: Bhoh, etasya pratyādhānaṃ kartavyam. Atha na karisyāmah?
प्रत्याधान.english: Hey, we must do a rollback of this. Shall we not do it?

भृत्य.devanagari: भृत्यं समादेशानुसारं कार्यं करोति। Robot does the work as per the command.

भृत्य.english: The robot quickly cleans the house.
When does the robot finish the work?
Hey! Where is the robot? Come here.

प्रत्यावर्तन.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य प्रत्यावर्तनं करोतु। Rollback the software.

प्रत्यावर्तन.english: The rollback of the database was necessary.

प्रत्यावर्तन.devanagari: किं त्वं फाइलस्य प्रत्यावर्तनं कर्तुं शक्नोषि?
प्रत्यावर्तन.transliteration: Kiṁ tvam phāilasya pratyāvartanaṁ kartuṁ śaknośi?
प्रत्यावर्तन.english: Can you perform the rollback of the file?
I will do the rollback of the code today.
Hey, shall we perform the rollback of the system?

पठस्मृति.devanagari: सङ्गणके मुख्यतन्त्रांशः पठस्मृतौ भवति। Main software is in ROM.

पठस्मृति.english: ROM is an essential part of the computer.
Data was stored in ROM for a long time.
Does ROM get destroyed during a power outage?

प्रतिनिवर्तन.devanagari: तन्त्रांशस्य प्रतिनिवर्तनं करोतु। Rollback the software.

प्रतिनिवर्तन.english: A rollback of the database was necessary.
Do you want to perform a rollback?
Let the rollback be completed. I hope so.

कारुयन्त्र.devanagari: कारुयन्त्रं समादेशानुसारं कार्यं करोति। Robot does the work as per the command.

कारुयन्त्र.english: The robot completes the work quickly.
The robot carried the load yesterday.
Can the robot do manual work?

कारुयन्त्र.devanagari: भोः, कारुयन्त्रम् आगच्छतु एतत् पत्रं आनयतु।
कारुयन्त्र.transliteration: bhoh, kāruyantrām āgacchtu etat patra ānaytau.
कारुयन्त्र.english: Hey robot, come here and bring this letter.

पटलग्रहण.devanagari: पटलग्रहणं प्रषयतु। Send me the screenshot.

पटलग्रहण.english: I will make a screen capture.
Can this screen capture be done?
Please send me my screen capture.

क्रमादेश.english: Hey friend! Show me the script.

पटलत्र.devanagari: पटलत्रं स्थापयतु। Keep the screen saver.

पटलत्र.english: Hey! Turn off the screen saver.

क्रमादेशभाषा.devanagari: फैतानित्येका क्रमादेशभाषा। Python is one scripting language.
क्रमादेशभाषा कम्प्यूटर प्रोग्राम लिखने के लिए उपयोगी है।
क्रमादेशभाषा.transliteration: kramādeśabhāṣā kampyūtar program likhne ke lie upyogī hai.
क्रमादेशभाषा.english: A scripting language is useful for writing computer programs.

क्रमादेशभाषा.devanagari: मैंने कल एक नई क्रमादेशभाषा सीखी।
क्रमादेशभाषा.transliteration: Maiṁne kal ek naī kramādeśabhāṣā sīkhī.
क्रमादेशभाषा.english: I learned a new scripting language yesterday.

क्रमादेशभाषा.devanagari: क्या आप यह क्रमादेशभाषा जानते हो?
क्रमादेशभाषा.transliteration: Kyā āp yah kramādeśabhāṣā jānte ho?
क्रमादेशभाषा.english: Do you know this scripting language?

क्रमादेशभाषा.devanagari: हाँ, मैं JavaScript क्रमादेशभाषा बहुत अच्छे से जानता हूँ।
क्रमादेशभाषा.transliteration: Hāँ, maiṁ JavaScript kramādeśabhāṣā bahut achche se jāntā hūँ.
क्रमादेशभाषा.english: Yes, I know the JavaScript scripting language very well.

कालबन्ध.devanagari: मेलनस्य कालबन्धः कृतः। Meeting schedule is made.

कालबन्ध.english: The schedule of the event is visible.

पटलरक्षक.devanagari: पटलरक्षकं स्थापयतु। Keep the screen saver.

पटलरक्षक.english: Do you like the screen saver?
Hey! Turn off the screen saver.

उपक्रमभाषा.devanagari: फैतानित्येका उपक्रमभाषा। Python is one scripting language.

उपक्रमभाषा.english: A scripting language performs work on a computer.
Do you know a scripting language?
A scripting language is very useful.

अनुसूचिकरण.devanagari: भवान् कृपया मेलनम् अनुसूचिकृत्वा सूचयतु। Please inform after scheduling the meeting.

अनुसूचिकरण.english: How will you do the scheduling?

अनुसूचिकरण.devanagari: अनुसूचिकरणम् शीघ्रम् कुर्यात्। आम्, तत्क्षणमेव करिष्यामि।
अनुसूचिकरण.transliteration: anusūchikaraṇam śīghram kuryāt. ām, tatkṣaṇameva karisyāmi.
अनुसूचिकरण.english: Please do the scheduling quickly. Yes, I will do it immediately.

अनुसूचि.devanagari: मेलनस्य अनुसूचिः आगतः। Meeting schedule is available.

Hey, we understand the importance of transparency.

अन्त्योपकरण.transliteration: antyopakaraṇaṁ rogasya chikitsāyāṁ mahattvapu rṇaṁ bhavati.

We provided terminal care to the patient.

अन्त्योपकरण.devanagari: किं अन्त्योपकरणं सर्वेषां रोगिणां कृते आवश्यकं भवति?
अन्त्योपकरण.transliteration: kiṁ antyopakaraṇaṁ sarveṣāṁ rogiṇāṁ kṛte āvaśyakaṁ bhavati?
अन्त्योपकरण.english: Is terminal care necessary for all patients?
O physician, when is terminal care begun?

महसरोजाष्टकानि.devanagari: पूर्वे तस्य सर्वरः पञ्च महसरोजाष्टकानि संचितानि आसन्।
महसरोजाष्टकानि.transliteration: pūrve tasya sarvaraḥ pañca mahsarojāṣṭakāni sañcitāni āsan।
महसरोजाष्टकानि.english: Previously, his server had five terabytes stored.
How many terabytes are necessary for storage?

महसरोजाष्टकानि.devanagari: भोः, किम् अस्य डिस्कस्य महसरोजाष्टकानि पर्याप्तानि न सन्ति?
महसरोजाष्टकानि.transliteration: bhoḥ, kim asya ḍiskasya mahsarojāṣṭakāni paryāptāni na santi?
महसरोजाष्टकानि.english: Hey, aren't this disk's terabytes sufficient?

स्तोक.english: I give a token amount of money to Indra.

स्तोक.devanagari: स सः स्तोकं फलं भक्तिमान् अखादत्।
स्तोक.transliteration: sa saḥ stokaṁ phalaṁ bhaktimān akhādat.
स्तोक.english: That devoted man ate a small fruit.

स्तोक.devanagari: किं त्वं मह्यं स्तोकं जलं आनेष्यसि?
स्तोक.transliteration: kiṁ tvaṁ mahyaṁ stokaṁ jalaṁ āneṣyasi?
स्तोक.english: Will you bring me a little water?

स्तोक.transliteration: Bhoḥ! kimarthaṁ stokaṁ eva bhojanaṁ karoṣi?
स्तोक.english: Hey! Why do you eat only a small amount of food?

नतरेखा.english: The underscore of this word is black.

Where did you see the underscore?
For what purpose is the underscore used?

प्रशिक्षण.english: The teacher gives instruction every day.

प्रशिक्षण.devanagari: भो! इदम् प्रशिक्षणम् कृपया मह्यम् दर्शय।
प्रशिक्षण.transliteration: bho! idam praśikṣaṇam kṛpayā mahyam darśaya.
प्रशिक्षण.english: Friend! Please show me this tutorial.

पुनर् उत्-स्था.devanagari: अहम् तं दस्तावेज़ं पुनरुत्थाप्य समर्पितः अस्मि।
पुनर् उत्-स्था.transliteration: aham taṃ dastāvez़aṃ punaroddhāpya samarpitaḥ asmi.

प्रति-आ-नी.english: He brings back the old fruit.
The teacher brought back the student.
Do you bring back the book?
Hey, bring back my cloth to me!

यूनिकोड्.english: I installed Unicode on the computer.

सर्वाक्षरकूट.english: Unicode was created in the past.

दोषावधारण.english: Troubleshooting of the computer is difficult.
The technician did troubleshooting of the problem.

दोषावधारण.devanagari: भवान् यंत्रस्य दोषावधारणम् कर्तुं शक्नोति किम्?
दोषावधारण.transliteration: bhavān yantrasya doṣāvadhāraṇam kartum śaknoti kim?
दोषावधारण.english: Can you do troubleshooting of the machine?

दोषावधारण.devanagari: अयम् दोषः गम्भीरः अस्ति। दोषावधारणम् तूर्णम् आवश्यकम्।
दोषावधारण.transliteration: ayam doṣaḥ gambhīraḥ asti. doṣāvadhāraṇam tūrṇam āvaśyakam.
दोषावधारण.english: This error is serious. Troubleshooting is needed quickly.

समस्यावधारण.english: The teacher helped the student in troubleshooting.

समस्यावधारण.devanagari: भवान् इस्य यन्त्रस्य समस्यावधारणम् कर्तुम् शक्नोति किम्?
समस्यावधारण.transliteration: bhavān isya yantrasya samasyāvadhāraṇam kartum śaknoti kim?

समस्यावधारण.devanagari: अरे, इस्य समस्यावधारणे आवश्यकः धीरता इति जानासि।
समस्यावधारण.transliteration: are, isya samasyāvadhāraṇe āvaśyakaḥ dhīratā iti jānāsi.
समस्यावधारण.english: Hey, you know that patience is necessary in troubleshooting.

सार्वकूट.devanagari: सार्वकूटः सभी भाषाओं को समर्थन करती थी।
सार्वकूट.transliteration: sārvakūṭaḥ sabhī bhāṣāom ko samarthan karatī thī.

सार्वत्रिकाक्षरकूट.english: Unicode is important in the modern system.
Do you know the purpose of Unicode?
I say, in Unicode all languages in the world can be written.

अविस्रोतस्.english: The UPS device protects electrical power safely.

अविस्रोतस्.devanagari: पूर्वदिने अविस्रोतः कार्यं सफलतया सिद्धं कृतवान्।
अविस्रोतस्.transliteration: pūrvadine avisrotaḥ kāryaṁ safalatayā siddhaṁ kṛtavān.
अविस्रोतस्.english: Yesterday, the UPS successfully completed its function.

अविस्रोतस्.devanagari: किमविस्रोतः इदं कार्यालयं सुरक्षितं कर्तुं शक्नोति?
अविस्रोतस्.transliteration: kim avisrotaḥ idaṁ kāryālayaṁ surakṣitaṁ kartuṁ śaknoti?
अविस्रोतस्.english: Can the UPS protect this office?

अविस्रोतस्.devanagari: भो! अविस्रोतः कुत्र स्थितः अस्ति? तव संगणकयन्त्रे किमिदं आवश्यकं वर्तते?
अविस्रोतस्.transliteration: bho! avisrotaḥ kutra sthitah asti? tava saṅgaṇakayantrem kim idam āvaśyakaṁ vartate?
अविस्रोतस्.english: Hey! Where is the UPS located? Do you need this for your computer?
This is a uninterruptible power supply.

अनधिकृताभिगम.english: Unauthorised access to the house is not permitted.

उपमा.devanagari: भवान् उपमां पश्यति? आम्, अहम् उपमां पश्यामि।
उपमा.transliteration: bhavān upamāṁ paśyati? ām, aham upamāṁ paśyāmi.
उपमा.english: Do you see the user interface? Yes, I see the user interface.

निवारक.english: The doctor gave me a vaccine.
Did the girl receive the vaccine?
Hey! Where is the vaccine available?

उपभोक्त्री.devanagari: सा उपभोक्त्री अपने फोन का उपयोग करती है।
उपभोक्त्री.transliteration: sā uphabhoktrī apne phon kā upayog kartī hai.
उपभोक्त्री.english: She is a user of her phone.

उपभोक्त्री.transliteration: vah uphabhoktrī kal is application kā upayog kiyā.
उपभोक्त्री.english: That user used this application yesterday.

उपभोक्त्री.transliteration: kyā āp ek naī sevā kī uphabhoktrī haiṁ?

उपभोक्त्री.transliteration: namasте! kyā tum is website kī uphabhoktrī ho?
उपभोक्त्री.english: Hello! Are you a user of this website?

उपयोक्त्रानुकूल.transliteration: pūrvam yah upakaran upayoktṛānukūl na āsīt.
उपयोक्त्रानुकूल.english: Previously, this tool was not user-friendly.

उपयोक्त्रानुकूल.devanagari: हे मित्र, यह वेबसाइट कति उपयोक्त्रानुकूल आसीत्?
उपयोक्त्रानुकूल.transliteration: he mitra, yah vēbsāit kati upayoktṛānukūl āsīt?
उपयोक्त्रानुकूल.english: Hey friend, how user-friendly was this website?

उपभोक्तृ.english: She was a user of this program.

उपभोक्तृ.transliteration: bhavān upbhoktā bhavet iti āśā karāmi.

उपयोगिता.devanagari: इस यंत्रकी उपयोगिता अत्यंत उत्तम है।
उपयोगिता.transliteration: Is yantraki upayogita atyant uttam hai.
उपयोगिता.english: The usability of this device is very good.

उपयोगिता.transliteration: Kya is application ki upayogita achhi hai?

उपयोगिता.transliteration: Han, is software ki upayogita bahut saral aur prabhavi hai.

उपाभिधान.transliteration: aham apnaṃ upābhidhānam gata dine parivartitam kṛtavān.

उपाभिधान.transliteration: bhavān kṛpayā me upābhidhānam punaḥ kathayiṣyati?

उपयोक्त्राभिधान.devanagari: अरे, मम उपयोक्त्राभिधानम् विस्मृतम्। त्वम् सहायः भवितुम् शक्नोषि किम्?
उपयोक्त्राभिधान.transliteration: are, mama upayoktrābhidhānam vismṛtam. tvam sahāyaḥ bhavitum śaknosi kim?
उपयोक्त्राभिधान.english: Oh, I forgot my user ID. Can you help me?

उपयोक्त्रानुकूला.devanagari: भवान् उपयोक्त्रानुकूलं पद्धतिं पसन्द करोति इति मन्ये।
उपयोक्त्रानुकूला.transliteration: bhavān upayoktrānukūlaṃ paddhatiṃ pasand karoti iti manye.

The user operated the computer yesterday.
Does the user understand this software?
Dear user, please reset the password.

बौद्ध.devanagari: भोः! बौद्धः साखी कीदृशी वर्तते? - अत्र तिष्ठति।
बौद्ध.transliteration: bhoḥ! bauddhaḥ sākhī kīdṛśī vartate? - atra tiṣṭhati.
बौद्ध.english: Hey! How does the virtual witness appear? - She is here.

बौद्धा.devanagari: कल मैंने बौद्धा वास्तविकता का अनुभव किया।
बौद्धा.transliteration: kal main ne bauddha vaastvik ata ka anubhav kiya.

बौद्धा.transliteration: main bauddha khel khalna pasand karta hun.
बौद्धा.english: I like to play virtual games.

अमूर्ता.devanagari: अमूर्ता संसार आजकल बहुत महत्त्वपूर्ण है।
अमूर्ता.transliteration: amūrtā saṁsār ājkal bahut mahattvapūrṇ hai.
अमूर्ता.english: The virtual world is very important nowadays.

अमूर्ता.devanagari: अमूर्ता कक्षा कल बहुत अच्छी थी।
अमूर्ता.transliteration: amūrtā kaksā kal bahut achhī thī.
अमूर्ता.english: The virtual class was very good yesterday.

अमूर्ता.devanagari: क्या तुम अमूर्ता मित्रों के साथ खेलते हो?
अमूर्ता.transliteration: kyā tum amūrtā mitrõ ke sāth khelte ho?
अमूर्ता.english: Do you play with virtual friends?

अमूर्ता.devanagari: हाँ, मुझे अमूर्ता पुस्तकें पढ़ना पसंद है।
अमूर्ता.transliteration: hāñ, mujhe amūrtā pustakẽ paṛhnā pasand hai.
अमूर्ता.english: Yes, I like reading virtual books.

कीटाणु.english: The virus attacked the human yesterday.
Who wants to destroy the virus?
Hey, this virus is very dangerous.

वितन्तुसञ्चार.english: Last year wireless communication developed in India.
Hey, how does communication work through wireless?

तन्तुरहितसञ्चार.english: In the past, wireless communication did not exist.

तन्तुरहितसञ्चार.devanagari: भवान् तन्तुरहितसञ्चारस्य साहाय्येन कथं कार्यं करोति?
तन्तुरहितसञ्चार.transliteration: bhavān tanturahitasañcārasya sāhāyyena kathaṁ kāryaṁ karoti?

विस्तृतप्रदेशजाल.english: The Wide Area Network is functioning everywhere.
The company established a Wide Area Network.
Is the Wide Area Network indeed strong?
Hey, use the Wide Area Network.
This is a wide area network.

अध्यास.english: Virtual illusion is a confusion of the mind.

अध्यास.devanagari: पूर्वे अध्यासः तस्य जीवनम् व्यथितम् अकरोत्।
अध्यास.transliteration: pūrve adhyāsaḥ tasya jīvanam vyathitam akarot.

आभास.devanagari: यह आभासः केवलं मनस्य कल्पना अस्ति।
आभास.transliteration: yah ābhāsaḥ kevalaṃ manasya kalpanā asti.

आभास.devanagari: भवान् आभासं न वास्तविकं समझन्ति खलु।
आभास.transliteration: bhavān ābhāsaṃ na vāstavakaṃ samjhanti khalu.

यौक्तिक.devanagari: यह यौक्तिकः कक्षा अत्यंत उपयोगी अस्ति।
यौक्तिक.transliteration: yah yauktikah kaksha atyantam upayogi asti.
यौक्तिक.english: This virtual classroom is very useful.

यौक्तिक.devanagari: किम् भवान् यौक्तिकः परीक्षा लेब्धवान् स्मः?
यौक्तिक.transliteration: kim bhavan yauktikah pariksha lebdhavan smah?
यौक्तिक.english: Did you take the virtual exam?
Hey, where is the virtual training available?

अमूर्तलोक.english: Last year I experienced virtual reality.

अमूर्तलोक.devanagari: अहं अमूर्तलोके खेलितुम् इच्छामि। त्वम् अपि आगच्छ!
अमूर्तलोक.transliteration: ahaṁ amūrtalokey khilitum ichhāmi. tvam api āgachhch!
अमूर्तलोक.english: I want to play in virtual reality. Come along with me too!

अमूर्त.english: The virtual world is not real.
The virtual world had no boundaries.

अमूर्त.devanagari: किं अमूर्तः पञ्चाशिकः कम्प्यूटरे विद्यमानः अस्ति?
अमूर्त.transliteration: kiṃ amūrtaḥ pañcāśikaḥ kampyūtare vidyamānaḥ asti?
अमूर्त.english: Is the virtual fifty-year-old present in the computer?

अमूर्त.devanagari: भवान् अमूर्तस्य खेलस्य रसं जानाति वा?
अमूर्त.transliteration: bhavān amūrtasya khēlasya rasaṃ jānāti vā?
अमूर्त.english: Do you know the joy of virtual games?

विप्रजा.english: The WAN network is operational everywhere.
Yesterday the WAN system was disrupted.
How will you set up the WAN?
This is a wide area network.

सम्+कुच.english: Do you zip up the bag?

य-अक्ष.transliteration: bhavān yaḥ akṣaḥ kathaṁ budhyate? ahaṁ taṁ na samjhāmi.

ल-अक्ष.transliteration: bho! la-akṣaḥ kaḥ asti? - la-akṣaḥ gahanāyāḥ vimāyāḥ akṣaḥ asti.
ल-अक्ष.english: Hey! What is the axis-Z? - The axis-Z is the axis of depth dimension.

निर्देश.english: The teacher gives an address to the students.
The king gave an address to the people.

The network administrator solved the problem yesterday.

जालप्रबन्धक.devanagari: अहम् जालप्रबन्धकः अस्मि, त्वं कः अस्ि?
जालप्रबन्धक.transliteration: aham jālaprabandhakaḥ asmi, tvaṁ kaḥ asi?

सङ्गणकशास्त्र.english: Computer science is a difficult subject.
He had a certificate in computer science.
How much do you know about computer science?

उपसर्पण.english: Look at the picture. Zoom in.

उपसर्पण.devanagari: अहं उपसर्पणं अकरवम्। तदा स्पष्टं दृष्टवान्।
उपसर्पण.transliteration: aham upasarpanam akarava. tada spastam drstavan.
उपसर्पण.english: I zoomed in. Then I saw it clearly.

उपसर्पण.devanagari: भो! उपसर्पणं कुरु, नाम पठितुम् इच्छामि।
उपसर्पण.transliteration: bho! upasarpanam kuru, nam pathitum icchami.
उपसर्पण.english: Hey! Zoom in, I want to read the name.

जालव्यवस्थापिका.devanagari: सः कार्यालये जालव्यवस्थापकः अस्ति। He is the network administrator in the office.

जालव्यवस्थापिका.english: The network administrator solves all problems.

जालव्यवस्थापिका.transliteration: bhoː jālavyavasthāpak, mam sangaṇakः kāry na karoti.
जालव्यवस्थापिका.english: Hey network administrator, my computer is not working.

वाहिकाविस्तार.devanagari: अस्य नेटवर्कस्य वाहिकाविस्तारः बहु अच्छा अस्ति।
वाहिकाविस्तार.transliteration: asya networkasya vāhikāvistāraḥ bahu achhā asti.

प्रणालीव्यास.transliteration: Kim aapke networkasya pranaaliivyaasah paryaptaa asti?
प्रणालीव्यास.english: Is the bandwidth of your network sufficient?

प्रणालीव्यास.devanagari: भोः, प्रणालीव्यासः किम् इदानीम् सुधारितः अस्ति?
प्रणालीव्यास.transliteration: Bhoh, pranaaliivyaasah kim idanim sudharitah asti?
प्रणालीव्यास.english: Hey, has the bandwidth improved now?

वाहिकाव्यास.transliteration: isa netwark kī vāhikāvyāsaḥ adhikaḥ asti.

वाहिकाव्यास.devanagari: हे मित्र! वाहिकाव्यासः वर्धितः एव भवितव्यम्।
वाहिकाव्यास.transliteration: he mitra! vāhikāvyāsaḥ vardhitaḥ eva bhavitavyam.
वाहिकाव्यास.english: Hey friend! The bandwidth should definitely be increased.

वाहिनीविस्तार.devanagari: किम् इस्य सेवायाः वाहिनीविस्तारः पर्याप्तः अस्ति?
वाहिनीविस्तार.transliteration: kim isya sevāyāḥ vāhinīvistāraḥ paryāptaḥ asti?

वाहिनीविस्तार.devanagari: वाहिनीविस्तारः बढ़ान्तु, तदा संचारणं शीघ्रं भविष्यति।
वाहिनीविस्तार.transliteration: vāhinīvistāraḥ baḍhāntu, tadā saṁchāraṇaṁ śīghraṁ bhavishyati.
वाहिनीविस्तार.english: Let's increase the bandwidth, then transmission will be faster.

जालप्रबन्धिका.devanagari: सः कार्यालये जालप्रबन्धकः अस्ति। He is the network administrator in the office.

जालप्रबन्धिका.english: The network administrator repairs the computers.

जालप्रबन्धिका.devanagari: भोः जालप्रबन्धक! मेरा संगणकयन्त्रं न चलति।
जालप्रबन्धिका.transliteration: bhoḥ jālaprabanddhka! merā saṁgaṇkayantraṁ na calati.

जालव्यवस्थापक.devanagari: सः कार्यालये जालव्यवस्थापकः अस्ति। He is the network administrator in the office.

जालव्यवस्थापक.english: The network administrator solves the problems.

जालव्यवस्थापक.transliteration: bhoḥ jālavyavasthāpakaḥ, sarve kampyūṭerāḥ kāryante kim?

विस्थूल.transliteration: bhavān visthūlaḥ asti, tena sāhasaṃ karaṇīyam.

पृथुवाहिका.english: The broadband service is very fast.

पृथुवाहिका.devanagari: भवतः गृहे पृथुवाहिका संयोजनः कति मासानां कृते अस्ति?

पृथुवाहिका.transliteration: Ahaṁ pṛthuvāhikāṁ prayuktā asmi. Kim bhavān api iyaṁ sevā upayuñjate?

प्रदेश.devanagari: भोः, अयं प्रदेशः सुरक्षितः इति मन्यसे।
प्रदेश.transliteration: bhōḥ, ayaṃ pradeśaḥ surakṣitaḥ iti manyase.

क्षेत्र.transliteration: tasya kṣetram pañcaśatam varṣam pūrvam sthāpitam āsīt.

क्षेत्र.transliteration: bho mitra! bhavataḥ kṣetram kutra asti?

वैद्युतकधनसञ्चार.english: Electronic fund transfer is fast today.

वैद्युतकधनसञ्चार.devanagari: यदा वैद्युतकधनसञ्चारः सम्पन्नः अभवत्, तदा धनं प्राप्तः।
वैद्युतकधनसञ्चार.transliteration: yadā vaidyutakadhanasmñchāraḥ sampannaḥ abhavat, tadā dhanaṃ prāptaḥ.
वैद्युतकधनसञ्चार.english: When the electronic fund transfer was completed, the money was received.

Electronic fund transfer is safe, no worries.

जालवाणिज्य.devanagari: अरे, किं त्वं तस्य जालवाणिज्यस्य नाम जानासि?
जालवाणिज्य.transliteration: are, kiṁ tvam tasya jālavāṇijyasya nāma jānāsi?
जालवाणिज्य.english: Hey, do you know the name of that e-book?

संलापप्रकोष्ठ.english: The chat room is always open.

ई-ग्रन्थ.devanagari: भवान् अस्य ई-ग्रन्थस्य नामं जानाति किम्?
ई-ग्रन्थ.transliteration: bhavān asya ī-granthasya nāmaṁ jānāti kim?
ई-ग्रन्थ.english: Do you know the name of this e-book?

ई-ग्रन्थ.devanagari: भो! यस्य पास ई-ग्रन्थः अस्ति? मे ता पठितुम् इच्छामि।
ई-ग्रन्थ.transliteration: bho! yasya pāsa ī-granthaḥ asti? me tā paṭhitum icchāmi.
ई-ग्रन्थ.english: Hey! Who has the e-book? I want to read it.

संलापशाला.devanagari: अहं संलापशालायां मित्रेभिः सह वार्तालापं करोमि।
संलापशाला.transliteration: ahaṁ saṁlāpaśālāyāṁ mitrebhiḥ saha vārtālāpaṁ karomī.
संलापशाला.english: I chat with friends in the chat room.

संलापशाला.devanagari: कल्य संलापशालायां त्वं किं विषयं अलोचयः?
संलापशाला.transliteration: kalya saṁlāpaśālāyāṁ tvaṁ kiṁ viṣayaṁ alocayaḥ?
संलापशाला.english: What topic did you discuss in the chat room yesterday?

संलापशाला.devanagari: भोः! संलापशालायां आओ, सर्वे अत्र सन्ति।
संलापशाला.transliteration: bhoḥ! saṁlāpaśālāyāṁ āo, sarve atra santi.
संलापशाला.english: Hey! Come to the chat room, everyone is here.

ई-वाणिज्य.devanagari: ई-वाणिज्यम् अधुना बहु लोकानां जीवनं परिवर्तयति।
ई-वाणिज्य.transliteration: ī-vāṇijyam adhunā bahu lokānāṃ jīvanaṃ parivartayati।

ई-वाणिज्य.devanagari: गतवर्षे ई-वाणिज्यम् भारतेषु अत्यधिकं वृद्धिं प्राप्तवान्।
ई-वाणिज्य.transliteration: gatavarṣe ī-vāṇijyam bhāratešu atydhikaṃ vṛddihiṃ prāptavān।

ई-वाणिज्य.transliteration: bhavān ī-vāṇijyasya mādhyamena kimapi kretuṃ ichchhati?
ई-वाणिज्य.english: Do you wish to buy something through e-commerce?

ई-वाणिज्य.devanagari: अहं ई-वाणिज्यम् बहुमनसि अस्ति इति मन्ये।
ई-वाणिज्य.transliteration: ahaṃ ī-vāṇijyam bahumanse asti iti manye।

This is a world wide web.

जालपर्यटन.devanagari: कल मैंने दो घंटे जालपर्यटनं कृतवान्।
जालपर्यटन.transliteration: kala maiṁne do ghṁṭe jālaparyaṭanaṁ kṛtavān.
जालपर्यटन.english: Yesterday I did web surfing for two hours.
How much time do you spend on web surfing?

जालपर्यटन.devanagari: मैं जालपर्यटनं पसंद करामि। भवान् अपि करोति किम्?
जालपर्यटन.transliteration: maiṁ jālaparyaṭanaṁ pasaṁd karāmi. bhavān api karoti kim?
जालपर्यटन.english: I like web surfing. Do you also do it?

जालदेश.english: Last year I created a new website.

जालदेश.devanagari: कim त्वं अस्य जालदेशस्य विषयं जानासि?
जालदेश.transliteration: kim tvam asya jāladēśasya viṣayaṁ jānāsi?
जालदेश.english: Do you know the topic of this website?

दक्षिणतस्.devanagari: दक्षिणतः नदी अस्ति। River is in right.

दक्षिणतस्.english: A tree stands on the right.
The house was on the right.

दूर.devanagari: बिडालः दूरे अस्ति। Cat is far.

पृष्ठतस्.devanagari: पृष्ठतः वृक्षः अस्ति। Tree is behind.

बहिस्.devanagari: वृक्षः गृहात् बहिः अस्ति।  Tree is outside the house.

बहिस्.english: Do you want to come outside?

सन्तोष.devanagari: तस्य सन्तोषः जायते। His happiness rises.
हे मित्र! सन्तोषः परमः धनम् अस्ति।
सन्तोष.transliteration: he mitra! santoṣaḥ paramaḥ dhanam asti.
सन्तोष.english: Oh friend! Happiness is the greatest wealth.

कोण.devanagari: प्रकोष्ठस्य कोणे उत्पीठिका अस्ति।  Table in the corner of the room.

कोण.english: A tree grows in the corner of the house.
The boy was sitting in the corner.
Is that thing placed in the corner?

अवाची.english: We went to the southern country.
Do you see the southern mountain?

अवाची.devanagari: अवाची दिशायां सूर्यः अस्ति इति कथ्यते।
अवाची.transliteration: avāchī diśāyāṁ sūryaḥ asti iti kathyate.
अवाची.english: They say the sun is in the southern direction.

पूर्वा.devanagari: पूर्वस्यां दिशि भवनम् अस्ति। Building is in east direction.

पूर्वा.english: The east direction is the place of sunrise.
I went towards the east direction.
Do you know the east direction?

उदीची.english: The northern direction is very cold.
We went to the northern country.
Do you live in the northern direction?

उदीची.devanagari: हे मित्र! उदीची दिशा किमत्र दृश्यते?
उदीची.transliteration: he mitra! udīchī diśā kimatr dṛśyate?
उदीची.english: Hey friend! Which way does the northern direction appear?

पश्चिमा.devanagari: पश्चिमा दिशा सूर्यास्त का स्थान है।
पश्चिमा.transliteration: paśchimā diśā sūryāst kā sthān hai.
पश्चिमा.english: The west direction is where the sun sets.

पश्चिमा.devanagari: हम कल पश्चिमा की ओर यात्रा किए।
पश्चिमा.transliteration: ham kal paśchimā kī or yātrā kie.
पश्चिमा.english: We traveled toward the west yesterday.

पश्चिमा.devanagari: क्या पश्चिमा देश में बहुत ठंड है?
पश्चिमा.transliteration: kyā paśchimā deś mẽ bahut ṭhaṇḍ hai?
पश्चिमा.english: Is it very cold in the western country?

पश्चिमा.devanagari: नमस्ते! क्या आप पश्चिमा से आए हो?
पश्चिमा.transliteration: namste! kyā āp paśchimā se āe ho?
पश्चिमा.english: Hello! Did you come from the west?

दक्षिणा.english: The south direction is very hot.

दक्षिणा.devanagari: हम कल दक्षिणा को गए थे।
दक्षिणा.transliteration: ham kal dakṣiṇā ko gae the.
दक्षिणा.english: We went to the south yesterday.

दक्षिणा.devanagari: क्या तुम दक्षिणा में रहते हो?
दक्षिणा.transliteration: kyā tum dakṣiṇā mẽ rahte ho?
दक्षिणा.english: Do you live in the south?

दक्षिणा.devanagari: दक्षिणा बहुत सुंदर है, क्या तुमने देखा?
दक्षिणा.transliteration: dakṣiṇā bahut sundar hai, kyā tumne dekhā?
दक्षिणा.english: The south is very beautiful, have you seen it?

प्रतीची.english: The sun goes toward the western direction.
We will go to the west.
Do you know the western direction?

अन्तर्.devanagari: पुस्तकं पेटिकायाः अन्तः अस्ति। Book is inside the box.

अन्तर्.english: The boy plays inside the forest.
Where were you inside the house?
The water inside the river is cool.
Did you go inside the temple?

केन्द्र.devanagari: क्रीडाङ्गनस्य केन्द्रे ध्वजस्तम्भः अस्ति। Flag pole is in the centre of the ground.

केन्द्र.english: A large temple stands in the centre of the city.

केन्द्र.devanagari: शिक्षकः केन्द्रे आसन् अन्ये छात्राः तस्य समीपे बसन्ति।
केन्द्र.transliteration: śikṣakaḥ kendre āsan anye chātrāḥ tasya samīpe basanti.
केन्द्र.english: The teacher was in the centre and the other students sat near him.
Did you see what is in the centre?

केन्द्र.devanagari: केन्द्रम् अत्र आस्ति न वा? हाँ, अत्र केन्द्रम् आस्ति।
केन्द्र.transliteration: kendram atra āsti na vā? hāñ, atra kendram āsti.
केन्द्र.english: Is the centre here or not? Yes, the centre is here.

प्राची.english: The east direction is the place of sunrise.
I went towards the east direction.
Did you build a house in the east direction?

प्राची.devanagari: प्राची दिशा कतिदूरे अस्ति? अत्र निकटे एव।
प्राची.transliteration: prāchī diśā katidūre asti? atra nikāte eva.
प्राची.english: How far is the east direction? It is very near here.

उत्तरा.english: The northern direction is very cold.
The Himalaya was situated in the north of India.
Will you go to the northern direction?
Hey, who lives in the north?

आशा.devanagari: तस्य आशा भवति। He has hope.

आनन्द.devanagari: बालकाः आनन्देन क्रीडन्ति। Children play joyfully.

कमल.english: There is a beautiful lotus in the lake.
The lotus rose from the water.
Look! How lovely the lotus is!

दुःख.devanagari: सः दुःखेन रोदीति। He cries with sad.

दुःख.english: The girl came home with sadness.
Friend! Why are you sad? Tell me.

सरसिरुह.devanagari: सरसिरुहं सरसि भवति। Lotus is in the pond.

भय.devanagari: बालकः भयेन धावति। Boy runs with fear.
भयम् मा कुरु, सखे! सर्वम् सुखम् भविष्यति।
भय.transliteration: bhayam mā kuru, sakhe! sarvam sukham bhaviṣyati.
भय.english: Don't be afraid, friend! Everything will be well.

स्थलपद्म.english: The rose is red in color.
Yesterday the rose was in bloom.
Is the fragrance of the rose sweet?

भयभीति.devanagari: बालकस्य भयभीतिः भवति। The child is scared.

भयभीति.english: The woman is scared in the darkness.
The elephant was scared after seeing the lion.

भयभीति.devanagari: मा चिन्ता कुरु! मेरो भयभीतिः नास्ति।
भयभीति.transliteration: mā chintā kuru! mero bhayabhītis nāsti.
भयभीति.english: Don't worry! I am not scared.

गन्धपुष्प.english: The fragrant flower spreads a sweet scent.
The marigold is beautiful in the garden.
Rama saw the marigold in bloom.

शान्ति.devanagari: ध्यानेन तस्य शान्तिः भवति। He becomes calm by meditation.

शान्ति.english: Calmness of the mind is the greatest happiness.
Living in the forest, he had calmness.

शान्ति.devanagari: शान्तिः मे आवश्यकी अस्ति। हाँ, सर्वेषाम् शान्तिः आवश्यका अस्ति।
शान्ति.transliteration: śāntiḥ me āvaśyakī asti. hā̃, sarveṣām śāntiḥ āvaśyakā asti.
शान्ति.english: I need calmness. Yes, calmness is necessary for everyone.

सूर्यकान्ति.english: In which forest do sunflowers grow?

सूर्यकान्ति.devanagari: भो! इदं सूर्यकान्तिः कीदृशी रमणीया अस्ति।
सूर्यकान्ति.transliteration: bho! idaṁ sūryakāntiḥ kīdṛśī ramaṇīyā asti.
सूर्यकान्ति.english: Oh! This sunflower is so beautiful.

भीति.devanagari: बालकः भीत्या धावति। Boy runs with fear.

भीति.english: Does fear exist in your heart?

भीति.devanagari: मा भीतिं कुरु! सर्वम् ठीकम् भविष्यति।
भीति.transliteration: mā bhītiṁ kuru! sarvam ṭhīkam bhaviṣyati.
भीति.english: Do not fear! Everything will be fine.
Fear is natural to all living beings.

कोप.devanagari: सः कोपेन वदति। He tells in angry

कोप.english: I do not understand your anger.
Why are you acting in anger?

विस्मय.devanagari: हिमालयदर्शनेन विस्मयः जायते। It is surprising to see Himalayas.

विस्मय.english: The girl felt surprise upon seeing the dance.

विस्मय.devanagari: किम् इदं अद्भुतम् वार्त्ता विस्मयः न जनयति?
विस्मय.transliteration: kim idaṁ adbhutam vārtā vismayaḥ na janayati?
विस्मय.english: Does this wonderful news not cause surprise?

विस्मय.devanagari: भो! तव आगमने मम विस्मयः असीम।
विस्मय.transliteration: bho! tava āgamne mama vismayaḥ asīm.
विस्मय.english: Oh! Your arrival fills me with great surprise.

हर्ष.devanagari: परीक्षा परिणामेन बालकस्य हर्षः भवति। Boy's happiness is due to the exam result.
विजयस्य समये राजस्य हर्षः अति महान् आसीत्।
हर्ष.transliteration: vijayasya samaye rajasya harshah ati mahan asit.
हर्ष.english: At the time of victory, the king's joy was very great.

हर्ष.devanagari: बालिका नवीन वस्त्रं प्राप्य हर्षः अनुभवति।
हर्ष.transliteration: balika navin vastram prapya harshah anubhavati.
हर्ष.english: The girl experiences joy upon receiving new clothes.

हर्ष.devanagari: किम् त्वं मित्रस्य आगमनात् हर्षः अनुभवसि?
हर्ष.transliteration: kim tvam mitrasya agmanat harshah anubhavasi?
हर्ष.english: Do you feel joy at your friend's arrival?

हर्ष.devanagari: अहम् च तव हर्षः दृष्ट्वा आनन्दितः भवामि।
हर्ष.transliteration: aham cha tava harshah drushtva aanandtah bhvami.
हर्ष.english: I too become delighted seeing your happiness.

फवलय.english: Where can one see the blue lotus?
The blue lotus is beautiful in the pond.
I saw the blue lotus yesterday.
Do you know about the blue lotus?
Hey! Look at this blue lotus.

मन्दार.english: The hibiscus is red in color.
I enjoy the fragrance of the hibiscus.

नीलोत्पल.english: The blue lotus blooms in the lake.

नीलोत्पल.devanagari: किम् नीलोत्पलं तव प्रियं वस्तु अस्ति?
नीलोत्पल.transliteration: kim nīlotpalaṃ tava priyaṃ vastu asti?
नीलोत्पल.english: Is the blue lotus your favorite thing?
Hey friend! Look at the blue lotus.

चम्पक.english: The Champak tree bears fragrant flowers.
The Champak tree grows in the forest.
Is the Champak tree yellow in color?
Hey! Smell the fragrance of the Champak tree.

स्वर्णचम्पक.english: The Golden Champak is extremely beautiful.
The Golden Champak grows in the forest.
Is the Golden Champak in your garden?

स्वर्णचम्पक.devanagari: अहं स्वर्णचम्पकस्य पुष्पं अदृक्षम्। भवान् किम् अदृक्षत्?
स्वर्णचम्पक.transliteration: Ahaṃ svarṇacampakasya puṣpaṃ adṛkṣam. Bhavān kim adṛkṣat?
स्वर्णचम्पक.english: I saw the flower of the Golden Champak. Did you see it?

पारिजात.english: The flowers of the Parijat tree are beautiful.
The Parijat tree grows in the forest.
Yesterday night, the Parijat tree bloomed.
Whose Parijat tree has such a fragrance?
Hey, when does the Parijat tree flower?

जपापुष्प.english: The Hibiscus flower is red in color.
The hibiscus flower bloomed in the garden.
Does the hibiscus flower have a pleasant fragrance?

जपापुष्प.devanagari: अहं जपापुष्पं तव मातुः कृते आनयामि।
जपापुष्प.transliteration: ahaṁ japāpuṣpaṁ tava mātuḥ kṛte ānayāmi.
जपापुष्प.english: I am bringing a hibiscus flower for your mother.
The young girl collects hibiscus flowers.

अशोकपुष्प.english: The Ashoka flower adorns the forest.
The Ashoka flower is red in color.
Sita made a garland of Ashoka flowers.
Does the Ashoka flower carry a sweet fragrance?

अशोकपुष्प.devanagari: भद्रे! अशोकपुष्पं कुत्र प्राप्यते? — वनेषु प्राप्यते।
अशोकपुष्प.transliteration: bhadre! aśokapuṣpaṁ kutra prāpyate? — vaneṣu prāpyate.
अशोकपुष्प.english: Dear friend! Where is the Ashoka flower found? — It is found in the forests.

बकुल.english: The Spanish cherry flower emits fragrance.
The Spanish cherry tree bears fruits.
When will the Spanish cherry flowers bloom?
Yesterday I rested in the shade of the Spanish cherry tree.
Have you seen the Spanish cherry tree?

अपराजिता.english: The Aparajita creeper grows in the garden.
Whose mother brought the Aparajita flower?
We were pleased with the Aparajita flowers.
When did you see the Aparajita flower?

किंशुक.english: The Palash flower blooms on the tree.
The flower of the Palash tree is red in color.
When will I see the Palash tree in the forest?
Last year the Palash tree was beautiful.

किंशुक.devanagari: भो! किंशुकस्य पुष्पं पश्य, कति सुंदरं!
किंशुक.transliteration: bho! kiṃśukasya puṣpaṃ paśya, kati sundaraṃ!
किंशुक.english: Hey! Look at the Palash flower, how beautiful it is!

रजनीगन्धा.english: The tuberose spreads its fragrance at night.
The tuberose is a beautiful flower.
We saw tuberoses in the forest yesterday.
Do you use tuberose in worship?
Oh! The fragrance of the tuberose is truly delightful.

कर्णोर.english: The yellow oleander adorns the garden with its yellow flowers.
The yellow oleander tree gives off a sweet fragrance.
Whose yellow oleander flowers were beautiful?
We planted the yellow oleander in the garden yesterday.

कर्णोर.devanagari: भो! कर्णोरः कः वृक्षः इत्य् अवगच्छसि।
कर्णोर.transliteration: bho! karṇoraḥ kaḥ vṛkṣaḥ ity avagachchhasi।
कर्णोर.english: Hey! Do you understand what kind of tree the yellow oleander is?

जपाकुसुम.english: The hibiscus is offered in the temple.
Rama sees the hibiscus in the garden.
When will I pluck the hibiscus?

स्थलकमल.english: The Cotton Rose is seen in the forest.
The flower of the Cotton Rose is red in color.
Yesterday I saw the Cotton Rose in the garden.
Does the Cotton Rose bloom with a pleasant fragrance?

स्थलकमल.devanagari: भो, स्थलकमलं पश्य! कति रम्यं पुष्पम् इदम्।
स्थलकमल.transliteration: bho, sthalakamalaṁ paśya! kati ramyaṁ puṣpam idam.
स्थलकमल.english: Hey, look at the Cotton Rose! What a beautiful flower this is.

जातीपुष्प.english: The jasmine flower bloomed in the forest.
Do you see the jasmine flower?
The beautiful jasmine flower grows in the house.

पुष्प.english: The poet wrote about the flower.
I offer the flower to the goddess.

पुष्पगुच्छ.english: Mother brought the bouquet to the house.

यूथिका.english: The Juhi bloomed in the forest.
This flower of the Juhi is lovely.
Do you know the Juhi, sir?

कर्णिकार.english: Indian laburnum is yellow in colour.
The Indian laburnum grows in the forest.
The flowers of the Indian laburnum were fragrant.
Is the Indian laburnum a tree?
Friend! Can you see the fruit of the Indian laburnum?

रक्तकरवीर.english: The Rosebay carries a sweet fragrance.
When shall I see the Rosebay?
Hey! Is not the Rosebay beautiful?

मालती.english: The Jasmine flowers bloom at night.
The jasmine tree was growing in the forest.
Hey! In how many days will the jasmine bloom?

धत्तूर.english: The Datura grows in the garden.

धत्तूर.devanagari: धत्तूरं सेवनं मनुष्यः कर्तुं न शक्नोति।
धत्तूर.transliteration: dhattūraṃ sevanam manuṣyaḥ kartuṃ na śaknoti.
धत्तूर.english: A human cannot consume the Datura.

धत्तूर.devanagari: भोः! धत्तूरः एकः दुर्गन्धी पादपः अस्ति।
धत्तूर.transliteration: bhoḥ! dhattūraḥ ekaḥ durgbandhī pādapaḥ asti.
धत्तूर.english: Hey! The Datura is a foul-smelling plant.

मल्लिका.english: The Arabian jasmine is blooming everywhere in the village.
The Arabian jasmine carries a fragrant flower.
When did the Arabian jasmine bloom?
I planted the Arabian jasmine in the garden.

मल्लिका.devanagari: भो! मल्लिकां पश्य, कति रमणीया इयम्!
मल्लिका.transliteration: bhō! mallika-kaṁ paśya, kati ramaṇīyā iyam!
मल्लिका.english: Oh! Look at the Arabian jasmine, how beautiful it is!

शेफालिका.english: Har singar flowers fall in the morning.
The har singar flower is fragrant.
When did we see the har singar flower?
The girl collected har singar flowers in the garden.
Can you plant the har singar flower?

स्तबक.english: The student gives a bouquet to the Guru.
A beautiful bouquet blooms in the garden.
The son brought a bouquet on mother's birthday.

स्तबक.devanagari: भोः! अयं स्तबकः तव इष्टः किम्?
स्तबक.transliteration: bhoḥ! ayaṃ stabkaḥ tava iṣṭaḥ kim?
स्तबक.english: Hey! Do you like this bouquet?

सेवन्तिका.english: Hey! How many days has the Dahlia been here?

कुमुद.english: The water lily looks beautiful in the pond.
The water lily bloomed in the morning.
Does the water lily exist in blue water?

कुमुद.devanagari: अहं कुमुदम् पश्यामि। त्वं कुमुदम् दृष्टवान् असि?
कुमुद.transliteration: ahaṁ kumudaṁ paśyāmi. tvaṁ kumudaṁ dṛṣṭavān asi?
कुमुद.english: I see the water lily. Have you seen the water lily?

प्रसून.english: A beautiful flower blooms in the garden.
The girl placed the flower in a vase.
Who gives the flower its fragrance?

प्रसून.devanagari: भो! इदं प्रसूनं पश्य, कति रमणीयम्।
प्रसून.transliteration: bho! idaṁ prasūnaṁ paśya, kati ramaṇīyam.
प्रसून.english: Hey! Look at this flower, how lovely it is.

कदम्ब.english: The kadamba tree bears flowers during the rainy season.
The fragrance of the kadamba tree is delightful.
Krishna used to play the flute under the kadamba tree.
How many years old is this kadamba tree?

कदम्ब.devanagari: भोह! कदम्बस्य पुष्पानि पश्य। अतिसुन्दराणि सन्ति।
कदम्ब.transliteration: bhoh! kadambasya pushpani pashy. atisudarani santi.
कदम्ब.english: Hey! Look at the kadamba flowers. They are very beautiful.

बन्दुक.english: The pentapetes is red in colour.
The pentapetes grows in the forest.
Which forest did the pentapetes belong to?

फोफनद.english: Red lotuses are in the pond.
The red lotus is dear to the women.
Do you see the red lotus?

नवमालिका.english: Double jasmine grows in the garden.
When did the double jasmine bloom?
I saw the double jasmine yesterday.
Do you see the double jasmine?

कुमुदनी.english: The water lily blooms in water.
The water lily opens at night.
In what place was the water lily situated?
This water lily appears very beautiful.
The water lily closed in the morning.

पुण्डरीक.english: Pundarika is a lotus (that is) white in colour.
He offered the lotus in worship.
Hey friend! Look at this lotus.

कणिकार.english: The flowers of the Karnikara are red in color.
I saw the Karnikara in the forest.

कणिकार.devanagari: भो! कणिकारः कीदृशः अस्ति? — स बहु सुन्दरः अस्ति।
कणिकार.transliteration: bho! kaṇikāraḥ kīdṛśaḥ asti? — sa bahu sundaraḥ asti.
कणिकार.english: Hey! What is the Karnikara like? — It is very beautiful.

मुकुल.english: Buds are visible on the tree.
When will the bud become a flower?

मुकुल.devanagari: अरे, एतत् मुकुलं पश्य! इति सुन्दरम्।
मुकुल.transliteration: are, etat mukulaṁ paśya! iti sundaram.
मुकुल.english: Hey, look at this bud! It is beautiful.

शलाटु.english: The Bel tree is very fragrant.
The Bel tree was growing in the garden.
Hey, look at the Bel flower! How beautiful it is!

कह्वार.devanagari: सः कह्वारं तरसे पत्रे पाठयति स्म।
कह्वार.transliteration: saḥ kahvāraṁ tarase patre pāṭhayati sma.
कह्वार.english: He painted the white lotus on the canvas.

कह्वार.devanagari: किं त्वं कह्वारं वने दृष्टवान् असि?
कह्वार.transliteration: kiṁ tvam̐ kahvāraṁ vane dṛṣṭavān asi?
कह्वार.english: Did you see the white lotus in the forest?

कह्वार.devanagari: अयं कह्वारः कुत्र वर्धते? सरसि वर्धते।
कह्वार.transliteration: ayaṁ kahvāraḥ kutra vardhate? sarasi vardhate.
कह्वार.english: Where does this white lotus grow? It grows in the lake.

दल.english: The petal of the flower is red in color.
The petals were blown away by the wind.
How many petals are there in this flower?
Hey, look at the petal! How beautiful it is.

इन्दीवर.english: The blue lotus adorns the water body.
The blue lotus is blue in color.
Whose blue lotus had a pleasant fragrance?
I saw the blue lotus in the pond.

इन्दीवर.devanagari: भोः, किं त्वं इन्दीवरं जलात् निर्गच्छन्ति इति वेत्सि?
इन्दीवर.transliteration: bhoh, kiṁ tvāṁ indīvaraṁ jalāt nirgacchanti iti vetsi?
इन्दीवर.english: Hey, do you know that blue lotuses emerge from the water?

कुन्द.english: The jasmine flower is white in color.
The fragrance of jasmine is very pleasant.
We saw the jasmine flower blooming in the forest.

कुन्द.devanagari: किं त्वं कुन्दस्य पुष्पं गृहे आनयितुम् इच्छसि?
कुन्द.transliteration: kim tvam kundasya pushpam grihe aanayitum ichchhasi?
कुन्द.english: Do you wish to bring the jasmine flower home?

कुन्द.devanagari: हे मित्र! कुन्दः एतत्र कदा फलति?
कुन्द.transliteration: he mitra! kundiḥ etatra kada phalati?
कुन्द.english: Dear friend! When does the jasmine bloom here?

वकुल.english: The Bakul tree grows in the garden.
When does the Bakul flower bloom?

वकुल.devanagari: यदा वकुलः पुष्पितः आसीत् तदा सुगन्धः समन्तात् आसीत्।
वकुल.transliteration: yadā vakulaḥ puṣpitaḥ āsīt tadā sugandhḥ samantāt āsīt.
वकुल.english: When the Bakul was in flower, fragrance spread all around.

वकुल.devanagari: भोः! अयं वकुलः कति वर्षपुरातनः अस्ति?
वकुल.transliteration: bhoḥ! ayaṃ vakulaḥ kati varshapu­rātanaḥ asti?
वकुल.english: Hey! How old is this Bakul tree?

नलिनी.devanagari: नलिन्यां पुष्पाणि विकसितानि। Flowers are bright in the pond.

नलिनी.english: Swans bathe in the lotus pond.
Who went to the lotus pond?

नलिनी.devanagari: अहं नलिन्यां पुष्पाणि पश्यितवान्। त्वं किम् अपश्यः?
नलिनी.transliteration: ahaṃ nalinyāṃ puṣpāṇi paśyitavān. tvaṃ kim apaśyaḥ?
नलिनी.english: I saw flowers in the lotus pond. What did you see?

अङ्कुर.english: The sprout was in the rain.

दोसा.english: Hey! The dosa has arrived here.

पुष्पकु्ण्ड.english: There are flowers in the flower pot.
The flower pot fell on the ground.
Who will fill the flower pot with water?
Please look at the flower pot.

जाती.english: The jasmine blooms in the forest.
The jasmine was planted in the house.

जाती.devanagari: भो! किं जाती तव उद्याने वर्तते?
जाती.transliteration: bho! kiṃ jātī tava udyāne vartate?
जाती.english: Hey! Does jasmine grow in your garden?

बीज.english: The farmer sows the seed in the field.
The seed sprouted during the rainy season.
Where do you bring the seed from?
This seed is good. I will plant it.

वटिका.devanagari: बालकाय वाटिका रोचते । Boy likes vada.

वटिका.english: Do you want to eat vada?

शाल्यपूप.devanagari: सा शाल्यपूपं पचति। She cooks idli.
कस्य शाल्यपूपः इच्छा अस्ति? - मम शाल्यपूपः इच्छा अस्ति।
शाल्यपूप.transliteration: kasya śālyapūpaḥ ichhā asti? - mama śālyapūpaḥ ichhā asti.
शाल्यपूप.english: Who wants idli? - I want idli.

पक्ववाटक.english: Do you want to eat vada?

सम्पाव.english: The samosa is fried in oil.
When did I eat the samosa?

समोष.devanagari: स: समोषम् एव पश्यति। He is looking at the samaosa only.
अयम् समोषः तव अस्ति, भोजनं कुरु।
समोष.transliteration: ayam samosah tava asti, bhojanam kuru.
समोष.english: This samosa is yours, eat it.

समाशः.devanagari: पुरुष: समाशान् क्रीणाति। The man is buying samosas.

वटक.english: Normally Vada is made with urad dhal.

वटक.devanagari: मातुलः वटकानां शिल्पी अस्ति। स: उत्तमान् वटकान् निर्मयति।
वटक.transliteration: mātulaH vaTakānāṃ śilpī asti. saH uttamān vaTakān nirmayati.
वटक.english: My uncle is a vada maker. He makes excellent vadas.

रोटिका.devanagari: अयम् रोटिका स्वादु अस्ति। भोजनं कुरु।
रोटिका.transliteration: ayam rotikā svādu asti. bhojanaṁ kuru.
रोटिका.english: This roti is delicious. Eat your meal.

कुण्डलिनी.english: Mother brought Jalebi from the market.
The boy eats Jalebi every day.

कुण्डलिनी.devanagari: अरे, एषा कुण्डलिनी कति मधुरा! खादस्व।
कुण्डलिनी.transliteration: are, eṣā kuṇḍalinī kati madhurā! khādasv.
कुण्डलिनी.english: Hey, this Jalebi is so sweet! Have some.

अमृतशष्कुली.devanagari: अमृतशष्कुल्य: पेटिकायाम् अस्ति । Jilebies are there in the box.

अमृतशष्कुली.english: Mother cooks jilebies in the kitchen.
When did the boy eat the jilebies?
We kept the jilebies in the pot.

अमृतशष्कुली.devanagari: के! इयम् अमृतशष्कुली कति मधुरा अस्ति!
अमृतशष्कुली.transliteration: kē! iyam amṛtaśaṣkulī kati madhurā asti!
अमृतशष्कुली.english: Oh! How sweet this jilebi is!

पृथुक.english: Beaten rice is desirable to Krishna.
Sister! Please give me beaten rice.

सूप.english: When do I cook the dal?

पानकगोलक.devanagari: बालेभ्यः पानगोलकं रोचते। Kids like Gula jamun.

पानकगोलक.english: Hey, please give me some gulab jamun.

यूष.english: Soup is good for the sick.
Soup is necessary for eating, isn't it?

अन्न.devanagari: अहम् अन्नं खादामि। I eat rice.

अन्न.english: The boy ate rice and became happy.

अन्न.devanagari: अन्नं मम प्रियम् अस्ति। त्वम् किम् इच्छसि?
अन्न.transliteration: annaṃ mama priyam asti. tvam kim ichhasi?
अन्न.english: Rice is dear to me. What do you want?

ओदन.english: Rice is desirable to south indians.
Do you want to eat rice?

रसगोलक.english: Rasagulla is served with sugar water.

लड्डुक.english: Laddu is desirable to the boy.
The teacher gave laddu to the students.
Do you wish to eat laddu?

कूलपी.devanagari: बालक: कूलपीं खादति। Boy is eating Kulfi.
अयं कूलपी रसाला अस्ति! भवती किम् इच्छति?
कूलपी.transliteration: Ayaṁ kūlapī rasālā asti! Bhavtī kim ichhati?
कूलपी.english: This kulfi is delicious! What would you like?

सिद्धान्न.english: Let there be cooked (ready) rice for Naivedyam.
Please give me the cooked rice.

क्वथित.devanagari: अहं क्वथितेन अन्नं खादामि। I eat rice with sambar.
क्वथितः अत्र सुस्वादु अस्ति न वा?
क्वथित.transliteration: kvathitaḥ atra susvādu asti na vā?

उपसेचन.english: Mother cooks the chutney with oil.
I made the chutney with coconut.

दुग्धपूपिका.devanagari: सा दुग्धपूपिकां खादति। She is eating gulabjamoon.

दुग्धपूपिका.english: Hey, where is that gulab jamun?

कुण्डली.devanagari: स: एकां कुण्डलीं खादति।  He is eating one jilebi.

कुण्डली.english: We go to the market to buy jilebis.
How many jilebis did you eat?
This jilebi is sweet, isn't it?

संयाव.english: Let there be ghee in Semiya
Mother used to cook the pound cake.

मोदक.english: There is a modaka in mother's hand.

पायस.english: People drink Payasam on festival days.

पायस.devanagari: अहं पायसं खादितुम् इच्छामि । त्वं किम् ।
पायस.transliteration: ahaṁ pāyasaṁ khāditum ichhāmi । tvāṁ kim ।
पायस.english: I want to eat payasam. What about you?

मधुरगुलिका.english: The little girl eats a candy.
There is a candy here, take it.

घृत.english: Mother poured ghee in the kitchen.

दधिवाटक.english: Curd Vada is served with Curd.
This Curd Vada was very tasty.

सुपिष्टक.english: The daughter eats cookie everyday evening.

सुपिष्टक.devanagari: बालकः कल सुपिष्टकम् खादित्वा प्रसन्नः अभवत्।
सुपिष्टक.transliteration: bālakḥ kal supiṣṭakam khāditvā prasannḥ abhavat।
सुपिष्टक.english: The boy ate a cookie yesterday and was happy.
Do you want to eat a cookie?

मधुरपिष्टक.english: Icecream cake is also available now.

मधुरपिष्टक.devanagari: इदम् मधुरपिष्टकम् अति रुचिकरम् अस्ति! किम् पुनः खादावः?
मधुरपिष्टक.transliteration: idam madhurapiṣṭakam ati ruchikaram asti! kim punaḥ khādāvaḥ?
मधुरपिष्टक.english: This cake is very delicious! Shall we eat more?

अपूप.devanagari: बालिका जन्मदिने मित्रैः सह अपूपं खादति ।
अपूप.english: The girl eats cake with friends on Birthday.
Mother cooks a sweet cake in the kitchen.

अपूप.devanagari: पिछले सप्ताहे हमने विशाल अपूप बनाया ।
अपूप.transliteration: pichhlē saptāhē hamné vishāl apūp banāyā ।
अपूप.english: Last week we made a large cake.

अपूप.devanagari: क्या तुम्हें यह अपूप स्वादिष्ट लगता है ?
अपूप.transliteration: kyā tumhēṁ yah apūp svādiṣṭ lagtā hai ?
अपूप.english: Do you find this cake delicious?

अपूप.devanagari: अरे, यह अपूप कहाँ से आया ? इसे कौन लाया ?
अपूप.transliteration: arē, yah apūp kahāṁ sē āyā ? isē kaun lāyā ?
अपूप.english: Hey, where did this cake come from? Who brought it?

पिष्टक.devanagari: राम: पिष्टकं खादति। Rama is eating biscuit.

पिष्टक.english: Do you want to eat a biscuit?

निष्पाव-रोटिका.english: Multigrain bread is good for health.
Mother cooks multigrain bread in the kitchen.

निष्पाव-रोटिका.devanagari: किम् भवान् निष्पावरोटिकां भोजने पसन्दः करोति?
निष्पाव-रोटिका.transliteration: kim bhavān niṣpāvaroṭikāṁ bhojaně pasandh karoti?
निष्पाव-रोटिका.english: Do you like multigrain bread for meals?
Hey! Multigrain bread is very delicious.

आज्य.devanagari: ओदनस्य उपरि किञ्चित् आज्यं स्थापयतु। Put a little ghee on top of rice.

आज्य.english: The mother keeps ghee in the kitchen.
Father brought ghee from the market yesterday.
How much ghee is needed in the food?

आज्य.devanagari: भोः! किञ्चित् आज्यं मह्यं दातुं शक्नोषि वा?
आज्य.transliteration: bhōḥ! kiñchit ājyaṁ mahyaṁ dātuṁ śaknōṣi vā?
आज्य.english: Hey! Can you give me some ghee?

दधिवटिका.devanagari: दधिवटिका मृदुः। Curd vada is soft.
अत्र दधिवटिकाः सुस्वादुः सन्ति। त्वं एकां प्रयतस्व।
दधिवटिका.transliteration: atra dadhivāṭikāḥ susvādhuḥ santi. tvaṁ ekāṁ prayatasva.
दधिवटिका.english: The curd vadas here are delicious. Try one.

दधि.english: My meal is incomplete without curd.

उपदंश.devanagari: भोजने उपदंशः अस्ति। Pickle is there in the food.

दधिवटक.devanagari: सा पुत्राय दधिवटकं ददाति। She is giving dahi vada to the son.

दधिवटक.english: Hey, where is the dahi vada?

सन्धित.devanagari: आम्रसन्धितं कूप्याम् अस्ति । Mango pickle is in the bottle.

सन्धित.english: Look at the pickle, how tasty it is!

शाक.english: The mother prepared the vegetable dish and gave it to the family.
Do you want to eat the vegetable dish?
Please give me a bowl of the vegetable dish.

पर्पट.english: The mother fries the papad in oil.

पर्पट.devanagari: हे! इदं पर्पटं कीदृशं मधुरं अस्ति!
पर्पट.transliteration: he! idaṁ parpataṁ kīdṛśaṁ madhuraṁ asti!
पर्पट.english: Hey! How delicious this papad is!

राज्यक्त.devanagari: राज्यक्ते लवणं न्यूनम् अस्ति। In Raita salt is less.

राज्यक्त.english: The raita is mixed in the yogurt.
Was there raita in your meal?

राज्यक्त.devanagari: राज्यक्तं बहु स्वादु अस्ति, न किम्?
राज्यक्त.transliteration: rājyaktaṁ bahu svādu asti, na kim?
राज्यक्त.english: The raita is very tasty, isn't it?

पिष्टजा.devanagari: युवका: पिष्टजम् एव खादन्ति। Youngmen are eating only pizza.
अहं पिष्टजां प्रियां मन्ये। भवान् अपि?
पिष्टजा.transliteration: ahaṃ piṣṭajāṃ priyāṃ manye। bhavān api?
पिष्टजा.english: I think pizza is delicious. And you?

अवलेह.english: Pickle with curd rice is tasty.
Mother prepared pickle with a knife.
Do you want to eat pickle?
Pickle becomes tasty when it is sweet and sour.

राज्यक्ता.devanagari: राज्यक्ते लवणं न्यूनम् अस्ति। In Raita salt is less.
राज्यक्ता दही च आलुकरन्ध्या निर्मिता अस्ति।
राज्यक्ता.transliteration: rājyaktā dahī ca ālukrandhyā nirmitā asti.
राज्यक्ता.english: Raita is made with yogurt and potato.
Do you want to eat raita?

राज्यक्ता.devanagari: राज्यक्ता अत्यन्त शीतला च स्वादु अस्ति।
राज्यक्ता.transliteration: rājyaktā atyantu śītlā ca svādu asti.
राज्यक्ता.english: Raita is very cool and tasty.

पित्जा.english: Pizza was first made in Italy.
Pizza is very delicious to me.
Yesterday I ate pizza with friends.
I will bring pizza with sauce today.

मोमोखाद्य.english: Momo is a favorite food in Nepal.

मोमोखाद्य.devanagari: भवती, किं मोमोखाद्यं स्वादु अस्ति ? हाँ, अत्यन्तं स्वादु ।
मोमोखाद्य.transliteration: bhvatī, kiṁ momokhādhyaṁ svādu asti ? hāñ, atyantaṁ svādu ।
मोमोखाद्य.english: Madam, is momo tasty? Yes, very tasty.

पिष्टज.devanagari: युवका: पिष्टजम् एव खादन्ति। Youngmen are eating only pizza.

मधुर.english: The boy drank the sweet milk.
Will you eat the sweet pudding?

मधुर.devanagari: हे मित्र! एषः मधुरः गुडः भवतु ।
मधुर.transliteration: he mitra! eṣaḥ madhuraḥ guḍaḥ bhavatu .
मधुर.english: Hey friend! Let this jaggery be sweet.

सक्तु.english: Barley/Oat meal is better for breakfast.
Barley meal tastes good, doesn't it?

पोलिका.english: North Indians like to eat Chapatti
Hey! How many chapatties are there?

प्रातराश.english: Breakfast is the important meal of the day.
What did you eat for breakfast?

वटकी.english: Who won't like Vadii with a curd sauce

वटकी.devanagari: भो! वटकीं गृहाण। सा सुस्वादु अस्ति।
वटकी.transliteration: bho! vaṭakīṁ gṛhāṇ. sā susvādu asti.
वटकी.english: Hey! Take the Vadii. It is delicious.

माषवटी.english: Urad vada is very useful for the health of young girls.
Urad vada is a delicious food.
I ate urad vada some time ago.
Hey, the urad vada is coming! Let's eat it.

काञ्जिक.english: Gruel is also delicious in hunger.
Do you wish to eat gruel?

काञ्जिक.devanagari: भोः, इदं काञ्जिकम् गरीयसी कृते अति हितकरम्।
काञ्जिक.transliteration: bhoḥ, idam kāñjikam garīyasī kṛte ati hitakaram.
काञ्जिक.english: Friend, this gruel is very beneficial for the poor.

तेमन.english: The boy laughed after tasting the sour gravy.
Do you drink the sour gravy?
Mother! The khadi is extremely sour.
The sour gravy was prepared in the kitchen.

शुक्त.english: Vinegar tastes good on the tongue.
The cook had vinegar in the vessel.
Is vinegar necessary in the food?
Hey, where can one buy vinegar?

खण्ड.english: The treacle is a byproduct of the sugar refining process.
The boy thinks the molasses is sweet.
The mother kept the treacle in the kitchen.
Do you want to eat the molasses?
How much does this treacle cost?

लाजा.english: Parched grain is an all-time delicious snack.
The boy became happy after eating parched grain.
The mother brings parched grain from the market.

वल्लूर.english: The carnivore craves for dried meat/flesh.
Dried meat is prepared in the kitchen.
The cook preserved the dried meat for many days.
Do you want to eat dried meat?
Hey! How many rupees is this dried meat?

सम्पुटाश.english: Sandwich is a common food in western countries.
I eat a sandwich every day.
Yesterday I ate sandwiches with my friend.

सम्पुटाश.devanagari: त्वं अद्य कीदृशः सम्पुटाशः खादितुम् इच्छसि?
सम्पुटाश.transliteration: tvaṁ adya kīdṛśaḥ sampuṭāśaḥ khāditum ichhasi?
सम्पुटाश.english: What kind of sandwich do you want to eat today?

सम्पुटाश.devanagari: भोः! अयं सम्पुटाशः अतीव स्वादु अस्ति।
सम्पुटाश.transliteration: bhoḥ! ayaṁ sampuṭāśaḥ atīva svādu asti.
सम्पुटाश.english: Hey! This sandwich is very delicious.

लाज.english: Parched grain is an all-time delicious snack.
The boy eats parched grain with affection.
Mother brought parched grain from the market.

लाज.devanagari: किं त्वम् लाजान् भोजनस्य समये खादितवान्?
लाज.transliteration: kim tvam lājān bhojnasya samaye khāditavān?
लाज.english: Did you eat parched grain at meal time?

लाज.devanagari: भो! लाजाः अत्र सन्ति। किमर्थं न खादसि?
लाज.transliteration: bho! lājāh atra santi. kimartham na khādasi?
लाज.english: Hey! Parched grain is here. Why don't you eat it?

पूगीफल.english: Betel leaf with betel nut is eaten for good digestion.
Betel nut is a sweet and rejuvenating substance.
The merchant sold betel nut in the market.
When do you chew betel nut?

पूगीफल.devanagari: अरे! पूगीफलं मह्यं दातुम् इच्छसि किम्?
पूगीफल.transliteration: are! pūgīphalaṁ mahyaṁ dātum ichhasi kim?
पूगीफल.english: Hey! Do you wish to give me some betel nut?

अंगारकर्कटी.english: Baati is eaten with toor dhal soup.
The baati is delicious when hot.
Mother made baati and served it to us.
Do you want to eat baati?
The baati is ready. Let's eat now.

माषदोसा.devanagari: अद्य माषदोसां खादितवान्। Today I had blackgram dosa.

माषदोसा.english: I ate blackgram dosa yesterday morning.
Do you want to eat blackgram dosa?
Hey! Where can one get blackgram dosa?

पक्ववटी.devanagari: पक्ववटी उष्णा अस्ति। Pakodi is hot.

पलाण्डुदोसा.devanagari: पलाण्डुदोसायाम् पलाण्डु: अस्ति। Onion is in onion dosa.

पलाण्डुदोसा.english: Do you like the onion dosa?
The onion dosa is available here indeed.

पौष्टिक.english: Pasta is famous in Italian cuisine.

मुद्गपूर्णिका.devanagari: स्थालिकायां मुद्गपूर्णिका: सन्ति। Kachoris are there in the plate.

मुद्गपूर्णिका.english: Do you want to eat kachoris?

पोटल.english: She munches the Pakodas with teeth.
Who wants to eat the pakodas?

पोटल.devanagari: भो! अयम् पोटलः किमर्थं तप्तः न अस्ति?
पोटल.transliteration: bho! ayam potalah kimartham taptah na asti?
पोटल.english: Hey! Why isn't this pakoda fried?

नागवल्ली.devanagari: उद्यानात् नागवल्लीम् आनय। Bring betel leaf from the garden.

नागवल्ली.english: She was chewing the betel leaf.

नागवल्ली.devanagari: अहं नागवल्लीं दातुं इच्छामि। त्वम् किं चाहसि?
नागवल्ली.transliteration: ahaṃ nāgavallīṃ dātum ichhāmi. tvam kiṃ chāhasi?
नागवल्ली.english: I want to give you betel leaf. What do you want?

मुद्गदोसा.devanagari: ह्यः मुद्गदोसां खादितवान्। Yesterday I ate moong dosa.

मुद्गदोसा.english: Today in the evening I eat moong dosa.

मुद्गदोसा.devanagari: अरे, मुद्गदोसां मह्यं दत्तवान्। हन्त, बहु स्वादु आसीत्।
मुद्गदोसा.transliteration: are, mudgadosāṁ mahyaṁ dattavān. hanta, bahu svādu āsīt.
मुद्गदोसा.english: Hey, he gave me moong dosa. Oh, it was very tasty!
