वटिकरोटिका.devanagari: नगरे वटिकरोटिकां सर्वे खादन्ति। In the city everyone eats vada pav.
मम प्रिये वटिकरोटिका अतीव स्वादु अस्ति।
वटिकरोटिका.transliteration: mama priye vatikarotika atiiva svadu asti.
वटिकरोटिका.english: My dear, vada pav is very delicious.
Do you want to eat vada pav?
Hey, give me two vada pavs!

माषवटिका.devanagari: माषवटिका आरोग्याय हितकरी। Vada is good for health.

माषवटिका.english: Do you want to eat urad vadas?
I prepare urad vadas every day.

सोपस्करदोसा.devanagari: सोपस्करदोसा ऋचिकरी अस्ति।  Masala dosa is tasty.

सोपस्करदोसा.english: Yesterday she cooked masala dosa for dinner.

सोपस्करदोसा.devanagari: भवान् सोपस्करदोसां आस्वादयतु। इयं अत्यन्तं स्वादु अस्ति।
सोपस्करदोसा.transliteration: bhavān sopaskaradosāṁ āsvādayatu. iyaṁ atyantaṁ svādu asti.
सोपस्करदोसा.english: Please taste the masala dosa. It is very delicious.

अल्पाहारा.devanagari: रमेश: अल्पाहारं खादति। Ramesh is eating tiffin.

अल्पाहारा.english: The boy brought tiffin to school yesterday.

अल्पाहारा.devanagari: अल्पाहार स्वादु अस्ति। हाँ, अत्यन्तं स्वादु!
अल्पाहारा.transliteration: Alpāhār svādu asti. Hāñ, atyantaṁ svādu!
अल्पाहारा.english: The tiffin is tasty. Yes, very tasty!

अल्पाहार.devanagari: रमेश: अल्पाहारं खादति। Ramesh is eating tiffin.

अल्पाहार.english: Father brought tiffin to school yesterday.
Do you wish to eat tiffin?

गोधूमपिष्टिका.devanagari: प्रातराशे गोधूमपिष्टिका आसीत्। Wheet upma was there in the breakfast.

गोधूमपिष्टिका.english: Yesterday the wheat upma was delicious.
Do you want to eat wheat upma?

गोधूमपिष्टिका.devanagari: गोधूमपिष्टिका भारतीयां भोजनं वदामि। नैव, सा समोसाः सन्ति।
गोधूमपिष्टिका.transliteration: godhūmapiṣṭikā bhāratīyāṃ bhojanam vadāmi. naiva, sā samosāḥ santi.
गोधूमपिष्टिका.english: I say wheat upma is Indian food. No, those are samosas.

ताम्बूल.english: Chewing betel leaf after food is good for digestion.
The king gives betel leaf to the guests.
When did I eat the betel leaf?
The merchant sold betel leaf in the market.
Dear lady! Are you making the betel leaf beautiful?

मस्तु.devanagari: कूप्यां मस्तु अस्ति। Milk cream is there in the bottle.

उपाहार.devanagari: उपाहारे कासालु: अस्ति। In snacks chips is there.

मृदुरोटिका.devanagari: पुत्र: मृदुरोटिकां न खादति। The son is not eating bread.

वार्ताकभर्जी.devanagari: वार्ताकभर्जी मह्यं रोचते। I like brinjal bajji.

वार्ताकभर्जी.english: Do you want to eat brinjal bajji?
Hey! The brinjal bajji is there.

कासालु.devanagari: राम: कसालुम् इच्छति। Ram likes chips.
कासालु: मह्यं देहि! ते बहु: रोचन्ते।
कासालु.transliteration: Kāsālu: mahyaṁ dehi! Te bahu: rochante.
कासालु.english: Give me chips! I like them very much.

कलायचूर्ण.devanagari: पाके कलायचूर्णम् उपयोगि अस्ति। Groundnut powder is useful in cooking.

कलायचूर्ण.english: I went to buy groundnut powder.

कलायचूर्ण.devanagari: कलायचूर्णम् मे दास्यसि? हाँ, तत् भवते दास्यामि।
कलायचूर्ण.transliteration: kalāyachūrṇam me dāsyasi? hāñ, tat bhavate dāsyāmi.
कलायचूर्ण.english: Will you give me groundnut powder? Yes, I will give it to you.

शाकरोटिका.devanagari: वृद्ध: शाकरोटिकां न इच्छति। The oldman does not like burger.

शाकरोटिका.english: When will you eat a burger?
Hey, give me one burger please.

सन्तानिका.devanagari: पुत्र: सन्तानिकां खादितुम् इच्छति। Son likes to eat milk cream.

सन्तानिका.english: The mother keeps milk cream in a bowl.
The milk cream was delicious in the meal.
Do you want to drink milk cream?

सन्तानिका.devanagari: मह्यम् सन्तानिका बहु रोचते! आपणस्य किम् मते?
सन्तानिका.transliteration: mahyam santānikā bahu rchte! āpṇasya kim mate?
सन्तानिका.english: I really like milk cream! What do you think of it?

तिन्त्रिण्युपसेचन.devanagari: तिन्त्रिण्युपसेचनम् आम्लम् अस्ति। Tamarind chutney is sour.
तिन्त्रिण्युपसेचनम् मधुरम् च आम्लम् च भवति।
तिन्त्रिण्युपसेचन.transliteration: tintriṇyupasechanam madhuram cha amlam cha bhavati.
तिन्त्रिण्युपसेचन.english: Tamarind chutney is both sweet and sour.
Maitreya used tamarind chutney in the meal.
Bring tamarind chutney to the meal, please.

जलपूरीका.devanagari: बालिका: जलपूरिकां खादन्ति। Girls are eating pani puri.

जलपूरीका.english: I like pani puri very much.
Your brother ate pani puri yesterday.
Come, let us buy pani puri at the market.

मरीचभर्जी.devanagari: मरीचभर्जी कटु: अस्ति। Mirchi bajji is spicy.
अरे, मरीचभर्जीस्य गन्धः कतिचित् तीव्रः इव आसीत्।
मरीचभर्जी.transliteration: are, marīcabhārjīsy gandhah katichat tīvrah iva āsīt.
मरीचभर्जी.english: Hey, the smell of the mirchi bajji was quite strong.

जीवन्तीपक्ववटी.devanagari: जीवन्तीपक्ववटी रुचिकरी अस्ति। Palak pakodi is delicious.

जीवन्तीपक्ववटी.english: Mother made palak pakodi in the kitchen.
Everyone eats palak pakodi at the meal.
Which day did you eat palak pakodi?
I love palak pakodi. Do you also?

फलपाक.devanagari: फलपाक: मधुरः भवति। Jam is sweet in taste.

फलपाक.english: I made fruit jam in the kitchen.
Do you want to eat fruit jam?

फलपाक.devanagari: यः फलपाकः अत्र सति, सः बहु स्वादु अस्ति।
फलपाक.transliteration: Yaḥ phalapākaḥ atra sati, saḥ bahu svādu asti.
फलपाक.english: The fruit jam that is here is very delicious.

फलपाक.devanagari: भोः! भवती फलपाकं कीदृशं पसन्दं करोति?
फलपाक.transliteration: Bhōḥ! Bhavatī phalapākaṃ kīdṛśaṃ pasandaṃ karōti?
फलपाक.english: Hey! What kind of fruit jam do you prefer?

आलुकभर्जी.devanagari: उपहारगृहे आलुकभर्जयः सन्ति। Aloo bajjis are there in the canteen.

आलुकभर्जी.english: I like aloo bajji very much.
Do you want to eat aloo bajjis?

आलुकभर्जी.devanagari: आलुकभर्जीः बहु स्वादु सन्ति। हाँ, बहु स्वादु!
आलुकभर्जी.transliteration: ālukaabharzīḥ bahu svādu santi. hāñ, bahu svādu!
आलुकभर्जी.english: Aloo bajjis are very tasty. Yes, very tasty!

मरीचचूर्ण.devanagari: मरीचचूर्णं कटु अस्ति। Mirchi powder is spicy.

मरीचचूर्ण.english: The cook mixes mirchi powder in the food.
I bought mirchi powder from the market yesterday.

मरीचचूर्ण.devanagari: अरे, यह मरीचचूर्णं अत्यंत तीव्रमास्ति। हां, बहुत कड़वा है।
मरीचचूर्ण.transliteration: Are, yah marīchachūrṇaṁ atyantaṁ tīvramassti. Hāñ, bahu kaṛvā hai.
मरीचचूर्ण.english: Hey, this mirchi powder is very strong. Yes, it's very hot.

चर्वणक.devanagari: आपणे चर्वणकानि सन्ति। Chewing gums are there in the shop.

चर्वणक.english: When did he eat the chewing gum?
I gave chewing gum to Priya.

आम्रमण्डक.devanagari: मधुरपिष्टके आम्रमण्डकः अस्ति। There is mango paste layer in the cake.

आम्रमण्डक.english: The mango paste layer is sweet.
There was mango paste layer in the rasgulla.
Is the mango paste layer tasty?
Hey friend! Eat the mango paste layer.

आलुपृथुक.devanagari: स: आलुपृथुकं क्रीणाति। He is buying alu chips with pounded rice.

आलुपृथुक.english: Do you see the alu chips?
Alu chips are necessary for the meal.

लाजमोदक.devanagari: अद्य लाजमोदकं प्रसादे अस्ति। Today fluffed rice laddu is in prasad.

लाजमोदक.english: Mother cooks the fluffed rice laddu deliciously.
Yesterday, brother ate the fluffed rice laddus.
Do you like the fluffed rice laddu?
Hey friend, will you give me the fluffed rice laddu?

अभ्यूष.devanagari: अभ्यूषः उपाहारः अस्ति। Fried chana is snack.

अभ्यूष.english: Sister! Please give me fried chana.

चणकाङ्कुर.devanagari: चणकाङ्कुराणां वर्णः पिङ्गलः अस्ति। Chana sprouts are brown in color.
चणकाङ्कुरः स्वास्थ्यकरः वर्तते। हाँ, सः बहु पोषकः अस्ति।
चणकाङ्कुर.transliteration: Chanakaṅkuraḥ svāsthyakaraḥ vartate. Hāñ, saḥ bahu poṣakaḥ asti.
चणकाङ्कुर.english: Chana sprouts are healthy. Yes, they are very nutritious.

पोलिक.devanagari: पुत्र्याः जन्मदिने माता पोलिकान् पचति। Mother cooks polis on daughter's bithday.

पोलिक.english: The housewife cooked poli in the kitchen.
Do you want to eat poli?

पोलिक.devanagari: भद्रे! पोलिकां स्वादु कुरु। हे, make the poli delicious!

कुट्टितलड्डुक.devanagari: कुट्टितलड्डुकस्य वर्णः पीत: अस्ति। Besan laddu's colour is yellow.

कुट्टितलड्डुक.english: Do you want to eat besan laddu?

नालम्.devanagari: बालक: नालेन शीतलपानीयं पीबति। The boy is drinking cool drink with a straw.

नालम्.english: The cow eats grass with straw.
The farmer collected straw in the field.
Hey! Will you give me the straw?

मुक्ताचूर्णलड्डूक.devanagari: बालकेभ्यः मुक्ताचूर्णलड्डूकम् रोचते। Children likes motichur laddu.

मुक्ताचूर्णलड्डूक.english: Do you want to eat motichur laddu?
Sister! Can you give me motichur laddu?

कलायाङ्कुर.devanagari: भूम्यां कलायांकुराः वर्धन्ते। Groundnut sprouts grow in land.

कलायाङ्कुर.english: I used to cook groundnut sprouts at home.

चुर्णलड्डुक.devanagari: चुर्णलड्डुकस्य वर्णः श्वेतः अस्ति। The colour of rava laddu is white.

चुर्णलड्डुक.english: Mother made rava laddu in the kitchen.
Do you want to eat rava laddu?
This rava laddu is very sweet.
How many rava laddus did the servant buy?

मुद्गाङ्कुर.devanagari: माता मुद्गाङ्कुरान् अपचत्। Mother cooked moong sprouts.

मुद्गाङ्कुर.english: I produced moong sprouts in the farm.
Hey, where can moong sprouts be found?

मोहनभोग.devanagari: मोहनभोगः मधुरः अस्ति। Shiraa is sweet in taste.

मोहनभोग.english: Shiraa did not flow yesterday night.
Is shiraa harmful for the patient?

मोहनभोग.devanagari: भोः! मोहनभोगः कुत्र वर्तते? अत्र आगच्छतु।
मोहनभोग.transliteration: Bhoḥ! Mohanabhogaḥ kutra vartate? Atra āgacchhatu.
मोहनभोग.english: Hey! Where is shiraa? Come here.

आर्द्रकोपसेचन.devanagari: आर्द्रकोपसेचनं स्वादु अस्ति। Ginger chutney is tasty.

आर्द्रकोपसेचन.english: Mother prepares ginger chutney in the kitchen.

आर्द्रकोपसेचन.devanagari: अहम् कल आर्द्रकोपसेचनं बहु स्वादु अभवत्।
आर्द्रकोपसेचन.transliteration: aham kal ārdrakopasecanam bahu svādu abhavat.
आर्द्रकोपसेचन.english: Yesterday, I found the ginger chutney very tasty.
Do you want to eat ginger chutney?

आर्द्रकोपसेचन.devanagari: कृपया आर्द्रकोपसेचनं मह्यम् दास्यसि चेत् सुखी भविष्यामि।
आर्द्रकोपसेचन.transliteration: kripayā ārdrakopasecanam mahyam dāsyasi chet sukhī bhavishyāmi.
आर्द्रकोपसेचन.english: If you please give me ginger chutney, I will be happy.

अतिरस.devanagari: दश अतिरसा: सन्ति। There are ten atraasa.

आग्रारसवती.devanagari: सा आग्रारसवतीम् इच्छति। She likes Agra halwa.

आग्रारसवती.transliteration: āgrārasvatī bhāratīyā svādiṣṭā khādy am asti.
आग्रारसवती.english: Agra halwa is a delicious Indian sweet dish.

गव्य.devanagari: गव्यया निर्मितं मधुरं तस्मै रोचते। He likes the sweets made with kova.

अहराश.devanagari: अहराशः उपहारकेन्द्रे अस्ति। Lunch is there in the canteen.

अहराश.english: What did you eat for lunch?

शाकसूप.devanagari: रोहित: शाकसूपेन सह रोटिकां खादति। Rohit is eating dal curry with roti.

शाकसूप.english: This dal curry is delicious, isn't it?

मिश्रितम्.devanagari: पुत्र: मिश्रितं क्रीणाति। Son is buying kara mixture.

मिश्रितम्.english: Mother prepares the kara mixture in the kitchen.
The girl ate the kara mixture.
Hey! Give me the kara mixture.

व्यञ्जन.devanagari: महेश: व्यञ्जनं न खादति। Mahesh doesn't eat curry.

व्यञ्जन.english: The curry is made with spices.
Would you like to eat curry?

क्षारबिन्दु.devanagari: जननी क्षारबिन्दुं पचति। Mother is cooking kara boondi.

गव्यपिष्टक.devanagari: जननी बालकेभ्य: गव्यपिष्टकं ददाति । Mother is giving kova cake to the boys.

गव्यपिष्टक.english: The boy is eating the kova cake.
When will I get the kova cake?
The housewife prepared the kova cake skillfully.
Do you think the kova cake is delicious?

मैसूरपिष्टक.devanagari: भगिनी मैसूरपिष्टकं परिवेषयति। Sister is serving mysorepak.
एषः मैसूरपिष्टकः बहु मधुरः अस्ति। नवे कि भवति?
मैसूरपिष्टक.transliteration: eṣah maisūrapiṣṭakah bahu madhuram asti. nave ki bhavati?
मैसूरपिष्टक.english: This mysorepak is very sweet. How is it for you?

नक्ताश.devanagari: नक्ताशे रोटिका लभ्यते तत्र। In dinner rotis are available there.

नक्ताश.english: I prepared dinner and ate food.

नक्ताश.devanagari: नक्ताशः रुचिकरः आसीत्। भवान् आस्वादितवान् किम्?
नक्ताश.transliteration: naktāśaḥ rucikaraḥ āsīt. bhavān āsvāditavān kim?
नक्ताश.english: Dinner was delicious. Did you enjoy it?

गव्या.devanagari: गव्यया निर्मितं मधुरं तस्मै रोचते। He likes the sweets made with kova.
मातुः गव्या परिवारस्य लागि निर्मिता आसीत्।
गव्या.transliteration: mātuḥ gavyā parivārasya lāgi nirmitā āsīt.
गव्या.english: Mother's kova was made for the family.

गव्या.devanagari: अहं गव्यां बहु प्रीये। त्वं किम्?
गव्या.transliteration: ahaṁ gavyāṁ bahu prīye. tvaṁ kim?
गव्या.english: I like kova very much. What about you?

सोपस्करशाक.devanagari: पत्नी सोपस्करशाकं पचति। Wife is cooking stuffed curry.
सोपस्करशाकः अत्यन्तं रुचिकरः वर्तते। आप्तु किम् इच्छसि?
सोपस्करशाक.transliteration: sopaskaraśākaḥ atyantaṁ rucikaraḥ vartate. āptu kim iccḥasi?
सोपस्करशाक.english: The stuffed curry is very tasty. Would you like some?

विस्तरी.devanagari: भोजनालये विस्तर्यां भोजनं लभ्यते। In restaurant food is available in leaf plate.

विस्तरी.english: Mother serves rice in a leaf plate.
The boy ate food from a leaf plate.

विस्तरी.devanagari: किं त्वं विस्तर्यां करी पानीयं पिबसि?
विस्तरी.transliteration: Kiṃ tvāṃ vistaranyāṃ karī pānīyaṃ pibasi?
विस्तरी.english: Do you drink water from a leaf plate tomorrow?

विस्तरी.devanagari: हे मित्र! एषा विस्तरी कदा क्रीयते?
विस्तरी.transliteration: He mitra! Eṣā vistarī kadā krīyate?
विस्तरी.english: Hey friend! When is this leaf plate used?

शष्कुली.devanagari: भवान् कति शष्कुलीम् इच्छति? How many chaklies you want?

शष्कुली.english: Mother makes chaklis in the kitchen.

शष्कुली.devanagari: एतां शष्कुलीं स्वादु अस्ति। हाँ, अत्यन्तं स्वादु।
शष्कुली.transliteration: etāṃ śaṣkulīṃ svādu asti. hāṃ, atyantaṃ svādu.
शष्कुली.english: This chakli is delicious. Yes, it's very delicious.

उपस्कृतोदन.devanagari: अद्य भोजने उपस्कृतोदनम् अस्ति। There was seasoned cooked rice in meals today.

उपस्कृतोदन.english: Yesterday at the meal, seasoned rice was eaten.
Is the seasoned rice pleasing to you?
Sister! Please bring the seasoned rice.

सूत्रिकापायस.devanagari: सूत्रिकापायसम् अस्ति वा? Shaavige kheer is available?

सूत्रिकापायस.english: Please, I wish to have shaavige kheer.

जूर्णरोटिका.devanagari: जूर्णरोटिका तत्र अस्ति। Jowari roti is there.

गोधूमरोटिका.devanagari: सा गोधूमरोटिकाम् एव खादति। She eats wheat rotis only.

सार.devanagari: भोजने सारः अस्ति। Rasam is there in the food.

सार.english: Is there rasam in the meal?

सार.devanagari: अयं सारः बहु तप्तः अस्ति। तव रुचति किम्?
सार.transliteration: ayaṃ sāraḥ bahu taptaḥ asti. tava rucati kim?
सार.english: This rasam is very hot. Do you like it?

भर्जितोदन.devanagari: बालक: सर्वदा भर्जितोदनं खादति। The boy is always eating fried rice.

भर्जितोदन.english: Mother prepares fried rice in the kitchen.
Yesterday, father did not eat fried rice at mealtime.
Fried rice tastes delicious, doesn't it?

अङ्गाररोटिका.devanagari: अङ्गाररोटिका मह्यं न रोचते। I don't like fried roti.

अङ्गाररोटिका.english: Mother cooks fried rotis every day.
Why don't you eat fried rotis?

अङ्गाररोटिका.devanagari: भवान्, कृपया अङ्गाररोटिकाः मह्यं दातुं शक्नोति?
अङ्गाररोटिका.transliteration: bhavān, kṛpayā aṅgāraroṭikāḥ mahyạ̄ṁ dātuṁ shaknoti?
अङ्गाररोटिका.english: Sir, could you please give me fried rotis?

कोद्रवरोटिका.devanagari: कर्णाटकस्य कोद्रवरोटिका प्रसिद्धा अस्ति। Ragi roti of Karnataka is famous.

कोद्रवरोटिका.english: Mother makes ragi roti in the kitchen.

कोद्रवरोटिका.devanagari: भोः, कोद्रवरोटिका अत्यन्त स्वादु अस्ति न?
कोद्रवरोटिका.transliteration: bhoḥ, kodravarodikā atyanta svādu asti na?
कोद्रवरोटिका.english: Hey, ragi roti is very tasty, isn't it?

भर्जितशाक.devanagari: भोजने अन्नेन सह भर्जितशाकम् भवति। There is rice with fried curry in lunch.

भर्जितशाक.english: Is fried curry necessary in the meal?
Bring the fried curry. I will eat it.

कृसरान्न.devanagari: भक्त: मन्दिरे कृसरान्नं प्रसादं वितरति। the devotee is distributing Pulihora prasad in temple.

कृसरान्न.english: The mother is cooking Pulihora in the kitchen.
Do you wish to eat Pulihora?

कृसरान्न.devanagari: अरे! कृसरान्नं कति रुचिकरम्। भवते अपि रोचते?
कृसरान्न.transliteration: are! kṛsarānnaṁ kati rucikaram. bhavate api rochate?
कृसरान्न.english: Hey! Pulihora is so delicious. Do you also like it?

जंबीरोदन.devanagari: जंबीरोदनस्य वर्ण: पीत: भवति। The color of lemon rice is yellow.

जंबीरोदन.english: I wish to eat lemon rice.
Mother prepared lemon rice in the kitchen.

जंबीरोदन.devanagari: भैया! कृपया मह्यं जंबीरोदनस्य कटोरी देहि।
जंबीरोदन.transliteration: Bhairyā! Krupayā mahyaṁ jambīrodasya katorī dehi.
जंबीरोदन.english: Brother! Please give me a bowl of lemon rice.

आम्रोदन.devanagari: सा आम्रोदनं सम्यक् पचति। She prepares mango rice nicely.

आम्रोदन.english: Mother prepared mango rice and served it.

आम्रोदन.devanagari: अहं आम्रोदनं बहु प्रेम करामि। एतत् स्वादु अस्ति।
आम्रोदन.transliteration: aham āmrodanam bahu prema karāmi. etat svādu asti.
आम्रोदन.english: I love mango rice very much. It is delicious.

तैलरोटिका.devanagari: स: सर्वदा तैलरोटिकाम् एव पृच्छति। He always asks for oiled roti.

तैलरोटिका.english: Mother cooks oiled roti in the kitchen.
The oiled roti was very delicious at the meal.
Will there be oiled roti today?

तैलरोटिका.devanagari: अहम् तैलरोटिकाम् खादितुम् इच्छामि। मम वितरण करोतु।
तैलरोटिका.transliteration: aham taila-rotikām khāditum ichhāmi. mama vitran karotu.
तैलरोटिका.english: I want to eat oiled roti. Please serve me some.

चित्रान्न.devanagari: चित्रान्ने जम्बीर रसः भवति। Chitranna has lemon juice.

सागुपायस.devanagari: माता सागुपायसम् परिवेषयति। Mother serves saabakki paayasa.
अयम् सागुपायसः अतिमधुरः। नन्दन् एतम् पीयताम्।
सागुपायस.transliteration: ayam sāgupāyasah atimadhuraḥ. nandan etam pīyatām.
सागुपायस.english: This saabakki paayasa is very sweet. Dear, please drink this.

लवणान्न.devanagari: लवणान्नं कूप्याम् अस्ति। Namkin is there in the jar.

पिष्टान्न.devanagari: आपणे पिष्टान्नम् अस्ति। Pastry is there in the shop.

पिष्टान्न.english: Sir, are you eating the pastry?

स्वादुमथित.devanagari: भोजनानन्तरं स्वादुमथितं पातव्यम्। After the meal we should drink lassi.

पुलाक.devanagari: जननी पुलाकं पचति। Mother is cooking Pulav.

पुलाक.english: Hey friend! Let's eat pulav with vegetables.

पूपाला.devanagari: कति पूपाला: सन्ति तत्र। How many phoolkis are there?

पूपाला.english: Hey, where is the phoolki sold?

पिण्ड.devanagari: पेटिकायां पिण्ड़ा: सन्ति। Pedas are there in the box.

सूत्रक.devanagari: बाला: सूत्रकं खादन्ति। Children are eating namkeen sev.

सूत्रक.english: Mother brings namkeen sev from the market.

सूत्रक.devanagari: अरे, सूत्रकं मह्यम् दिच्छ! अत्यन्त मधुरम्।
सूत्रक.transliteration: Are, sūtrakam mahyam dicch! Atyant madhuram.
सूत्रक.english: Hey, give me some namkeen sev! It's very delicious.

मुद्गपर्पट.devanagari: मुद्गपर्पटः कटुयुक्तः भवति। Moong papad is spicy.

मुद्गपर्पट.english: Dear! Where is moong papad sold?

पूप.devanagari: महेशाय पूप: रोचते। Mahesh likes sweet dumpling.
अयम् पूप: मधुर: अस्ति। भवान् अपि पूप: खादितुम् इच्छति किम्?
पूप.transliteration: ayam pūp: madhur: asti. bhavān api pūp: khāditum ichhati kim?
पूप.english: This sweet dumpling is delicious. Do you also wish to eat the sweet dumpling?

सागुवर्ध्य.devanagari: सागुवर्ध्यस्य वर्णः श्वेत: अस्ति। Rice papad is white.

सागुवर्ध्य.english: She cooked rice papad in the kitchen.

सागुवर्ध्य.devanagari: हे मित्र! इदं सागुवर्ध्यं स्वादु अस्ति। भवानपि खादतु।
सागुवर्ध्य.transliteration: hē mitra! idaṁ sāguvardhyaṁ svādu asti. bhavānapi khādatu.
सागुवर्ध्य.english: Hey friend! This rice papad is delicious. You eat it too.

परिकल्पवर्ध्य.devanagari: एतद् परिकल्पवर्ध्यम्। This is disigned papad.

परिकल्पवर्ध्य.english: His designed papad was made yesterday.

परिकल्पवर्ध्य.devanagari: भद्रे! परिकल्पवर्ध्यम् आनय। हम् खादितुम् इच्छामि।
परिकल्पवर्ध्य.transliteration: bhadre! parikalpavarddhyam ānaya. ham khāditum ichchhāmi.
परिकल्पवर्ध्य.english: Dear friend! Bring the designed papad. I wish to eat it.

पक्कालु.devanagari: भवान् पक्कालुं खादितुम् इच्छति वा? Do you want to eat Aloo Tikki?

पक्कालु.english: My friend really enjoys Aloo Tikkis.

लप्सिका.devanagari: स्थालिकायां लप्सिका अस्ति। Halva is there in the plate.

लप्सिका.english: Do you want to eat the halva?

भ्रष्टापूप.devanagari: भ्रष्टापूपस्य उपरि किञ्चित् नवनीतस्य लेपनं करोतु। Apply little butter on the toast.

भ्रष्टापूप.english: Toast is a delicious breakfast food.

भ्रष्टापूप.devanagari: अहं कल भ्रष्टापूपं मधुना सह खादितवान्।
भ्रष्टापूप.transliteration: ahaṁ kala bhraṣṭāpūpaṁ madhunā saha khāditavān.
भ्रष्टापूप.english: I ate toast with honey yesterday.

भ्रष्टापूप.devanagari: एषः भ्रष्टापूपः अतीव उष्णः भवति। एनं स्पृशतु मा।
भ्रष्टापूप.transliteration: eṣaḥ bhraṣṭāpūpaḥ atīva uṣṇaḥ bhavati. enaṁ spṛśatu mā.
भ्रष्टापूप.english: This toast is very hot. Don't touch it.

दध्यन्न.devanagari: दध्यन्नं पथ्यं भवति। Curd rice is digestible.

दध्यन्न.english: Hey! Please give me curd rice.

अमृति.devanagari: स: अमृतिं खादति। He is eating Imarati.

कलाकन्द.devanagari: स: कलाकन्दं क्रीणाति। He is buying Kalakand.

मिष्ठान्न.devanagari: मिष्ठान्ने सिताया: आधिक्यं भवति। In sweet, too much sugar is used.
हे मित्र! एतत् मिष्ठान्नं रुचिकरं अस्ति।
मिष्ठान्न.transliteration: he mitra! etat miṣṭhānnaṁ ruchikaraṁ asti.
मिष्ठान्न.english: Hey friend! This sweet is delicious.

गुल्य.devanagari: स: गुल्यं खादति। He is eating toffee.
मञ्जरी, किं त्वं मह्यं गुल्यं दास्यसि?
गुल्य.transliteration: Mañjarī, kiṁ tvam̐ mahyaṁ gulyaṁ dāsyasi?
गुल्य.english: Manjari, will you give me toffee?

शर्करापाल:.devanagari: शर्करापाल: कुत्र अस्ति? Where is the Shakkarpara?

शर्करापाल:.english: The Shakkarpara is delicious, isn't it?

पिष्टिका.devanagari: पञ्च पिष्टिका: तत्र सन्ति। Five Kachodis are there.
एते पिष्टिका: बहु स्वादु: सन्ति न?
पिष्टिका.transliteration: ete piṣṭikā: bahu svādu: santi na?
पिष्टिका.english: These kachodis are very tasty, aren't they?

मिष्ठपाक.devanagari: आमलकस्य मिष्ठपाकं अग्रजा पचति। Elder sister is cooking Amla Muravva.

मिष्ठपाक.english: We cooked Muravva for him yesterday.
Do you want to eat Muravva?

मिष्ठपाक.devanagari: अहं मिष्ठपाकः प्रियः अस्ति। त्वं किम्?
मिष्ठपाक.transliteration: ahaṁ miṣṭhapākaḥ priyaḥ asti. tvaṁ kim?
मिष्ठपाक.english: I like Muravva. What about you?

पक्ववटिका.devanagari: कति पक्ववटिका: तया खदिताः? How many pakodis were eaten by her?

पक्ववटिका.english: The mother fried the pakodis in oil.

पक्ववटिका.devanagari: भो! एता: पक्ववटिका: मम कृते आनय।
पक्ववटिका.transliteration: bho! etāḥ pakva-vatikaḥ mama kṛte ānaya.
पक्ववटिका.english: Hey! Please bring these pakodis for me.

दालमुद्ग.devanagari: उपहारगृहात् दालमुद्गम् आनयतु। Bring Dalmot namkeen from canteen.

दालमुद्ग.english: Father brought Dalmot namkeen from the market.

अवदंश.devanagari: उपहारगृहे अवदंशः लभ्यते। Chat is available in canteen.

अवदंश.english: Tomorrow my friend will eat chat.

अवदंश.devanagari: अरे, अवदंशः कुत्र अस्ति? चलामः खरीदामः।
अवदंश.transliteration: are, avadaṃśaḥ kutra asti? chalāmaḥ kharīdāmaḥ.
अवदंश.english: Hey, where is the chat? Let's go buy some.

किलाट.devanagari: सा किलाटेन मधुरं पचति । She is making sweet from khova.
किं त्वं किलाटेन हलुवा निर्मातुम् इच्छसि ?
किलाट.transliteration: kiṁ tvаṁ kilāṭena haluvā nirmātum ichhasi ?
किलाट.english: Do you want to make halwa with khova?

किलाट.devanagari: हे मित्र! किलाटं बाजारे मिलितवान् किम् ?
किलाट.transliteration: he mitra! kilāṭaṁ bāzāre militavān kim ?
किलाट.english: Hey friend! Did you find khova in the market?

हैमी.devanagari: पेटिकायां हैम्य: सन्ति। Barfies are in the box.
भो! किं त्वं हैम्यं प्रेषयसि मे?
हैमी.transliteration: bho! kiṃ tvam haimyaṃ preṣayasi me?
हैमी.english: Hey! Will you send me the barfi?

घृतपूर.devanagari: उत्तरभारते घृतपूरस्य प्रसिद्धिः अस्ति। In North-India Ghevar sweet is famous.

घृतपूर.english: Ghevar is a sweet and delicious food.
Hey! Give me a piece of Ghevar.

पक्वान्न.devanagari: उपहारगृहे पक्वान्नानि सन्ति। In the canteen, cooked foods are there.

पक्वान्न.english: Mother prepares cooked food in the kitchen.
At mealtime, the cooked food was eaten by all.

पक्वान्न.devanagari: भवान् पक्वान्नं खादितवान् किम्? आम्, मैं पक्वान्नं खादितवान् अस्मि।
पक्वान्न.transliteration: bhavān pakvānnaṁ khāditavān kim? ām, maiṁ pakvānnaṁ khāditavān asmi.
पक्वान्न.english: Did you eat the cooked food? Yes, I ate the cooked food.

वाताश.devanagari: वाताश: अत्र अस्ति। Bataasha is here.

वाताश.english: When did the girl obtain bataasha?
Do you want to eat bataasha?

मठक.devanagari: मह्यं मठकः न रोचते। I don't like Maṭri.

मठक.english: The Maṭri was in the classroom.

फलरस.devanagari: फलरसः अस्ति वा? Is there juice?

कफघ्नी.devanagari: कफघ्नीं स्वीकरोतु कृपया। Please take coffee.

कृशर.devanagari: कृशर: मह्यं रोचते। I like Khichdi.

कौष्माण्ड़.devanagari: पुत्री कौष्माण्ड़ं वितरति। Daughter is distributing Petha sweet.

कौष्माण्ड़.english: The mother is cooking Petha sweet.
Hey, give me some Petha sweet.

गजक.devanagari: एकस्य गजकस्य मूल्यं कियत्? How much is one Gajak sweet?

गजक.english: Eat the Gajak, it is very tasty.

काफी.english: Many drink coffee in the morning.

उपाहारशाला.devanagari: उपहारशालायाः नाम आनन्द भवन् अस्ति ।  Name of the hotel is Anand Bhavan.

उपाहारशाला.english: I ate food in the hotel.
Hey! How many rooms are in the hotel?

चाय.devanagari: सः चायं इच्छति। He wants tea.

चाय.english: When is the hot tea ready?

कूर्चिका.devanagari: पाचक: दुग्धात् कूर्चिकां निर्माति। The cook is making Ravdi from milk.
भो! अयं कूर्चिका कति मूल्यस्य अस्ति?
कूर्चिका.transliteration: bho! ayaṁ kūrchikā kati mūlyasya asti?
कूर्चिका.english: Hey! How much does this Ravdi cost?

उपाहारगृह.devanagari: उपाहारगृहे जनाः अल्पाहारं खादन्ति। People eat snaks at canteen.

उपाहारगृह.english: Yesterday, many students were in the canteen.
When do you go to the canteen?

उपाहारगृह.devanagari: अयं चाय उपाहारगृहे निर्मितः अस्ति। आम्, सः अत्यन्तं रुचिकरः।
उपाहारगृह.transliteration: ayaṁ chāya upāhāragṛhe nirmitaḥ asti. ām, saḥ atyantaṁ ruchikaraḥ.
उपाहारगृह.english: This tea is made at the canteen. Yes, it is very delicious.

नवनीत.english: The mother makes butter in the kitchen.
The boy became happy after eating butter.
Do you want to send butter?

नवनीत.devanagari: अरे, किमर्थं नवनीतं तत्र स्थापितम् अस्ति?
नवनीत.transliteration: are, kimarthaṃ navnītaṃ tatra sthāpitam asti?
नवनीत.english: Hey, why is butter placed there?

रस.english: Tasty mango juice to remove summer heat is ready.

रस.devanagari: किं त्वं इस्सर् फलरसः पिबितुम् इच्छसि?
रस.transliteration: Kim tvam issar phalarasah pibItum ichchhasi?
रस.english: Do you want to drink fruit juice?

रस.devanagari: अरे, इयं अनारसः कतिपयाभिः रूप्यकैः वर्तते।
रस.transliteration: Are, iym anArasah katipayAbhih rupyakaiah vartate.
रस.english: Hey, this pomegranate juice costs a few rupees.

चायकेन्द्र.devanagari: चायकेन्द्रम् अत्र अस्ति। The tea-centre is here.

चायकेन्द्र.english: I drank tea at the tea centre.
Do you wish to go to the tea centre?

उपाहारकेन्द्र.devanagari: उपाहारकेन्द्रे भोजनं सिद्धम् अस्ति। Food is ready at tiffin center.

उपाहारकेन्द्र.english: The tiffin center opens at six o'clock in the morning.
Yesterday I went to the tiffin center.
When will you go to the tiffin center?

उपाहारकेन्द्र.devanagari: अत्र उपाहारकेन्द्रे उत्तमं दोसः भवति। हां, सः तु स्वादुः अस्ति।
उपाहारकेन्द्र.transliteration: atra upāhārakendre uttamam dosah bhavati. hān, sah tu svādu-h asti.
उपाहारकेन्द्र.english: Here at the tiffin center they make excellent dosa. Yes, it is indeed delicious.

हरितचाय.devanagari: हरितचायं सर्वे न इच्छन्ति। All people don't like green tea.

हरितचाय.english: I have a desire to drink green tea.

क्षीर.devanagari: शिशुः क्षीरम् इच्छति। Baby wants milk.

क्षीर.english: The mother gives milk to drink.

शीतपेय.english: I drink cool drink in summer.
Yesterday, my friend drank a cool drink.
I want a cool drink. What about you?

शीतलपानीय.devanagari: स: शीतलपानीयम् आनायति। He is bringing cool drink.

शीतलपानीय.english: Oh, cool drink is very delicious!

आम्ररस.english: Mango juice is tasty in summer.
Mother's mango juice was very cool.

जम्बीररस.english: Lemon juice is tasty on a hot afternoon
Do you want to drink lemon juice?

नारिकेलजल.english: Tasty coconut water is desirable to me.
Friend! Would you like to give me coconut water?

चायपान.devanagari: जननी चायपानस्य आयोजनं करोति। Mother is arranging Tea.
वयं कालः चायपानं पीत्वा आनन्दितास् भवामः।
चायपान.transliteration: vayaṁ kālaḥ chāyapānaṁ pītvā ānanditas bhavāmaḥ.
चायपान.english: We became happy after drinking tea in the morning.
Do you also wish to drink tea?

क्वाथ.devanagari: काफीकृते क्वाथ: नास्ति। There is no decoction for coffee.

क्वाथ.english: The doctor gave the patient a decoction.

क्वाथ.devanagari: हे मित्र, इदं क्वाथ: स्वादु अस्ति।
क्वाथ.transliteration: Hē mitra, idaṃ kvāth: svādu asti.
क्वाथ.english: Hey friend, this decoction is tasty.

तक्र.english: Hey! Can you give me buttermilk?

सुरापान.devanagari: वयम् सुरापानं न स्वीकुर्मः। We should not drink liquor.

सुरापान.english: Drinking liquor is harmful for health.

सुरापान.devanagari: मा सुरापानं पिब! इदं बुद्धिघ्नम् अस्ति।
सुरापान.transliteration: mā surāpānaṁ piba! idaṁ buddhighnȃm asti.
सुरापान.english: Don't drink liquor! It destroys intelligence.

मदिरा.devanagari: मदिरा द्राक्षायाः निर्मिता अस्ति। Wine is made of grapes.

शीतलकापी.devanagari: युवती शीतलकापीं पिबति। The young lady is drinking cold coffee.

शीतलकापी.english: Do you want to drink cold coffee?

शीतलकापी.devanagari: अरे! यह शीतलकापी कदा आयोजितं भविष्यति?
शीतलकापी.transliteration: are! yah śītalakāpī kadā āyojitaṁ bhaviṣyati?
शीतलकापी.english: Hey! When will this cold coffee be ready?

पीयूष.devanagari: पीयूषेण निर्मितं मधुरं गृहे अस्ति। Sweet made up of Brittel milk is there at home.

पीयूष.english: I ate the brittle milk yesterday.
Do you know about brittle milk?
Please give me the brittle milk.

दुग्ध.english: I give milk for the child.
I filled the pot with milk.

दुग्ध.devanagari: किं त्वं दुग्धं पीत्वा सुखी असि?
दुग्ध.transliteration: kiṁ tvāṁ dugdhāṁ pītvā sukhī asi?
दुग्ध.english: Are you happy after drinking milk?

विक्षारजल.devanagari: ताम्बूलापणे विक्षारजलं लभ्यते। At panshop soda water is available.

विक्षारजल.english: Do you want to drink soda water?

दधिक.devanagari: दधिकं पिबति किम्? Will you take lassi?

दधिक.english: Hey! Bring lassi to the house.

शर्करा.english: There was sugar in the kitchen.
Please, I wish to give sugar.

गुडपानक.devanagari: गुडपानकं मधुरम् अस्ति। Jaggery water is sweet.

गुडपानक.english: Do you want to drink jaggery water?
Hey friend! May the jaggery water be delicious.

मांस.devanagari: मांसम् लघुखण्डशः कर्तयतु। Cut the meat in to small pieces.

मांस.english: The cook is preparing the meat.
The farmer was selling meat in the market.
Do you want to eat meat?
Sir, where do you buy meat?

फल.devanagari: बालकः फलं खादति। Boy eats fruit.

फल.english: There are fruits on the tree.
The girl ate a sweet fruit.
Hey! How many fruits are necessary?

एला.english: Fragrant Payasam with cinnamom is ready.
Cardamom is the best of spices.
Mother bought cardamom at the market.
Do you drink tea with cardamom?
The cardamom makes a pleasant fragrance.

उपस्कर.devanagari: के उपस्कराः क्रेतव्याः। Which ingredients are to be bought.

उपस्कर.english: All the ingredients are in this kitchen.
I bought ingredients at the market yesterday.
Whose spices were in the jar?

जलपान.devanagari: जलपानस्य व्यवस्थां क: करोति। Who is arranging refreshment?

जलपान.english: Refreshment was served at the event.
Would you like to have refreshment?

जलपान.devanagari: अरे, तव जलपानं कुत्र अस्ति? तत्र आणयामि।
जलपान.transliteration: are, tava jalapānaṃ kutra asti? tatra āṇayāmi.
जलपान.english: Hey, where is your refreshment? I will bring it there.

ओषधि.devanagari: ओषधयः पाकाय भवति। Herbs are used in cooking.

ओषधि.english: The doctor gave the herb to the patient.

ओषधि.devanagari: भद्रे, अस्माकं वाटिकायां सुंदरा ओषधिः वर्धते।
ओषधि.transliteration: Bhadre, asmākaṁ vāṭikāyāṁ sundarā oṣadhiḥ vardhate.
ओषधि.english: Dear friend, a beautiful herb grows in our garden.

विदंश.devanagari: विपण्याम् बहवः विदंशा: लभ्यन्ते। There are many spices are available in the market.

विदंश.english: The cook kept the spices in the kitchen.

विदंश.devanagari: भोः! मह्यं विदंशः दायि। Bhoh! Mahyam vidamshah dayi.

शाकतरला.devanagari: शाकतरला स्वास्थवर्धिका अस्ति। Vegitable soup is good for health.

शाकतरला.english: Yesterday the vegetable soup was very delicious.
Do you want to eat vegetable soup?

शाकतरला.devanagari: हे भ्राता! कृपया शाकतरला गृह आनय।
शाकतरला.transliteration: he bhrātā! krupayā śākatralā gṛha ānaya.
शाकतरला.english: Hey brother! Please bring the vegetable soup home.

फलपानीय.devanagari: ग्रीष्मकाले सर्वे फलपानीयं पिबन्ति। In summer people drink sharbath.

फलपानीय.english: Manjira became happy after drinking the sharbath.

फलपानीय.devanagari: भोः! मञ्जिरे, मह्यं शीतलं फलपानीयं दाहि।
फलपानीय.transliteration: Bhoh! Manjire, mahyaṁ śītalaṁ phalpānīyaṁ dāhi.
फलपानीय.english: Hey Manjira, give me cold sharbath!

कृष्णमरिच.english: The smell of black pepper is very fragrant.
I bought black pepper at the market.

कृष्णमरिच.devanagari: किं भवान् कृष्णमरिचं भोजने योजयितुम् इच्छति?
कृष्णमरिच.transliteration: Kim bhavān kṛṣṇamaricchaṁ bhojane yojayitum icchhati?
कृष्णमरिच.english: Do you want to add black pepper to the food?
Hey! Give me the black pepper.

लवङ्ग.english: Clove is good for dental health.
The cook added clove to the food.
Do you know the smell of clove?

लवङ्ग.devanagari: अरे, मह्यं लवङ्गं दिशतु। एषा दन्तवेदना अस्ति।
लवङ्ग.transliteration: are, mahyam lavangam dishathu. esha dantavedana asti.
लवङ्ग.english: Hey, give me clove. I have a toothache.

जातिपत्री.english: Star anise seed looks like a star.
Star anise has a pleasant fragrance.
The physician used star anise in the medicine.

जातिपत्री.devanagari: भोजने जातिपत्री स्वादं वर्धयति, न किम्?
जातिपत्री.transliteration: bhojane jātipatrī svādiṁ vardhayati, na kim?
जातिपत्री.english: Star anise enhances the flavor in food, doesn't it?

मधुरिका.devanagari: सुश्वासाय जीर्णाय च भोजनान्ते मधुरिकाः भक्ष।
मधुरिका.english: For good breath and digestion, eat fennel seeds at the end of meal.
I ate fennel seeds long ago.

मधुरिका.devanagari: हे! मे मधुरिकाः दत्तुम् शक्नोषि किम्?
मधुरिका.transliteration: he! me madhurīkāḥ dattum śaknośi kim?
मधुरिका.english: Hey! Can you give me some fennel seeds?

धन्याक.english: Coriander seeds are used for fragrant food.
Coriander seeds are necessary in the kitchen.
I bought coriander seeds from the market.
Where do you wish to buy coriander seeds?

राजिका.english: We bought black mustard seeds at the market.
Hey, give me the mustard seeds!

भृग.english: Cinnamon is a spice made from trees.
Cinnamon is the reason for the fragrance.
Cinnamon was used in the kitchen.
Does cinnamon have a sweet and pleasant taste?
Would you like to give me some cinnamon?

दीपनी.devanagari: जननी दीपन्या: रोटिका पचति । Mother is cooking fenugreek chapati.

दीपनी.english: Where is fenugreek sold? It is available in the market.

मेथिका.english: Fenugreek is good for women’s health.
Fenugreek is used in the kitchen.
I went to the farmer to buy fenugreek.
Do you add fenugreek in food?

मेथिका.devanagari: हे! मेथिका सुस्वादु भवति न किम्?
मेथिका.transliteration: He! Methikā sussvādu bhavati na kim?
मेथिका.english: Hey! Fenugreek tastes good, doesn't it?

कृष्णनिम्ब.english: Curry leaf is used to get black hair.
Curry leaf satisfies the tongue with its delicious taste.
I used curry leaf in the kitchen.
Do you know the benefits of curry leaf?
Hey friend! Curry leaf is necessary in food.

रक्तमरीचिका.english: Red chilly is used in cooking.
I went to the market to buy red chilli.
Do you want to eat red chilli?
Red chilli is very useful, isn't it?

जीरक.english: Boiled water with cumiin seeds is the Jaljeera drink.
Cumin seeds are necessary in the kitchen.
I brought cumin seeds from Kashmir.
Do you know the properties of cumin seeds?
Mother, where does cumin go in the food?

शुण्ठी.english: Ginger tea helps to relive headache.
The physician gave dry ginger to the patient.
Do you take dry ginger every day?
Hey! Dry ginger powder is very beneficial.

जातीफल.english: Nutmeg is considered the king of spices.
The wife kept nutmeg in the kitchen.
Do you know the benefits of nutmeg?

जातीफल.devanagari: हे मित्र! अयं जातीफलः अत्यन्त सुगन्धः वर्तते।
जातीफल.transliteration: hé mitra! ayaṁ jātīphalaḥ atyanta sugandhḥ vartate.
जातीफल.english: Hey friend! This nutmeg is very fragrant.

तमालपत्र.english: Take out the bay leaf before eating.
The bay leaf falls into the sauce.
There was a bay leaf in the rice dish.
How many bay leaves are in the kitchen?
Why do you add the bay leaf (to the dish)?

कृष्णतिल.english: Sesame oil is good for frying.
I mix black sesame seeds into the rice pudding.
The housewife went to the market to buy black sesame seeds.
Do you smell the black sesame seeds?

कृष्णतिल.devanagari: भ्राते, कृष्णतिलं मह्यं दातुं शक्नोषि किम्?
कृष्णतिल.transliteration: bhrāte, kṛṣṇatilaṁ mahyaṁ dātuṁ śaknoṣi kim?
कृष्णतिल.english: Brother, can you give me some black sesame seeds?

खसबीज.english: Poppy seed is a medicinal substance.
We went to the market to buy poppy seeds.

खसबीज.devanagari: अस्मिन् पाके खसबीजस्य कति परिमाणम् आवश्यकम्?
खसबीज.transliteration: Asmin pāke khasabījasya kati parimānam āvaśyakam?
खसबीज.english: How much poppy seed is needed in this recipe?
Have you eaten poppy seeds before?

तैल.english: The cook used oil in the food.
Is the oil kept in a cool place?

लवण.english: The cook adds salt to the food.
I brought salt from the market.
Do you keep salt in the house?
The taste of food increases with salt.

शालि.devanagari: शालिभोजनं लभ्यते वा? Is rice food available?

शालि.english: In how many days does rice ripen?

शालि.devanagari: भवान् शालिं पचितवान् किम्? हाँ, अहं पचितवान्।
शालि.transliteration: bhavān śāliṁ pacitavān kim? hāँ, ahaṁ pacitavān.
शालि.english: Did you cook the rice? Yes, I cooked it.

तण्डुल.devanagari: माता तण्डुलं पचति। Mother cooks rice.

तण्डुल.english: The farmer produces rice in the field.
How much rice is in your house?

नारिकेलचूर्ण.english: Sugar mixed grated coconut it very tasty.
Grated coconut is used in sweets.
I mixed grated coconut in the pudding.

अतसी.devanagari: अतस्याः तैलं भवति। Oil is made from flax.

अतसी.english: The farmer planted flax in the field.
In how many days does flax grow?
We use flax to make cloth.

काफीचूर्ण.devanagari: काफीचूर्णस्य वर्ण: कपीश: अस्ति।  The coffee powder's color is brown.

काफीचूर्ण.english: I drink coffee powder every day.
Mother brought coffee powder from the market.
Do you like the taste of coffee powder?

काफीचूर्ण.devanagari: एषा काफीचूर्णं उत्तमा अस्ति। हाँ, सः सुगन्धि अस्ति।
काफीचूर्ण.transliteration: eṣā kāfīchūrṇaṁ uttamā asti. hāñ, saḥ sugandhī asti.
काफीचूर्ण.english: This coffee powder is excellent. Yes, it smells good.

हरिद्राचूर्ण.english: I worship Ganesha with turmeric powder.
Mother used to use turmeric powder in the kitchen.
Do you want to buy turmeric powder?
Give me turmeric powder. Okay, right now.

रक्तमरीचिकाचूर्ण.english: This red chilli powder is tasty.
Mother added red chilli powder to the food.
Do you spread different red chilli powder?
Brother! Where should we buy red chilli powder?

चायचूर्ण.devanagari: चायचूर्णं कुत्र अस्ति? Where is the tea powder?
मैत्री चायचूर्णं कृते रुपयाः पञ्चदश दत्ता।
चायचूर्ण.transliteration: maitri chāyachūrṇaṃ kṛte rupyāḥ pañcadaśa dattā.
चायचूर्ण.english: I gave fifteen rupees for the tea powder.
Do you see the tea powder?

चायचूर्ण.devanagari: कृपया मे चायचूर्णं देहि। आम्, तत्क्षणम्।
चायचूर्ण.transliteration: kṛpayā me chāyachūrṇaṃ dehi. ām, tatkṣaṇam.
चायचूर्ण.english: Please give me the tea powder. Yes, right away.

मकरन्द.devanagari: मकरन्दं सञ्चिनोति मधुमक्षिका। Honey bee collects the honey.

मकरन्द.english: Honey flows out from the flowers.
The bee became happy after drinking the honey.
Why does honey exist in flowers?

मकरन्द.devanagari: भो! यं मकरन्दं पश्यसि तत् किम् मधुरम् अस्ति?
मकरन्द.transliteration: bho! yaṃ makarandaṃ paśyasi tat kim madhuram asti?
मकरन्द.english: Hey! Is that honey you see sweet?

चूर्ण.devanagari: पत्नी चुर्णेन पात्राणि क्षालयति। Wife washes pots with powder.

चूर्ण.english: The doctor gives medicinal powder to the patient.
Sita made the girl fragrant with powder.
Will you bring powder from the market?
I buy Himalayan powder. What about you?

परिस्तरण.english: To prevent the dough from sticking, spreading flour is used.
The cook spreads flour on the table.
The spreading of flour was completed yesterday.
How much flour spreading is necessary to prepare the food?

परिस्तरण.devanagari: अरे! परिस्तरणं न कुरु, पिष्टं तु चिपचिपम् भवति।
परिस्तरण.transliteration: are! paristareṇaṁ na kuru, piṣṭaṁ tu chipichipam bhavati.
परिस्तरण.english: Hey! Don't spread flour, the dough becomes sticky.

आढकी.devanagari: आढकी अस्ति वा? Is red gram available?

आढकी.english: The cooked pigeon pea is delicious.
I planted pigeon pea in the farm.
At what price is the red gram being sold?

माष.devanagari: माषस्य वर्णः कृष्णः। Color of black gram is black.

माष.english: Black gram is a nutritious food.
Hey, what is the price of black gram?

चीनाक.devanagari: उत्तरभारतीयखाद्यपदार्थेषु चीनाकाः उपयुज्यन्ते। Fennels are used in north indian dishes.

चीनाक.english: The teacher showed fennel to the students.
Do you want to eat fennel?
I say fennel is very pleasant.

कुलत्थ.devanagari: भोः। सायं किञ्चित् कुलत्थं क्रीणातु। Sir Buy some horsegram in the evening.

कुलत्थ.english: Do you want to eat horse gram?
Sir! What is the price of horse gram?

निष्पाव.devanagari: किञ्चित् निष्पावस्य व्यञ्जनं परिवेषयतु। Please serve some flat bean curry.

निष्पाव.english: When did I eat the flat bean?
The flat bean was grown at home.
Do you like the flat bean?

मुद्ग.devanagari: मुद्गस्य वर्णः हरितः। Color of green gram is green.

मुद्ग.english: Do you want to eat green gram?

मुद्ग.devanagari: मुद्गः बहु पोषकः अस्ति, तस्य भक्षणं कुरु।
मुद्ग.transliteration: mudgaḥ bahu poṣakaḥ asti, tasya bhakṣaṇaṁ kuru.
मुद्ग.english: Green gram is very nutritious, eat it.

गोधूम.devanagari: गोधूमः पुष्टिकरः आहारः अस्ति। Wheat is a healthy food.

गोधूम.english: The farmer plants wheat in the field.
Do you want to buy wheat?

गोधूम.devanagari: अयम् गोधूमः उत्तमः अस्ति, न किम्?
गोधूम.transliteration: ayam godhūmah uttamah asti, na kim?
गोधूम.english: This wheat is good, isn't it?

चणक.devanagari: पूरिकया सह चणकव्यञ्जनं स्वादु। Poori with chana is tasty.

चणक.english: Do you want to grind the chickpeas?
Hey! What is the price of chickpeas?

मकुष्टक.devanagari: मकुष्टकस्य वर्णः श्वेतः। The color of kidney bean is white.
मकुष्टकः रसेन भरितः एव। हाँ, सः स्वादु अस्ति।
मकुष्टक.transliteration: makuṣṭkaḥ rasen bhritaḥ ev. Hāñ, saḥ svādu asti.
मकुष्टक.english: The kidney bean is full of flavor. Yes, it is tasty.

त्रिपुट.devanagari: त्रिपुटस्य वर्णः पिड़्गलः। The color of Khesaari is brown.
भोः, अयं त्रिपुटः भृष्टः स्वादुः अस्ति।
त्रिपुट.transliteration: bhoḥ, ayam tripuṭaḥ bhṛṣṭaḥ svāduḥ asti.
त्रिपुट.english: Hey, this roasted khesaari is delicious.

कङ्गु.devanagari: कङ्ग्वा सूपः उपाह्रियते। Soup is prepared from millet.

कङ्गु.english: The farmer planted millet in the field.

कङ्गु.devanagari: अहं कङ्गुः क्रेतुं इच्छामि। त्वं अपि?
कङ्गु.transliteration: ahaṃ kaṅguḥ kretuṃ ichhāmi. tvaṃ api?
कङ्गु.english: I want to buy millet. And you?

मसुर.devanagari: अद्य प्रातराशे मसुरस्य सूपः आसीत्। Lentil soup was there in today’s breakfast.

मसुर.english: Mother used to cook lentils in the kitchen.

मसुर.devanagari: किं त्वं मसुरस्य व्यंजनं खादितुम् इच्छसि?
मसुर.transliteration: kiṃ tvaṃ masurasya vyañjanaṃ khāditum icchasi?
मसुर.english: Do you want to eat lentil curry?

मसुर.devanagari: मसुराः सस्ताः च स्वादिष्टाः च सन्ति।
मसुर.transliteration: masurāḥ sastāḥ ca svādiṣṭāḥ ca santi.

नीवार.devanagari: आपणे नीवारः अस्ति वा? Is wild rice available in shop?

नीवार.english: The farmer cultivates wild rice in the field.
Have you eaten wild rice before?

नीवार.devanagari: हे मित्र! नीवारः कहाँ मिलेगी? कदा क्रेतुं शक्नोमि?
नीवार.transliteration: he mitra! nīvāraḥ kahāṁ milegī? kadā kretuṃ śaknomi?
नीवार.english: Hey friend! Where will I get wild rice? When can I buy it?

कोद्रव.devanagari: निर्धनः कोद्रवखाद्यं खादति। Poor eats food made up with Paspalum.

कोद्रव.english: The farmer sows kodo millet in the field.
The housewife used to cook rice with kodo millet.
For whom is kodo millet the food?

कोद्रव.devanagari: अहं कोद्रवखाद्यं रोचते! त्वम् अपि खादसि किम्?
कोद्रव.transliteration: aham kodravakhādyam rochate! tvam api khādasi kim?
कोद्रव.english: I like kodo millet food! Do you also eat it?

चारुक.devanagari: क्षेत्रे चारुकाः उप्ताः। Sugarcane seeds are sown in the field.

चारुक.english: The sugarcane seed grows in the earth.
The farmer watered the sugarcane seeds.
How many sugarcane seeds were planted in the field?

चारुक.devanagari: भोः! एते चारुकाः कुत्र प्राप्ताः? अत्र खरीदितुं शक्नुमः।
चारुक.transliteration: bhoḥ! ete cārukaḥ kutra prāptāḥ? atra kharīdituṁ śaknumaḥ.
चारुक.english: Hey! Where did you get these sugarcane seeds? We can buy them here.

कलाय.devanagari: कलायस्य पिष्टकं बहु स्वादु। Groundnut balls are very tasty.

कलाय.english: The farmer plants groundnuts in the field.
The housewife cooked a groundnut dish.
Do you wish to eat groundnuts?

कलाय.devanagari: अरे, कलायः कति मूल्यस्य अस्ति? - एषः पञ्चदशरुप्यकस्य अस्ति।
कलाय.transliteration: are, kalāyḥ kati mūlyasya asti? - eṣḥ pañchadaśarupyakasya asti.
कलाय.english: Hey, how much do groundnuts cost? - They cost fifteen rupees.

भल्लातकी.devanagari: वृक्षे भल्लातका: सन्ति। Cashew nuts are there in the tree.

भल्लातकी.english: Do you see the cashew nuts?
Where are cashew nuts found? They are found in the market.

सूत्रीका.devanagari: सूत्रीकापायसं सर्वे इच्छन्ति। Everyone like vermicelli payasam.

सूत्रीका.english: The mother cooks vermicelli in the kitchen.

सूत्रीका.devanagari: हे मित्र! सूत्रीकां स्वादु कृत्वा दिश।
सूत्रीका.transliteration: he mitra! sūtrīkāṃ svādu kṛtvā diśa.
सूत्रीका.english: Hey friend! Please make the vermicelli tasty and serve it.

सर्षप.devanagari: उष्णतैले सर्षपः विदीर्यते। Mustard splits in hot oil.

सर्षप.english: Why do you sow mustard seeds?

भल्लातक.devanagari: वृक्षे भल्लातका: सन्ति। Cashew nuts are there in the tree.

भल्लातक.english: The taste of cashew nuts is sweet.
Cashew nuts are very beneficial, aren't they?

मरीचिका.devanagari: मरीचिका शुकाय रोचते। Parrots like chilli.

मरीचिका.english: This dish will be very chilli-filled.

राजमाष.devanagari: राजमाषे कृष्णवर्णः बिन्दुः दृश्यते। Black dot is seen in cow peas.

राजमाष.english: Cow peas are a nutritious food.
Do you want to eat cow peas?
Sister, where is cow peas sold in the market?

यव.devanagari: यवस्य काञ्जिकम् ज्वरसमये दीयते। Barely gruel is given during fever.

यव.english: The farmer sows barley in the field.
Barley grains were stored in the house.
Do you know the price of barley?
The barley crop should be good this year.

द्विदल.devanagari: द्विदलम् उष्णे जले पक्वं भवति। Dal gets cooked in hot water.

द्विदल.english: I buy dal at the market.
Do you want to eat dal?

द्विदल.devanagari: भोः! द्विदलं मह्यं दातुम् शक्नोषि किम्?
द्विदल.transliteration: bhoḥ! dvīdalaṁ mahyaṁ dātum śaknośi kim?
द्विदल.english: Hey! Can you give me some dal?

व्रीहि.devanagari: व्रीहयः आरोग्याय हिताः सन्ति। Grains are good for health.

व्रीहि.english: The farmer plants rice in the field.

व्रीहि.devanagari: भवान् व्रीहिं भोजने पसन्द करोति किम्?
व्रीहि.transliteration: bhavān vrīhiṃ bhojane pasand karoti kim?
व्रीहि.english: Do you prefer rice in your meal?
Hey, what is the price of rice?

अणु.english: Basmati rice is produced in India.
Do you wish to eat basmati rice?

अणु.devanagari: हे मित्र! अणुः अत्यन्तं स्वादु अस्ति।
अणु.transliteration: He mitra! Anuḥ atyantaṁ svādu asti.
अणु.english: Hey friend! Basmati rice is very delicious.

वनमु्द्ग.devanagari: मह्यं वनमुद्गः न रोचते। I don't like Lobia.

वनमु्द्ग.english: Father brought Lobia from the market.

वनमु्द्ग.devanagari: अयं वनमुद्गः पौष्टिकः एव। हाँ, सः स्वास्थ्यकरः अपि।
वनमु्द्ग.transliteration: ayaṃ vanamudgaḥ pauṣṭikaḥ ev. Hāñ, saḥ svāsthyakaraḥ api.
वनमु्द्ग.english: This Lobia is nutritious. Yes, it's healthy too.

यावनाल.devanagari: यावनालस्य रोटिका रुचिकरी। Jawar roti is tasty.

यावनाल.english: I went to the market to buy jawar.

यावनाल.devanagari: यावनालः स्वास्थ्यकरः भोजनः अस्ति इति कथयसि।
यावनाल.transliteration: yāvanālaḥ svāsthyakaraḥ bhojanaḥ asti iti kathayasi.
यावनाल.english: You say jawar is healthy food.

सिताशर्करा.devanagari: सिताशर्करायाः वर्ण: श्वेत:। The color of Sugar is white.

सिताशर्करा.english: Where do you want to buy sugar?

श्यामाक.devanagari: प्रातः कृपया श्यामाकेन निर्मितम् ओदनं खादतु। Please eat black millet porridge in the morning.

श्यामाक.english: Black millet is a nutritious grain.
The farmer used to sow black millet in the field.
When did you eat black millet?
Where is black millet found? - It is found in the market.

कोद्रवकबल.devanagari: कोद्रवकबले आरोग्यवर्धकतत्वानि सन्ति। In ragi grain immunity boosting nutrients are there.

कोद्रवकबल.english: Ragi grain is filled with nutritious elements.

कोद्रवकबल.devanagari: पुरा अस्माकं दादाः कोद्रवकबलं खादन्ति स्म।
कोद्रवकबल.transliteration: purā asmākaṁ dādāḥ kodravakabalaṁ khādanti sma.
कोद्रवकबल.english: In the past, our grandfathers used to eat ragi grain.
Do you know the taste of ragi grain?

कोद्रवकबल.devanagari: भो! कोद्रवकबलेन रोटिः निर्मिता स्वादिष्टा भवति।
कोद्रवकबल.transliteration: bho! kodravakabelena rotiḥ nirmitā svādiṣṭā bhavati.
कोद्रवकबल.english: Hey! Bread made from ragi grain becomes very delicious.

तिक्ता.devanagari: निम्बपत्रं तिक्तम् अस्ति। Neem leaf is bitter.

तिक्ता.english: This medicine contains a bitter taste.

तिक्ता.devanagari: अरे, यह तिक्तं खाद्यम् मा खाद।
तिक्ता.transliteration: Are, yah tikataṃ khādyam mā khād.
तिक्ता.english: Hey, don't eat this bitter food.

मधुरा.devanagari: आम्रं मधुरम् अस्ति। Mango is sweet.

मधुरा.english: The girl sang a sweet song.

आम्रफल.english: I bought mangoes at the market.

अम्ल.devanagari: जम्बीरम् आम्लम् आस्ति। Lemon is sour.

अम्ल.english: These sour fruits are not sweet.

कटु.devanagari: मरीचिका कटुः अस्ति। Chilli is hot.

मकाय.devanagari: अहं मकायः पश्यामि। भवान् अपि पश्यति?
मकाय.transliteration: ahaṁ makāyaḥ paśyāmi. bhavān api paśyati?
मकाय.english: I see maize. Do you also see it?

लवणा.devanagari: रसः लवणः अस्ति। Juice is salty
हे मित्र! यह दही लवणा अस्ति। किं त्वं पीत्वा इच्छसि?
लवणा.transliteration: he mitra! yah dahī lavanā asti. kiṁ tvaṁ pītvā ichchhasi?
लवणा.english: Hey friend! This yogurt is salty. Do you want to drink it?

अम्ला.devanagari: जम्बीरम् आम्लम् आस्ति। Lemon is sour.
अयम् आम्लः दही सह रुचिरः भवति।
अम्ला.transliteration: ayam āmlah dahī saha ruchirah bhavati.
अम्ला.english: This sour one tastes nice with yogurt.

तिक्त.devanagari: निम्बपत्रं तिक्तम् अस्ति। Neem leaf is bitter.
अरे! यह जलं कदा तिक्तं आभवत्?
तिक्त.transliteration: are! yah jalaм kada tikta ābhavat?
तिक्त.english: Oh! When did this water become bitter?

चणकचूर्ण.english: Besan is useful in making laddus.
Mother made a dish with besan.
Do you want to buy besan?

चणकचूर्ण.devanagari: हे, चणकचूर्णम् कुत्र मिलति? — बाजारे मिलति।
चणकचूर्ण.transliteration: he, chanakaChūrṇam kutra milati? — bāzāre milati.
चणकचूर्ण.english: Hey, where is besan found? — It is found in the market.

आढ़की.english: Arhar dal is beneficial for health.
Mother cooks arhar dal in the kitchen.

आढ़की.devanagari: अहं कल आढ़कीदालं क्रेतुं बाजारं गतवान्।
आढ़की.transliteration: Ahaṁ kala āḍhakīdālaṁ kretuṁ bāzāraṁ gatavān.
आढ़की.english: I went to the market yesterday to buy arhar dal.
How much arhar dal is there in your house?

आढ़की.devanagari: भोः, आढ़कीदालः कुत्र विक्रीयते? - अत्र विक्रीयते।
आढ़की.transliteration: Bhoḥ, āḍhakīdālaḥ kutra vikrīyate? - Atra vikrīyate.
आढ़की.english: Excuse me, where is arhar dal sold? - It is sold here.

गुड.english: She mostly uses jaggary while cooking.
Jaggary is necessary to make sweet food.
Previously, the merchant sold jaggary in the market.

गुड.devanagari: किं त्वं गुडस्य स्वादं ज्ञातवान् एषः?
गुड.transliteration: kiṁ tvaṁ guḍasya svādasṁ jñātavān eṣaḥ?
गुड.english: Do you know the taste of this jaggary?

गुड.devanagari: अरे, मह्यं गुडं क्षिपतु! पायसं निर्मातुं इच्छामि।
गुड.transliteration: are, mahyaṁ guḍaṁ kṣipatu! pāyasaṁ nirmātuṁ ichhāmi.
गुड.english: Hey, pass me the jaggary! I want to make payasa.

प्रियङ्गु.english: The farmer sows bajra in the field.
The housewife ground the bajra and made flour.
Does bajra yield well in the summer?

प्रियङ्गु.devanagari: भ्राते, अहं प्रियङ्गु: खादितुम् इच्छामि। त्वं किम् आनयसि?
प्रियङ्गु.transliteration: bhrāte, ahaṁ priyaṅgu: khāditum ichhāmi. tvaṁ kim ānayasi?
प्रियङ्गु.english: Brother, I want to eat bajra. Will you bring it?

मसूर.english: Masoor dal is a nutritious food.

मसूर.devanagari: अहं कल मसूरं क्रेतुं बाजारे गच्छामि।
मसूर.transliteration: ahaṁ kala masūraṁ kretuṁ bāzāre gacchāmi.
मसूर.english: I will go to the market tomorrow to buy masoor dal.

मसूर.devanagari: मसूरः गृहे सुलभः इति मेधा अकथयत्।
मसूर.transliteration: masūraḥ gṛhe sulabhaḥ iti medhā akathayat.
मसूर.english: Medha said that masoor dal is easily available at home.

कालिन्द.devanagari: कालिन्दस्य खण्डानि स्थालिकायाम् सन्ति। Water melon pieces are in the plate.

प्रबदर.devanagari: प्रायः प्रबदरं रक्तं भवति। Often cherry fruit is red.

प्रबदर.english: When did I eat the cherry?

कपित्थ.devanagari: कपित्थं गणेशाय रोचते । Ganesha likes wood apple .

कपित्थ.english: Wood apple is a sweet fruit.
Do you see a wood apple?

कपित्थ.devanagari: भोः! यह कपित्थम् कुत्र मिलितुम् शक्नोति?
कपित्थ.transliteration: Bhoh! Yah kapittham kutra militum shaknoti?
कपित्थ.english: Hey! Where can one find wood apples?

सेवफल.english: The apple is red in color.
The girl brought the apple from the tree.
Do you wish to drink the apple juice?

कलिङ्ग.english: In summer, everyone likes water melon.

कलिङ्ग.devanagari: भोः, कलिङ्गं आनय इति मे निवेदनम्।
कलिङ्ग.transliteration: bhoḥ, kaliṅgaṁ ānaya iti me nivedanam.
कलिङ्ग.english: Please, bring the watermelon, I request.

सीताफल.devanagari: सीताफले बीजानि भवन्ति। In custard-apple seeds are there

सीताफल.english: Do you see the custard apple?

सीताफल.devanagari: भवान् सीताफलम् आनयतु। बहु रुचिकरम् भविष्यति।
सीताफल.transliteration: bhavān sītāphalam ānayatu. bahu ruchikaram bhavişyati.
सीताफल.english: Please bring the custard apple. It will be very delicious.

जम्बीरफल.english: He brought a lemon from the market.
Do you want to eat a lemon?

अञ्जीर.devanagari: बालक: अञ्जीरं खादति । Boy is eating fig.

अञ्जीर.english: Mother bought figs at the market.
Do you want to eat figs?
Are there figs in your house?

नारङ्ग.english: Hey! The oranges here are very delicious.

द्राक्षा.devanagari: द्राक्षा बालकेभ्यः अतिरोचते। Boys are fond of grapes.

अनास.english: The pineapple grows on the tree.

प्रियालु.devanagari: बालिका प्रियालुं खादति। The girl eats apricot.

प्रियालु.english: Ram bought an apricot at the market.
Hey, how much does this apricot cost?

पनस.devanagari: पनसफलं वृक्षे वर्धते। Jackfruit grows in tree.

पनस.english: They brought jackfruits to the house.

पनस.devanagari: पनसानि कोष्ठे सन्ति। खलु मञ्जूषायां पनसानि आयात।
पनस.transliteration: panasāni koṣṭhe santi. khalu mañjūṣāyāṃ panasāni āyāta.
पनस.english: The jackfruits are in the basket. Please bring the jackfruits in the box.

नारिकेल.english: Coconut is necessary in the dish.
He cultivated coconut in the field.

खर्बूज.devanagari: स: खर्बूजम् क्रीणाति। He buys musk melon

खर्बूज.english: Hey! Bring the musk melon. Please.

जम्बुफल.devanagari: जम्बुफलम् तत्र अस्ति। Rose apple is there.

जम्बुफल.english: Do you see the rose apple?
Brother, bring the rose apples home.

कन्दमूल.devanagari: कन्दमूलस्य रुचि: मधुरः भवति। Sweet potato tastes sweet.

कन्दमूल.english: Sweet potatoes grow in the field.
I ate sweet potato for food.
Do you wish to eat sweet potato?
Hey friend! Bring sweet potato home.

आर्द्रालु.devanagari: आर्द्रालुनः वर्ण: केसर:। Peach is orange in color.

खण्डकालुक.devanagari: जननी खण्डकालुकम् कर्तयति। Mother is cutting the sweet potato.

खण्डकालुक.english: The farmer brought the sweet potato from the field.
Do you (feminine) want to eat the sweet potato?
Hey! Where is the sweet potato?

बदरीफल.devanagari: रमा बदरीफलानि खादति। Rama is eating berries.

बदरीफल.english: Sita brought berries from the forest.

बदरीफल.devanagari: हे! यह बदरीफलम् मेरे लिए दीयताम्।
बदरीफल.transliteration: he! yah badārīphalam mere lie dīyatām.

आमलक.devanagari: आमलकस्य रुचि: आम्लः। Indian gooseberry tastes sour.

आमलक.english: When did I eat Indian gooseberry?
Indian gooseberries were fruiting on the tree.
Do you wish to see the Indian gooseberry?

लिचिका.devanagari: रमा लीचिकां खादति। Rama eats Lychee.

लिचिका.english: This lychee is not like a banana.

दाडिम.devanagari: दाडिमस्य रसः मधुरः भवति। Pomegranate juice is sweet.

दाडिम.english: The pomegranate is a fruit of red color.

दाडिम.devanagari: हे मित्र! दाडिमस्य बीजानि खट्वानि सन्ति।
दाडिम.transliteration: he mitra! dāḍimasya bījāni khaṭvāni santi.
दाडिम.english: Hey friend! The seeds of the pomegranate are sour.

सपोटा.english: Hey! Sapodilla fruits are sold here.

विल्व.devanagari: पक्वविल्वफलं रुचिकरं भवति। Ripe stone-apple is tasty

विल्व.english: The stone apple bears fruit on the tree.
Do you know about the stone apple?

विल्व.devanagari: अयं विल्वः बहु स्वादु अस्ति, न खलु?
विल्व.transliteration: Ayam vil­vaḥ bahu svādu asti, na khalu?
विल्व.english: This stone apple is quite tasty, isn't it?

वृत्तकर्कटी.devanagari: वृत्तकर्कट्य: सर्वत्र लभ्यन्ते। Musk melons are available everywhere.

वृत्तकर्कटी.english: When did I eat the musk melon?
In which market are musk melons sold?
Hey, bring the musk melon to the game.

बिल्व.devanagari: पुरुष: बिल्वफलरसं पिबति। Man is drinking the juice of stone apple.

बिल्व.english: The stone apple hangs on the tree.
Do you wish to eat the stone apple?

बिल्व.devanagari: अयं बिल्वफल: मधुर: अस्ति। हाँ, इदम् अतीव स्वादु।
बिल्व.transliteration: ayam bilvaphal: madhuraḥ asti. Hāṁ, idam atīv svādu.
बिल्व.english: This stone apple is sweet. Yes, it is very tasty.

तोयफला.devanagari: जनक: तोयफला: क्रीणाति। Father is buying musk melons.

तोयफला.english: Mother smells the fragrance of the musk melons.
The boy ate a musk melon yesterday.
Are musk melons available in the market?

तोयफला.devanagari: अरे! यम् तोयफलम् अतीव मधुरम्। वयम् अपि खादिष्यामः।
तोयफला.transliteration: are! yam toyaphalam atīv madhuram। vayam api khādiṣyāmaḥ।
तोयफला.english: Hey! This musk melon is very sweet. We will eat it too.

इक्षु.devanagari: इक्षुरसः मधुरः भवति। Sugarcane juice is sweet

इक्षु.english: The farmer harvests sugarcane in the rainy season.
The sugarcane was kept in the kitchen at home.
When do you want to buy sugarcane?

इक्षु.devanagari: इक्षुः अत्र उत्तमः अस्ति। किं भवान् पि इच्छति?
इक्षु.transliteration: ikṣuh atra uttamah asti. kiṁ bhavān pi icchati?
इक्षु.english: The sugarcane here is excellent. Do you want some too?

काफी-उत्पीठिका.devanagari: सुन्दरी काफी-उत्पीठिका अस्ति। Beautiful coffee table is there.

काफी-उत्पीठिका.english: The coffee table is in the room.
I sit near the coffee table.

अमृतफल.devanagari: राम: अमृतफलं क्रीणाति। Ram is buying guava.

तिन्तिडीका.devanagari: तिन्तिडीकानि वृक्षे सन्ति। Tamarinds are there in the tree.

पेरुक.devanagari: पेरुकस्य मूल्यं किम् ? How much is the cost of guava?

पेरुक.english: When did I eat the guava?
The guavas grew on the tree.

ताल.devanagari: स: तालस्य रसं पीबति। He is drinking palm juice.

ताल.english: The palm tree is a large tree.
Rama collected the fruits of the palm tree.
Do you know the palm tree?
I dwell in the shade of the palm tree.

उत्पीठक.devanagari: उत्पीठकः वामनः अस्ति। The stool is short.

उत्पीठक.english: The stool is in the classroom.
I was sitting on the stool.
Is the stool in the house?

उत्पीठक.devanagari: भोः, उत्पीठकः कुत्र अस्ति? मह्यम् उत्पीठकः चाहिए।
उत्पीठक.transliteration: bhoḥ, utpīṭhakaḥ kutra asti? mahyam utpīṭhakaḥ chāhie.
उत्पीठक.english: Hey, where is the stool? I need the stool.

आसन्दी.devanagari: मातामही आसन्दे उपविशति। Grandmother sits on the chair.

आसन्दी.english: The boy is seen on the chair.

आसन्दी.devanagari: आसन्दी सुंदरा अस्ति। त्वं अपि उपविशतु।
आसन्दी.transliteration: Āsandī sundarā asti. Tvã api upaviśatu.
आसन्दी.english: The chair is beautiful. You also sit down.

एलाफल.devanagari: एलाफलानि मधुराणि सन्ति। Litchies are sweet.

एलाफल.english: The litchi is red in color.

आसन्द.devanagari: मातामही आसन्दे उपविशति। Grandmother sits on the chair.

आसन्द.english: The boy sits on the chair.
Is the chair in the classroom?

तिन्तिडीक.devanagari: तिन्तिडीकानि वृक्षे सन्ति। Tamarinds are there in the tree.
हे मित्र! तिन्तिडीकः स्वादिष्टः अस्ति न?
तिन्तिडीक.transliteration: he mitra! tintidīkaḥ svādiṣṭaḥ asti na?
तिन्तिडीक.english: Hey friend! Tamarind is tasty, isn't it?

करमर्दक.devanagari: करमर्दकानि तत्र सन्ति। Bengal currents are there.

करमर्दक.english: The Bengal Current flows in the ocean.
The Bengal Current brought warm water in the past.
Is the Bengal Current near India?

करमर्दक.devanagari: अरे, करमर्दकं पश्यसि? हाँ, तत् अत्र दृश्यते।
करमर्दक.transliteration: are, karamardakaṁ paśyasi? hāñ, tat atra dṛśyate.
करमर्दक.english: Hey, do you see the Bengal Current? Yes, it is visible here.

अक्षोट.devanagari: अक्षोट: वृक्षात् पतति। Walnut falls from the tree.
हे मित्र! अक्षोटान् मह्यम् दातुम् इच्छसि किम्?
अक्षोट.transliteration: he mitra! akṣoṭān mahyam dātum ichhasi kim?
अक्षोट.english: Hey friend! Do you want to give me walnuts?

तिन्दुक.devanagari: तिन्दुकानि कंडोले सन्ति। Indian Persimmons are in the basket.

तिन्दुक.english: The Indian Persimmon is a sweet fruit.
We ate Indian Persimmons in the garden yesterday.
Do you see the Indian Persimmon?

तिन्दुक.devanagari: अये! तिन्दुकस्य रसः कति सुस्वादुः आसीत्।
तिन्दुक.transliteration: aye! tindukasya rasaḥ kati susvāduḥ āsīt.
तिन्दुक.english: Oh! The taste of that Indian Persimmon was so delicious.

द्राक्षागुच्छ.devanagari: एषः द्राक्षागुच्छः अस्ति। This is the bunch of grapes.

द्राक्षागुच्छ.english: The bunch of grapes is sweet.
We ate the bunch of grapes.
Was the bunch of grapes on the tree?

द्राक्षागुच्छ.devanagari: भो! द्राक्षागुच्छः कुत्र अस्ति? मैं ढूंढ रहा हूँ।
द्राक्षागुच्छ.english: Hey! Where is the bunch of grapes? I am looking for it.

इङ्गुद.devanagari: इङ्गुदे औषधियगुणानि सन्ति। Medicinal qualities are there in the Indian almond.

इङ्गुद.english: The fruits of the Indian almond are sweet.

इङ्गुद.devanagari: वयं कदा इङ्गुदं वृक्षं दृष्टवान् स्मः।
इङ्गुद.transliteration: Vayaṁ kadā iṅgudasaṁ vṛkṣaṁ dṛṣṭavān smaḥ.
इङ्गुद.english: When did we see the Indian almond tree?
He sat in the shade of the Indian almond.

इङ्गुद.devanagari: भो! किं त्वं इङ्गुदस्य बीजानि खादितवान्?
इङ्गुद.transliteration: Bho! Kiṁ tvam iṅgudasya bījāni khāditavān?
इङ्गुद.english: Hey! Have you eaten the seeds of the Indian almond?

सुखासन.devanagari: सुखासनम् सौख्यकारी अस्ति। Easychair is comfortable.

सुखासन.english: The easy chair is placed in the room.
She was sitting on the easy chair.

सुखासन्द.devanagari: सुखासन्दः विशालः अस्ति। The sofa is big.

सुखासन्द.english: The sofa was in the room.

प्रेङ्खा.devanagari: प्रेङ्खायां शिशुः अस्ति। Child is in the cradle.

पर्यङ्क.devanagari: पर्यङ्के पितामहः शेते। Grandfather is sleeping on bed.

पर्यङ्क.english: The girl was sitting on the couch.
Is the bed in the room?
I want to sleep on the bed.

वस्तुदानी.devanagari: वस्तुदान्यां वस्तूनि सन्ति। Items are there in the bero.

वस्तुदानी.english: The farmer kept grain in the bero.
My book is in the bero. Yours?

दोला.english: Let us be rocking in the swing.
The girl plays on the swing.
Do you wish to play on the swing?
Come, let us play together on the swing.

धनपेटिका.devanagari: धनपेटिकायां धनम् अस्ति। Money is in the Money locker.

धनपेटिका.english: The money locker is very strong.
Where is the money locker located?
Will you give me the key to the money locker?

त्रिभुज.devanagari: मापिकायाः साहाय्येन एकं त्रिभुजं रचयतु। Draw a triangle with the help of a scale.

त्रिभुज.english: The boy drew a triangle on paper.
How many angles does a triangle have?

त्रिभुज.devanagari: भो! किं त्वं त्रिभुजं बोद्धुं शक्नोषि?
त्रिभुज.transliteration: bho! kiṁ tvá tribhujaṁ boddhtuṁ śaknośi?
त्रिभुज.english: Hey! Can you understand the triangle?

शय्या.devanagari: प्रकोष्टे महती शय्या अस्ति। In a room there is a heavy bed.

शय्या.english: The girl sleeps comfortably on the bed.
I left the bed in the morning.

उत्पीठिका.devanagari: तत्र उत्पीठिका अस्ति। There is a table.

उत्पीठिका.english: There was a book on whose table?
I do work at this table.

आयतचतुरस्र.devanagari: क्रीडाङ्गनस्य आकारः आयतचतुरस्रम्। The shape of the playground is rectangle.

आयतचतुरस्र.english: The teacher drew a rectangle on the blackboard.

आयतचतुरस्र.devanagari: भोः! किं भवान् आयतचतुरस्रस्य परिमिति जानाति?
आयतचतुरस्र.transliteration: bhoḥ! kiṁ bhavān āyatachaturasrasya parimiti jānāti?
आयतचतुरस्र.english: Hey! Do you know the perimeter of the rectangle?

आकार.devanagari: शिशूनां चाकलेहाः विविधाकारैः निर्मिताः सन्ति। Children’s chocolates are made of different shapes.
मेरे खेलौनेस्य आकारः त्रिकोणाकारः अस्ति, तव खेलौनेस्य आकारः किम्?
आकार.transliteration: mere khelonanesya ākarāh trikohṇākarāh asti, tava khelonanesya ākarāh kim?
आकार.english: My toy's shape is triangular, what about your toy's shape?

समचुरस्र.devanagari: चतुरस्रस्य चत्वारः अस्राः सन्ति। There are four angles/corners in square.

समचुरस्र.english: A square is drawn on white paper.
The boy drew a square with a pen.

समचुरस्र.devanagari: किं चुरस्रस्य सर्वाः भुजाः समाः सन्ति?
समचुरस्र.transliteration: Kim churasrasya sarvāh bhujāh samāh santi?
समचुरस्र.english: Are all sides of a square equal?

समचुरस्र.devanagari: भो! एषा चुरस्रः कति भुजाभिः निर्मितः?
समचुरस्र.transliteration: Bho! Eṣā churasrah kati bhujābhih nirmitah?
समचुरस्र.english: Hey! How many sides is this square made of?

रेखा.devanagari: रेखां रचयितुं मापिका आवश्यकी। Scale is necessary to draw a line.

रेखा.english: The teacher drew a line on the blackboard.

रेखा.devanagari: किं त्वं इमां रेखां दृष्टवान् असि?
रेखा.transliteration: kiṁ tvāṁ imāṁ rekhāṁ dṛṣṭavān asi?

रेखा.english: Hey! What is the name of this line?

वृत्ति.devanagari: वर्तुलस्य वृत्तिः 2πr। The circumference of a circle is 2 pi r.
इस वर्तुलस्य वृत्तिः पंचविंशति सेंटीमीटर अस्ति।
वृत्ति.transliteration: isa vartulasya vṛttiḥ pañcaviṃśati sentiimitar asti.
वृत्ति.english: This circle's circumference is twenty-five centimeters.
In mathematics, the circumference was important.
How will you calculate the circumference?

वृत्ति.devanagari: अहं वृत्तिं मापयामि, त्वं सूत्रं स्मरसि खलु?
वृत्ति.transliteration: ahaṃ vṛttiṃ māpayāmi, tvaṃ sūtraṃ smarasι khalu?
वृत्ति.english: I am measuring the circumference; do you remember the formula?

नायिका.english: Does the leader read a book?

नायक.english: The leader lives in the city.
Oh leader! Where are you going?

सभा.devanagari: सभायां मन्त्रिणः सन्ति। Ministers are there in the assembly.

सभा.english: The king speaks in the assembly.
All citizens were in the assembly.
You are going to the assembly, indeed.

सचिव.devanagari: कार्यक्रमे सचिवः आगच्छति। Minister is coming to the program.

सचिव.english: The minister went to the kingdom yesterday.
Is the minister staying at home?

आधिपत्य.devanagari: नेतारः आधिपत्यम् विदधाति। Leaders establish power.

आधिपत्य.english: O King, power must be protected.

नेतृ.devanagari: भवतः देशस्य नेता कः? Who is the leader of your country?
रामः हमारे गांव का नेता है।
नेतृ.transliteration: Rāmaḥ hamāre gāṁv kā netā hai.
नेतृ.english: Ram is the leader of our village.

नेतृ.devanagari: प्राचीन काले में अशोक एक महान नेता था।
नेतृ.transliteration: Prāchīn kāle meṁ Ashok ek mahān netā thā.
नेतृ.english: In ancient times, Ashoka was a great leader.

नेतृ.devanagari: कौन व्यक्ति इस संस्था का नेता बनेगा?
नेतृ.transliteration: Kaun vyakti is sṁsthā kā netā benegā?
नेतृ.english: Who will become the leader of this organization?

नेतृ.devanagari: हाँ, वह एक बहुत अच्छा नेता है। उसे सब लोग मानते हैं।
नेतृ.transliteration: Hāṁ, vah ek bahut achhā netā hai. Use sab log mānte haiṁ.
नेतृ.english: Yes, he is a very good leader. Everyone respects him.

कार्मिक.devanagari: मम मित्रं कार्मिकसंस्थायां अस्ति। My friend is in personnel department.

कार्मिक.english: The worker does work in the office.

कार्मिक.devanagari: कार्मिकाः कल कार्यं समाप्तं कुर्वन्ति स्म।
कार्मिक.transliteration: kārmikāḥ kal kāryaṁ samāptaṁ kurvanti sma.
कार्मिक.english: The workers completed the work yesterday.

मन्त्रिन्.devanagari: भारतस्य वित्तमन्त्रिणी निर्मला सीतारामन्वर्या  अस्ति। Inida's Finance Minister is Nirmala Sitaraman ji.

मन्त्रिन्.english: The minister gives a speech in the assembly.
The ministers made a decision yesterday.
I am sending a letter to the minister.

मन्त्रिणी.devanagari: भारतस्य वित्तमन्त्रिणी निर्मला सीतारामन्वर्या  अस्ति। Inida's Finance Minister is Nirmala Sitaraman ji.

मन्त्रिणी.english: The Minister speaks in the assembly.
The Minister made a decision yesterday.
Will the Minister accept the policy?

कार्मिकी.devanagari: मम मित्रं कार्मिकसंस्थायां अस्ति। My friend is in personnel department.

कार्मिकी.english: She, the worker, does work in the office.
The worker completed her work yesterday.
Sir, where is the worker going?

नेत्री.devanagari: भवतः देशस्य नेता कः? Who is the leader of your country?
सा नेत्री विद्यालयस्य छात्राः नेतृत्वं करोति।
नेत्री.transliteration: sā netri vidyālayasya chātrāḥ netritvaṁ karoti.
नेत्री.english: She, the leader, guides the students of the school.

नेत्री.devanagari: तस्या नेत्र्या नेतृत्वे हम सफलाः अभवाम।
नेत्री.transliteration: tasyā netrya netritva hama saphalāḥ abhavām.
नेत्री.english: Under her leadership, we were successful.

नेत्री.devanagari: किम् भवती इस दलस्य नेत्री अस्ति?
नेत्री.transliteration: kim bhavati isa dalasya netri asti?
नेत्री.english: Are you the leader of this group?

नेत्री.devanagari: हे नेत्री! त्वं कस्य संस्थायाः नेतृत्वं करोसि?
नेत्री.transliteration: he netri! tvaṁ kasya saṁsthāyāḥ netritvaṁ karosi?
नेत्री.english: Oh leader! Which organization do you lead?

प्रधानमन्त्रिन्.devanagari: अस्माकं देशस्य प्रधानमन्त्री नरेन्द्रमोदी वर्यः। Our country's Prime Minister is Narendra Modi ji.

प्रधानमन्त्रिन्.english: The Prime Minister gave a speech in the assembly.
Who will be the Prime Minister next year?
The Prime Minister is leaving today for a national tour.
Hey, where is the Prime Minister?

नृप.devanagari: नृपः कः? Who is the king?

नृप.english: The king is fond of justice.
The king went to lead the army.

नृप.devanagari: नृपः अत्र आगतः। नरहा, नृपः कुशलः अस्ति।
नृप.transliteration: nṛpaḥ atra āgataḥ. narahā, nṛpaḥ kushalḥ asti.
नृप.english: The king has come here. Yes, the king is well.

वित्ता.devanagari: वित्तविभागः गरिष्ठः विभागः। Finance Ministry is an important branch.

वित्ता.english: Hey! What will become of our finance?

वित्त.devanagari: वित्तविभागः गरिष्ठः विभागः। Finance Ministry is an important branch.

वित्त.english: Last year, the finances gained growth.

संसद्.devanagari: संसदि ग्रीष्मकालिनं सत्रम् आरब्धम्। Summer session has started in the Parliament.

संसद्.english: New members were elected in the Parliament.
What topic is being discussed in Parliament today?
Important decisions are made in the Parliament.
Do you wish to visit the Parliament?

प्रजाप्रभुत्व.devanagari: भाारतदेशे प्रजाप्रभुत्वमस्ति। In India there is democracy.

प्रजाप्रभुत्व.english: In ancient India there was no democracy.
Is democracy the best system of government?

रक्षा.devanagari: रक्षाशाखामन्त्री राजनाथसिंहः अस्ति। Rajnath Singh is Defence Minister.
पुरातने काले नगरस्य रक्षा दुर्गेण आसीत्।
रक्षा.transliteration: Purātane kāle nagarasya rakṣā durgeṇa āsīt.
रक्षा.english: In ancient times, the fort was the city's defence.

रक्षा.devanagari: किं त्वं राष्ट्रस्य रक्षायै तैयारः असि?
रक्षा.transliteration: Kiṁ tvam rāṣṭrasya rakṣāyai taiyāraḥ asi?
रक्षा.english: Are you ready for the nation's defence?
I understand the importance of defence.

प्रधानमन्त्रिणी.devanagari: अस्माकं देशस्य प्रधानमन्त्री नरेन्द्रमोदी वर्यः। Our country's Prime Minister is Narendra Modi ji.

प्रधानमन्त्रिणी.english: The Prime Minister gives a speech in the assembly.
The Prime Minister created a policy last year.
Has the Prime Minister come to the office?
Sir, when will the Prime Minister's meeting happen?

नीति.devanagari: मम पिता नीत्यायोगे अध्यापकः आसीत्। My father was a professor in political science department.

नीति.english: Political science is the foundation of the state.
In ancient times, the great sages used to teach political science.
How do you study political science?

नीति.devanagari: अरे, नीतिः कठिना विषया वर्तते इति मन्ये।
नीति.transliteration: Are, nītiḥ kaṭhinā viṣayā vartate iti manye.
नीति.english: Hey, I think political science is a difficult subject.

निवृत्तिवेतन.devanagari: मम निवर्तिवेतनम् आगतम्। My pension has come.

निवृत्तिवेतन.english: How many rupees was your (feminine) pension?

निवृत्तिवेतन.devanagari: अरे, मम निवृत्तिवेतनम् अद्य न आगतम्।
निवृत्तिवेतन.transliteration: are, mam nivṛttiveтanam adya na āgатam.
निवृत्तिवेतन.english: Hey, my pension hasn't come today.

जनजातीय.devanagari: जनजातीयानां समुदायानां विकासार्थं शासनानि रचनीयानि। Rules must be formed for the development of the tribal community.

जनजातीय.english: The tribal person lives in the forest.
The tribal tradition was very ancient.
Do you know about tribal culture?

जनजातीय.devanagari: हे मित्र! जनजातीयः कलाकारः अत्यन्तं कुशलः अस्ति।
जनजातीय.transliteration: he mitra! janjātīyaḥ kalākāraḥ atyantaṃ kusalaḥ asti.
जनजातीय.english: O friend! The tribal artist is very skilled.

सार्वजनिक.devanagari: निर्वचनं सार्वजनिकः विषयः अस्ति। Election is public matter.
सार्वजनिकः पुस्तकालयः सर्वेषां जनानां कृते उपलब्धः अस्ति।
सार्वजनिक.transliteration: sārvajanikaḥ pustakālayaḥ sarveṣāṃ janānāṃ kṛte uplabdhaḥ asti.
सार्वजनिक.english: The public library is available for all people.
Yesterday, there was a public meeting in the city.
We both want to go to the public garden.

जनजातीया.devanagari: जनजातीयानां समुदायानां विकासार्थं शासनानि रचनीयानि। Rules must be formed for the development of the tribal community.

जनजातीया.english: The tribal person lives in the forest.
The tribal women practiced traditional art.
How many tribal people come here?
Do you know about tribal culture?

आयव्यय.devanagari: गतमासस्य आयव्ययः अतिक्रान्तः। Last month's budget exceeded.

आयव्यय.english: This year's budget is five hundred thousand rupees.
It is necessary to approve the household budget.
Which department has the largest budget?
Sir! Please show me the budget report.

विभाग.devanagari: अहं परमाणूर्जाविभागे कार्यं कृतवती। I worked in Department of Atomic Energy.

विभाग.english: The Education Department announces a new policy.
In which department do you work?
The head of the Commerce Department conducted a meeting yesterday.
Sir, where should the application be submitted to the Health Department?

सार्वजनिकी.devanagari: निर्वचनं सार्वजनिकः विषयः अस्ति। Election is public matter.
सार्वजनिकी पुस्तकालयः सर्वेषां जनानां कृते उपलब्धः अस्ति।
सार्वजनिकी.transliteration: sārvajnikī pustakālayaḥ sarveṣāṃ janānāṃ kṛte uplabdhah asti.
सार्वजनिकी.english: The public library is available for all people.
Yesterday there was a public function in the building.
Is the public bathing ghat near the river?

सार्वजनिकी.devanagari: हे मित्र! अयं सार्वजनिकः उद्यानः अतीव रमणीयः अस्ति न?
सार्वजनिकी.transliteration: he mitra! ayaṃ sārvajnikaḥ udyānaḥ atīva ramaṇīyaḥ asti na?
सार्वजनिकी.english: Hey friend! This public garden is very beautiful, isn't it?

संविधान.devanagari: भारतदेशस्य संविधानम् महदस्ति। The constitution of India is great.

संविधान.english: The constitution protects the rights of all citizens.
The Indian constitution was created in the year 1950.
Does the constitution determine the rules of the nation?
We follow the rules of the constitution.

कर्मन्.devanagari: अत्र कर्म किं वर्तते। What is the object here?

कर्मन्.english: I did not do the work.

वर्षीयसी.english: Since you are older, what will you do then?

ज्यायसी.devanagari: भवान् ज्यायसी भ्राता अस्ति, न किम्?
ज्यायसी.transliteration: bhavān jyāyasī bhrātā asti, na kim?
ज्यायसी.english: You are the older brother, aren't you?

ज्यायस्.english: The older man came to the house.

ज्यायस्.devanagari: भ्रातः, त्वम् ज्यायान् असि च अहम् कनीयान् अस्मि।
ज्यायस्.transliteration: bhrātaḥ, tvam jyāyān asi ca aham kanīyān asmi.
ज्यायस्.english: Brother, you are older and I am younger.

बलिष्ठ.english: The lion is the strongest animal of the forest.
This warrior was the strongest of the army.
Who is the strongest hero in the kingdom?
I think you are the strongest, friend.

गरिष्ठ.devanagari: ग्रहेषु वृहस्पतिग्रहः गरिष्ठः। Jupiter is the heaviest among other planets.

गरिष्ठ.english: The body of an elephant is the heaviest.
The brick was heavier than iron.

गरिष्ठ.devanagari: भोः, इदं पुस्तकं गरिष्ठं न भवति।
गरिष्ठ.transliteration: bhoh, idam pustakam garisthham na bhavati.
गरिष्ठ.english: Hey, this book is not the heaviest.

गरीयस्.devanagari: पृथ्वीबृहस्पतिग्रहयोः बृहस्पतिग्रहः गरीयान्। Among earth and jupiter, Jupiter is heavier.

गरीयस्.english: Which stone was heavier than water?
Is this book heavier than that book?

वर्षीयस्.devanagari: भवान् वर्षीयान् अस्ति, अतः आप्नः कथाः श्रृणोमि।
वर्षीयस्.transliteration: bhavān varṣīyān asti, ataḥ āpnaḥ kathāḥ śṛṇomi.
वर्षीयस्.english: You are older, therefore I listen to your words.

बलिष्ठा.english: The elephant is the strongest among animals.
That warrior was the strongest in the army.
Who is the strongest king in this country?

बलिष्ठा.devanagari: भव, त्वं बलिष्ठः छात्रः इह विद्यालये।
बलिष्ठा.transliteration: bhava, tvaṁ baliṣṭhaḥ chātrah iha vidyālaye.
बलिष्ठा.english: Listen, you are the strongest student in this school.

विशेषण.devanagari: विशेषणं किम्? What is the adjective?

विशेषण.english: The teacher taught adjectives to the students.
How many adjectives are in the lesson?

विशेषण.devanagari: त्वं विशेषणं समझसि इति आशा करामि।
विशेषण.transliteration: tvaṁ viśeṣaṇaṁ samjhasi iti āśā karāmi.
विशेषण.english: I hope you understand the adjective.

गरीयसी.devanagari: पृथ्वीबृहस्पतिग्रहयोः बृहस्पतिग्रहः गरीयान्। Among earth and jupiter, Jupiter is heavier.

गरीयसी.english: This stone was heavier than that.
Will this load become heavier than that?

गरीयसी.devanagari: भोः, यह भाण्डः अत्यन्त गरीयसी अस्ति न?
गरीयसी.transliteration: bhoḥ, yah bhāṇḍaḥ atyanta garīyasī asti na?
गरीयसी.english: Hey, this vessel is quite heavy, isn't it?

अन्तरिक्ष.devanagari: प्रधानमन्त्री अन्तरिक्षविभागमपि निर्वहति। Prime Minister looks after Department of Space also.
भवान् अन्तरिक्षं दृष्टवान् अस्ति? हाँ, मैं अन्तरिक्षतारका: पश्यामि।
अन्तरिक्ष.transliteration: bhavān antarikṣaṁ dṛṣṭavān asti? Hāñ, maiṁ antarikṣatārakā: paśyāmi.
अन्तरिक्ष.english: Have you seen space? Yes, I see stars in space.

बलीयस्.devanagari: अस्य हस्तिनः शरीरं वायसस्य शरीरात् बलीयान् अस्ति।
बलीयस्.transliteration: asya hastinah śarīram vāyasasya śarīrāt balīyān asti.
बलीयस्.english: This elephant's body is stronger than a crow's body.

बलीयस्.devanagari: तदा स योद्धा शत्रोः योद्धात् बलीयान् आसीत्।
बलीयस्.transliteration: tadā sa yoddhā śatroḥ yodddhāt balīyān āsīt.
बलीयस्.english: Then that warrior was stronger than the enemy's warrior.
Is the lion not stronger than the donkey?

बलीयस्.devanagari: भोः! अयं पाषाणः तव पाषाणात् बलीयान् इव दृश्यते।
बलीयस्.transliteration: bhoh! ayam pāṣāṇah tava pāṣāṇāt balīyān iva dṛśyate.
बलीयस्.english: Hey! This stone appears to be stronger than your stone.

गरिष्ठा.devanagari: ग्रहेषु वृहस्पतिग्रहः गरिष्ठः। Jupiter is the heaviest among other planets.
इस भारे पत्थरे गरिष्ठा शरीरस्य भाग अस्ति।
गरिष्ठा.transliteration: isa bhāre patthere garišthā śarīrasya bhāg asti.
गरिष्ठा.english: In this heavy stone, the heaviest part of the body exists.
He ate the heaviest food of that.

गरिष्ठा.devanagari: किं यह गरिष्ठा धातु सोने भारी नास्ति?
गरिष्ठा.transliteration: kiṁ yah garišthā dhātu sone bhārī nāsti?
गरिष्ठा.english: Is this heaviest metal not heavier than gold?

गरिष्ठा.devanagari: अरे, यह गरिष्ठा पदार्थ कुत्र आहृतवान्?
गरिष्ठा.transliteration: are, yah garišthā padārth kutr āhṛtavān?
गरिष्ठा.english: Hey, from where did you bring this heaviest substance?

वरीयस्.english: Is this not a greater thing?

वरीयस्.devanagari: भवान् वरीयान् विद्वान् अस्ति इति वदन्ति।
