वरीयस्.transliteration: bhavān varīyān vidvān asti iti vadanti.
वरीयस्.english: They say you are a greater scholar.

कनिष्ठा.english: Lady, here comes the youngest one.

यविष्ठा.english: The youngest girl lives in the house.
Who is the youngest among the brothers?
The youngest sister always laughs too.

कनीयस्.english: His younger son was in the house.
Hey younger one! Where are you going?

ज्येष्ठ.english: The king is the oldest son.
The oldest brother came home yesterday.
Hey, where does the oldest son live?

वर्षिष्ठा.english: She, the oldest woman, lives in the house.
The oldest man told a story.
O oldest one! Where are you going?

कनीयसी.english: The younger sister was in the house.

कनीयसी.devanagari: किं तव कनीयसी अपा विद्या करोति?
कनीयसी.transliteration: kiṃ tava kanīyasī apā vidyā karoti?

कनीयसी.english: Hey! Where did the younger daughter go?

यविष्ठ.english: Does the youngest boy go to school?
Hey! Where is the youngest brother?

कनिष्ठ.english: The youngest sister studied at school.
Who is the youngest among the brothers?

कनिष्ठ.devanagari: त्वं कनिष्ठः असि, तस्मात् गृहे रमणीयः।
कनिष्ठ.transliteration: tvaṃ kaniṣṭhaḥ asi, tasmāt gṛhe ramaṇīyaḥ.
कनिष्ठ.english: You are the youngest, therefore you play pleasantly at home.

वर्षिष्ठ.english: He is the oldest man and lives in the village.
The oldest woman told a story.
Hey oldest one, where are you going?

वरिष्ठ.english: The greatest teacher taught the students.
The greatest king comes to the city.

यवीयसी.devanagari: रामसौमित्त्र्योः सौमित्रिः यवीयान्। Lakshmana is younger than Rama.

यवीयसी.english: The sister is younger than the brother.
Are you younger than your mother?

यवीयसी.devanagari: हे पुत्र! त्वं यवीयसः खलु। तद् ध्यायस्व।
यवीयसी.transliteration: he putra! tvam yavīyasaḥ khalu. tad dhyāyasva.
यवीयसी.english: O son! You are indeed younger. Therefore, be mindful of that.

यवीयस्.devanagari: रामसौमित्त्र्योः सौमित्रिः यवीयान्। Lakshmana is younger than Rama.

यवीयस्.english: The two brothers exist, but Arjuna is younger.
Kalidasa was younger than the earlier poet.
Who is younger between you two?

यवीयस्.devanagari: त्वं यवीयान् असि, अतः सावधानो भव।
यवीयस्.transliteration: Tvam yavīyān asi, atah sāvadhāno bhava.
यवीयस्.english: You are younger, therefore be careful.

ज्येष्ठा.english: She, the oldest daughter, lives in the house.
Hey oldest one, where are you going?

श्रेेष्ठ.english: Who is the best student in this school?
May you become the best singer.

अल्पीयस्.english: Lesser virtues are in the houses of good people.

प्रेयस्.english: The mother is dearer to the brother.
This book is dearer to me than that one.

श्रेयसी.english: Is this not a better option?
Hey, what would be the better way?

वरिष्ठा.english: Who is the greatest man here?

वरिष्ठा.devanagari: भवान् वरिष्ठः विद्वान् अस्ति इति शृणोमि।
वरिष्ठा.transliteration: bhavān variṣṭhaḥ vidvān asti iti śṛṇomi.
वरिष्ठा.english: I hear that you are the greatest scholar.

प्रेयसी.english: His dearer wife was at home.

प्रेयसी.devanagari: भो! तव प्रेयसी कन्या कुत्र अस्ति?
प्रेयसी.transliteration: bho! tava preyasī kanyā kutra asti?
प्रेयसी.english: Hey! Where is your dearer daughter?

अल्पिष्ठा.english: Hey! Give me the smallest fruit.

प्रेष्ठ.english: Is this not the dearest wife?
O dearest friend, how are you?

श्रेयस्.english: He was a better student before.
Is this not better than that?

श्रेयस्.devanagari: भो मित्र! श्रेयान् मार्गः कः स्यात्?
श्रेयस्.transliteration: bho mitra! śreyān mārgaḥ kaḥ syāt?
श्रेयस्.english: O friend! Which would be the better path?

श्रेेष्ठा.english: They say you are the best singer.

प्रेष्ठा.devanagari: भो! प्रेष्ठे सखे, त्वं कुशलः किम्?
प्रेष्ठा.transliteration: bho! preṣṭhe sakhe, tvaṁ kusalaḥ kim?
प्रेष्ठा.english: Hey! Dearest friend, are you well?

अल्पीयसी.english: The price of this book is lesser.

अल्पीयसी.devanagari: तस्य धनं मेरे धनात् अल्पीयसी आसीत्।
अल्पीयसी.transliteration: tasya dhanaṁ mere dhanāt alpīyasī āsīt.
अल्पीयसी.english: His wealth was lesser than my wealth.
Is this wife of lesser importance?

अल्पीयसी.devanagari: भो, एषा कन्या अल्पीयसी परन्तु बुद्धिमती अस्ति।
अल्पीयसी.transliteration: bho, eṣā kanyā alpīyasī parantu buddhimatī asti.
अल्पीयसी.english: Hey, this girl is lesser in age but intelligent.

क्षोदीयस्.english: He is indeed a more cruel man.
Those two more cruel kings were in battle.

क्षोदीयस्.devanagari: किं तव भ्राता क्षोदीयान् न भवति?
क्षोदीयस्.transliteration: kiṁ tava bhrātā kṣodīyān na bhavati?
क्षोदीयस्.english: Is your brother not more cruel?

क्षोदीयस्.devanagari: हे मित्र, क्षोदीयानं व्यक्तिं किमर्थं भजसे?
क्षोदीयस्.transliteration: he mitra, kṣodīyānaṁ vyaktiṁ kimarthaṁ bhajase?
क्षोदीयस्.english: O friend, why do you associate with that more cruel person?

अल्पिष्ठ.devanagari: अस्य अल्पिष्ठः धनं तस्य भ्रातृणां मध्ये अस्ति।
अल्पिष्ठ.transliteration: asya alpişthah dhanam tasya bhratṛnam madhye asti.
अल्पिष्ठ.english: He has the least wealth among his brothers.
The smallest leaf fell in the forest.
Was the least fruit on the tree?
You have eaten the least food.

क्षोदीयसी.devanagari: सा क्षोदीयसी स्त्री बालकों को कष्टं ददाति।
क्षोदीयसी.transliteration: sā kṣodīyasī strī bālakān̐ kō kaṣṭaṁ dadāti.
क्षोदीयसी.english: That cruel woman causes suffering to the children.
The king was angry with the crueler maidservants.

क्षोदीयसी.devanagari: भोः! क्षोदीयसी भवा, कृपया शिशुं न पीडय।
क्षोदीयसी.transliteration: bhōḥ! kṣodīyasī bhavā, kṛpayā śiśuṁ na pīḍaya.
क्षोदीयसी.english: Hey! Don't be cruel, please do not torment the child.

क्षेपिष्ठ.english: Who is coming the quickest on the path?

क्षेपिष्ठ.devanagari: भो, क्षेपिष्ठः त्वं किमर्थं सर्वदा धावसि?
क्षेपिष्ठ.transliteration: bho, kṣepiṣṭhaḥ tvaṃ kimarthaṃ sarvadā dhāvasi?
क्षेपिष्ठ.english: Hey quickest one, why do you always run?

महिष्ठा.english: This biggest tree is in the forest.
Is this not the biggest mountain?
Hey, look at the biggest city!

क्षेपिष्ठा.english: The quickest runner won the prize.
Who was the quickest on the path?

क्षेपिष्ठा.devanagari: भवान् क्षेपिष्ठं कर्म करिष्यति इति मन्ये।
क्षेपिष्ठा.transliteration: bhavān kṣepiṣṭhaṁ karma kariṣyati iti manye.
क्षेपिष्ठा.english: I think you will do the quickest work.

महिष्ठ.english: The biggest elephant lives in the forests.
The biggest mountain touched the sky.

महिष्ठ.devanagari: कः महिष्ठः वृक्षः इमे वने वर्तते?
महिष्ठ.transliteration: kaḥ mahiṣṭhaḥ vṛkṣaḥ ime vane vartate?
महिष्ठ.english: Which is the biggest tree in this forest?
Friend, look at the biggest stone there.

प्रथीयसी.english: Is this not a larger cloth?
You used to see the larger city.

महीयस्.devanagari: यह पर्वत उस पर्वत से महीयान् अस्ति।
महीयस्.transliteration: yah parvat us parvat se mahīyān asti.
महीयस्.english: This mountain is bigger than that mountain.
The king was bigger than all the people.

महीयस्.devanagari: किम् एषः हस्ती तस्मात् महीयान् नास्ति?
महीयस्.transliteration: kim eṣaḥ hastī tasmāt mahīyān nāsti?
महीयस्.english: Is this elephant not bigger than that one?

महीयस्.devanagari: भोः, यह वृक्षः कति महीयान् आसीत्!
महीयस्.transliteration: bhoḥ, yah vṛkṣaḥ kati mahīyān āsīt!
महीयस्.english: Oh, how much bigger that tree was!

प्रथीयस्.devanagari: यह वृक्षः अन्य वृक्षात् प्रथीयान् अस्ति।
प्रथीयस्.transliteration: yah vṛkṣaḥ anya vṛkṣāt prathīyān asti.
प्रथीयस्.english: This tree is larger than the other tree.

प्रथीयस्.devanagari: भोः! अयं नदी प्रथीयान् अस्ति न?
प्रथीयस्.transliteration: bhoḥ! ayaṃ nadī prathīyān asti na?
प्रथीयस्.english: Hey! This river is larger, isn't it?

महीयसी.devanagari: भो! यह महीयसी पर्वतः कस्मिन् देशे वर्तते?
महीयसी.transliteration: bho! yah mahīyasī parvataḥ kasmin deśe vartate?
महीयसी.english: Hey! In which country is this bigger mountain located?

अणीयस्.english: The atom is smaller than the particle.

अणीयस्.devanagari: यः अणीयान् आसीत् तस्य नाम किम् आसीत्?
अणीयस्.transliteration: yaḥ aṇīyān āsīt tasya nāma kim āsīt?
अणीयस्.english: What was the name of that which was smaller?
This dust particle becomes smaller than that.
Have you seen something smaller, sir?

क्षेपीयस्.english: The horse moves with quicker speed.
The letter was sent by a quicker route.
Shall we come by the quicker path?
Hey, where is the quicker way?

प्रथिष्ठ.english: This largest tree stands in the forest.
The largest mountain touched the sky.

प्रथिष्ठ.devanagari: किम् एषः प्रथिष्ठः नदीः नगरं जलेन भरयति?
प्रथिष्ठ.transliteration: kim eṣaḥ prathiṣṭhaḥ nadīḥ nagaraṃ jalen bharayati?
प्रथिष्ठ.english: Does this largest river fill the city with water?

प्रथिष्ठ.devanagari: भोः, प्रथिष्ठः गजः तव गृहे आगतः।
प्रथिष्ठ.transliteration: bhoḥ, prathiṣṭhaḥ gajaḥ tava gṛhe āgataḥ.
प्रथिष्ठ.english: Hey, the largest elephant has come to your house.

प्रथिष्ठा.devanagari: इयं प्रथिष्ठा भूमिः सर्वत्र विस्तृता अस्ति।
प्रथिष्ठा.transliteration: iyaṃ prathiṣṭhā bhūmiḥ sarvatra vistṛtā asti.
प्रथिष्ठा.english: This largest earth is spread everywhere.
His largest kingdom was greatly respected.

प्रथिष्ठा.devanagari: किम् एषा प्रथिष्ठा नगरी प्राचीनतमा अस्ति?
प्रथिष्ठा.transliteration: kim eṣā prathiṣṭhā nagarī prāchīntamā asti?
प्रथिष्ठा.english: Is this largest city the most ancient?

प्रथिष्ठा.devanagari: भोः, प्रथिष्ठा तव गृहः कस्य निर्मितः?
प्रथिष्ठा.transliteration: bhoḥ, prathiṣṭhā tava gṛhaḥ kasya nirmitaḥ?
प्रथिष्ठा.english: Hey, by whom was your largest house built?

क्षोदिष्ठ.devanagari: सः क्षोदिष्ठः पुरुषः सर्वेषु क्रूरः अस्ति।
क्षोदिष्ठ.transliteration: saḥ kṣodiṣṭhaḥ puruṣaḥ sarveṣu krūraḥ asti.
क्षोदिष्ठ.english: He is the cruelest man among all.

क्षोदिष्ठ.devanagari: किं स क्षोदिष्ठः राजा न अस्ति?
क्षोदिष्ठ.transliteration: kiṁ sa kṣodiṣṭhaḥ rājā na asti?
क्षोदिष्ठ.english: Is he not the cruelest king?

क्षोदिष्ठ.devanagari: हे मित्र! क्षोदिष्ठः व्यक्तिः गृहे आगच्छति।
क्षोदिष्ठ.transliteration: he mitra! kṣodiṣṭhaḥ vyaktiḥ gṛhe āgacchati.
क्षोदिष्ठ.english: Oh friend! The cruelest person is coming to the house.

क्षेपीयसी.english: This horse has a quicker speed.
She traveled by a quicker path.
Hey friend! Move at a quicker pace.

क्षोदिष्ठा.devanagari: सः क्षोदिष्ठः नरः सर्वेषु क्रूरः अस्ति।
क्षोदिष्ठा.transliteration: saḥ kṣodiṣṭhaḥ naraḥ sarveṣu krūraḥ asti.
क्षोदिष्ठा.english: He is the cruelest man among all.

क्षोदिष्ठा.devanagari: ता क्षोदिष्ठा स्त्री पशुभ्यः दुर्व्यवहारं कृतवती।
क्षोदिष्ठा.transliteration: tā kṣodiṣṭhā strī paśubhyaḥ durvyavahāraṁ kṛtavantī.
क्षोदिष्ठा.english: That cruelest woman behaved badly towards the animals.

क्षोदिष्ठा.devanagari: किं भवान् क्षोदिष्ठः राजा इति शृणोति स्म?
क्षोदिष्ठा.transliteration: kiṁ bhavān kṣodiṣṭhaḥ rājā iti śṛṇoti sma?
क्षोदिष्ठा.english: Did you hear that he was the cruelest king?

क्षोदिष्ठा.devanagari: क्षोदिष्ठाः जनाः नगरे वसन्ति। ते सर्वदा दुष्टाः भवन्ति।
क्षोदिष्ठा.transliteration: kṣodiṣṭhāḥ janāḥ nagare vasanti. te sarvadā duṣṭāḥ bhavanti.
क्षोदिष्ठा.english: The cruelest people live in the city. They are always wicked.

तनिष्ठा.english: The finest woman is very beautiful.
Hey! Where does the finest craftsman live?

दविष्ठ.english: Rama went to the farthest path.
Is this not the farthest forest?
Hey! Show me the farthest place.

दवीयसी.english: She lives in a farther place.
Will you go by the farther path?
This place is farther, isn't it?

तनीयस्.devanagari: किम् एतत् तनीयान् धागा न अस्ति?
तनीयस्.transliteration: kim etat tanīyān dhāgā na asti?
तनीयस्.english: Is this not a finer thread?
Hey! Look at this finer leaf.

भूयसी.english: There were more students in the school.

भूयसी.devanagari: भूयसी कार्यं करणीयम्, अत्र समयः नास्ति।
भूयसी.transliteration: bhūyasī kāryaṁ karaṇīyam, atra samayaḥ nāsti.
भूयसी.english: More work needs to be done; there is no time here.

दवीयस्.english: He lives in places farther from the city.
They went by a farther path.
Hey! Where is the farther destination?

भूयिष्ठ.english: Most people live in the city.
What happens most of the time?

तनीयसी.devanagari: किं यह रेशा तनीयसी नहीं अस्ति?
तनीयसी.transliteration: kiṃ yah reśā tanīyasī nahīṃ asti?

तनीयसी.devanagari: भवान्, एषा तनीयसी सूत्रं मे दातुम् इच्छसि?
तनीयसी.transliteration: bhavān, eṣā tanīyasī sūtraṃ me dātum icchasi?
तनीयसी.english: Sir, would you like to give me this finer thread?

दविष्ठा.english: She considers that city to be the farthest.
They went to the farthest village.
Is that mountain the farthest one?

दविष्ठा.devanagari: भोः, दविष्ठां वनं कुत्र अस्ति? - अत्र दक्षिणे।
दविष्ठा.transliteration: bhoḥ, dviṣṭhāṃ vanaṃ kutra asti? - atra dakṣiṇe.
दविष्ठा.english: Friend, where is the farthest forest? - It is to the south here.

अणिष्ठा.english: The smallest particle is the foundation.
The tiniest dust particle was flying in the wind.
Can the smallest star be seen in the sky?

अणिष्ठा.devanagari: भो! अणिष्ठं वस्तु सूक्ष्मं अस्ति न?
अणिष्ठा.transliteration: bho! aṇiṣṭhaṁ vastu sūkṣmaṁ asti na?
अणिष्ठा.english: Hey! The smallest thing is subtle, isn't it?

अणीयसी.english: The smaller particle is tiny compared to the larger particle.
The smaller ray was visible there.
Does the smaller dust float in the atmosphere?

अणीयसी.devanagari: अणीयसी कण इह आगच्छ। तां पश्य।
अणीयसी.transliteration: aṇīyasī kaṇa iha āgachchh. tāṁ paśya.
अणीयसी.english: Come here, smaller particle. Look at it.

तनिष्ठ.devanagari: यह तनिष्ठः वस्त्रम् अतीव सुन्दरम् अस्ति।
तनिष्ठ.transliteration: yah taniṣṭhaḥ vastram atīva sundaram asti.
तनिष्ठ.english: This finest cloth is very beautiful.
The finest silk made the king's garment.

तनिष्ठ.devanagari: किम् एषः तनिष्ठः धागाः नहीं दुर्लभः?
तनिष्ठ.transliteration: kim eṣah taniṣṭhaḥ dhāgāh nahīm durlabhah?
तनिष्ठ.english: Is this finest thread not rare?
Hey! Bring me the finest leaf.

भूयिष्ठा.english: The most numerous trees are in the forest.
The majority of students were in the school.
Do most people live in the village?

भूयिष्ठा.devanagari: अरे, भूयिष्ठाः लोकाः तत्र न आयान्ति खलु।
भूयिष्ठा.transliteration: are, bhūyiṣṭhāḥ lokāḥ tatra na āyānti khalu.
भूयिष्ठा.english: Listen, most people do not come there, you know.

अणिष्ठ.english: The smallest particle floats in water.
The tiniest dust particles were flying in the wind.
Is the smallest leaf on the tree?

अणिष्ठ.devanagari: अणिष्ठं सूक्ष्मं च वस्तु दृश्यते इति भवान् कथयति।
अणिष्ठ.transliteration: aniṣṭhaṁ sūkṣmaṁ ca vastu dṛśyate iti bhavān kathayati.
अणिष्ठ.english: You say that the smallest and subtle thing is visible.

लघिष्ठ.english: Sir, please look at the smallest object.

नेदीयसी.english: She was on the nearer path.

नेदीयसी.devanagari: यः नेदीयसी उपायः अस्ति तम् गृच्छ।
नेदीयसी.transliteration: yaḥ nedīyasī upāyaḥ asti tam gṛccha.
नेदीयसी.english: Take the nearer way that exists.
Do you know the nearer place?

नेदिष्ठ.english: The nearest tree was on the path.
Hey! Look at the nearest city.

नेदीयस्.english: Who came to the nearer place?
Do you see the nearer garden?

पटीयस्.devanagari: तव भ्राता मेरे भ्रातरः पटीयान् आसीत्।
पटीयस्.transliteration: tava bhrātā mere bhrātaraḥ paṭīyān āsīt.
पटीयस्.english: Your brother was smarter than my brother.

पटीयस्.devanagari: अरे, यह छात्रा तो बहुत पटीयान् है!
पटीयस्.transliteration: are, yah chātrā to bahut paṭīyān hai!
पटीयस्.english: Hey, this girl is very smart!

शुक्लीयसी.devanagari: भवान् मेघः शुक्लीयसी दृश्यते इति वदति।
शुक्लीयसी.transliteration: bhavān megha śuklīyasī dṛśyate iti vadati.
शुक्लीयसी.english: You say the cloud appears whiter.

नेदिष्ठा.english: Who is the nearest man in the forest?

नेदिष्ठा.devanagari: भद्रे! नेदिष्ठं वस्त्रं मह्यं दातुम् इच्छसि?
नेदिष्ठा.transliteration: bhadre! nediṣṭhaṁ vastraṁ mahyaṁ dātum icchasi?
नेदिष्ठा.english: Dear lady! Do you wish to give me the nearest cloth?

शुक्लिष्ठ.devanagari: किं यह पत्रं शुक्लिष्ठं न अस्ति?
शुक्लिष्ठ.transliteration: kiṁ yah patraṁ śuklīṣṭhaṁ na asti?
शुक्लिष्ठ.english: Is this leaf not the whitest?
Hey! Where is the whitest snow?

पटिष्ठा.english: Those two were the smartest men.
Is this the smartest young woman?

पटिष्ठा.devanagari: भो! तव पटिष्ठः पुत्रः कुत्र अस्ति?
पटिष्ठा.transliteration: bho! tava patiṣṭhaḥ putraḥ kutra asti?
पटिष्ठा.english: Hey! Where is your smartest son?

लघिष्ठा.devanagari: किं तव लघिष्ठा भगिनी गृहे अस्ति?
लघिष्ठा.transliteration: kiṃ tava laghiṣṭhā bhaginī gṛhe asti?
लघिष्ठा.english: Is your youngest sister at home?
Oh! Give me the smallest flower.

लघीयसी.devanagari: यह पुस्तकं तस्य पुस्तकात् लघीयसी अस्ति।
लघीयसी.transliteration: yah pustakam tasya pustakāt laghīyasī asti.
लघीयसी.english: This book is smaller than his book.

लघीयसी.devanagari: अरे, तव पत्नी मम पत्न्या लघीयसी न भवति।
लघीयसी.transliteration: are, tava patnī mama patnyā laghīyasī na bhavati.
लघीयसी.english: Hey, your wife is not smaller than my wife.

शुक्लीयस्.devanagari: तस्य पुष्पं मेरे पुष्पात् शुक्लीयान् आसीत्।
शुक्लीयस्.transliteration: tasya puṣpam mere puṣpāt śuklīyān āsīt.
शुक्लीयस्.english: His flower was whiter than my flower.

शुक्लीयस्.devanagari: हे मित्र, तव शार्टु शुक्लीयान् आभवत्।
शुक्लीयस्.transliteration: he mitra, tav śārṭu śuklīyān ābhavat.
शुक्लीयस्.english: Hey friend, your shirt became whiter.

पटीयसी.devanagari: तव भ्राता मम भ्रातृ पटीयसी आसीत्।
पटीयसी.transliteration: Tava bhrātā mama bhrātṛ patīyasī āsīt.
पटीयसी.english: Your brother was smarter than my brother.

पटीयसी.devanagari: भोः, एषा पटीयसी नारी कुत्र वसति?
पटीयसी.transliteration: Bhoḥ, eṣā patīyasī nārī kutra vasati?
पटीयसी.english: Hey, where does this smarter woman live?

पटिष्ठ.devanagari: भो पटिष्ठः! किं त्वं मां सहायं कर्तुं शक्नोषि?
पटिष्ठ.transliteration: bho patiṣṭhaḥ! kiṃ tvāṃ sahāyaṃ kartuṃ śaknoshi?
पटिष्ठ.english: O smartest one! Can you help me?

लघीयस्.english: This book is smaller than that one.
He was smaller than his brothers.

लघीयस्.devanagari: किम् एतत् पत्रं तत्पत्रात् लघीयान् अस्ति?
लघीयस्.transliteration: kim etat patram tatpatrat laghīyān asti?
लघीयस्.english: Is this letter smaller than that letter?

लघीयस्.devanagari: भो! यदि त्वं लघीयान् भवसि, तर्हि सहजम् गच्छ।
लघीयस्.transliteration: bho! yadi tvam laghīyān bhavasi, tarhi sahajam gacch.
लघीयस्.english: Hey! If you are smaller, then go easily.

स्फेयसी.english: Hey! Do you see that vast forest?

स्फेयस्.english: In the past, the kingdom was vaster.
Sir, this ocean is vast, is it not?

स्थेयसी.devanagari: पहले की तुलना में यह स्थेयसी आधार था।
स्थेयसी.transliteration: pahlē kī tulnā mē yah stheyasī ādhār thā.
स्थेयसी.english: It was a more stable foundation compared to before.
Is this a more stable place?

स्थेयसी.devanagari: हां, यह स्थेयसी है। हमें इसी पर रहना चाहिए।
स्थेयसी.transliteration: hāṁ, yah stheyasī hai. hemē isī par rahnā chāhie.
स्थेयसी.english: Yes, it is more stable. We should stay on this.

स्थवीयसी.devanagari: अयं बालिका स्थवीयसी, न तु स्वस्था।
स्थवीयसी.transliteration: ayam bālikā sthavīyasī, na tu svasthā.
स्थवीयसी.english: This girl is fatter, but not healthy.

स्थेष्ठा.english: This is the most stable land.
His mind was the most stable.
Is this the most stable seat?

स्थेष्ठा.devanagari: अरे, तुम्हारा स्थेष्ठा मार्ग दिखाओ न।
स्थेष्ठा.transliteration: are, tumhārā stheṣṭhā mārg dikhāo n.
स्थेष्ठा.english: Hey, show me your most stable path, will you?

स्थेयस्.english: Which stone would be more stable?

स्थेयस्.devanagari: भवान् स्थेयान् पदे स्थितः अस्ति इति मन्ये।
स्थेयस्.transliteration: bhavān stheyān pade sthitaḥ asti iti manye.
स्थेयस्.english: I think you are standing on more stable ground.

स्थवीयस्.devanagari: किम् एषः पुरुषः स्थवीयान् न भविष्यति?
स्थवीयस्.transliteration: kim eṣaḥ puruṣaḥ sthavīyān na bhaviṣyati?
स्थवीयस्.english: Will this man not become fatter?
Hey! Who is that fatter man coming?

ह्रसिष्ठ.english: Which is the shortest tree in the forest?
You have read the shortest book.

ह्रसिष्ठा.english: Do you have the shortest hair?
Hey, the shortest cloth appears to me.

शुक्लिष्ठा.english: Are you seeing the whitest leaf?

स्थेष्ठ.english: This mountain is the most stable.
That most stable woman was in the house.
Is this not the most stable object?

स्थेष्ठ.devanagari: भवान् स्थेष्ठः पुरुषः अस्ति इति मन्ये।
स्थेष्ठ.transliteration: bhavan sthaishthah purushah asti iti manye.
स्थेष्ठ.english: I think you are the most stable man.

स्थविष्ठ.english: That female elephant was the fattest.

स्थविष्ठ.devanagari: किं तद् पशु स्थविष्ठं न भवति?
स्थविष्ठ.transliteration: kiṃ tad paśu sthaviṣṭhaṃ na bhavati?
स्थविष्ठ.english: Is that animal not the fattest?

स्थविष्ठ.devanagari: भो! यः बालकः स्थविष्ठः अस्ति, तस्य नाम किम्?
स्थविष्ठ.transliteration: bho! yaḥ bālakaḥ sthaviṣṭhaḥ asti, tasya nāma kim?
स्थविष्ठ.english: Hey! What is the name of the boy who is the fattest?

स्थविष्ठा.english: That cow was the fattest in the past.

स्थविष्ठा.devanagari: भो! तव स्थविष्ठा सखी कुत्र वसति?
स्थविष्ठा.transliteration: bho! tav sthavishtha sakhi kutr vasati?
स्थविष्ठा.english: Hey! Where does your fattest friend live?

ह्रसीयसी.english: This path is shorter than that one.

ह्रसीयसी.devanagari: किम् एष नदी तस्मात् ह्रसीयसी नास्ति?
ह्रसीयसी.transliteration: kim eṣa nadī tasmāt hrasīyasī nāsti?
ह्रसीयसी.english: Is this river not shorter than that one?
Hey! Was that a shorter day?

ह्रसीयस्.devanagari: यह रस्सी पहली रस्सी से ह्रसीयान् अस्ति।
ह्रसीयस्.transliteration: yah rassī prathamī rassī se hrasīyān asti.
ह्रसीयस्.english: This rope is shorter than the first rope.

ह्रसीयस्.devanagari: तस्य केशाः मम केशेभ्यः ह्रसीयांसः आसन्।
ह्रसीयस्.transliteration: tasya keśāḥ mama keśebhyaḥ hrasīyāṁsaḥ āsan.
ह्रसीयस्.english: His hairs were shorter than my hairs.

ह्रसीयस्.devanagari: किम् एषा पथ् तस्मात् पथः ह्रसीयान् अस्ति?
ह्रसीयस्.transliteration: kim eṣā path tasmāt pathaḥ hrasīyān asti?
ह्रसीयस्.english: Is this path shorter than that path?

ह्रसीयस्.devanagari: भोः, तव दण्डः अत्यन्तं ह्रसीयान् दृश्यते।
ह्रसीयस्.transliteration: bhoḥ, tava daṇḍaḥ atyantaṁ hrasīyān dṛśyate.
ह्रसीयस्.english: Friend, your stick appears very short.

त्रपीयसी.english: Is your mind becoming more restless?
You are certainly experiencing greater restlessness.

त्रपिष्ठा.english: She was a very restless woman.
Hey friend! The very restless children are playing.

त्रपीयस्.english: He became more restless in the classroom.
Hey, this boy is becoming more restless!

द्राघीयसी.english: This path is longer than that one.

द्राघिष्ठा.devanagari: किं यह द्राघिष्ठा वृक्षः वने अस्ति?
द्राघिष्ठा.transliteration: kiṁ yah drāghiṣṭhā vṛkṣaḥ vane asti?
द्राघिष्ठा.english: Is this the longest tree in the forest?
Do you know the longest path?

बंहीयसी.english: Are there abundant fruits in the tree?

बंहीयसी.devanagari: हे मित्र! बंहीयसी गवः तव क्षेत्रे न सन्ति।
बंहीयसी.transliteration: he mitra! banhīyasī gavaḥ tava kṣetre na santi.
बंहीयसी.english: Hey friend! The numerous cows are not in your field.

द्राघिष्ठ.english: Which is the longest tree in the forest?
Did you read the longest book?

स्फेष्ठ.english: In ancient times, the kingdom was vast.

स्फेष्ठ.devanagari: हे मित्र! अयं वनं स्फेष्ठं दृश्यते।
स्फेष्ठ.transliteration: he mitra! ayaṁ vanaṁ sphaiṣṭhaṁ dṛśyate.
स्फेष्ठ.english: Oh friend! This forest appears vast.

बंहीयस्.english: There are abundant fruits in the forest.

बंहीयस्.devanagari: भोः, बंहीयास् ते मित्राः आसन् न?
बंहीयस्.transliteration: Bhoḥ, banhīyās te mitrāḥ āsan na?
बंहीयस्.english: Hey, didn't you have many friends?

बंहिष्ठा.english: There are many trees in the forest.
At that time, there were many people in the city.

बंहिष्ठा.devanagari: हे मित्र! बंहिष्ठाः तारकाः रात्रौ दृश्यन्ते।
बंहिष्ठा.transliteration: he mitra! baṁhiṣṭhāḥ tārakāḥ rātrou dṛśyante.
बंहिष्ठा.english: O friend! Many stars are seen at night.

स्फेष्ठा.english: In ancient times, there was a vast empire.

स्फेष्ठा.devanagari: किम् इदं स्फेष्ठं वनं न भयानकम्?
स्फेष्ठा.transliteration: Kim idaṁ spheṣṭhaṁ vanaṁ na bhayānakam?
स्फेष्ठा.english: Is this vast forest not frightening?

स्फेष्ठा.devanagari: अरे, भो! स्फेष्ठाः पर्वताः कति सुन्दराः सन्ति!
स्फेष्ठा.transliteration: Are, bho! Spheṣṭhāḥ parvātāḥ kati sundarāḥ santi!
स्फेष्ठा.english: Oh friend! How beautiful these vast mountains are!

त्रपिष्ठ.english: The restless girl danced in the house yesterday.
Did the restless man come to the city?
Hey, where are the restless people going?

वृन्दीयस्.devanagari: यह वृन्दीयान् पुष्पमाला अतीव सुन्दरा अस्ति।
वृन्दीयस्.transliteration: yah vrndīyān puṣpamālā atīva sundarā asti.
वृन्दीयस्.english: This excellent flower garland is very beautiful.

वृन्दीयस्.devanagari: तस्य वृन्दीयान् गीतः सर्वान् हृदयानि स्पृशत्।
वृन्दीयस्.transliteration: tasya vrndīyān gītaḥ sarvān hṛdayāni spṛśat.
वृन्दीयस्.english: His excellent song touched all hearts.

वृन्दीयस्.devanagari: किं यह वृन्दीयान् वस्त्रं न भवेत्?
वृन्दीयस्.transliteration: kiṃ yah vrndīyān vastraṃ na bhavet?
वृन्दीयस्.english: Is this not an excellent cloth?
Hey! Are these excellent fruits here?

बंहिष्ठ.english: The abundant forest is filled with animals.
Many people used to live in the city.

बंहिष्ठ.devanagari: किम् इदं बंहिष्ठं फलं वृक्षे वर्तते?
बंहिष्ठ.transliteration: kim idaṁ baṁhiṣṭhaṁ phalaṁ vṛkṣe vartate?
बंहिष्ठ.english: Is this abundant fruit present in the tree?

बंहिष्ठ.devanagari: भोः! त्वां बंहिष्ठाः मित्राः अत्र आगच्छन्।
बंहिष्ठ.transliteration: bhoḥ! tvāṁ baṁhiṣṭhāḥ mitrāḥ atra āgacchhan.
बंहिष्ठ.english: Hey! Many friends of yours are coming here.

क्रशीयसी.devanagari: हे मित्र, तव भगिनी क्रशीयसी वर्तते।
क्रशीयसी.transliteration: he mitra, tav bhaginī krashīyasī vartate.
क्रशीयसी.english: Hey friend, your sister appears thinner.

वृन्दिष्ठ.devanagari: किम् एषा वृन्दिष्ठा कला न अस्ति?
वृन्दिष्ठ.transliteration: kim eṣā vrindiṣṭhā kalā na asti?

वृन्दिष्ठ.english: Hey, this is indeed an excellent teacher!

क्रशीयस्.devanagari: यह व्यक्ति पहले से क्रशीयान् है।
क्रशीयस्.transliteration: yah vyakti pehle se krashīyān hai.
क्रशीयस्.english: This person is thinner than before.

क्रशीयस्.devanagari: किम् एष बालकः क्रशीयान् न भवत्?
क्रशीयस्.transliteration: kim eṣ bālakah krashīyān na bhavat?
क्रशीयस्.english: Did this boy not become thinner?
You look thinner. Is all well?

क्रशिष्ठ.english: This animal is the thinnest, not the fattest.

भ्रशीयसी.english: Excessive effort is indeed necessary for success.

वृन्दिष्ठा.devanagari: किम् इदं वृन्दिष्ठं कार्यं न वदसि?
वृन्दिष्ठा.transliteration: kim idaṃ vṛndishṭhaṃ kāryaṃ na vadasi?
वृन्दिष्ठा.english: Why don't you speak of this excellent work?
Hey! The excellent dancer has arrived here.

म्रदिष्ठ.devanagari: इयं पुष्पं म्रदिष्ठं सर्वेषु पुष्पेषु अस्ति।
म्रदिष्ठ.transliteration: iyaṃ puṣpaṃ mradiṣṭhaṃ sarveṣu puṣpeṣu asti.
म्रदिष्ठ.english: This flower is the softest among all flowers.

म्रदिष्ठ.devanagari: किं यह वस्त्रं म्रदिष्ठं नहीं भवति?
म्रदिष्ठ.transliteration: kiṃ yah vastraṃ mradiṣṭhaṃ nahī bhavati?
म्रदिष्ठ.english: Is this cloth not the softest?

म्रदिष्ठ.devanagari: भोः, यह तृणं म्रदिष्ठं खलु अस्ति एव।
म्रदिष्ठ.transliteration: bhoh, yah tṛṇaṃ mradiṣṭhaṃ khalu asti ev.
म्रदिष्ठ.english: Friend, this grass is indeed the softest.

म्रदिष्ठा.english: Which of these flowers is the softest?

म्रदिष्ठा.devanagari: भो! यह म्रदिष्ठा रेशमी धागा अत्यन्तं सुन्दरा, न किम्?
म्रदिष्ठा.transliteration: Bho! Yah mradiṣṭhā reshmī dhāgā atyantaṃ sundarā, na kim?
म्रदिष्ठा.english: Hey! This softest silk thread is very beautiful, isn't it?

म्रदीयसी.devanagari: अरे, तव स्पर्शं कस्मात् म्रदीयसी भवत्?
म्रदीयसी.transliteration: are, tava sparśaṁ kasmāt mradīyasī bhavat?
म्रदीयसी.english: Hey, why is your touch becoming softer?

भ्रशिष्ठा.english: Excessive suffering exists in his life.
The fire burned the city with extreme heat.

भ्रशिष्ठा.devanagari: किम् भ्रशिष्ठा क्रोधः तव मनसि वर्तते?
भ्रशिष्ठा.transliteration: kim bhraśiṣṭhā krodhaḥ tava manasi vartate?
भ्रशिष्ठा.english: Does excessive anger exist in your mind?
Extreme fear touches the hearts of all.

वृन्दीयसी.devanagari: यह वृन्दीयसी पुष्पमाला अति सुन्दरा अस्ति।
वृन्दीयसी.transliteration: yah vṛndīyasī puṣpamālā ati sundarā asti.
वृन्दीयसी.english: This excellent flower garland is very beautiful.

वृन्दीयसी.devanagari: किं तव वृन्दीयसी मञ्जरी फलवती जाता?
वृन्दीयसी.transliteration: kiṃ tava vṛndīyasī mañjarī phalavati jātā?
वृन्दीयसी.english: Did your excellent cluster of flowers bear fruit?

वृन्दीयसी.devanagari: भो! यह वृन्दीयसी वाटिका भवते नितरां रोचते इति मन्यामहे।
वृन्दीयसी.transliteration: bho! yah vṛndīyasī vāṭikā bhavate nitarāṃ rochate iti manyāmahe.
वृन्दीयसी.english: Friend! We believe this excellent garden is very pleasing to you.

भ्रशीयस्.devanagari: भ्रशीयान् शीतम् आगतम्। किम् त्वं ठण्डे सहिष्णुः असि?
भ्रशीयस्.transliteration: bhraśīyān śītam āgatam. kim tvạṃ ṭhaṇḍe sahiṣṇuḥ asi?
भ्रशीयस्.english: Excessive cold has come. Are you tolerant of the cold?

क्रशिष्ठा.devanagari: यह क्रशिष्ठा स्त्री अत्यन्त दुर्बल अस्ति।
क्रशिष्ठा.transliteration: yah krashiṣṭhā strī atyant durbal asti.
क्रशिष्ठा.english: This thinnest woman is very weak.

क्रशिष्ठा.devanagari: स क्रशिष्ठः पुरुषः कल रोगी आसीत्।
क्रशिष्ठा.transliteration: sa krashiṣṭhaḥ puruṣaḥ kal rogī āsīt.
क्रशिष्ठा.english: That thinnest man was sick yesterday.

क्रशिष्ठा.devanagari: किम् इमे क्रशिष्ठाः बालिकाः भोजनं न खादन्ति?
क्रशिष्ठा.transliteration: kim ime krashiṣṭhāḥ bālikāḥ bhojanam na khādanti?
क्रशिष्ठा.english: Don't these thinnest girls eat food?

क्रशिष्ठा.devanagari: भोः! तव क्रशिष्ठं शरीरं कोथा रोगात्?
क्रशिष्ठा.transliteration: bhoḥ! tav krashiṣṭham śarīram kothā rogāt?
क्रशिष्ठा.english: Hey! Is your thinnest body suffering from illness?

म्रदीयस्.devanagari: इयं वस्त्रं तस्यां वस्त्रात् म्रदीयान् अस्ति।
म्रदीयस्.transliteration: iyaṃ vastraṃ tasyāṃ vastrāt mradīyān asti.
म्रदीयस्.english: This cloth is softer than that cloth.

म्रदीयस्.devanagari: यदा बालकः पुष्पं स्पृशति, तदा तस्य म्रदीयान् अनुभवः आसीत्।
म्रदीयस्.transliteration: yadā bālakaḥ puṣpaṃ spṛśati, tadā tasya mradīyān anubhavaḥ āsīt.
म्रदीयस्.english: When the child touched the flower, he felt that it was very soft.

म्रदीयस्.devanagari: किं एषा त्वचा तस्याः त्वचायाः म्रदीयान्?
म्रदीयस्.transliteration: kiṃ eṣā tvachā tasyāḥ tvachāyāḥ mradīyān?
म्रदीयस्.english: Is this skin softer than that skin?

म्रदीयस्.devanagari: हे मित्र! अस्य रेशमस्य म्रदीयान् अनुभवः भवति, न किम्?
म्रदीयस्.transliteration: he mitra! asya reśmasya mradīyān anubhavaḥ bhavati, na kim?
म्रदीयस्.english: Dear friend! This silk feels softer, doesn't it?

भ्रशिष्ठ.english: Can we endure such excessive burden?
The excessive fatigue will be mine.

द्रढिष्ठ.english: This mountain is the most stable.
His foundation was the most stable.

द्रढिष्ठ.devanagari: किं यह शिलाः द्रढिष्ठा न भवति?
द्रढिष्ठ.transliteration: kim yah shila drdhishtha na bhavati?
द्रढिष्ठ.english: Is this rock not the most stable?

द्रढिष्ठ.devanagari: भो मित्र! तस्य प्रतिज्ञा द्रढिष्ठा अस्ति।
द्रढिष्ठ.transliteration: bho mitra! tasya pratijnā drdhishtā asti.
द्रढिष्ठ.english: Oh friend! His promise is the most stable.

द्रढीयस्.devanagari: किं यह वृक्ष द्रढीयान् न अस्ति?
द्रढीयस्.transliteration: kim yah vṛksh drdhīyān na asti?
द्रढीयस्.english: Is this tree not more stable?

द्रढीयस्.devanagari: भो मित्र, द्रढीयान् भित्ति निर्मिता इति सः कथयति।
द्रढीयस्.transliteration: bho mitra, drdhīyān bhitti nirmitā iti sah kathayati.
द्रढीयस्.english: Oh friend, he says that a more stable wall was built.

द्रढिष्ठा.english: This mountain is the most stable.
That policy was the most stable.
Is this the most stable rope?
You make the most stable decision.

द्रढीयसी.english: The foundation before was more stable.
Is this a more stable friendship?

द्रढीयसी.devanagari: हे भाई, तुम्हारा संकल्प द्रढीयसी होना चाहिए।
द्रढीयसी.transliteration: hē bhāī, tumhārā sankālp draḍhīyasī honā chāhiē.
द्रढीयसी.english: Hey brother, your resolve should be more stable.

स्रजीयस्.english: That woman wears a more garland-covered garland.
The king wore a more garland-covered flower garland.
Do you have a more garland-covered garland?

स्रजीयस्.devanagari: भो! तव स्रजीयान् माला सुन्दरी अस्ति।
स्रजीयस्.transliteration: bho! tava srjīyān māllā sundarī asti.
स्रजीयस्.english: Hey! Your more garland-covered garland is beautiful.

साधिष्ठ.english: Indra is the strongest among the gods.
That hero was the strongest of the army.

साधिष्ठ.devanagari: भवान् साधिष्ठः पुरुषः भवसि न किम्?
साधिष्ठ.transliteration: Bhavān sādhiṣṭhaḥ puruṣaḥ bhavasi na kim?
साधिष्ठ.english: Are you not the strongest man?

साधीयस्.devanagari: अहम् साधीयान् भवामि इति वदसि कथम्?
साधीयस्.transliteration: aham sādhīyān bhavāmi iti vadasi katham?
साधीयस्.english: How do you say I am becoming stronger?

साधिष्ठा.devanagari: स साधिष्ठः योद्धा युद्धे जयः अभवत्।
साधिष्ठा.transliteration: sa sādhiṣṭhaḥ yoddhā yuddhe jayaḥ abhavat.
साधिष्ठा.english: The strongest warrior was victorious in battle.

साधिष्ठा.devanagari: किं तुम साधिष्ठाः पुरुषाः नगरे वसथः?
साधिष्ठा.transliteration: kiṁ tuma sādhiṣṭhāḥ puruṣāḥ nagare vasathaḥ?
साधिष्ठा.english: Do the strongest men dwell in the city?

साधिष्ठा.devanagari: भोः, साधिष्ठा देवता कस्य रक्षकः भविष्यति।
साधिष्ठा.transliteration: bhoḥ, sādhiṣṭhā devatā kasya rakṣakaḥ bhaviṣyati.
साधिष्ठा.english: Friend, the strongest deity will be whose protector?

परिव्रढिष्ठ.english: The chief man in the city is the king.
The principal general was unable to lead the army.
Which is the chief teacher dwelling in the hermitage?
Hey! Where is the foremost scholar going?

परिव्रढीयस्.english: The chief man lives in the village.
Was the chief man in the assembly?
O chief! How do you live?

परिव्रढीयसी.devanagari: किं सः परिवृढः पुरुषः नहीं वर्तते?
परिव्रढीयसी.transliteration: kiṁ saḥ parivṛḍhaḥ puruṣaḥ nahīṁ vartate?
परिव्रढीयसी.english: Is he not the chief man?
O Chief! Where are you going?

साधीयसी.english: In this year, the rainfall was stronger.

साधीयसी.devanagari: तस्य शक्तिः दिनेन दिने साधीयसी भवति।
साधीयसी.transliteration: Tasya shakti dinen dine sadhīyasī bhavati.
साधीयसी.english: His strength becomes stronger day by day.

साधीयसी.devanagari: किम् एतत् औषधं साधीयसी प्रभावं करिष्यति?
साधीयसी.transliteration: Kim etat aushadham sadhīyasī prabhavam karisyati?
साधीयसी.english: Will this medicine produce a stronger effect?

साधीयसी.devanagari: अरे, तव प्रतिरोधः तु अत्यन्त साधीयसी आसीत्!
साधीयसी.transliteration: Are, tava pratirodhah tu atyanta sadhīyasī āsīt!
साधीयसी.english: Hey, your resistance was indeed very strong!

स्रजीयसी.english: The goddess, adorned with garlands, shines beautifully.
The king was decorated with garland coverings.

स्रजीयसी.devanagari: किं भवती स्रजीयसी पुष्पगुच्छेन न सुशोभनी?
स्रजीयसी.transliteration: kiṃ bhavatī srjīyasī puṣpaguchchhena na suśobhanī?
स्रजीयसी.english: Is not the lady adorned with flower garlands very beautiful?

स्रजीयसी.devanagari: अहो! तव कन्या स्रजीयसी मालयैः कतिशः शोभते इति वद।
स्रजीयसी.transliteration: aho! tava kanyā srjīyasī mālyaiḥ katiśaḥ śobhate iti vad.
स्रजीयसी.english: Oh! Tell me, how beautifully your daughter appears with those garland coverings!

परिव्रढिष्ठा.devanagari: सा परिव्रढिष्ठा नारी गृहे राज्यं करोति।
परिव्रढिष्ठा.transliteration: sā parivrḍhiṣṭhā nārī gṛhe rājyaṁ karoti.
परिव्रढिष्ठा.english: That chief woman rules the household.

परिव्रढिष्ठा.devanagari: परिव्रढिष्ठः पुरुषः सैन्यं नेतृत्वे अग्रसरः आसीत्।
परिव्रढिष्ठा.transliteration: parivrḍhiṣṭhaḥ puruṣaḥ sainnyaṁ netṛtve agrasaraḥ āsīt.
परिव्रढिष्ठा.english: The chief man was foremost in leading the army.
Does the chief king not protect justice?

परिव्रढिष्ठा.devanagari: भोः! परिव्रढिष्ठः यज्ञकर्ता त्वं किमर्थं आगच्छसि?
परिव्रढिष्ठा.transliteration: bhoḥ! parivrḍhiṣṭhaḥ yajñakartā tvaṁ kimarthaṁ āgacchasī?
परिव्रढिष्ठा.english: O chief priest! Why do you come here?

स्रजिष्ठ.english: The goddess, most adorned with garlands, shines beautifully.

स्रजिष्ठ.devanagari: स एव राजा स्रजिष्ठः समारम्भे आसीत्।
स्रजिष्ठ.transliteration: sa eva rājā srajišṭhaḥ samāramble āsīt.
स्रजिष्ठ.english: That very king was most covered with garlands at the ceremony.
Were the goddesses most adorned with garlands every day?

स्रजिष्ठ.devanagari: हे सख्या! यः बालको स्रजिष्ठः दृश्यते, स मम भ्राता।
स्रजिष्ठ.transliteration: he sakhyā! yaḥ bālako srajišṭhaḥ dṛśyate, sa mama bhrātā.
स्रजिष्ठ.english: Hey friend! That boy who appears most covered with garlands is my brother.

मेदस्.english: There is fat in the body.

भोस्.english: Hi there! Where are you going?
Hi there! What is your name?

नमस्कार.english: He greeted (with namaskara) in the morning.

साधिका.english: Does the practitioner chant the mantra?

साधिका.devanagari: नमस्ते साधिके! तव अभ्यासः कथं अस्ति?
साधिका.transliteration: namaste sādhike! tava abhyāsaḥ kathaṃ asti?
साधिका.english: Greetings, practitioner! How is your practice?

विश्रान्ति.english: I desire rest, what about you?

त्वचीयसी.english: That fruit was more skin-covered yesterday.

त्वचीयसी.devanagari: भोः, यह वृक्षः त्वचीयसी फलानि वहति।
त्वचीयसी.transliteration: bhoh, yah vṛikṣah tvachīyasī phalāni vahati.
त्वचीयसी.english: Hey, this tree bears more skin-covered fruits.

योगप्रशिक्षक.english: The yoga teacher trained the students.
Is the yoga teacher in the classroom?
Greetings yoga teacher! How are you?

स्थिति.devanagari: अस्य योगासनस्य स्थितिः का? What is the posture of this Yoga Asana.

स्थिति.english: The posture of the soldier is straight.
The posture of the girl was beautiful.

त्वचीयस्.english: Is this elephant not more skin-covered?

त्वचीयस्.devanagari: भोः, ते पक्षिणः त्वचीयानाः सन्ति किम्?
त्वचीयस्.transliteration: bhoḥ, te pakṣiṇaḥ tvachīyānāḥ santi kim?
त्वचीयस्.english: Hey, are those birds more skin-covered?

त्वचिष्ठा.english: This man is covered with skin.
That woman was covered with skin.
Is that child not covered with skin?
Hey! This body becomes covered with skin.

साधक.english: Greetings, practitioner! Where are you going?

स्रजिष्ठा.english: The goddess, adorned with garlands, wears the garland.
The dancer was adorned with garlands.
Is not the garland-covered goddess worthy of worship?

स्रजिष्ठा.devanagari: भो! तव भगिनी स्रजिष्ठा सुन्दरी दृश्यते।
स्रजिष्ठा.transliteration: bho! tava bhaginī srajiṣṭhā sundarī dṛśyate.
स्रजिष्ठा.english: Hey! Your sister, covered with garlands, appears beautiful.

मानसिकारोग्य.devanagari: मानसिकारोग्यं अत्यावश्यकम्। Mental health is important.

मानसिकारोग्य.english: Mental health is the foundation of happiness.
In the past, his mental health was poor.
How can we protect mental health?
I am thinking about your mental health.

योगप्रशिक्षिका.english: The yoga teacher shows the posture.
The yoga teacher taught the students yesterday.
Does the yoga teacher teach breathing exercises?
Greetings yoga teacher! Are you well?

त्वचिष्ठ.english: This man is covered with skin.
That woman was covered with skin.

त्वचिष्ठ.devanagari: किं त्वचिष्ठाः जनाः सदा स्वस्थाः भवन्ति?
त्वचिष्ठ.transliteration: kiṁ tvchiṣṭhāḥ janāḥ sadā swasthāḥ bhavanti?

त्वचिष्ठ.devanagari: भो! त्वचिष्ठः एष बालकः कति वर्षः पुरानः?
त्वचिष्ठ.transliteration: bho! tvchiṣṭhaḥ eṣa bālakaḥ kati varṣaḥ purānaḥ?
त्वचिष्ठ.english: Hey! This skin-covered boy, how old is he?

सभ्यता.devanagari: क्या आप सभ्यता के इतिहास को जानते हैं?
सभ्यता.transliteration: Kyā āp sabhyatā ke itihās ko jānte hain?
सभ्यता.english: Do you know the history of civilization?

सभ्यता.devanagari: हाँ, मुझे यह सभ्यता बहुत दिलचस्प लगती है।
सभ्यता.transliteration: Hāñ, mujhe yah sabhyatā bahut dilchasp lagtī hai.
सभ्यता.english: Yes, I find this civilization very interesting.

सिंहासन.english: The emperor sits on the throne.
Is the throne made of gold?
Hey! Where is the throne located?

गान.devanagari: गानं अध्येतुम् इच्छामि। Like to learn singing.

गान.english: When do you listen to singing?
Hey friend, does one dance with singing?

वरण्डक.english: The king sits on the Howdah and looks at the citizens.
The howdah was made of gold.
Hey, do you wish to climb onto the howdah?

विराम.english: A holiday comes once a week.
Last week there was a holiday.
When will the next holiday be?
How is the holiday? It is joyful!

पठन.devanagari: अहं परीक्षायै पठनं करोमि। I am doing reading for exams.

पठन.english: Yesterday I did reading of a book.
Do you do reading every day?
Your reading pleases me very much.

किरीट.english: The coronated king wears a crown.
The golden crown shines on the king's head.
Long ago, the great king wore a crown.

किरीट.devanagari: अरे! यह किरीटः कति मनोहरः अस्ति!
किरीट.transliteration: are! yah kirīṭaḥ kati manohāraḥ asti!
किरीट.english: Oh! This crown is so beautiful!

पारितोषिक.english: The king gives a gift to the victorious soldier.
The mother gave a gift to her son.
This gift pleases me very much.

परिवालन.devanagari: सेवकाः परिवालनाधारोण कार्यं कुर्वन्ति। The workers work on rotation basis.

परिवालन.english: Rotation is an important part of the machine.
Rotation of the wheel was necessary.

संस्कृति.english: Culture adorns the hearts of people.

संस्कृति.devanagari: किं त्वं अपने संस्कृतेः गर्वं करोषि?
संस्कृति.transliteration: kiṃ tvam apne saṃskṛteḥ garvaṃ karoṣi?
संस्कृति.english: Do you take pride in your culture?
This culture was created by our ancestors.

ध्यान.english: Meditation should be done twice a day.
How many hours will you meditate?

उपायन.english: Who wouldn't be satisfied with a gift?
The king gives gifts to the people.
His gift pleases me very much.
When will you bring a gift?

उपायन.devanagari: अहं भवते उपायनं आनयं तर्हि भवान् प्रसन्नः भविष्यति।
उपायन.transliteration: Aham bhavate upāyanam ānaym tarhi bhavān prasannāh bhaviṣyati.
उपायन.english: If I bring you a gift, then you will be happy.

परिभ्रमण.devanagari: स्वामी रामानुजाचार्यः पुरातनकाले परिभ्रमणकर्ता आसीत्। Swami Ramanucharya was a revolutionist in olden days.
पृथिव्याः परिभ्रमणम् वर्षे एकवारम् पूर्णम् भवति।
परिभ्रमण.transliteration: Pṛthivyāḥ paribhramaṇam varṣe ekavāram pūrṇam bhavati.
परिभ्रमण.english: The revolution of the Earth is completed once in a year.
The revolution of the planets was proven by the scientist.
How many days does the revolution of the Earth take?
Hey! This revolution is very important.

पाक.devanagari: पाकं कर्तुम् इच्छामि। I like to cook.
पाकः कठिनः वा? नहि, सुखः अस्ति।
पाक.transliteration: pākaḥ kaṭhinaḥ vā? nahi, sukhaḥ asti.
पाक.english: Is cooking difficult? No, it is pleasant.

महानस.devanagari: महानसे पाकः भवति। Cooking happens in the kitchen.

महानस.english: Rama cooks food in the kitchen.

कवाक्ष.devanagari: कवाक्षेण वायुः आयाति। Air flows in through window.

कवाक्ष.english: Hey! The window should be closed.

स्थला.devanagari: स्थलायां स्थापयतु। Keep it on floor.

स्थला.english: The boy plays on the floor.
Is there a book on the floor?

स्तम्भ.devanagari: सहस्रं स्तम्भाः सन्ति। There are 1000 pillars.

स्तम्भ.english: Hey! Can you see the pillar?

धूमनाल.devanagari: धूमनालात् धूमः गच्छति। Smoke goes from Smoke Vent.
भो! धूमनालः कुत्र अस्ति? इदम् भवने नहि दृश्यते।
धूमनाल.transliteration: Bho! Dhūmanālaḥ kutra asti? Idam bhavane nahi dṛśyate.
धूमनाल.english: Hey! Where is the smoke vent? It is not visible in this house.

स्नानगृह.devanagari: स्नानगृहे फेनकम् अस्ति। Soap is in the bath room.

स्नानगृह.english: Is there water in the bathroom?
Open the bathroom! Bring the towel from there.

अवकरिका.devanagari: अवकरं अवकरिकायां अवक्षिप। Throw the waste in the dustbin.

प्रकोष्ठ.devanagari: चत्वारः प्रकोष्ठाः सन्ति। There are four rooms.

प्रकोष्ठ.english: There was a table in the room.

भोजनशाला.devanagari: भोजनशालायां पिता खादति। Father is eating in the dining room.

भोजनशाला.english: Mother cooks food in the dining room.
The boys ate food in the dining room yesterday.
Come to the dining room! The food is ready.

अतिथिप्रकोष्ठ.devanagari: अतिथिप्रकोष्ठे अतिथिः अस्ति। Guest is in the guest house.

अतिथिप्रकोष्ठ.english: The guest house is very beautiful.
How many rooms were there in the guest house?

अतिथिप्रकोष्ठ.devanagari: अतिथिप्रकोष्ठः नगरे स्थितः अस्ति। तत्र सुखं निवसतु।
अतिथिप्रकोष्ठ.transliteration: athithiprakoshthah nagare sthitah asti. tatra sukham nivasatu.
अतिथिप्रकोष्ठ.english: The guest house is located in the city. May you stay comfortably there.

शयनप्रकोष्ठ.devanagari: शयनप्रकोष्ठे माता निद्राति। Mother is sleeping in the bed room.

शयनप्रकोष्ठ.transliteration: śayanaprako ṣ ṭhaḥ bahu sundaraḥ asti.

शयनप्रकोष्ठ.english: The boy played in the bedroom.

शयनप्रकोष्ठ.transliteration: kim śayanaprako ṣ ṭhaḥ svachaḥ asti?
śayanaprako ṣ ṭhe āramadāyakaṁ śayyā asti.
शयनप्रकोष्ठ.english: There is a comfortable bed in the bedroom.

द्वार.english: Who is coming to the door?
We are going out through the door.

वातायन.devanagari: गृहे वातायनानि चत्वारि सन्ति। There are four windows in the house.

वातायन.english: Ramesh closed the window and came.
Does the window bring cool air?
Hey! A loud sound is heard from the window.

धूमनिर्गम.devanagari: धूमनिर्गमाद् धूमः गच्छति। Smoke goes from Smoke Vent.

धूमनिर्गम.english: The smoke vent is very tall.
The smoke vent in this house was damaged.
Hey! Clean the smoke vent quickly.

छदि.devanagari: मृच्छदेन छदिः अस्ति। Ceiling is made up of clay tiles.

छदि.english: The high ceiling protects the house.
The ceiling in the old building was broken.

छदि.devanagari: छदिः सुन्दरा अस्ति न? हाँ, सा बहु सुन्दरा अस्ति।
छदि.transliteration: chhādiḥ sundarā asti na? Hāñ, sā bahu sundarā asti.
छदि.english: The ceiling is beautiful, isn't it? Yes, it is very beautiful.

अवकरकण्डोल.devanagari: अवकरकण्डोलः कुत्र अस्ति? Where is the dustbin?

पि़ञ्ज.devanagari: दीपस्य पिञ्जः कुत्र अस्ति? Where is the light switch?

देहली.devanagari: देहली द्वारे अस्ति।Threshold is in the door

देहली.english: Who is standing near the threshold?
Hey! Cross the threshold. Do not delay.

नालिका.devanagari: नालिकया जलं प्रवहति। Water flows through pipe.

नालिका.english: Why was the pipe filled with water?

कुट्टिमशोधनी.english: I cleaned the floor with the mop.

दीप.devanagari: दीपः प्रज्वलति। The lamp is glowing.

दीप.english: The lamp is on the table.
The lamp was lit last night.
Dear friend, please light the lamp.

जवनिका.devanagari: वातयाने जवनिका शोभते। The curtian on window is beautiful.

जवनिका.english: Please open the curtain before sunrise.

द्रोणी.devanagari: द्रोणी शौचालये अस्ति। Bucket is in the toilet.

द्रोणी.english: The bucket is full of water.
He is carrying the bucket to the house.

द्रोणी.devanagari: भवान् द्रोणीं मे दातुम् इच्छति किम्?
द्रोणी.transliteration: Bhavān dronīṁ me dātum ichhati kim?
द्रोणी.english: Will you give me the bucket?

भित्ति.devanagari: चतस्रः भित्तयः सन्ति। There are four walls.

भित्ति.english: The wall is red in color.

भित्ति.devanagari: भित्तौ चित्रं आसीत्। किं तव भित्तौ अपि चित्रम् अस्ति?
भित्ति.transliteration: bhittau chitram āsīt. Kiṁ tava bhittau api chitram asti?
भित्ति.english: There was a picture on the wall. Do you also have a picture on your wall?

गवाक्ष.devanagari: शौचगृहे गवाक्ष: अस्ति। Round window is in toilet.

गवाक्ष.english: The round window in the house is beautiful.
There was a round window in his room.
How many round windows are in the temple?

गवाक्ष.devanagari: भो! अयं गवाक्ष: कीदृश: रमणीय: इति न मन्यसे?
गवाक्ष.transliteration: bho! ayaṁ gavākṣaḥ kīdṛśaḥ ramaṇīya: iti na manyase?
गवाक्ष.english: Hey! Don't you think this round window is charming?

वस्त्रप्रक्षालयनयन्त्र.devanagari: वस्त्रप्रक्षालयनयन्त्रं वस्त्रं प्रक्षालयति। Washing machine washes the clothes.

वस्त्रप्रक्षालयनयन्त्र.english: The washing machine is a useful device.
The housewife operated the washing machine yesterday.
What do you think of the washing machine?
I want to know the price of the washing machine.

नाल.devanagari: नालतः जलं स्रवति। Water is leaking from tap.

ऊष्णीकरणी.english: Is the heater in the cold room?

ऊष्णीकरणी.devanagari: भोः, ऊष्णीकरणी कुत्र अस्ति? मे तां खोजितुम् इच्छामि।
ऊष्णीकरणी.transliteration: Bhoḥ, ūṣṇīkaraṇī kutra asti? Me tāṁ khojitum ichhāmi.
ऊष्णीकरणी.english: Hey, where is the heater? I want to find it.

दण्डदीप.devanagari: गृहे चत्वारः दण्डदीपाः सन्ति। There are four tubelights in the house.

दण्डदीप.english: There was a tubelight in the classroom.
Hey! Please turn on the tubelight.

सम्मार्जनी.devanagari: सा सम्मार्जन्या मार्जयति। She cleans with broom.

सम्मार्जनी.english: A broom is necessary in the house.
I cleaned the floor with a broom.
Hey! I want you to give me the broom.

तल्प.devanagari: तल्प: सौख्यकारी अस्ति। The mattress is comfortable.

तल्प.english: Where is the mattress? It is in the bedroom.

कट.english: The mat is on the ground.
Rama wants to buy a mat.

शयनकक्ष.devanagari: मम गृहे द्वौ शयनकक्षौ स्तः। There are two bedrooms in my house.

शयनकक्ष.english: There is a pillow in the bedroom. Where is the pillow?

कपाटिका.devanagari: कपाटिकायां वस्त्राणि सन्ति। Clothes are in the cubboard.

कपाटिका.english: There were books in the cupboard.
Do you want to open the cupboard?
My jewels are in the cupboard.

कम्बल.devanagari: शीतलकाले कम्बलम् आवश्यकम्। In the winter blanket is necessary.

कम्बल.english: Is there a blanket in the room?
Can you give me a blanket?

पादकट.devanagari: एषः पादकट:। This is bath mat.

पादकट.english: A floor mat is necessary in the house.
I am going to buy a carpet.
Have you seen the floor mat?

मशकजाल.devanagari: मशकजालः मशकेभ्यः रक्षणं करोति। Mosquito net protects from mosquitoes.

मशकजाल.english: Ram hung the mosquito net at night.
Is the mosquito net in the bedroom?

मशकजाल.devanagari: त्वं मशकजालं कुत्र स्थापयसि? अहं तस्य उपरि।
मशकजाल.transliteration: tvaṁ maśkajālaṁ kutra sthāpayasi? ahaṁ tasya upari.
मशकजाल.english: Where do you place the mosquito net? I'll put it above.

यवनिका.devanagari: वातयाने यवनिका शोभते। The curtian on window is beautiful.

यवनिका.english: The colorful curtain is hung in the room.
Where did this curtain come from?

भावचित्र.devanagari: एतत् कस्य भावचित्रम्? Whose portrait is this?

भावचित्र.english: Is the portrait in the museum?

भावचित्र.devanagari: भावचित्रम् पश्य! इयम् अति रमणीया अस्ति।
भावचित्र.transliteration: bhāvachitram paśya! iyam ati ramaṇīyā asti.
भावचित्र.english: Look at the portrait! It is very charming.

चित्रकम्बलम्.devanagari: चित्रकम्बलं सम्यक् अस्ति। Color blanket is good.

चित्रकम्बलम्.english: I am wearing the colored blanket.
He kept the colored blanket in the bedroom.

चित्रकम्बलम्.devanagari: अयं चित्रकम्बलः कुत्र वर्तते? इदं वस्त्रे शोभनं।
चित्रकम्बलम्.transliteration: ayam chitrakamblah kutra vartate? idam vastre shobhanam.
चित्रकम्बलम्.english: Where is this colored blanket? It looks beautiful in cloth.

पुष्पधानी.devanagari: एतां पुष्पधानीं कुत्र स्थापयानि? Where can I place this flower vase.

पुष्पधानी.english: That flower vase is very beautiful.
I filled the flower vase with flowers.
Is your flower vase in the box?
Oh, how lovely this flower vase is!

अच्छादक.devanagari: तल्पे अच्छादकम् अस्ति। There is sheet on the mattress.

अच्छादक.english: In winter, a sheet is necessary.
Can you give me the sheet?

रात्रिदीप.devanagari: शयनकक्षे रात्रिदीप: अस्ति। Night lamp is in bedroom.

रात्रिदीप.english: Can you light the night lamp?
Hey! Why isn't the night lamp glowing?

उपधान.devanagari: उपधानं शय्यायाम् अस्ति। The pillow is on the bed.

उपधान.english: He took the pillow and went to the bedroom.

उपधान.devanagari: भद्रे, उपधानं मह्यं दातुं शक्नोषि किम्?
उपधान.transliteration: bhadre, updhānaṁ mahyaṁ dātuṁ śaknoṣi kim?
उपधान.english: Dear friend, can you give me the pillow?

भित्तिघटी.devanagari: शयनगृृहे भित्तिघटी अस्ति। There is a wall clock in the bed room.

भित्तिघटी.english: The wall clock shows the correct time every day.
The wall clock in the classroom was broken.
What time does the wall clock show?
Where is the wall clock? - It is in the office.

धूम.english: The smoke is great, isn't it?

अग्नि.devanagari: अग्निः उष्णः भवति। Fire is hot.

अग्नि.english: When did the fire go out?

अग्नि.devanagari: किं अग्निः तत्र अस्ति? आम्, अग्निः तत्र अस्ति।
अग्नि.transliteration: kiṃ agniḥ tatra asti? ām, agniḥ tatra asti.
अग्नि.english: Is fire there? Yes, fire is there.

स्थालिका.devanagari: स्थालिकायाम् अन्नम् अस्ति। Rice is in the plate.

स्थालिका.english: Mother filled the plate with water.

कंस.devanagari: कंसः कुत्र अस्ति? Where is cup?

कंस.english: I brought the cup to the house.
Will you give me the cup?

अनिलचुल्लि.devanagari: एषा अनिलचुल्लिः अस्ति। This is stove.

अनल.devanagari: अनलः उष्णः भवति। Fire is hot.

अनल.english: When did the fire go out?
The fire made light at night.

अनल.devanagari: अनलः कुत्र आसीत्? - अनलः गृहे आसीत्।
अनल.transliteration: analaḥ kutra āsīt? - analaḥ gṛhe āsīt.
अनल.english: Where was the fire? - The fire was in the house.

चषकधानिका.devanagari: चषका: चषकधानिकायां सन्ति। The glasses are on glass tray.

चषकधानिका.english: I kept the glass tray in the room.
Is the glass tray on the table?
Hey! Give me the glass tray.

करण्ड.devanagari: करण्डे फलानि सन्ति। There are fruits in basket.

करण्ड.english: He threw the basket into the river.
How many flowers were in the basket?

कण्डोल.english: Vegetables are placed in the basket.
The basket is full of grain.
The farmer brought the basket from the field.
How many fruits are in the basket?

कण्डोल.devanagari: भो! कण्डोलः कुत्र अस्ति? एतत्र अस्ति।
कण्डोल.transliteration: bho! kaṇḍolaḥ kutra asti? etat asti.
कण्डोल.english: Hey! Where is the basket? It is here.

अग्निपेटिका.english: Matchsticks are inside the match box.
The matchbox is of red color.
I placed the matchbox on the table.

अग्निपेटिका.devanagari: भवान् अग्निपेटिकां मे दातुं शक्नोति किम्?
अग्निपेटिका.transliteration: bhavān agnipeṭikāṃ me dātum shaknoti kim?
अग्निपेटिका.english: Can you give me the matchbox?

अन्तःपेटिका.english: The book is in the drawer.
What are you searching for in the drawer?

चमस.devanagari: चमसेन खादामः। We eat with spoon.

चमस.english: The spoon is in the kitchen.
She washes the spoon with water.

चमस.devanagari: अहं चमसं आवश्यकं करोमि। किं त्वं अपि चमसं चिनोषि?
चमस.transliteration: aham chamasan āvashyakam karomi. Kim tvam api chamasan chinoshi?
चमस.english: I need the spoon. Do you also need a spoon?

शूर्प.english: Ganesha's ear looks like a winnowing pan.
The farmer purifies the grain with a winnowing fan.
I bought a winnowing basket yesterday.
Where do you see the winnowing fan?

शूर्प.devanagari: भो! यह शूर्पः मम अस्ति। त्वं इच्छसि किम्?
शूर्प.transliteration: bho! yah śūrpah mam asti. tvaṁ ichchhasi kim?
शूर्प.english: Hey! This winnowing basket is mine. Do you want it?

पि़टक.devanagari: पिटके धान्यानि सन्ति। Grains are in basket.

पि़टक.english: The basket fell on the ground.

अग्निशलाका.english: The matchstick is easy to find.

शराव.english: Cover the bottle with a lid.
The lid is on top of the bottle.
Hey! Will you give me the lid?

घट.english: Shravana Kumar fills the pot with water.
The pot fell on the ground.

प्रशीतक.devanagari: प्रशीतके पयोहिमम् अस्ति। Ice cream is in the refrigerator.

प्रशीतक.english: I brought milk from the refrigerator.
Is there meat in the refrigerator?

उष्णरक्षक.english: The thermos keeps the fluid warm.

पूगकर्तरी.devanagari: पूगकर्तरी पुगं कर्तयति। Nutcracker cuts nuts.

पिधान.devanagari: कूप्याः पिधानं कुत्र? Where is the bottle cap?

पिधान.english: He placed the lid on the vessel.

चायपात्र.devanagari: चायं चायपात्रे अस्ति। The tea is in teapot.

चायपात्र.english: The teapot is on the table.
Where did you put the teapot?

पोटलिका.english: Provisions from shops are normally given in a sack like bundle.
The merchant carries goods in bundles.
He brought a packet from the market yesterday.

पेषणशिला.english: A grinding stone is used to crush the grain.
Mother ground the spices with a grinding stone.

पेषणशिला.devanagari: भो! त्वं पेषणशिलां मां दातुं शक्नोषि?
पेषणशिला.transliteration: bho! tvaṃ peṣaṇaśilāṃ māṃ dātuṃ śaknoshi?
पेषणशिला.english: Hey! Can you give me the grinding stone?

अयोभाण्ड.english: Grain in stored in the barrel.
Rama filled the metal barrel with water.
Have you seen the metal barrel?

मन्थान.english: Using a chuner, butter is got from curd.
The cowherd holds the churning stick in his hand.
The mother churned the curd with a churning stick.
Who sells churning sticks in the village?
Hey! My churning stick is here.

काष्ठ.english: I bring wood to the house.
Will you give me the wood?

अनिलकोष.devanagari: अनिलकोष: पाकशालायाम् अस्ति। Gas cylinder is in kitchen.

अनिलकोष.english: The gas cylinder was empty yesterday.

अनिलकोष.devanagari: अनिलकोष: क्रयं करणीयः। हाँ, तत् आवश्यकम्।
अनिलकोष.transliteration: anilakoṣaḥ krayaṃ karaṇīyaḥ. Hāṃ, tat āvaśyakam.
अनिलकोष.english: We should buy a gas cylinder. Yes, that is necessary.

प्रणाली.english: Liquids are filled into narrow mouthed containers using a funnel.
The funnel is made of metal.
Maitreya poured water into the pot using a funnel.
Do you have a funnel available?

प्रणाली.devanagari: अरे! मम प्रणाली कुत्र गता? तां खिलु देहि।
प्रणाली.transliteration: are! mama pranālī kutra gatā? tām khilu dehi.
प्रणाली.english: Hey! Where did my funnel go? Please give it to me.

चालनी.english: Fine flour is cleaned with a sieve.
Grain is sifted through a sieve.
Rama purified the flour with a sieve.
Do you know how to use a sieve?

चालनी.devanagari: अरे, मह्यं चालन्या दातुम् शक्नोषि किम्?
चालनी.transliteration: are, mahyaṁ chālnnyā dātum śaknośi kim?
चालनी.english: Hey, can you give me the sieve?

कुण्डिका.english: The disciple brings water to the teacher in a water pot.
The water pot is placed on the table.
The monk brought the water pot to the well.
Give me the water pot, please.

पात्र.devanagari: पात्रं शरावं विना अस्ति। pot is without lid.

पात्र.english: The pot is full of water.
He kept the pot in the kitchen.

भ्राष्ट्र.devanagari: अहम् भ्राष्ट्रे पचामि। I am cooking in frying-pan.

भ्राष्ट्र.english: He bought the frying-pan at the market.
Can you give me the frying-pan?

मृद्घट.english: A clay pot is useful after getting heated by fire.
The earthen pot is filled with water.
He saw the clay pot fall.
Hey! Give me the clay pot.

चमसी.english: The spoon is in the kitchen.
Mother mixes milk in the pudding with a spoon.
Hey, give me one spoon please.

दर्वी.devanagari: पाकशालायां एका दर्वी अस्ति। There is one ladle in kitchen.

दर्वी.english: This ladle is made of metal.
The cook mixed the soup with a ladle.

चषकाधानिका.devanagari: चषकाधानिकया चायं आनय। Bring tea with saucer.

चषकाधानिका.english: Hey! Give me the saucer please.

शिक्य.english: Flower pot hangs from the pot sling.
Ram brought the pot with the pot sling.
Is the pot sling available to you?
Hey! Give me the pot sling.

ऋजीष.devanagari: निलेषः ऋजीषेन रोटिकां पचति। Nilesh cooks roti on frypan.

ऋजीष.english: Mother keeps the frying-pan on the fire.

ऋजीष.devanagari: बालकः ऋजीषेन तैलं तप्तं करोति स्म।
ऋजीष.transliteration: Bālakah ṛjīṣena tailaṁ taptaṁ karoti sma.
ऋजीष.english: The boy heated oil in the frying-pan.

चषक.devanagari: अहं चषकेण जलं पिबामि। I drink wather with glass.

चषक.english: He places the glass on the table.
Did you drink milk from the glass?
There was wine in this cup.

कूपी.devanagari: सीता चषकेण कूप्यां जलं पूरयति। Sita with glass filliing up water in bottle.

कूपी.english: The boy drinks milk from the bottle.
The mother kept honey in the bottle.

गलन्तिका.english: Water stored in a pitcher is delicious.
The pitcher is made of clay.
Rama bought a pitcher at the market.
In which pitcher is the milk?
Hello! How much does this pitcher cost?

रन्ध्रदर्वी.devanagari: रन्ध्रदर्वी दीर्घा अस्ति। Ladle is long.

रन्ध्रदर्वी.english: The slotted ladle is immersed in the sauce.
The cook removed the food with the slotted ladle.
For whom is the slotted ladle necessary?
Please accept the slotted ladle, sir.

समदर्वी.english: ladle is used for cooking puri.
The ladle is useful for distributing sauce.
Mother dropped the ladle into the food vessel.
Will you give me the ladle?

नलिका.devanagari: नलिकायाः जलं स्रवति। Water flows from tap.

पीठम्.devanagari: भरतः पीठे रोटिकां निर्माति। Bharat creates chapaati in seat.

पीठम्.english: The king sits on the seat.

उखा.devanagari: सौजन्या उखायां चायं पचति। Saujanya prepares tea in sausepan.

उखा.english: Mother heats milk in the saucepan.
Father cooked rice in the saucepan.

उखा.devanagari: यह उखा बहुत अच्छा है। हाँ, यह नया उखा है।
उखा.transliteration: Yah ukhā bahut achhā hai. Hāṁ, yah nayā ukhā hai.
उखा.english: This saucepan is very good. Yes, it is a new saucepan.

वर्धमानक.devanagari: वर्धमानके वस्तुनि स्थापय। Put things in pot.

वर्धमानक.english: The pot is full of food.
I filled the pot with water.

कटाह.devanagari: गृहिणी कटाहे नवनीतं पचति। Housewife cooks butter in shallow-boiler.

कटाह.english: There is a shallow boiler in the kitchen.
The cook heated oil in the shallow boiler.
Where is the shallow boiler located?

कटाह.devanagari: भो! कटाहः तत्र रखः इति कथयतु।
कटाह.transliteration: Bho! KaTāhaḥ tatra rakhaḥ iti kathaytau.
कटाह.english: Hey! Please tell me the shallow boiler is kept there.

स्थाली.devanagari: पाकशालायां बहवः स्थाल्यः सन्ति। In Kitchen, there are many cooking-vessels.

स्थाली.english: This cooking-vessel is made of clay.
Mother cooked food in the cooking-vessel.

सन्दंशिका.devanagari: पाकसमये सन्दंशिका पाकशालायाम् उप्युज्यते। In Kitchen at cooking time, Clip is used.

सन्दंशिका.english: He held the paper with a clip.

सन्दंशिका.devanagari: भवान् सन्दंशिकां मह्यं दातुं शक्नोति किम्?
सन्दंशिका.transliteration: bhavān sandamshikām mahyam dātum shaknoti kim?
सन्दंशिका.english: Can you give me the clip?

उद्ध्मान.devanagari: स्त्री उद्ध्मानेन सूपं पचति। Lady cooks dal in stove.

उद्ध्मान.english: Is there water on the stove?

उद्ध्मान.devanagari: भोः! उद्ध्मानं निर्वाप करणीयम्। अग्निः प्रचण्डः अस्ति।
उद्ध्मान.transliteration: bhoh! uddhmanam nirvapa karaniyam. agnih prachhandah asti.
उद्ध्मान.english: Hey! The stove must be extinguished. The fire is too strong.

उदञ्चन.devanagari: उदञ्चने जलं पूरयतु। Fill up water in bucket.

उदञ्चन.english: The bucket carries a lot of weight.
Rama brought water from the well with a bucket.
Who dropped the bucket in the river?
Hey, please give me that bucket.

सन्दंशः.devanagari: गृहिणी सन्दंशेन रोटिकां पात्रे स्थापयति। Housewife keeps roti in pot through a pair of tongs or

सन्दंशः.english: The boy holds wood with tongs.
The servant touched the fire with tongs.

सन्दंशः.devanagari: भोः! मे सन्दंशं यच्छ। कार्यं कर्तव्यम्।
सन्दंशः.transliteration: bhoh! me sandanshah yachcha. karyam kartavyam.
सन्दंशः.english: Hey! Give me the tongs. Work must be done.

पीठिका.devanagari: रामः पीठिकायां रोटिकां निर्माति। Ram creates chapaati in pedestal.

पीठिका.english: I am arranging the pedestal in order to worship the goddess.
Bhima placed the musk on the pedestal.
Are you satisfied with the pedestal?

पीठिका.devanagari: अयं पीठिका कति रूप्यकानां अस्ति? - षष्ठी शतं रूप्यकानां।
पीठिका.transliteration: Ayaṃ pīṭhikā kati rūpyakānāṃ asti? - ṣaṣṭhī śataṃ rūpyakānāṃ.
पीठिका.english: How much does this pedestal cost? - Six hundred rupees.

बाष्पस्थाली.devanagari: गृहिणी बाष्पस्थाल्यां ताण्डुलं पचति। Housewife is cooking rice in pressure cooker.

बाष्पस्थाली.english: Mother cooked lentils in the pressure cooker yesterday.

बाष्पस्थाली.devanagari: भवान् बाष्पस्थाल्यां कमलं स्थापयिष्यति। हाँ, अहं तत् करिष्यामि।
बाष्पस्थाली.transliteration: bhavān bāṣpasthālyāṁ kamalaṁ sthāpayiṣyati. hāñ, ahaṁ tat kariṣyāmi.
बाष्पस्थाली.english: Will you place the lotus in the pressure cooker? Yes, I will do that.

वेल्लनी.devanagari: लक्ष्मणः वेल्लन्या रोटिकां पीठिकायां निर्माति। Laxman with rolling pin creates chapati in pedestal.

वेल्लनी.english: Mother flattens the dough with the rolling pin.

वेल्लनी.devanagari: रसोइका वेल्लन्यां उपयुक्तां कृत्वा भक्ष्यं तयारं कृते।
वेल्लनी.transliteration: Rasoikā vellanyāṁ upyuktāṁ kṛtvā bhakṣyaṁ tayāraṁ kṛte.
वेल्लनी.english: The cook prepared the food by using the rolling pin skillfully.
Where do you keep the rolling pin?

वेल्लनी.devanagari: अरे, मेरा वेल्लनी कहाँ है? - यह रसोई में है।
वेल्लनी.transliteration: Are, merā vellnī kahāṁ hai? - Yah rasoi meṁ hai.
वेल्लनी.english: Hey, where is my rolling pin? - It is in the kitchen.

कटोर.devanagari: बालकः कटोरेण जलं पिबति। Boy drinks water with earthen vessel.

कटोर.english: Mother gives yogurt in an earthen vessel.
Father placed rice in the earthen vessel.

कटोर.devanagari: भ्रातर्! कटोरं आनय। मिष्टान्नं खादितुम् इच्छामि।
कटोर.transliteration: bhrātar! kaTōraṁ ānaya. miṣṭānnaṁ khāditum ichhāmi.
कटोर.english: Brother! Bring the earthen vessel. I want to eat sweets.

हसन्ती.devanagari: पुरातनसमये, महिलाः हसन्त्या भोजनं पक्ववत्यः। In old times, women used to cook food on portable fire-vessel.

हसन्ती.english: She lights the fire with the portable fire-vessel.
The villagers used to carry the portable fire-vessel on their journey.
Do you know the use of the portable fire-vessel?

हसन्ती.devanagari: भद्रे! हसन्त्या मे तापयितुं शक्नोषि किम्?
हसन्ती.transliteration: bhadre! hasantyā me tāpayituṁ śaknośi kim?
हसन्ती.english: Dear lady! Can you help me heat things with your portable fire-vessel?

करक.devanagari: बालिका सरितः जलं करकेण आनयति। Girl brings water through water-pot from river.

करक.english: The housewife fills the water-pot with water.
He bought the water-pot at the market.

करक.devanagari: करकः भग्नः। तव करकः कुत्र अस्ति?
करक.transliteration: karakaḥ bhagnaḥ. tava karakaḥ kutra asti?
करक.english: The water-pot is broken. Where is your water-pot?

विद्युद्दीप.devanagari: विद्युद्दीपः ज्वलति। Electric lamp is glowing.

विद्युद्दीप.english: Hey, where is the electric lamp?

घरट्ट.devanagari: आपणस्वामी घरट्टेण गोधुमं घर्षति। The shopowner is grinding wheat through Grindingstone.

घरट्ट.english: The mother ground the spices with the grinding stone.
Where is the grinding stone located?
Hey, give me the grinding stone.

व्यजन.devanagari: गृहे व्यजनम् अस्ति। Fan is in house.

व्यजन.english: Do you want to see the fan?

दिनदर्शिका.devanagari: दिनदर्शिका भित्याम् अस्ति। Calander is on the wall.

दिनदर्शिका.english: Do you see the wall calendar?

छुरिका.devanagari: छुरिकया शाकं कर्तयतु। Cut the vegetable with knife.

छुरिका.english: He cut the meat with a knife.
Where do you keep the knife?

कन्दु.devanagari: कन्दु: कुत्र अस्ति । Where is the kettel.

कन्दु.english: The kettle was on the fire.
How many rupees does the kettle cost?
Hey, will you give me the kettle?

शङ्कुला.devanagari: शङ्कुला आम्र्फलानि खण्डयति। Pair of nippers or scissors cuts mangoes into pieces.

शङ्कुला.english: I cut the paper with scissors.
Will you give me the scissors?

आसन.devanagari: आसने उपविश्य पूजां करोमि। Sitting on the seat I worship
भोः! मे आसनं दद इति कथयसि किम्?
आसन.transliteration: bhoḥ! me āsanaṁ dada iti kathayasi kim?
आसन.english: Hey! You say 'give me the seat', don't you?

दूरदर्शन.devanagari: चलच्चित्रम् दूरदर्शनेन पश्यामः। We see movie with television.

दूरदर्शन.english: I watched the news on television yesterday.
What do you watch on television?
Television is a favorite thing for children.

पेषणशीला.devanagari: आपणस्वामी पेषणशिलया गोधुमं घर्षति। The shopowner is grinding wheat through Grindingstone.

पेषणशीला.english: The mother grinds rice with the grinding stone.
The girl ground lentils with the grinding stone yesterday.
Do you grind spices with the grinding stone?

पेषणशीला.devanagari: अरे, पेषणशिला कुत्र अस्ति? मुझे सहायता कर।
पेषणशीला.transliteration: are, peṣaṇaśilā kutra asti? mujhe sahāytā kar.
पेषणशीला.english: Hey, where is the grinding stone? Help me.

पीठी.devanagari: पीठे देवः विराजमानः अस्ति। The God is regally seated on the seat.

पीठी.english: The king causes a golden seat to be made.

पीठी.devanagari: ऋषिः पीठ्यां उपविष्टः ध्यानं करोति स्म।
पीठी.transliteration: ṛṣiḥ pīṭhyāṁ upviṣṭaḥ dhyānaṁ karoti sma.
पीठी.english: The sage sat on the seat and meditated.

चन्दन.devanagari: चन्दनस्य परिमलः मनोहरः। The fragrance of sandal is pleasant.

चन्दन.english: I wish to buy a piece of sandal.
Do you know the qualities of sandal?

चन्दन.devanagari: चन्दनं सुगन्धि अस्ति, अत्र सहमति करोषि?
चन्दन.transliteration: chandanaṁ sugandhī asti, atra sahmati karoṣi?
चन्दन.english: Sandal is fragrant, do you agree with this?

आकाशवाणी.devanagari: आकाशवाण्या वार्ताः श्रूयन्ताम्। Listen news via radio.

आकाशवाणी.english: I heard the news on the radio.
Do you listen to the radio?

आकाशवाणी.devanagari: आकाशवाणी बहु रोचकी अस्ति। आम्, सः सत्यम्।
आकाशवाणी.transliteration: ākāśavāṇī bahu rochakī asti। ām, saḥ satyam।
आकाशवाणी.english: The radio is very interesting. Yes, that is true.

पीठ.devanagari: पीठे देवः विराजमानः अस्ति। The God is regally seated on the seat.

पीठ.english: The king was seated on the seat.
How long do you sit on the seat?

पीठ.devanagari: अयं पीठः बहु सुन्दरः अस्ति। हाँ, सत्यमेव।
पीठ.transliteration: ayaṁ pīṭhaḥ bahu sundaraḥ asti. hāñ, satyamev.
पीठ.english: This seat is very beautiful. Yes, indeed it is.

गन्धवर्तिका.devanagari: नार्या मन्दिरे गन्धवर्तिका प्रज्वालिता। Incense was lit by the woman in the temple.

गन्धवर्तिका.english: The incense gives a pleasant fragrance.
The priest lit the incense in the temple.

गन्धवर्तिका.devanagari: अह, गन्धवर्तिकायाः सुगन्धः कति सुन्दरः! हाँ, तत् अत्यन्तं रमणीयम्।
गन्धवर्तिका.transliteration: aha, gandhavartiká kati sundaraḥ! hā̃, tat atyantaṃ ramaṇíyam.
गन्धवर्तिका.english: Oh, how beautiful is the fragrance of the incense! Yes, it is very pleasant.

दीपशिखा.devanagari: दीपशिखा तमः अपहरति। The flame of the lamp removes darkness.

दीपशिखा.english: The lamp flame was shaken by the wind.
Can the lamp flame be seen?
How beautiful this lamp flame is!

कर्पूर.devanagari: कर्पूरस्य वर्णः श्वेतः। The color of camphor is white

माला.english: The beautiful garland is made from flowers.

विभूति.devanagari: शिवभक्ताः विभूतिं मस्तके धरन्ति। The devotees of Shiva apply holy-ash on forehead./

विभूति.english: Where do you buy holy ash?
I give holy ash to the devotees.

अक्षत.devanagari: अक्षतैः पूजयामि। I worship with the unbroken grains

अक्षत.english: The unbroken grain is kept in the temple.
The god accepted the unbroken grain.
Who will bring the unbroken grain?

अक्षत.devanagari: भोः! अक्षतः कुत्र अस्ति? — इह अस्ति।
अक्षत.transliteration: Bhoḥ! Akṣataḥ kutra asti? — Iha asti.
अक्षत.english: Hey! Where is the unbroken grain? — It is here.

प्रसाद.devanagari: अर्चकः देवेभ्यः प्रसादं निवेदयति। The worshipper offers eatables to the deities.

प्रसाद.english: The devotee offers the religious food to God.
Yesterday, the blessed food was distributed in the temple.
Come brother, the blessed food is pure.

घण्टिका.devanagari: घण्टिकां वादयामि। I sound the bell.

घण्टिका.english: The bell makes a sweet sound.

घण्टिका.devanagari: हे मित्र, घण्टिकां पश्य! ईश्वरस्य पूजायां घण्टिका आवश्यका अस्ति।
घण्टिका.transliteration: he mitra, ghantikāṁ paśya! īśvarasya pūjāyāṁ ghantikā āvaśyakā asti.
घण्टिका.english: Hey friend, look at the bell! The bell is necessary in worship of God.

आचमनी.devanagari: आचमनीं पूरयतु। Fill the water pot.

आचमनी.english: The water pot is full of water.
He brought the water pot from the house.
Hey, please give me the water pot.

घण्टा.english: The bell makes a sweet sound.
Was the bell in the temple?

हरिद्रा.devanagari: हरिद्रायाः वर्णः पीतः। The color of the turmeric is yellow.
माता हरिद्रां रसोइ घरे उपयोजयति स्म।
हरिद्रा.transliteration: mata haridram rasoi ghare upayojayati sma.
हरिद्रा.english: Mother used to apply turmeric in the kitchen.

हरिद्रा.devanagari: हरिद्रा स्वास्थ्यकरी अस्ति। आवां इदं भोजने योजयावः।
हरिद्रा.transliteration: haridra swasthyakari asti. avam idam bhojane yojayavah.
हरिद्रा.english: Turmeric is healthy. Let us add it to the food.

धनभाण्ड.devanagari: धनभाण्डे भक्ताः धनं स्थापयन्ति। Devotees place money in the collection box.

धनभाण्ड.english: The boy puts coins in the piggy bank.

धनभाण्ड.devanagari: अहं कल धनभाण्डे धनं संचयं कृतवान्।
धनभाण्ड.transliteration: Aham kala dhanabhāṇḍe dhanam sanchayam kṛtavān.
धनभाण्ड.english: I saved money in the piggy bank yesterday.

धनभाण्ड.devanagari: किं तव धनभाण्डे पर्याप्तं धनं विद्यते?
धनभाण्ड.transliteration: Kim tava dhanabhāṇḍe paryāptam dhanam vidyate?
धनभाण्ड.english: Is there enough money in your piggy bank?

धनभाण्ड.devanagari: भोह! मम धनभाण्डं दृश्यताम्। कति सिक्कास् आसन्!
धनभाण्ड.transliteration: Bhoh! mama dhanabhāṇḍam dṛśyatām. kati sikkās āsan!
धनभाण्ड.english: Hey! Look at my piggy bank. How many coins there are!

रक्षासूत्र.devanagari: सः रक्षासूत्रम् मणिबन्धे बध्नाति। He ties the protecting thread on the wrist.

रक्षासूत्र.english: The girl wears the protecting thread.
The brother gave the protecting thread to his sister.
Have you worn the protecting thread?
Dear lady! Where did you obtain the protecting thread?

नैवेद्य.devanagari: बालकृष्णाय नवनीतं नैवेद्यं निवेदितम्। Butter was offered to Bala Krishna

नैवेद्य.english: I offer food to the deity.
Delicious food was prepared as an offering in the temple.
What food should be offered to the Lord?
O priest! Where is the religious offering kept?

कुङ्कुम.devanagari: सा कुङ्कुमेन तिलकं धरति। She marks her forehead with saffron paint.

कुङ्कुम.english: There was saffron paint on his hands.
Do you wish to buy saffron paint?

कुङ्कुम.devanagari: अहं कुङ्कुमम् वहामि। त्वं किम् आनयसि?
कुङ्कुम.transliteration: ahaṃ kuṅkumam vahāmi. tvaṃ kim ānayasi?
कुङ्कुम.english: I am bringing saffron paint. What are you bringing?

वर्ति.english: There should be oil and a wick in an oil lamp.
The wick makes light in the lamp.

वर्ति.devanagari: भोः! वर्तिः कुत्र अस्ति? मे दीपस्य वर्तिः नष्टा।
वर्ति.transliteration: bhoḥ! vartiḥ kutra asti? me dīpasya vartiḥ naṣṭā.
वर्ति.english: Hey! Where is the wick? The wick of my lamp is lost.

वक्रदीप.devanagari: वक्रदीपः ज्वलति। CFL lamp is glowing.

वक्रदीप.english: Hey, we need the CFL bulb.

शौचगृह.devanagari: एतत् शौचगृहम् अस्ति। This is toilet.

विद्युत्कन्द.devanagari: मम गृहे विद्युत्कन्दः नास्ति। No tungsten lamp at my home.

विद्युत्कन्द.english: The tungsten filament is important, isn't it?

दूरवाणी.devanagari: दूरवाण्या सम्भाषणं करोतु। Talk via telephone.

दूरवाणी.english: How do you speak on the telephone?
Hey, make a call on the telephone!

ध्वनिवर्धक.devanagari: ध्वनिवर्धकेन सङ्गीतं श्रूयते। Music is heard on speaker.

ध्वनिवर्धक.english: I want to buy a speaker.
Where did you buy the speaker?

चित्रकट.devanagari: चित्रकटं प्रसारयतु। Spread the color mat.

चित्रकट.english: The colored mat is on the ground.
I wanted to buy the colored mat yesterday.
Is the colored mat in your house?
Friend, what is the price of the colored mat?

समीकर.devanagari: समीकरः कुत्र अस्ति। Where is the Iron?

समीकर.english: I flatten the cloth with the flat iron.
The flat iron was broken, but now it is repaired.

पुष्पाधानी.devanagari: पुष्पाधान्यां पुष्पाणि सन्ति। Flowers are in the flower vase.

पुष्पाधानी.english: The beautiful flower vase is on the table.
I filled the flower vase with water.
Which flower vase had the red flowers?
Hey! Will you bring the flower vase?

विद्युद्व्यजन.devanagari: विद्युद्व्यजनं चालय। Switch on the fan.

विद्युद्व्यजन.english: The electric fan operates at high speed.

विद्युद्व्यजन.devanagari: अहं विद्युद्व्यजनं कः दिनम् उपयोगं अकरवम्।
विद्युद्व्यजन.transliteration: ahaṃ vidyud-vyajanaṃ kaḥ dinam upayogaṃ akaravham.
विद्युद्व्यजन.english: I used the electric fan yesterday.
Does the electric fan make cool air?
Hey, please turn off the electric fan.

आच्छादक.devanagari: आच्छादकेन शीतलता न भवति। Cold will not be there with blanket.

आच्छादक.english: I used a blanket at night.

आच्छादक.devanagari: अहं आच्छादकम् आवश्यकम् मन्ये। त्वम् किम् मन्यसे?
आच्छादक.transliteration: Aham āchChādakam āvaśyakam manye. Tvam kim manyase?
आच्छादक.english: I think the blanket is necessary. What do you think?

संमार्जनी.devanagari: संमार्जन्या संमार्जनं करोतु। Clear with broom.

संमार्जनी.english: A broom is necessary in the house.
She swept the floor with the broom.

दूरनियन्त्रक.devanagari: दूरनियन्त्रकेण दूरदर्शनम् प्रवर्तयति। Television is operated by remotecontroller.

दूरनियन्त्रक.english: The remote controller is in my hand.
Who is looking for the remote controller?
I found the remote controller yesterday.
Where is the remote controller? It was here.

चलदूरवाणी.devanagari: चलदूरवाणी कुत्र अस्ति? Where is the mobile?

चलदूरवाणी.english: Do you use a mobile phone?
I went to buy a mobile phone yesterday.
Hey! What is the price of your mobile phone?

वातानुकूलित.devanagari: ग्रीष्मकाले वतानुकुलतम् आवश्यकम्। In the summer airconditioner is needed.

वातानुकूलित.english: The air conditioner was placed in the room.
Do you want to turn on the air conditioner?

वातानुकूलित.devanagari: वातानुकूलितम् अत्यधिकं शीतलम् अस्ति। न्यूनतरं शक्तिं कुरु।
वातानुकूलित.transliteration: vātānukūlitam atyadhikaṁ śītalam asti. nyūnataraṁ śaktiṁ kuru.
वातानुकूलित.english: The air conditioner is too cold. Reduce the power.

चित्रग्राहिणी.devanagari: चित्रग्राहिण्या चित्रं गृह्णातु। Take picture with camera.
कल मैंने चित्रग्राहिण्या फूलों की छायाचित्रं अकरवम्।
चित्रग्राहिणी.transliteration: kal maiṁne chitragrahiṇyā phūlōṁ kī chhāyāchitram akarvam.
चित्रग्राहिणी.english: Yesterday I took photos of flowers with the camera.

चित्रग्राहिणी.devanagari: अरे, मम चित्रग्राहिणी दृश्यते। किम् भवान् अपि छायाचित्रं कर्तुम् इच्छसि?
चित्रग्राहिणी.transliteration: are, mama chitragrahiṇī dṛśyate. kim bhavān api chhāyāchitram kartum ichchhasi?
चित्रग्राहिणी.english: Hey, here is my camera. Do you also want to take a photo?

अट्टाधारिका.devanagari: अट्टाधारिका उपरि अस्ति। Ceiling beam is on top.

अट्टाधारिका.english: The ceiling beam used to support the building's weight.
Oh! The ceiling beam might be broken.

सिक्थवर्तिका.english: Some light a candle on the birthdays.
I lit the candle in the room.

द्वारसन्धिक.devanagari: द्वारसन्धिकेन द्वारं तिष्ठति। Door stands with the door joint.

द्वारसन्धिक.english: The craftsman made the door joint.

शलाका.devanagari: वातायाने शलाकाः सन्ति। Strings are there in the window.

शलाका.english: Who will fix the window string?
I cleaned the window string yesterday.
Hey! Please renew the window string.

घटी.english: The clock is placed in the box.
The clock is lost. Bring a new clock.

वारङ्ग.devanagari: वारङ्गेन द्वारं पिदधातु। Close the door with the door handle.

वारङ्ग.english: The door handle is made of gold.
Hey, please hold the door handle firmly.

विभेद.devanagari: भित्तौ विभेदः अस्ति। There is a crack in the wall.

विभेद.english: A crack is visible in the stone.
Hey, why is this crack so deep?

मृद्दीप.devanagari: मृद्दीपः तैलेन ज्वलति। Clay lamp glows with oil.

मृद्दीप.english: The clay lamp gives light at night.
Hey! Will you give me the clay lamp?

छद.english: The tile is on the roof of the house.
With tiles, a roof can be built.

छद.devanagari: यः छदः भूमौ पतितः? एषः छदः।
छद.transliteration: Yaḥ chadaḥ bhūmau patitaḥ? Eṣaḥ chadaḥ.
छद.english: Which tile fell on the ground? This tile.

नेयदीप.english: In the past, people studied by lighting a lantern.
Ramesh went to the market to buy a lantern.
Hey! Please give me my lantern.

पाकशाला.devanagari: पाकशालायां माता पचति। Mother cooks in the kitchen.

पाकशाला.english: The fire burns in the kitchen.
Yesterday the girl cooked food in the kitchen.
Is there a vegetable in the kitchen?
Hey! Bring water to the kitchen.

मृच्छद.devanagari: मृच्छदेन छदिः अस्ति। Ceiling is made up of clay tiles.

मृच्छद.english: The clay tile is made from earth.
Was the clay tile beautiful in the house?

मृच्छद.devanagari: मृच्छदेन भवनं रक्षितम्। आम्, तत् उचितम् आसीत्।
मृच्छद.transliteration: mṛcchādena bhavanaṁ rakṣitam. ām, tat ucitam āsīt.
मृच्छद.english: The building was protected by clay tiles. Yes, that was appropriate.

अर्गल.devanagari: अर्गलं द्वारपिधानार्थं भवति। Door lock is to lock the door.

अर्गल.english: The door lock is made of metal.
He fastened the door lock with a key.
Did you unlock the door lock?

अर्गल.devanagari: अर्गलं दृढं कुरु, कारणं तु चौरैः भयं वर्तते।
अर्गल.transliteration: argalaṁ dṛḍhaṁ kuru, kāraṇaṁ tu chauraiḥ bhayaṁ vartate.
अर्गल.english: Make the door lock secure, because there is fear of thieves.

त्रिका.devanagari: त्रिका कूपाद् जलं उन्नेतुं उपयुज्यते। Pulley is used to extract water from well.
त्रिका जलं नदीसमीपे स्थितेषु क्षेत्रेषु सिञ्चनाय कार्यते।
त्रिका.transliteration: Trikā jalam nadīsamīpe sthiteṣu kṣetreṣu siñchanāy kāryate.
त्रिका.english: The pulley is used for irrigation in fields located near the river.

त्रिका.devanagari: किसान: कस्मिन् समये त्रिकायाः उपयोगः कृतः?
त्रिका.transliteration: Kisān: kasmin samaye trikāyāḥ upayogaḥ kṛtaḥ?
त्रिका.english: Farmer: At what time was the pulley used?
