त्रिका.devanagari: मेरे पिता प्रतिदिनं त्रिकां चलितवान् जलानयनार्थम्।
त्रिका.transliteration: Mere pitā pratidin trikām chalitavān jalānayan-ārtham.
त्रिका.english: My father used to operate the pulley daily to draw water.

त्रिका.devanagari: अरे! त्रिका टूटिता। नवीनां त्रिकां आनयस्व।
त्रिका.transliteration: Are! Trikā ṭūtitā. Navīnāṁ trikāṁ ānayasva.
त्रिका.english: Hey! The pulley is broken. Bring a new pulley.

कवाट.devanagari: द्वारे कवाटानि भवन्ति। Door panels are in the door.

कवाट.english: The door panel is made of wood.
Paint was applied to the door panel.

भुवर्.devanagari: भुवः नीलः अस्ति। The sky is blue.

भुवर्.english: Look at the sky! It is so beautiful.

स्वर्.devanagari: स्वः इन्द्रं पालयति। Indra rules heaven.

प्रातर्.devanagari: प्रातः देवालयस्य गमनं सुशीलम्। Going to the temple in the morning is a good habit.

प्रातर्.english: In the morning, the sun rises.
In the morning, I studied the lesson.
What do you do in the morning?
Come in the morning! Let us eat breakfast.

पुनर्.devanagari: शिक्षकः पुनः आगच्छति। Teacher comes again.

पुनर्.english: I came again. How are you?

छायाचित्र.english: Will you give me the photograph?

पेटिका.english: What are you keeping in the box?

अद्य.english: Today there are clouds in the sky.
This morning I went to school.

अद्य.devanagari: अद्य बहु उष्णम् अस्ति, न किम्?
अद्य.transliteration: Adya bahu uṣṇam asti, na kim?
अद्य.english: It's very hot today, isn't it?

सूची.english: A thread is necessary to hold the needle.

कुड्मल.english: The button is made of gold.
Hey! Will you give me the button?

ग्रन्थि.english: There are hundreds of knot types
The knot of the rope is strong.

ग्रन्थि.devanagari: अयं ग्रन्थिः कठिनः इव प्रतीयते, किम् न?
ग्रन्थि.transliteration: ayaṃ granthiḥ kathinaḥ iva pratīyate, kim na?
ग्रन्थि.english: This knot seems difficult, doesn't it?

बहुधा.devanagari: परिष्कारः बहुधा कर्तुं शक्यते। Resolution can be done in many ways.

बहुधा.english: Knowledge is obtained in many ways.
His problems were resolved in many ways.

बहुधा.devanagari: भाषा बहुधा शिक्षितुं न शक्यते किम्?
बहुधा.transliteration: bhāṣā bahudhā śikṣituṁ na śakyate kim?
बहुधा.english: Cannot language be taught in many ways?
Hey! You think the work should be done in many ways.

इव.devanagari: नटः राजा इव अभिनयति। Actor acts like king.

इव.english: The girl is beautiful like a flower.

इव.devanagari: सः वायुः इव द्रुतम् गच्छति स्म।
इव.transliteration: Saḥ vāyuḥ iva drutam gacchati sma.
इव.english: He went quickly like the wind.

इव.devanagari: किम् एषः सिंहः इव वीरः नास्ति?
इव.transliteration: Kim eṣaḥ siṃhaḥ iva vīraḥ nāsti?
इव.english: Is he not brave like a lion?

इव.devanagari: भवान् मित्रः इव मे प्रिये भवति।
इव.transliteration: Bhavān mitraḥ iva me priye bhavati.
इव.english: You are dear to me like a friend.

रज्जु.english: The rope looks like a snake.
A strong rope is tied to the tree.

रज्जु.devanagari: भोः! रज्जुः कुत्र अस्ति? एषा रज्जुः भवान्नः अददात्।
रज्जु.transliteration: bhoḥ! rajjuḥ kutra asti? eṣā rajjuḥ bhavānnah adadāt.
रज्जु.english: Hey! Where is the rope? You gave us this rope.

धनसञ्चयकोष.english: Little by little save money in the piggy bank.
The boy puts coins in the piggy bank.
I deposited one hundred rupees in the piggy bank.
How many rupees are in your piggy bank?
Agree, the piggy bank is the best tool for saving.

निःश्रेणिका.english: Ladder is used to reach high places.
The ladder is leaning against the wall.
Rama climbed onto the roof with the help of the ladder.
How many ladders are there in the house?
Hey! Will you give me the ladder?

कुत्र.devanagari: पुस्तकं कुत्र अस्ति? Where is the book?

कुत्र.english: I was somewhere. I don't know where.

न.devanagari: बालकःः न पठति। Boy does not study.

सदा.devanagari: सदा रामनाम वदतु। Tell Name of the Rama always.

सदा.english: He was always in the house.

अत्र.devanagari: अत्र कः अस्ति? Who is here?

अत्र.english: There is a beautiful forest here.

अपि.devanagari: वृद्धः अपि धावति। Old man also runs.

तत्र.devanagari: तत्र कः अस्ति? Who is there?

तत्र.english: Go there. I will come there.

एव.devanagari: बालकः मधुरम् एव इच्छति। Boy likes only sweet.

एव.english: Hey, only the teacher gives knowledge.

किन्तु.devanagari: पाठः सरलः अस्ति किन्तु सः न पठति। The lesson is easy. But he does not read.
सः धनवान् अस्ति किन्तु सुखी नहि।
किन्तु.transliteration: saḥ dhanvān asti kintu sukhī nahi.
किन्तु.english: He is wealthy but not happy.

किन्तु.devanagari: अहं कार्यं कृतवान् किन्तु सः अकृतवान्।
किन्तु.transliteration: ahaṃ kāryaṃ kṛtvān kintu saḥ akṛtvān.
किन्तु.english: I did the work but he did not.

किन्तु.devanagari: भोजनं स्वादु अस्ति किन्तु महत् नास्ति?
किन्तु.transliteration: bhojanam svādu asti kintu mahat nāsti?
किन्तु.english: Is the food delicious but not abundant?
I waited long but he did not come.

सह.devanagari: बालकः मित्रेण सह गच्छति। Boy goes along with friend.

सह.english: The mother eats food along with her son.
The father went to the garden along with his sister.

सह.devanagari: कිम् त्वं आचार्येण सह पाठं पठसि?
सह.transliteration: Kim tvam āchāryena saha pāṭham paṭhasi?
सह.english: Do you study the lesson along with the teacher?

सह.devanagari: हे बालक! त्वं मेन सह खेलतु।
सह.transliteration: He bālak! Tvam mena saha khelatāv.
सह.english: Hey boy! Play along with me.

राष्ट्रियध्वज.english: The national flag is a symbol of India.
The national flag was hoisted on this day.

राष्ट्रियध्वज.devanagari: भारतीयः राष्ट्रियध्वजः कति वर्षानि प्राचीनः अस्ति?
राष्ट्रियध्वज.transliteration: Bhāratīyah rāṣṭriyadhvajah kati varṣāni prāchīnah asti?
राष्ट्रियध्वज.english: How many years old is the Indian national flag?
Do you see the national flag?

परन्तु.devanagari: परीक्षा अस्ति परन्तु सः न लिखति। There is exam. But he does not write.
सः गृहे वसति परन्तु विद्यालयं न गच्छति।
परन्तु.transliteration: saḥ gṛhe vasati parāntu vidyālayaṃ na gacchati.
परन्तु.english: He lives at home but does not go to school.

परन्तु.devanagari: अहं भोजनं खादितवान्, परन्तु जलं न पीतवान्।
परन्तु.transliteration: ahaṃ bhojanam khāditavān, parāntu jalaṃ na pītavān.
परन्तु.english: I ate food, but I did not drink water.

परन्तु.devanagari: किं त्वम् पुस्तकं पठिष्यसि परन्तु खेलनं न करिष्यसि?
परन्तु.transliteration: kiṃ tvam pustakam paṭhiṣyasi parāntu khelenam na kariṣyasi?
परन्तु.english: Will you study the book but not play?

परन्तु.devanagari: भवान् आगच्छति परन्तु भवती न आगच्छति।
परन्तु.transliteration: bhavān āgachhati parāntu bhvatī na āgachhati.
परन्तु.english: He comes but she does not come.

च.devanagari: बाालकः कथां कवितां च वदति। Boy tells story and poem.
सः पुस्तकं लेखनीं च गृहं नयति।
च.transliteration: saḥ pustakam lekhaniim ch grham nayati.
च.english: He brings book and pen to home.

च.devanagari: रमा फलानि खादित वाटिकां च देखित।
च.transliteration: rama phalani khadit vatikam ch dekhit.
च.english: Rama ate fruits and saw the garden.

च.devanagari: किम् त्वं पत्रं लेखसि मित्रं च पश्यसि?
च.transliteration: kim tvam patram lekhasi mitram ch pashyasi?
च.english: Do you write letter and see friend?

च.devanagari: भवान् नमस्ते! अहं पाठं कर्तुम् आगच्छामि।
च.transliteration: bhavan namaste! aham patham kartum agachchhami.
च.english: Hello sir! I come to do the lesson and more.

इति.devanagari: वन्दे मातरम् इति सैनिकः वदति। Soldier says 'Vande Mataram'
अहं शिष्यः अस्मि इति कन्या अवदत्।
इति.transliteration: ahaṃ śiṣyaḥ asmi iti kanyā avdat.
इति.english: The girl said, 'I am a student.'

इति.devanagari: कः एतां पुस्तकं पठति इति त्वं जानासि?
इति.transliteration: kaḥ etāṃ pustakam paṭhati iti tvam jānāsi?
इति.english: Do you know who reads this book?

इति.devanagari: सः भोजनं करिष्यति इति मन्यसे किम्?
इति.transliteration: saḥ bhojanam kariṣyati iti manyase kim?
इति.english: Do you think he will eat food (like this)?

राष्ट्रियमुद्राचिह्न - अशोकचिह्न.english: The national emblem of India is the Ashok Emblem.

राष्ट्रियमुद्राचिह्न - अशोकचिह्न.devanagari: अशोकचिह्नम् प्राचीन भारतस्य सम्राटेन अशोकेन निर्मितम् आसीत्।
राष्ट्रियमुद्राचिह्न - अशोकचिह्न.transliteration: ashokchihnma prāchīn bhāratasya samrāṭen ashoken nirmitam āsīt.
राष्ट्रियमुद्राचिह्न - अशोकचिह्न.english: The Ashok Emblem was created by Emperor Ashok of ancient India.
Is the national emblem Ashok Emblem important?
Indians proudly carry the national emblem, the Ashok Emblem.
This is a national emblem - ashok.

राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.english: The Ganga is the national river of India.

राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.devanagari: गङ्गा नदी प्राचीन काले पवित्रा मानिता आसीत्।
राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.transliteration: Gaṅgā nadī prāchīn kāle pavittrā mānitā āsīt.
राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.english: The Ganga river was considered sacred in ancient times.

राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.devanagari: किम् गङ्गा सर्वेषां भारतीयानां हृदये प्रियतमा नदी अस्ति?
राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.transliteration: Kim gaṅgā sarveṣāṁ bhāratīyānāṁ hṛdaye priyatamā nadī asti?
राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.english: Is the Ganga the most beloved river in the hearts of all Indians?

राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.devanagari: भवान् गङ्गानदीं दृष्टवान् अस्ति? हाँ, अहम् तां दृष्टवान् अस्मि।
राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.transliteration: Bhavān gaṅgānadīṁ dṛṣṭavān asti? Hāñ, aham tāṁ dṛṣṭavān asmi.
राष्ट्रियनदी - गङ्गा.english: Have you seen the Ganga river? Yes, I have seen it.
This is a national river - ganga.

राष्ट्रियफल - आम्र.english: The mango is the national fruit of India.
I ate the national fruit, the mango, yesterday.
Is the mango the national fruit?
Hey! Look at the mango, the national fruit.
This is a national fruit - mango.

राष्ट्रियगीत.english: The national song is very beautiful.
Do you know the national song?
We sing the national song every day.

ध्वजस्तम्भ.english: The flag post stands at the king's house.
The flag post was erected yesterday.
Hey, do you see the flag post?

पतङ्ग.english: The butterfly sits on the flower.
Does the butterfly fly in the sky?

पतङ्ग.devanagari: अहं पतङ्गं पश्यामि। त्वं अपि पश्यसि?
पतङ्ग.transliteration: ahaṁ patañgaṁ paśyāmi. tvaṁ api paśyasi?
पतङ्ग.english: I see a butterfly. Do you see it too?

राष्ट्रिीयपशु - व्याघ्र.english: The tiger is the national animal of India.
The tiger used to live in the forests.
Is the tiger the national animal?
Oh! How powerful the tiger is!
This is a national animal - tiger.

राष्ट्रियपुष्प - कमल.english: The lotus is the national flower of India.
The lotus used to grow in water.
Is the lotus the national flower?

राष्ट्रियपुष्प - कमल.devanagari: हे मित्र! कमलम् बहु सुन्दरम् अस्ति न?
राष्ट्रियपुष्प - कमल.transliteration: he mitra! kamalam bahu sundaraṁ asti na?
राष्ट्रियपुष्प - कमल.english: Hey friend! The lotus is very beautiful, isn't it?
This is a national flower - lotus.

राष्ट्रियगान.english: I have sung the national song.
Do you listen to the national song?
Hey, let's all sing the national song together.

भारत.devanagari: भारतम् अस्माकं देशः। India is our country.

भारत.english: Friend! Look at India. The country is wonderful.
India was inhabited by ancient civilizations.

चित्रपतङ्ग.devanagari: चित्रपतङ्गः विविधै वर्णैः डयते। Butterfly flies colorfully.

चित्रपतङ्ग.english: The butterfly sits on the flower.
The butterfly flew in the garden.
Wow! How beautiful the butterfly is!

राष्ट्रियपक्षिन् - मयूर.english: The peacock is India's national bird.
The peacock was seen in the forest yesterday.
Is the peacock not the national bird?
Hey! Look at the peacock's beautiful tail.
This is a national bird - peacock.

पुत्तिका.devanagari: पुत्तिकायाः पीडा अस्ति। Trouble with Termites.

पुत्तिका.english: The termites were eating the wood.

ध्वजप्रसारणरज्जु.english: The flag tying rope is strong.
The soldier tied the flag rope.
Did the flag tying rope break?
Hey! Bring the flag tying rope.
This is a flag tieing rope.

राष्ट्रियवृक्ष - वटवृक्ष.english: The banyan tree is the national tree of India.

राष्ट्रियवृक्ष - वटवृक्ष.devanagari: अयं वटवृक्षः बहु वर्षसहस्राणि जीवति स्म।
राष्ट्रियवृक्ष - वटवृक्ष.transliteration: ayaṁ vaṭavṛkṣaḥ bahu varsasahasrāṇi jīvati sma.
राष्ट्रियवृक्ष - वटवृक्ष.english: This banyan tree lived for many thousands of years.
Is the banyan tree the national tree?

राष्ट्रियवृक्ष - वटवृक्ष.devanagari: भोः! वटवृक्षः कस्य देशस्य राष्ट्रियवृक्षः भवति?
राष्ट्रियवृक्ष - वटवृक्ष.transliteration: bhoḥ! vaṭavṛkṣaḥ kasy deśasy rāṣṭriyavṛkṣaḥ bhavati?
राष्ट्रियवृक्ष - वटवृक्ष.english: Hey! Which country's national tree is the banyan tree?
This is a national tree - banyan tree.

राष्ट्रियक्रीडा - यष्टिकन्दुकक्रीडा.english: Indian players won in the national game, hockey.
Is hockey the national game of India?
I want to play the national game, hockey.
This is a national game - hockey.

केसरवर्ण, श्वेतवर्ण, हरितवर्ण, नीलवर्ण.english: The Indian flag is saffron colored.
In the middle of the flag was white color.
Who knows that blue color is in the flag?
Hey! The green color is situated at the bottom of the flag.

केसरवर्ण, श्वेतवर्ण, हरितवर्ण, नीलवर्ण.devanagari: अयं केसरवर्णः, श्वेतवर्णः, हरितवर्णः, नीलवर्णः अस्ति।
केसरवर्ण, श्वेतवर्ण, हरितवर्ण, नीलवर्ण.english: This is a national flag colors.

शलभ.devanagari: अत्र शलभाः सन्ति। There are grasshoppers here.

पिपीलिका.devanagari: पिपीलिका शर्करां प्रति गच्छति। Ant goes towards sugar.

पिपीलिका.english: The ant moves on the ground.
Hey, one ant is coming here.

स्वज्योति.english: The firefly is seen at night.
The firefly wandered in the forest.

वृश्चिक.english: The scorpion was in the house.
The scorpion is dangerous, come here!

वरटा.english: Hey! The wasp is coming! Be careful.

ऊर्णनाभ.devanagari: ऊर्णनाभः जालं निर्माति। Spider builds web.

ऊर्णनाभ.english: The spider lives on the tree.
Hey spider! Where are you going?

लूता.devanagari: लूता जालं निर्माति। Spider builds web.

लूता.english: The spider is visible at night.
I do not like the spider.

शतपदी.devanagari: मम वाटिकायां शतपदी अस्ति। There is centipede in my garden.

शतपदी.english: The centipede moves on the ground.
I saw the centipede in the house.
Hey! Do you have a centipede?

मक्षिका.devanagari: मधुरं परितः मक्षिकाः सन्ति। Flies are all around sweet.

मक्षिका.english: The fly goes into the air.
The fly was sitting on the food.
The flies are bothersome, aren't they?

तैलप.devanagari: तैलपः पाकशालायाम् अस्ति। Cockroach is in the kitchen.

तैलप.english: The cockroach eats food at night.
Hey friend! There was a cockroach in the house.

मधुमक्षिका.devanagari: मधुुमक्षिका मधुसङ्ग्रहणं करोति। Honey bee collects the honey.

मधुमक्षिका.english: The honey bee lives on the flower.
Whose friend is the honey bee?
The honey bee built a home.
Oh! The honey bee is coming, be careful!

तन्तुनाभ.devanagari: तन्तुनाभः जालं निर्माति। Spider builds web.

तन्तुनाभ.english: The spider lives in a tree.

तन्तुनाभ.devanagari: तन्तुनाभः कुत्र गच्छति? वह जालं स्पृशति।
तन्तुनाभ.transliteration: tantunaabhah kutra gachhati? vah jālaṁ spṛshati.
तन्तुनाभ.english: Where does the spider go? It touches the web.

तृणजलायुका.devanagari: तृणजलायका सस्यानि नाशयति। Caterpillar spoils plants.

तृणजलायुका.english: The caterpillar eats on the leaves.
The caterpillar was on the tree.
Is the caterpillar green in color?

तृणजलायुका.devanagari: अरे! तृणजलायुका इहत्र दृश्यते। हरिता इयम्।
तृणजलायुका.transliteration: are! tṛṇajalāyukā ihattra dṛśyate. haritā iyam.
तृणजलायुका.english: Hey! The caterpillar is seen here. It is green.

यूका.english: The louse was on my body.
Is the louse in your hair?
The child will cry from fear of the louse.

मशक.devanagari: मशकानां पीडा असहनीया रात्रौ। Could not tolerate mosquitoes in the night.

कीट.devanagari: कीटाः अशद्धस्थलेषु भवन्ति। Worms are seen in unclean areas.

कीट.english: The insect sits on the flower.
The worm was on the tree.
Oh! An insect came into my food.

हार.devanagari: नर्तक्यः हाराः धरन्ति। Dancers are wearing long necklaces.

हार.english: The king's long necklace is beautiful.
The goddess wore the long necklace.
Do you see the long necklace?

पुष्पहार.devanagari: पुष्पहारः पुष्पैः रचितः।  Flower-garland is made with flowers.

पुष्पहार.english: The deity wears a flower garland.
The girl made a flower garland.
Do you see the flower garland?

भ्रमर.devanagari: भ्रमरः शब्दं करोति। Bee makes sound.

भ्रमर.english: The bee sits on the flower.
The bee is coming! Go far away.

भृङ्ग.english: The bee dwells on the flower.

भृङ्ग.devanagari: भृङ्गः सुन्दरः अस्ति। हाँ, भृङ्गः अत्यन्तं सुन्दरः अस्ति।
भृङ्ग.transliteration: bhṛṅgaḥ sundaraḥ asti. Hāñ, bhṛṅgaḥ atyantaṁ sundaraḥ asti.
भृङ्ग.english: The bee is beautiful. Yes, the bee is very beautiful.

नासाभरण.devanagari: सा नासाभरणं धरति। She's wearing nose-ring.

नासाभरण.english: Whose nose-ring is made of gold?
Where did you buy the nose-ring?

ताटङ्क.devanagari: ताटङ्कः रजतमयम् अस्ति। Earring top is silver.

ताटङ्क.english: The earring top was made of gold.
Who is wearing the earring top?

ताटङ्क.devanagari: भद्रे, एषः ताटङ्कः तव वा अस्ति?
ताटङ्क.transliteration: bhadre, eṣaḥ tāṭaṅkaḥ tava vā asti?
ताटङ्क.english: Dear lady, is this earring top yours?

कण्ठभूषा.english: She went to buy a necklace.

मत्कुण.devanagari: मत्कुणः कुक्कुरे अस्ति। Flea is on the dog.

मत्कुण.english: A flea does not exist on a human's body.
I saw a flea on the bed.
Was the flea in the animal's ear?

कर्णलोलक.devanagari: कर्णलोलकं सुवर्णमयम् अस्ति। Earring is golden.

कर्णलोलक.english: Where do you wish to buy an earring?

मत्कोटक.devanagari: मत्कोटकेन पीडा अस्ति। Trouble with Termites.

मत्कोटक.english: The termites were eating the wood.
Is there a termite in your house?

ग्रैवेयक.devanagari: नर्तनार्थं ग्रैवेयकं धर्तव्य्म्। Choker is to be worn for dance.

ग्रैवेयक.english: The princess wears a beautiful choker.

ग्रैवेयक.devanagari: इह ग्रैवेयकं पश्य! किं सुन्दरं नास्ति?
ग्रैवेयक.transliteration: Iha graiiveyakam paśya! Kim sundaram nāsti?
ग्रैवेयक.english: Look at this choker! Isn't it beautiful?

पुष्पमाला.devanagari: पुष्पमाला पुष्पैः रचितः।  Flower-garland is made with flowers.

पुष्पमाला.english: The goddess wears a flower garland.
The girl made a flower garland.
Who made the fragrant flower garland?

पुष्पमाला.devanagari: भो! इयं पुष्पमाला कतি रूप्यकाणां मूल्येन विक्रीयते?
पुष्पमाला.transliteration: Bho! Iyaṃ puṣpamālā kati rūpyakāṇāṃ mūlyena vikriyate?
पुष्पमाला.english: Hello! For how many rupees is this flower garland being sold?

कृमि.devanagari: कृमयः अशद्धस्थलेषु भवन्ति। Worms are seen in unclean areas.

कृमि.english: The worm lives inside the fruit.
During the rainy season, there were many worms.
Is there a worm on this leaf?
Oh! A worm is crawling on my foot.

मौक्तिकहार.devanagari: मौक्तिकहारः मुक्तया रचितः।  Pearl-necklace is made with pearls.

मौक्तिकहार.english: The princess wears a beautiful pearl necklace.
The queen wore the pearl necklace yesterday.
Do you see this pearl necklace?

मौक्तिकहार.devanagari: अयं मौक्तिकहारः कतिमूल्यः अस्ति? - अत्यन्तं महार्हः।
मौक्तिकहार.transliteration: ayam mauktikahārah katimūlyah asti? - atyantam mahārhah.
मौक्तिकहार.english: What is the price of this pearl necklace? - It is very expensive.

वज्र.devanagari: आभरणम् वज्र-युक्तम् अस्ति।  Jewelry is (made with) diamond.

हीरक.devanagari: अङ्गुलीयकं हीरक-युक्तम् अस्ति। Ring is (made with) diamond.

हीरक.english: The king wants to buy a diamond.
Where did this diamond come from?

वृष.english: The bull is stronger than the elephant.
The bull was grazing in the field.
Does the bull live in your house?

वृष.devanagari: भोः! वृषः कुत्र अस्ति? यहाँ आ।
वृष.transliteration: bhoḥ! vṛṣaḥ kutra asti? yahāñ ā.
वृष.english: Hey! Where is the bull? Come here.

आभरणम्.devanagari: आभरणम् सुवर्णमयं रजतमयं वा भवति। Jewelry is made with gold or silver.
भवतु! मम आभरणम् सुन्दरम् अत्र अस्ति।
आभरणम्.transliteration: bhavatu! mama ābharaṇam sundaram atra asti.
आभरणम्.english: Indeed! My beautiful jewelry is here.

तायक.devanagari: स: तायकं प्रतिदिनं धरति। He wears taaviz everyday.

तायक.english: The girl wears a taaviz around her neck.
The mother bought a taaviz for her son.

नूपुर.devanagari: बालिका नूपुर-ध्वन्या मोदते। Girl is pleased with anklet-sounds.

नूपुर.english: The woman wears a golden anklet.
The princess wore a jeweled anklet.

नूपुर.devanagari: भद्रे! भवती नूपुरम् कथं पसन्दं करोति?
नूपुर.transliteration: bhadre! bhavatī nūpuram kathaṃ pasandaṃ karoti?
नूपुर.english: Madam! How do you like the anklet?

वलय.devanagari: महिलायै वलयानि रोचन्ते। Women like bangles.
मम वलयम् कहाँ अस्ति? - इह अस्ति।
वलय.transliteration: Mam vlyam kahāñ asti? - Ih asti.
वलय.english: Where is my bangle? - It is here.

कौशल.devanagari: तस्य गणिते कौशलम् अस्ति। He has math skill.

कौशल.english: The king's skill in battle was famous.
How much skill do you have in craftsmanship?
Oh, his skill in speaking is wonderful!
The student acquired skill in sports.

वेणिग्रन्थि.devanagari: नर्तकी वेणिग्रन्थिं धरति। Dancer is wearing hair-tassle.

वेणिग्रन्थि.english: The princess wears a beautiful hair-tassel.
The temple maiden made a hair-tassel yesterday.

वेणिग्रन्थि.devanagari: किं तव वेणिग्रन्थिः सोने की है?
वेणिग्रन्थि.transliteration: kiṁ tav veṇigranthiḥ sone kī hai?
वेणिग्रन्थि.english: Is your hair-tassel made of gold?
Oh! Her hair-tassel is so lovely.

मुक्ता.devanagari: समुद्रे मुक्ताः लभन्ते। Pearls are found in sea.

मुक्ता.english: The queen wore a beautiful pearl.

मुक्ता.devanagari: अयं मुक्ता कहाँ प्राप्ता? इयं शङ्खात् आया।
मुक्ता.transliteration: ayaṃ muktā kahāṁ prāptā? iyaṃ śaṅkhāt āyā.
मुक्ता.english: Where was this pearl obtained? It came from a shell.

अङ्गुलीयक.devanagari: जनाः विविधानि अङ्गुलीयकानि क्रीणन्ति। People buy different kinds of rings.

अङ्गुलीयक.english: His ring was made of gold.

काञ्ची.devanagari: नर्तक्याः काञ्ची शोभते। Dancer's armlet shines.

काञ्ची.english: The princess wears a golden armlet.
This woman's armlet fell on the ground.
Dear lady! What is your armlet like?

तिलक.devanagari: तिलकं बुद्धि-पूजायाः सूचकम्। Bindi is representative of intellect-worship.

तिलक.english: The woman wears a bindi on her forehead.
The girl gave a beautiful bindi to her friend.
Where do you buy the bindi?

तिलक.devanagari: अयं तिलकः रक्तवर्णः खलु। हाँ, अतीव सुन्दरः।
तिलक.transliteration: ayam tilakah raktavarṇah khalu. hāñ, atīva sundarah.
तिलक.english: This bindi is red in color, isn't it? Yes, it is very beautiful.

मणि.devanagari: आभरणम् मणियुक्तम् अस्ति। Jewelry is made with precious stone.

मणि.english: The precious stone fell on the ground.
This precious stone is very beautiful.
Hey! Show me that precious stone.

किङ्किणी.devanagari: नृत्ये किङ्किणीनाम् पूजनं भवति। In dance, ghungroos are worshipped.

किङ्किणी.english: The ghungroo shines on the dancer's feet.

किङ्किणी.devanagari: कल नृत्यने किङ्किणीनां शब्दः मनोरमः आसीत्।
किङ्किणी.transliteration: kala nṛtyane kiṅkiṇīnāṁ śabdaḥ manoramaḥ āsīt.
किङ्किणी.english: Yesterday during the dance, the sound of the ghungroos was delightful.
How many ghungroos are there in this dance hall?

किङ्किणी.devanagari: भो! तव किङ्किणी कुत्र अस्ति? इमां पश्य।
किङ्किणी.transliteration: bho! tava kiṅkiṇī kutra asti? imāṁ paśya.
किङ्किणी.english: Hey! Where is your ghungroo? Look at this one.

यन्त्र.devanagari: कार्यालये यन्त्राणि सन्ति। Machines are in office.

सङ्कलन.english: Is my addition correct or incorrect?

गुणन.devanagari: बालकः गुणनं करोति। The boy is doing multiplication.

गुणन.english: I have learned multiplication. And you?

वचन.devanagari: लेखकः वचनं लिखति। Writer writes the dialog.
अहं वचनं पठामि। त्वं किं कुरुषि?
वचन.transliteration: ahaṃ vacanaṃ pṭhāmi. tvaṃ kiṃ kuruṣi?
वचन.english: I am reading the dialogue. What are you doing?

भाजन.devanagari: भाजनस्य विधिं पाठयतु। Teach the rules of division.

भाजन.english: Was the answer to the division correct?

सूत्रचक्र.devanagari: सूत्रचक्रं कुत्र अस्ति। Where is the spinning wheel.

सूत्रचक्र.english: Rama made thread with the spinning wheel.
Does the woman operate the spinning wheel?
Hey! Bring me the spinning wheel.

कथा.devanagari: नाटकस्य कथा का? What is the plot of the drama?

कथा.english: The subject of this plot is interesting.
I did not like the old plot very much.
How was the end of the plot?
Hey friend! Listen to the plot.

सीवनयन्त्र.devanagari: सीवनयन्त्रेण माता युतकं सीव्यति। Mom stiches the shirt with tailor machine.

सीवनयन्त्र.english: The tailor machine is a very useful machine.
The tailor stitched the cloth with the tailor machine.
Do you know how to use the tailor machine?

सीवनयन्त्र.devanagari: मम सीवनयन्त्रम् खरबिलम् अस्ति। त्वं किम् करिष्यसि?
सीवनयन्त्र.transliteration: Mama sīvanayantram kharabillam asti. Tvam kim karisyasi?
सीवनयन्त्र.english: My tailor machine is broken. What will you do?

पाठ्यपुस्तक.devanagari: प्रथमाकक्ष्यायाः पाठ्यपुस्तकानि कुत्र लभ्यन्ते? Where are the text books for first standard available?

कल्पना.devanagari: चलचित्रे निर्देशकस्य कल्पना उत्तमा। In the movie the director's fiction is good.

कल्पना.english: The child's fiction is very interesting.
The writer wrote a book with old fictions.

कल्पना.devanagari: अरे, एषा कल्पना बहु सुन्दरी वर्तते।
कल्पना.transliteration: Are, esha kalpanā bahu sundarī vartate.
कल्पना.english: Hey, this fiction is very beautiful indeed.

वेमा.devanagari: वस्त्राणि वेमया भवन्ति। Cloths are made with Loom.

वेमा.english: The loom is situated in the workshop.
The loom there was destroyed long ago.
Have you seen the loom in the market?

वेमा.devanagari: भोः! अस्या वेमायाः सहायता अत्र आवश्यकी अस्ति।
वेमा.transliteration: bhoḥ! asyā vemāyāḥ sahāytā atra āvaśyakī asti.
वेमा.english: Hey! The help with this loom is needed here.

वार्ताहर.devanagari: वार्ताहरः वार्तां पठति। Newsreader reads the news.

वार्ताहर.english: The news reader speaks the news every day.
The news reader broadcast the national news yesterday.
Does the news reader inform about international news?

वार्ताहर.devanagari: वार्ताहरः, भवान् कस्य समाचारपत्रस्य कर्मचारी अस्ति?
वार्ताहर.transliteration: vārtāharaḥ, bhavān kasya samāchārapatrasya karmchārī asti?
वार्ताहर.english: News reader, which newspaper's employee are you?

व्यवकलन.devanagari: दशतः पञ्चानां व्यवकलने पञ्च एव शिष्यते। Subtracting 5 from 10, five only remains.

व्यवकलन.english: Subtraction is an important part of mathematics.
The teacher taught the students subtraction.

व्यवकलन.devanagari: भवान् व्यवकलनस्य प्रश्नं समाधातुं शक्नोषि किम्?
व्यवकलन.transliteration: bhavān vyavakalaasya praśnaṁ samādhātuṁ śaknoṣi kim?
व्यवकलन.english: Can you solve this subtraction problem?

व्यवकलन.devanagari: अहं व्यवकलनम् भलीभाँति समजामि। त्वं किम्?
व्यवकलन.transliteration: ahaṁ vyavakalanam bhalībhā̃ti samajāmi. tvaṁ kim?
व्यवकलन.english: I understand subtraction well. What about you?

तैलयन्त्र.devanagari: तैलयन्त्रेण तैलं उद्भवति। Oil is made with oil press.

तैलयन्त्र.english: The oil press is a very valuable machine.
The farmer pressed the sesame seeds with the oil press.
Where do you want to buy an oil press?

तैलयन्त्र.devanagari: अयं तैलयन्त्रः उत्तमः अस्ति। हाँ, सः सर्वोत्तमः यन्त्रः अस्ति।
तैलयन्त्र.transliteration: ayam tailayantrah uttamah asti. hāñ, sah sarvottamah yantrah asti.
तैलयन्त्र.english: This oil press is good. Yes, it is the best machine.

पद्य.devanagari: पद्यम् एकं श्रावय। Tell me a poem.
अहम् एकम् नवम् पद्यम् रचितवान्। किम् भवान् श्रोतुम् इच्छति?
पद्य.transliteration: aham ekam navam padyam racitavan. kim bhavan srotum ichhati?
पद्य.english: I composed a new poem. Would you like to listen?

सम्पादक.devanagari: एषः पत्रिकायाः सम्पादकः अस्ति। He is the editor of the newspaper.

सम्पादक.english: Who is the editor of this journal?

वृत्तपत्रिका.devanagari: अद्य वृत्तपत्रिका न आगता। Today newspaper did not arrive.

वृत्तपत्रिका.english: The newspaper is worth reading every day.

वार्तापत्रिका.devanagari: अद्य वार्तापत्रिका न आगता। Today newspaper did not arrive.

वार्तापत्रिका.english: Do you also read the newspaper?

वार्ता.devanagari: का वार्ता अद्य? What is the news today?

सम्पादिका.devanagari: एषः पत्रिकायाः सम्पादकः अस्ति। He is the editor of the newspaper.

सम्पादिका.english: Does the editor work at the newspaper?

सम्पादिका.devanagari: नमस्ते सम्पादिका! भवती कीदृशं कार्यं करोति?
सम्पादिका.transliteration: namaste sampādiakā! bhavati kidṛsham kāryam karoti?
सम्पादिका.english: Greetings editor! What kind of work do you do?

चैत्र.english: The month of March-April is beautiful.
When does the month of March-April come?
I want to travel in March-April.

मास.devanagari: गतमासे परीक्षा आसीत्। Exam was there in last month.

मास.english: I went to Delhi last month.
In which month is your birthday?

मास.devanagari: भो मित्र! आगामी मासे कुत्र गमिष्यसि?
मास.transliteration: Bho mitra! āgāmī māse kutra gamiṣyasi?
मास.english: Hey friend! Where will you go next month?

कार्त्तिक.english: The month of October-November is cool.
Does rain occur during the October-November month?
When does the October-November month come, sir?

पौष.english: Pausha is the beginning of the winter season.
Last year, snow fell in Pausha.
Sir, what do you do in Pausha?

भाद्रपद.devanagari: भाद्रपदः मासः वर्षस्य अष्टमः मासः अस्ति।
भाद्रपद.transliteration: bhādrapadaḥ māsaḥ varṣasya aṣṭamaḥ māsaḥ asti.
भाद्रपद.english: Bhadrapada is the eighth month of the year.
There was abundant rain in Bhadrapada.
When does the festival occur in Bhadrapada?

भाद्रपद.devanagari: भाद्रपदः आगच्छति, तर्हि वर्षा समाप्ता भविष्यति।
भाद्रपद.transliteration: bhādrapadaḥ āgachhati, tarhi varṣā samāptā bhaviṣyati.
भाद्रपद.english: When Bhadrapada comes, the rains will end.

श्रावण.english: The month of Śrāvaṇa comes in the year.
Last year, the month of Śrāvaṇa was very rainy.
Is the month of Śrāvaṇa hot?

श्रावण.devanagari: श्रावणे कदा वर्षा पतति? प्रायः श्रावणे बहु वर्षा भवति।
श्रावण.transliteration: śrāvaṇe kadā varṣā patati? prāyaḥ śrāvaṇe bahu varṣā bhavati.
श्रावण.english: When does rain fall in Śrāvaṇa? Usually, there is much rain in Śrāvaṇa.

आषाढ.english: The month of Ashadh is the beginning of the rainy season.

आषाढ.devanagari: गते वर्षे आषाढे वर्षा बहुत अभवत्।
आषाढ.transliteration: gate varṣe āṣāḍhe varṣā bahuta abhavat.
आषाढ.english: Last year in Ashadh, there was much rainfall.

आषाढ.devanagari: आषाढे तव कियान्ति दिनानि कार्यस्य आसन्?
आषाढ.transliteration: āṣāḍhe tava kiyānti dināni kāryasya āsan?
आषाढ.english: How many days of work did you have in Ashadh?

आश्विन.english: The month of Ashwin comes in the autumn season.
Last year in Ashwin, there was heavy rainfall.
Will you go to Delhi in the month of Ashwin?

आश्विन.devanagari: आश्विनः मासः अत्यन्तं सुखदः अस्ति, न किम्?
आश्विन.transliteration: āświnaḥ māsaḥ atyantaṁ sukhadaḥ asti, na kim?
आश्विन.english: The month of Ashwin is very pleasant, isn't it?

वैशाख.english: Vaisakha is the beginning of the summer season.
Last year in Vaisakha, there was no rain.

वैशाख.devanagari: किम् इदं वर्षं वैशाखे तव गृहे उष्णता अधिका आसीत्?
वैशाख.transliteration: kim idam varṣam vaiśākhe tava gṛhe uṣṇatā adhikā āsīt?
वैशाख.english: Was it very hot in your house this year during Vaisakha?

वैशाख.devanagari: वैशाखः शीघ्रम् आगच्छति, अतः जलं संचयनीयम्।
वैशाख.transliteration: vaiśākhḥ śīghram āgachhati, atḥ jalam sañcayanīyam.
वैशाख.english: Vaisakha comes soon, so we should store water.

मार्गशीर्ष.english: In the month of Margashirsha, the sun moves towards the south.

मार्गशीर्ष.devanagari: मार्गशीर्षे पिछले वर्षे बहु वर्षा अभवत्।
मार्गशीर्ष.transliteration: mārgarśīrṣe pichle varshe bahu varṣā abhavat.
मार्गशीर्ष.english: In Margashirsha of last year, there was much rain.
What will you do in Margashirsha?

मार्गशीर्ष.devanagari: अहम् मार्गशीर्षे तीर्थयात्रां करिष्यामि। त्वम् अपि आगमिष्यसि किम्?
मार्गशीर्ष.transliteration: aham mārgarśīrṣe tīrthayātrāṃ kariṣyāmi. tvam api āgamiṣyasi kim?
मार्गशीर्ष.english: I will make a pilgrimage in Margashirsha. Will you also come?

आनक.devanagari: एषः आनकः अस्ति। This is drum.

आनक.english: Hey! This drum is beautiful, isn't it?

वीणा.devanagari: वीणा-नादः मधुरं श्रूयते। Veena sounds beautiful.

वीणा.english: I want to learn the veena.
Where did you buy the veena?

गुहा.devanagari: गुहायां सिंहः अस्ति। Lion is in cave.

गुहा.english: The boy played in the cave.
Was there water in the cave?

गुहा.devanagari: अयं गुहा बहु रमणीया अस्ति इति मन्ये।
गुहा.transliteration: ayaṃ guhā bahu ramaṇīyā asti iti manye.
गुहा.english: I think this cave is very beautiful.

कांस्यताल.devanagari: सा कांस्यतालं सम्यक् वादयति। She plays cymbals well.

कांस्यताल.english: The cymbals make a sweet sound.
Do you want to play the cymbals?

डिण्डिम.english: The drum makes a sweet sound.
Who is holding the drum in their hands?

डिण्डिम.devanagari: भो! डिण्डिमः कुत्र अस्ति? इह आनय।
डिण्डिम.transliteration: Bho! Diṇḍimaḥ kutra asti? Iha ānay.
डिण्डिम.english: Hey! Where is the drum? Bring it here.

राशि.devanagari: आकाशे राशिः अस्ति। Constellation is in the sky.

राशि.english: Aries constellation is the first constellation.
Taurus constellation was the second constellation.
Is Leo constellation the fifth constellation?
Hey! Do you know about Libra constellation?

हार्मोनियम्.devanagari: हार्मोनिय-वादनं वादयितुं जानातु। Learn to play Harmonium.

हार्मोनियम्.english: Playing the harmonium is very beautiful.
Please, show me the harmonium, sir.

ऊर्ध्वक.devanagari: ऊर्ध्वक-कक्ष्या कुत्र अस्ति ? Where is the Tabla-class?

ऊर्ध्वक.english: Do you want to play the tabla?

ऊर्ध्वक.devanagari: मम ऊर्ध्वकः नूतनः अस्ति। भवान् श्रोतुं शक्नोति किम्?
ऊर्ध्वक.transliteration: mama ūrdhvakaḥ nūtanaḥ asti. bhavān śrotuṁ śaknoti kim?
ऊर्ध्वक.english: My tabla is new. Can you listen to it?

मृदङ्ग.devanagari: सः मृदङ्गं वादयति। He is playing Mrudanagam.

मृदङ्ग.english: The mrudanga is a musical instrument.
Do you want to play the mrudanga?
I really like the sound of the mrudanga.

माघ.english: The month of Magha is cold.
I enjoy a warm room in Magha.

फाल्गुन.english: The month of Phalguna is the time of spring.

फाल्गुन.devanagari: गते वर्षे फाल्गुने पुष्पाः पूर्णरूपेण विकसिताः आसन्।
फाल्गुन.transliteration: gate varṣe phālgune puṣpāḥ pūrṇarūpeṇa vikasitāḥ āsan.
फाल्गुन.english: In the past year, during Phalguna, the flowers bloomed fully.
What do you do in the month of Phalguna?

फाल्गुन.devanagari: हे मित्र! फाल्गुनः आगच्छति, तत्र गच्छामः।
फाल्गुन.transliteration: he mitra! phālgunaḥ āgacchati, tatra gacchāmaḥ.
फाल्गुन.english: Hey friend! Phalguna is coming, let's go there.

ढक्का.devanagari: शिवः ढक्कां नवपञ्चवारं वादितवान्। Shiva played double drum 14 times.

ढक्का.english: The musician plays the large drum.

ढक्का.devanagari: मञ्चे ढक्कायाः शब्दः अतीव रमणीयः आसीत्।
ढक्का.transliteration: Mañche ḍhakkāyāḥ śabdaḥ atīva ramaṇīyaḥ āsīt.
ढक्का.english: On the stage, the sound of the large drum was very pleasant.
Can you play the large drum?

ढक्का.devanagari: अरे, ढक्कां मह्यं दत्त्वा मधुरं सङ्गीतं कुरु।
ढक्का.transliteration: Are, ḍhakkāṁ mahyaṁ dattvā madhuraṁ saṅgītaṁ kuru.
ढक्का.english: Hey, give me the large drum and play sweet music.

नागस्वर.devanagari: नागस्वरस्य ध्वनिं वर्धयतु। Increase sound of Nagaswara

नागस्वर.english: The Nagaswarah plays a sweet melody.
The Nagaswarah was played in the temple.
How beautiful is the sound of the Nagaswarah!

तम्बूरवाद्य.devanagari: तम्बूरवाद्यम् स्वर-शिक्षणे महत् उपकारकम्। Tanpura is crucial for learning swara.

तम्बूरवाद्य.english: The musician always plays the tanpura.

तम्बूरवाद्य.devanagari: किम् भवान् तम्बूरवाद्यस्य ध्वनिम् श्रोतुम् इच्छति?
तम्बूरवाद्य.transliteration: kim bhavān tambūravādhyasya dhvanim śrotum ichhati?
तम्बूरवाद्य.english: Do you want to hear the sound of the tanpura?

कानन.devanagari: कानने वृक्षाः सन्ति। There are trees in the forest.

कानन.english: Did you live in the forest?

अरण्य.devanagari: रामः अरण्यं अगच्छत्। Ram went to forest.

अरण्य.english: Hey! Don't go to the forest.

वन.devanagari: रामः वनं गतवान्। Rama went to forest.
वने पशवः भवन्ति। हाँ, बहवः पशवः।
वन.transliteration: vane paśavḥ bhavanti. hāñ, bahavaḥ paśavḥ.
वन.english: Are there animals in the forest? Yes, many animals.

विद्युत्.devanagari: अहो! विद्युत् गर्जति च वर्षति च।
विद्युत्.transliteration: aho! vidyut garjati ca varṣati ca.
विद्युत्.english: Oh! Lightning thunders and rains together.

पर्वत.devanagari: पर्वते साधकाः वसन्ति। In mountains, yoga-practioners live.

पर्वत.english: The mountain, the Himalaya, was famous.
I saw the mountain. And you?

सरोवर.devanagari: ग्रामे सरोवरः अस्ति। Lake is in the village.

सरोवर.english: The boys drink water from the lake.

वापी.devanagari: देवालये वापी अस्ति। There is a pond in temple.

वापी.english: The pond is full of water.
The girl plays near the pond.

सौदामिनी.english: Oh! How intense the lightning is!

गिरि.devanagari: गिरिः तत्र अस्ति। There is a mountain.

गिरि.english: The high mountain touches the sky.

पारावार.devanagari: पारावारे जलम् अस्ति। Water is in the ocean.

पारावार.english: Sailors navigate the boat in the ocean.
Hey, look at the ocean! How beautiful!

तडाग.devanagari: तङागे मीनाः जीवन्ति। Fishes live in the pond.

तडाग.english: Lotus flowers bloomed in the pond.

मरुभूमि.devanagari: मरुभूमिः कुत्र अस्ति? Where is the desert?

मरुभूमि.english: There were no trees in the desert.
Did you go to the desert?
I want to travel through the desert.

महासागर.devanagari: रामसेना महासागरं तरति। Rama's army crosses ocean.

महासागर.english: The sailors sail a boat in the ocean.
Is the ocean filled with water?

द्वीप.english: Island is in the middle of sea.
There were forests on the island.

द्वीप.devanagari: भोः, द्वीपः कुत्र अस्ति? अत्र च मानुषाः निवसन्ति।
द्वीप.transliteration: bhoh, dvīpah kutra asti? atra ch mānushāh nivasanti.
द्वीप.english: Hey, where is the island? Do people live here too?

चूर्णखण्ड.devanagari: वानाराः महासागरे चूर्णखण्डान् क्षिपन्ति। Monkeys throw pebbles in ocean.

चूर्णखण्ड.english: The boy sees a pebble on the path.

चूर्णखण्ड.devanagari: सः चूर्णखण्डं हस्तে गृहीत्वा खेलितुम् आरब्धः।
चूर्णखण्ड.transliteration: saḥ chūrṇakhṇḍaṃ haste gṛhītvā khélitum ārabdhaḥ।
चूर्णखण्ड.english: He picked up a pebble in his hand and began to play.

चूर्णखण्ड.devanagari: किं त्वं इदं चूर्णखण्डं मयस्य दातुम् इच्छसि?
चूर्णखण्ड.transliteration: kiṃ tvã idaṃ chūrṇakhṇḍaṃ mayasya dātum ichássi?
चूर्णखण्ड.english: Do you wish to give me this pebble?

चूर्णखण्ड.devanagari: अरे! एष चूर्णखण्डः कतिचनं प्रस्तरखण्डान् भेदयिष्यति।
चूर्णखण्ड.transliteration: are! éṣa chūrṇakhṇḍaḥ katicanaṃ prastarakháṇḍān bhédayiṣyati।
चूर्णखण्ड.english: Hey! This pebble will break several stones.

शिला.devanagari: शिला महती अस्ति। The rock is big.

शिला.english: The rock fell on the ground.

वसन्त.devanagari: वसन्तकालः सर्वेभ्यः रोचते। Everyone likes spring.

भुवन.english: Is the earth full of rain?
The earth is the shelter of all beings.

अब्धि.devanagari: अब्धिः अत्र अस्ति। Pond is here.

अब्धि.english: There were fish in the pond.
The pond is beautiful, isn't it?

पृथ्वी.devanagari: पृथ्वी सुन्दरी अस्ति। Earth is beautiful.

पृथ्वी.english: Earth was the home of humans.
Is Earth the best planet in the solar system?
Hey, whose dear Earth was this?

भूमि.devanagari: भूमौ किं नास्ति? What is not there in earth?

भूमि.english: Water was necessary for the earth.

भूमि.devanagari: भूमिः हरिता वर्तते। आम्, भूमिः हरिता अस्ति।
भूमि.transliteration: bhūmiḥ haritā vartate. ām, bhūmiḥ haritā asti.
भूमि.english: The earth becomes green. Yes, the earth is green.

वेला.devanagari: वेलायां रम्यं वातावरणं अस्ति। Good weather at seashore.

वेला.english: I went to the seashore yesterday.
Whose seashore is near the ocean?
When will you take a walk at the seashore?

कन्दर/कन्दरी,कन्दरा/कन्दर.english: A river flows through the valley.
Do people live in the valley?

कन्दर/कन्दरी,कन्दरा/कन्दर.devanagari: अहम् कन्दरीम् दृष्टवान्। तत्र वनम् आसीत्।
कन्दर/कन्दरी,कन्दरा/कन्दर.transliteration: aham kandarīm dṛṣṭavān. tatra vanam āsīt.
कन्दर/कन्दरी,कन्दरा/कन्दर.english: I saw the valley. There was a forest there.

वृष्टि.devanagari: अद्य वृष्टिः भवति। Today it will rain.

वृष्टि.english: Hey! The rain is starting. Take an umbrella.

सुरङ्गा.devanagari: सुरङ्गायां चोराः धावन्ति। Thieves run in the tunnel.

सुरङ्गा.english: The men went into the tunnel.

सुरङ्गा.devanagari: अहं सुरङ्गायां भयं अनुभवामि। त्वं किम्?
सुरङ्गा.transliteration: ahaṁ surangāyāṁ bhayaṁ anubhavāmi. tvaṁ kim?
सुरङ्गा.english: I feel fear in the tunnel. What about you?

शिखर.devanagari: शिखरस्य आरोहणं करोति बालकः। Boy claims the mountain peak.

शिखर.english: The mountain peak is covered with clouds.
Snow fell on the mountain peak.

शिखर.devanagari: किं त्वं शिखरस्य शीर्षे गतवान् अस्ि?
शिखर.transliteration: kiṃ tvāṃ śikharasya śīrṣe gatavān asi?
शिखर.english: Did you go to the top of the peak?
I see the peak. How beautiful!

समुद्रतीर.devanagari: हनुमान् समुद्रतीरं पश्यति। Hanuman sees seashore.

समुद्रतीर.english: The children play on the seashore.
Do you live on the seashore?

समुद्रतीर.devanagari: अहम् समुद्रतीरम् प्रेम करामि। त्वम् अपि?
समुद्रतीर.transliteration: aham samudratīram prema karāmi. tvam api?
समुद्रतीर.english: I love the seashore. Do you also?

नद.devanagari: नदे जलम् अस्ति। Water is in the river.

नद.english: The river is near the village.

वसुधा.devanagari: वसुधायां सर्वम् अस्ति। All are there in earth.

वसुधा.english: The beauty of the earth was wonderful.

वसुधा.devanagari: भो! वसुधा माता इव पालयति नः।

वसुधा.english: Hey! The earth protects us like a mother.

उर्वारुक.devanagari: उर्वारुकानि वृक्षे सन्ति। Cucumber is in the tree.

कोशातकी.devanagari: बालक: कोशातकीम् इच्छति। Boy likes ridge gourd.

भिण्डीनक.devanagari: भिण्डीनकस्य मूल्यम् अधिकम् अस्ति। Okra's price is too much.

पालङ्ग.devanagari: महिला पालङ्गं कर्तयति । Woman is cutting the turnip.

भिण्डिका.devanagari: पाचक: भिण्डिका: कर्तयति। Cook is cutting ladies fingers.

मूलक.devanagari: भगिनी मूलकेन रोटिकां पचति। Sister is cooking Raddish Parattha.

भिण्डि.devanagari: कृषक: भिण्ड़ी: चिनोति। The farmer is picking up ladies fingers.

चर्भटि.devanagari: अनुजा चर्भटिं खादति। Younger sister is eating cucumber.

कर्कटी.devanagari: तत्र पञ्च करकट्य: सन्ति। 5 cucumbers are there.

वर्तुलक.devanagari: भोजने वर्तुलकस्य व्यञ्जनम् अस्ति। Peas vegetable is there in meal.

सूरण.devanagari: सूरणस्य व्यञ्जनं रुचिकरम्  अस्ति। Elephant yam dish is tasty.

सूरण.english: This is a elephant foot yam.
Where is the elephant foot yam?
One sees the elephant foot yam.
I have a elephant foot yam.

शिग्रु.devanagari: स: शिग्रो: सूपं पिबति। He drinks the drumstick soup.

गोराणी.devanagari: गोराणीशाकं अत्र न लभते। Broad beans vegetables are not available here.

पटोल.devanagari: पटोले बीजानि सन्ति। Seeds are there in pointed gourd.

दलसारिणी.devanagari: सा दलसारिणीं क्रीणाति। She is buying Arvi.

यावानल.devanagari: बालक: यावानलरोटिकां खादति। Boy is eating corn bread.

छत्राक.devanagari: मातामही छत्राकं न खादति। Grand mother does not eat mushroom.

मधुसूदनी.devanagari: पुत्री मधुसूदनीं खादति। Daughter eats beetroot.

कन्दशाक.devanagari: कन्दशाकानि आपणे सन्ति। Kohlrabies are in the shop.

टिडिश.devanagari: स: टिडिशं न इच्छति। He does not like Indian squash.

निम्बुक.devanagari: निम्बुकस्य रुचि: आम्लः भवति। Taste of lemon is sour.

तिन्त्रिणी.devanagari: तिन्त्रिणी पाकशालायाम् अस्ति। Tamarind is in kitchen room.

कदलीकुसुम.devanagari: एकं कदलीकुसुमं आनयतु। Bring a banana flower.

कर्कोट.devanagari: कर्कोटानि भारते लभ्यन्ते। Spiny gourds are available in India.

बिम्बक.devanagari: सा बिम्बकं पचति। She cooks ivy gourd.

लशुन.devanagari: लशुनं मह्यं न रोचते। I don't like garlic.

आर्द्रक.devanagari: आर्द्रके औषधियगुणानि सन्ति। Medicinal qualities are there in ginger.

जम्बीर.devanagari: वृक्षे जम्बीराणि सन्ति। Lemons are in the tree.

पोतकी.devanagari: पोतक्याः वर्ण: हरित:। The color of spinach is green.

खड्गकोष.devanagari: खड्गकोषे खड्गः अस्ति। Sword is in the Sword Sheath.

खेट.devanagari: खेटः योधं रक्षति। Shield protects the army man.

अङ्कुश.devanagari: अङ्कुशः कुत्र? Where is the elephant hook.

वास्तूक.devanagari: वास्तूकः अत्र लभ्यते। Lambs Quarters are available here.

कुन्त.devanagari: व्याधः कुन्तं क्षिपति। Hunter throws the spear.

भुशुण्डी.devanagari: भुशुण्डी आरक्षकस्य समीपे अस्ति। Firearm is with police man.

बाण.devanagari: व्याधः बाणेन हतवान्। Hunter killed with arrow.

प्ररशु.devanagari: परशुना वृक्षं छिनत्ति। He cuts the tree with axe.

तूणीर.devanagari: तूणीरे बाणाः सन्ति। Arrows are in the Quiver.

पालक्या.devanagari: पालक्यायाः वर्ण: हरित:। The color of spinach is green.

शिम्बी.devanagari: शिम्बी अत्र लभ्यते। Legumes are available here.

पालङ्की.devanagari: पालङ्क्या: वर्ण: हरित:। The color of spinach is green.

धनुष्.devanagari: अर्जुनः धनुः धरति। Arjuna wears the bow.

ब्रह्मनाडी.devanagari: असौ ब्रह्मनाडी। That is divine channel.

निगड.english: The offender is restrained with handcuff.

प्रस्फोटक.devanagari: आतङ्कवादिना प्रस्फोटकं स्फोटितम्। Terrorist blasted the bomb.

गोलिकास्त्र.devanagari: गालिकास्त्रे गोलिका अस्ति। Bullet is in the gun.

देवानागरी.devanagari: देवानागरी बह्वीनां भाषानां लिपिः अस्ति। Devanagari is the script for many languages.

युद्धवाहन.devanagari: युद्धवाहनेन सैनिकाः गच्छन्ति। Army men go by tanker.

आयुर्वेद.devanagari: मम भ्राता आयुर्वेदशास्त्रं पठति। My brother studies ayurveda.

अविद्या.devanagari: ज्ञानम् अविद्यां नाशयति। Knowledge kills the ignorance.

अष्टाङ्ग.devanagari: अष्टाङ्गयोगे अष्ट अङ्गानि सन्ति। There are eight limbs in eight-limbed yoga.

गोलिका.devanagari: गालिकास्त्रे गोलिका अस्ति। Bullet is in the gun.

भक्ति.devanagari: योगस्य चतुर्षु प्रकारेषु भक्तिः अपरा। Devotion is one of the four kinds of yoga.

चित्त.devanagari: चित्तस्य उपशमः योगलक्षणम्। Yoga objective is to calm down the mind.

अहिंसा.devanagari: अहिंसा अनुसरणीया। We should follow non-harming.

युद्धनौका.devanagari: युद्धनौका सागरे अस्ति। Navy ship is in the sea water.

मण्डल.devanagari: शुद्धे मण्डले योगः अभ्यसनीयः। Yoga should be practiced in clean circle.

कोष.devanagari: अस्मासु पञ्चमहाकोषाः सन्ति। There are 5 sheaths in us.

ज्ञान.devanagari: ऋषयः ध्यानेन ज्ञानं प्राप्नुवन्। Saints gained knowledge with meditation.

प्राण.devanagari: पञ्च प्राणाः सन्ति। There are 5 life forces.

इडा.devanagari: इडा-नाड्याः अपरं नाम चन्द्रनाडी। Other name of Ida nadi is chandra nadi.

योग.devanagari: योगः अभ्यसनीयः। Yoga must be practiced.

दृष्टि.devanagari: तस्य सुदीर्घा दृष्टिः अस्ति। He has very long vision.

प्राणायाम.devanagari: प्रतिदिनं प्राणायामं करोतु। Do breathing exercises everyday.

जप.devanagari: माता जपं करोति। Mother is muttering.

ॐ.devanagari: दीर्घश्वासेन ओमिति उच्चारय। Utter Ohm with long breath.

प्रज्ञा.devanagari: प्रज्ञया विवेकः जायते। Discrimination happens after the wisdom.

नियम.devanagari: तपः अपि एकः नियमः। Discipline is also one niyama.

मन्त्र.devanagari: पिता प्रातःकाले मन्त्रान् वदति। Father utters the mantras in the morning.

प्रत्याहार.devanagari: इन्द्रियानां प्रत्याहारः करणीयः। Withdrawal of senses must be done/practiced.

निरोध.devanagari: चित्तवृत्तेः निरोधः योगस्य प्रथमं लक्ष्यम्। First aim is to restrict (calm) the whirlpool of mind thoughts.

तप.devanagari: तपः आनन्दाय कल्पते। Penance leads to bliss.

स्वाध्याय.devanagari: पिता स्वाध्यायं करोति। Father is doing self-study.

विवेक.devanagari: प्रज्ञया विवेकः जायते। Discrimination happens after the wisdom.

संस्कार.devanagari: संस्कारबीजनाशः अपि योगस्य परं लक्ष्यम्। The highest objective of the yoga is to destroy the roots of the activators.

यम.devanagari: पञ्चसु यमेषु सत्यमपि एकम्। Truthfulness is one of the 5 yamas.
